            --transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f7fa 0%, #c3cfe2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            color: var(--dark);
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        .app-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr;
            min-height: 100vh;
            max-width: 1600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }

        /* Sol Panel - Kontroller */
        .control-panel {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #2c3e50 0%, #1a252f 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 30px 20px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            height: 100vh;
            border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
        }

        .logo-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent);
        }

        .logo {
            font-size: 2.2em;
            font-weight: 800;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--accent), var(--primary));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .logo i {
            font-size: 1.8em;
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        .logo-subtitle {
            color: #bdc3c7;
            font-size: 0.9em;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        /* Kontrol Grupları */
        .control-group {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border-radius: var(--border-radius);
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .control-group:hover {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
            border-color: var(--accent);
        }

        .control-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
        }

        .control-title {
            font-size: 1.1em;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--accent);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .control-title i {
            font-size: 1.2em;
        }

        .btn-reset {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            border: none;
            color: #bdc3c7;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.8em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .btn-reset:hover {
            background: var(--danger);
            color: white;
        }

        /* Form Elemanları */
        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .form-label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #ecf0f1;
            font-size: 0.9em;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .form-select, .form-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px 15px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            border-radius: 8px;
            color: white;
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.95em;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .form-select:focus, .form-input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--accent);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(78,205,196,0.2);
        }

        .range-group {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .range-value {
            min-width: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.9em;
        }

        /* Butonlar */
        .btn-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-top: 15px;
        }

        .btn {
            padding: 10px 18px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.9em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            flex: 1;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .btn-primary {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: white;
        }

        .btn-primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(102,126,234,0.4);
        }

        .btn-random {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--warning), var(--danger));
            color: white;
        }

        .btn-random:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(254,202,87,0.4);
        }

        .btn-success {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--success), #10ac84);
            color: white;
        }

        /* Sağ Panel - Önizleme ve Kod */
        .preview-panel {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
            height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* Önizleme Alanı */
        .preview-area {
            padding: 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea15 0%, #764ba215 100%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            min-height: 300px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .preview-container {
            max-width: 800px;
            width: 100%;
            padding: 40px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: var(--border-radius);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
            border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .preview-container::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 4px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--accent), var(--success));
        }

        #previewText {
            font-size: 28px;
            line-height: 1.6;
            transition: var(--transition);
            text-align: center;
            padding: 20px;
            min-height: 120px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            word-break: break-word;
        }

        /* Kod Alanı */
        .code-area {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 30px;
            padding: 30px;
            background: #f8f9fa;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        .code-section {
            background: white;
            border-radius: var(--border-radius);
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }

        .code-header {
            background: var(--dark);
            color: white;
            padding: 15px 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
        }

        .code-title {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .code-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .btn-icon {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            border: none;
            color: white;
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .btn-icon:hover {
            background: var(--accent);
        }

        .code-content {
            padding: 20px;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 13px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            background: #1e272e;
            color: #d2dae2;
            height: 300px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-wrap: break-word;
        }

        /* Renk Picker */
        .color-picker-container {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-top: 15px;
        }

        #colorPicker {
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .color-input-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .color-input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: white;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 0.9em;
        }

        /* Yeni Özellikler */
        .advanced-controls {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .checkbox-group {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .checkbox-group input[type="checkbox"] {
            width: 18px;
            height: 18px;
            accent-color: var(--accent);
        }

        .checkbox-group label {
            color: #ecf0f1;
            font-size: 0.9em;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 1200px) {
            .app-container {
                grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
            }
            
            .code-area {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 20px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .app-container {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            
            .control-panel {
                height: auto;
                position: relative;
                max-height: 60vh;
            }
            
            .preview-panel {
                height: auto;
            }
        }

        /* Animasyonlar */
        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        .control-group {
            animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-out;
        }

        /* Scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: var(--accent);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: var(--primary);
        }

        /* Sema Efekti */
        .sema-effect {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .sema-effect.active {
            opacity: 0.3;
            animation: semaRotate 8s linear infinite;
        }

        @keyframes semaRotate {
            0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg); }
            100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); }
        }

        .sema-effect::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, var(--primary), var(--accent), var(--success), var(--warning), var(--primary));
            border-radius: 50%;
            filter: blur(20px);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="app-container">
        <!-- Sol Panel - Kontroller -->
        <div class="control-panel">
            <div class="logo-section">
                <div class="logo">
                    <i class="fas fa-palette"></i>
                    GS RAMS PRO
                </div>
                <div class="logo-subtitle">Profesyonel Tasarım Stüdyosu</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Font Kontrolleri -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="control-header">
                    <div class="control-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-font"></i>
                        Yazı Tipi & Boyut
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetFont()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Font Ailesi</label>
                    <select class="form-select" id="fontSelect">
                        <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
                        <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway (Elegant)</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif">Playfair Display (Classic)</option>
                        <option value="'Noto Sans', sans-serif">Noto Sans (Clean)</option>
                        <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive">Dancing Script (El Yazısı)</option>
                        <option value="'Caveat', cursive">Caveat (Handwriting)</option>
                        <option value="Arial, sans-serif">Arial (Standard)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Font Boyutu: <span id="fontSizeValue">18px</span></label>
                    <div class="range-group">
                        <input type="range" class="form-input" id="fontSize" min="12" max="72" value="18">
                        <span class="range-value" id="fontSizeDisplay">18px</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-group">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomFont()">
                        <i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Rastgele Font
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="applyPreset('modern')">
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i> Modern Preset
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Renk Kontrolleri -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="control-header">
                    <div class="control-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-fill-drip"></i>
                        Renk & Dolgu
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetColor()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="color-picker-container">
                    <div id="colorPicker"></div>
                    <div class="color-input-group">
                        <input type="text" class="color-input" id="colorInput" value="#2c3e50">
                        <button class="btn-icon" onclick="copyColor()" title="Renk Kodu Kopyala">
                            <i class="fas fa-copy"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-group">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomColor()">
                        <i class="fas fa-random"></i> Rastgele Renk
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="gradientMode()">
                        <i class="fas fa-gradient"></i> Gradient Modu
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Yazı Stilleri -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="control-header">
                    <div class="control-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-text-height"></i>
                        Yazı Stilleri
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetStyles()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="advanced-controls">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Kalınlık</label>
                        <select class="form-select" id="fontWeight">
                            <option value="300">İnce (300)</option>
                            <option value="400">Normal (400)</option>
                            <option value="500">Orta (500)</option>
                            <option value="600">Yarı Kalın (600)</option>
                            <option value="700">Kalın (700)</option>
                            <option value="800">Çok Kalın (800)</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Stil</label>
                        <select class="form-select" id="fontStyle">
                            <option value="normal">Normal</option>
                            <option value="italic">İtalik</option>
                            <option value="oblique">Eğik</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Harf Aralığı: <span id="letterSpacingValue">0px</span></label>
                    <input type="range" class="form-input" id="letterSpacing" min="-2" max="10" value="0" step="0.1">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Satır Yüksekliği: <span id="lineHeightValue">1.6</span></label>
                    <input type="range" class="form-input" id="lineHeight" min="1" max="3" value="1.6" step="0.1">
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Efektler -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="control-header">
                    <div class="control-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-magic"></i>
                        Efektler
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetEffects()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="advanced-controls">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Gölge</label>
                        <select class="form-select" id="shadowType">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="soft">Yumuşak</option>
                            <option value="hard">Sert</option>
                            <option value="glow">Parlaklık</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Border</label>
                        <select class="form-select" id="borderType">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="solid">Düz</option>
                            <option value="gradient">Gradient</option>
                            <option value="dashed">Kesikli</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="checkbox-group">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="textShadow" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <label for="textShadow">Metin Gölgesi</label>
                </div>
                <div class="checkbox-group">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="textStroke" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <label for="textStroke">Metin Konturu</label>
                </div>
                <div class="checkbox-group">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="textGradient" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <label for="textGradient">Gradient Yazı</label>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Kaydet ve Paylaş -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="control-header">
                    <div class="control-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-share-alt"></i>
                        Dışa Aktar
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-group">
                    <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="saveDesign()">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Tasarımı Kaydet
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="shareDesign()">
                        <i class="fas fa-share"></i> Paylaş
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-group">
                    <button class="btn" onclick="exportPNG()" style="background: var(--warning); color: white;">
                        <i class="fas fa-image"></i> PNG İndir
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn" onclick="exportSVG()" style="background: var(--success); color: white;">
                        <i class="fas fa-code"></i> SVG İndir
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Sağ Panel - Önizleme ve Kod -->
        <div class="preview-panel">
            <!-- Önizleme Alanı -->
            <div class="preview-area">
                <div class="preview-container">
                    <div class="sema-effect" id="semaEffect"></div>
                    <div id="previewText">
                        🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile profesyonel tasarımlar oluşturun!<br>
                        Türk gösterisi ve modern sema efektleri sizi bekliyor.
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Kod Alanı -->
            <div class="code-area">
                <!-- HTML Kodu -->
                <div class="code-section">
                    <div class="code-header">
                        <div class="code-title">
                            <i class="fab fa-html5"></i>
                            HTML Çıktısı
                        </div>
                        <div class="code-actions">
                            <button class="btn-icon" onclick="copyCode('html')" title="Kopyala">
                                <i class="fas fa-copy"></i>
                            </button>
                            <button class="btn-icon" onclick="downloadHTML()" title="İndir">
                                <i class="fas fa-download"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="code-content" id="htmlOutput">
&lt;!-- GS Rams Pro Tasarım Çıktısı --&gt;
&lt;div class="gs-rams-text"&gt;
    🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile profesyonel tasarımlar oluşturun!&lt;br&gt;
    Türk gösterisi ve modern sema efektleri sizi bekliyor.
&lt;/div&gt;
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- CSS Kodu -->
                <div class="code-section">
                    <div class="code-header">
                        <div class="code-title">
                            <i class="fab fa-css3-alt"></i>
                            CSS Çıktısı
                        </div>
                        <div class="code-actions">
                            <button class="btn-icon" onclick="copyCode('css')" title="Kopyala">
                                <i class="fas fa-copy"></i>
                            </button>
                            <button class="btn-icon" onclick="downloadCSS()" title="İndir">
                                <i class="fas fa-download"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="code-content" id="cssOutput">
/* GS Rams Pro CSS Çıktısı */
.gs-rams-text {
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #2c3e50;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    letter-spacing: 0px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    text-align: center;
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 20px;
}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Renk Picker Başlatma
        const colorPicker = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPicker", {
            width: 180,
            color: "#2c3e50",
            layout: [
                { 
                    component: iro.ui.Wheel,
                    options: {}
                },
                { 
                    component: iro.ui.Slider,
                    options: {
                        sliderType: 'value'
                    }
                }
            ]
        });

        // Değişkenler
        let currentDesign = {
            fontFamily: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
            fontSize: 28,
            color: "#2c3e50",
            fontWeight: "400",
            fontStyle: "normal",
            letterSpacing: 0,
            lineHeight: 1.6,
            textShadow: false,
            textStroke: false,
            textGradient: false,
            shadowType: "none",
            borderType: "none"
        };

        // Sayfa Yüklendiğinde
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            initControls();
            updatePreview();
            updateCodeOutput();
            
            // Range değerlerini sync et
            syncRangeValues();
            
            // Renk picker event
            colorPicker.on('color:change', function(color) {
                document.getElementById('colorInput').value = color.hexString;
                updatePreview();
            });
            
            // Input event'leri
            document.getElementById('colorInput').addEventListener('input', function() {
                colorPicker.color.hexString = this.value;
                updatePreview();
            });
        });

        function initControls() {
            // Tüm kontroller için event listener ekle
            const controls = [
                'fontSelect', 'fontSize', 'fontWeight', 'fontStyle',
                'letterSpacing', 'lineHeight', 'shadowType', 'borderType',
                'textShadow', 'textStroke', 'textGradient'
            ];
            
            controls.forEach(id => {
                const element = document.getElementById(id);
                if (element) {
                    element.addEventListener('input', updatePreview);
                    element.addEventListener('change', updatePreview);
                }
            });
        }

        function syncRangeValues() {
            const ranges = [
                { id: 'fontSize', display: 'fontSizeDisplay', suffix: 'px' },
                { id: 'letterSpacing', display: 'letterSpacingValue', suffix: 'px' },
                { id: 'lineHeight', display: 'lineHeightValue', suffix: '' }
            ];
            
            ranges.forEach(range => {
                const slider = document.getElementById(range.id);
                const display = document.getElementById(range.display);
                
                if (slider && display) {
                    // İlk değeri ayarla
                    display.textContent = slider.value + range.suffix;
                    
                    // Değişiklikleri takip et
                    slider.addEventListener('input', function() {
                        display.textContent = this.value + range.suffix;
                    });
                }
            });
        }

        function updatePreview() {
            const preview = document.getElementById('previewText');
            
            // Temel stiller
            preview.style.fontFamily = document.getElementById('fontSelect').value;
            preview.style.fontSize = document.getElementById('fontSize').value + 'px';
            preview.style.color = document.getElementById('colorInput').value;
            preview.style.fontWeight = document.getElementById('fontWeight').value;
            preview.style.fontStyle = document.getElementById('fontStyle').value;
            preview.style.letterSpacing = document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value + 'px';
            preview.style.lineHeight = document.getElementById('lineHeight').value;
            
            // Efektler
            applyEffects(preview);
            
            // Sema efekti
            activateSemaEffect();
            
            // Kod çıktısını güncelle
            updateCodeOutput();
            
            // Tasarımı kaydet
            saveCurrentDesign();
        }

        function applyEffects(element) {
            // Gölge efekti
            const shadowType = document.getElementById('shadowType').value;
            switch(shadowType) {
                case 'soft':
                    element.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
                    break;
                case 'hard':
                    element.style.textShadow = '3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
                    break;
                case 'glow':
                    element.style.textShadow = '0 0 20px ' + document.getElementById('colorInput').value;
                    break;
                default:
                    element.style.textShadow = 'none';
            }
            
            // Border efekti
            const borderType = document.getElementById('borderType').value;
            switch(borderType) {
                case 'solid':
                    element.style.border = '2px solid ' + document.getElementById('colorInput').value;
                    element.style.padding = '15px';
                    element.style.borderRadius = '8px';
                    break;
                case 'gradient':
                    element.style.border = '3px solid transparent';
                    element.style.backgroundClip = 'padding-box, border-box';
                    element.style.backgroundOrigin = 'padding-box, border-box';
                    element.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(white, white), linear-gradient(45deg, ${document.getElementById('colorInput').value}, #4ecdc4)`;
                    element.style.padding = '15px';
                    element.style.borderRadius = '8px';
                    break;
                case 'dashed':
                    element.style.border = '2px dashed ' + document.getElementById('colorInput').value;
                    element.style.padding = '15px';
                    element.style.borderRadius = '8px';
                    break;
                default:
                    element.style.border = 'none';
                    element.style.padding = '0';
            }
            
            // Checkbox efektleri
            if (document.getElementById('textShadow').checked) {
                element.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
            }
            
            if (document.getElementById('textStroke').checked) {
                element.style.webkitTextStroke = '1px white';
                element.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
            }
            
            if (document.getElementById('textGradient').checked) {
                element.style.background = `linear-gradient(45deg, ${document.getElementById('colorInput').value}, #4ecdc4)`;
                element.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
                element.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
            }
        }

        function activateSemaEffect() {
            const sema = document.getElementById('semaEffect');
            sema.classList.add('active');
            setTimeout(() => {
                sema.classList.remove('active');
            }, 1000);
        }

        function updateCodeOutput() {
            const fontFamily = document.getElementById('fontSelect').value;
            const fontSize = document.getElementById('fontSize').value + 'px';
            const color = document.getElementById('colorInput').value;
            const fontWeight = document.getElementById('fontWeight').value;
            const fontStyle = document.getElementById('fontStyle').value;
            const letterSpacing = document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value + 'px';
            const lineHeight = document.getElementById('lineHeight').value;
            
            // CSS çıktısı
            let cssCode = `/* GS Rams Pro CSS Çıktısı */
.gs-rams-text {
    font-family: ${fontFamily};
    font-size: ${fontSize};
    color: ${color};
    font-weight: ${fontWeight};
    font-style: ${fontStyle};
    letter-spacing: ${letterSpacing};
    line-height: ${lineHeight};
    text-align: center;
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 20px;
}`;
            
            // Efektleri ekle
            const shadowType = document.getElementById('shadowType').value;
            if (shadowType !== 'none') {
                cssCode += `
    text-shadow: ${previewText.style.textShadow};`;
            }
            
            const borderType = document.getElementById('borderType').value;
            if (borderType !== 'none') {
                cssCode += `
    border: ${previewText.style.border};
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 15px;`;
            }
            
            if (document.getElementById('textGradient').checked) {
                cssCode += `
    background: linear-gradient(45deg, ${color}, #4ecdc4);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;`;
            }
            
            cssCode += `
}`;
            
            // HTML çıktısı
            const htmlCode = `<!-- GS Rams Pro Tasarım Çıktısı -->
<div class="gs-rams-text">
    🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile profesyonel tasarımlar oluşturun!<br>
    Türk gösterisi ve modern sema efektleri sizi bekliyor.
</div>`;
            
            document.getElementById('cssOutput').textContent = cssCode;
            document.getElementById('htmlOutput').textContent = htmlCode;
        }

        // Rastgele Fonksiyonlar
        function randomFont() {
            const fonts = [
                "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
                "'Raleway', sans-serif",
                "'Playfair Display', serif",
                "'Noto Sans', sans-serif",
                "'Dancing Script', cursive",
                "'Caveat', cursive",
                "Arial, sans-serif"


## Prompt 3

### You
*2025-12-09 12:29:21 +03*

Özgürce geliştirmeye devam edelim yeni fonksiyonlar Yeni butonlar ve Yeni yazı dekorasyon ve yazı euro piçkili jsy renk seçici olarak seçeceğiz kullanacağız ve menüler butonlar sol alanda aşağı kaydırılmalı sayfa düzeninde olacak önizleme yazısı olacak sadece önizleme yazısı sağda üstü olacak altında CSS ve html çıkış kodları olacak ve fonksiyonları özellikleri olacak yeni fonksiyonlar yeni özellikler yeni stiller eklemeye devam edelim daha modern ve daha şık gösterişli bir tema ile 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 12:29:22 +03*

Aşağıya, anlattığın yapıya göre **daha profesyonel, daha modern, daha şık** ve genişletilmiş bir “GS RAMS PRO” arayüzü hazırladım.

- Sol taraf: **tamamen scroll’lu kontrol paneli** (yeni butonlar, yeni stiller, gelişmiş dekorasyonlar).
- Sağ üst: **sabit önizleme metni**.
- Sağ alt: **yan yana HTML ve CSS çıktı alanları**.
- Yeni özellikler:
  - Yazı **transform (büyük/küçük/baş harf)**,
  - **Metin hizalama**, kelime aralığı,
  - **Çok renkli gradient text** (iki renk seçici),
  - **Neon / Glow preset**, “Türk Gösterisi / Sema” presetleri,
  - **Outline (stroke)** için renk + kalınlık,
  - **Arka plan kutusu** (arka plan rengi + radius),
  - Rastgele tema butonları.

Hepsi **tek HTML dosyasında**; direkt kaydedip çalıştırabilirsin.

---

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>GS RAMS PRO – Türk Gösterisi & Modern Sema</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <!-- iro.js renk seçici -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Caveat:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Font Awesome (ikonlar) -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">

    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #ff4757;
            --primary-soft: #ff6b81;
            --secondary: #3742fa;
            --accent: #ffa502;
            --accent2: #2ed573;
            --bg-main: #0f172a;
            --bg-panel: #020617;
            --bg-panel-soft: #111827;
            --text-main: #e5e7eb;
            --muted: #9ca3af;
            --radius: 14px;
            --shadow-soft: 0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.75);
            --transition: all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #1f2937 0, #020617 60%);
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
            color: var(--text-main);
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .app {
            max-width: 1680px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            height: 100vh;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 360px 1fr;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #020617 0%, #030712 60%, #020617 100%);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
            border-radius: 18px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.25);
        }

        /* SOL PANEL – MENÜLER (scroll) */
        .sidebar {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #1f2937 0, #020617 65%);
            padding: 22px 18px 22px 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            border-right: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
        }

        .sidebar-header {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding-bottom: 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.45);
        }

        .brand {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .brand-logo {
            width: 38px;
            height: 38px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: conic-gradient(from 200deg, var(--primary), var(--accent), var(--secondary), var(--accent2), var(--primary));
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(248,250,252,0.2);
        }

        .brand-logo i {
            color: #0f172a;
        }

        .brand-text-main {
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.14em;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .brand-text-sub {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.18em;
            color: var(--muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .preset-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .pill-btn {
            border-radius: 999px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            border: none;
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.7);
            color: var(--muted);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .pill-btn span {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
        }

        .pill-btn:hover {
            background: rgba(248,250,252,0.06);
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .pill-btn-primary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--accent));
            color: #0b1120;
        }

        .pill-btn-primary:hover {
            filter: brightness(1.1);
        }

        .sidebar-scroll {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding-right: 8px;
        }

        .panel-group {
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 14px 14px 12px;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.3);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(15,23,42,0.75);
        }

        .panel-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .panel-title {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .panel-title i {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        .panel-reset {
            border: none;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
            color: var(--muted);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .panel-reset:hover {
            background: rgba(248,250,252,0.08);
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .field {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .field-label {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            margin-bottom: 4px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .field-label span.value {
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        select,
        input[type="number"],
        input[type="text"].text-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px 10px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background: #020617;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            outline: none;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        select:focus,
        input[type="number"]:focus,
        input[type="text"].text-input:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(234,179,8,0.45);
        }

        input[type="range"] {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: var(--accent);
        }

        .range-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .range-value-badge {
            min-width: 48px;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            padding: 3px 6px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4);
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .btn-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 6px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .btn {
            border-radius: 999px;
            border: none;
            padding: 7px 10px;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        .btn i {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
        }

        .btn:hover {
            background: rgba(248,250,252,0.08);
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .btn-random {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-soft), var(--accent));
            color: #020617;
        }

        .btn-random:hover {
            filter: brightness(1.1);
        }

        .btn-outline {
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
        }

        .checkbox-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }

        .checkbox-pill {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 4px 9px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.85);
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .checkbox-pill input {
            accent-color: var(--accent);
        }

        .checkbox-pill:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent);
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        /* Renk Picker kutuları */
        .color-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }

        .color-box {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 6px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #020617;
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
        }

        .color-title {
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            margin-bottom: 3px;
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        .color-input-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 4px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        .color-hex {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 4px 6px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.8);
            background: #020617;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-family: "JetBrains Mono","Fira Code",monospace;
        }

        .color-mini-btn {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: none;
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            color: var(--muted);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .color-mini-btn:hover {
            background: rgba(248,250,252,0.06);
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .mini-picker {
            width: 100%;
            height: 90px;
        }

        /* SAĞ PANEL */
        .right {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-rows: 250px 1fr;
            height: 100%;
        }

        /* Önizleme üstte sabit alan */
        .preview-wrapper {
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, rgba(248,250,252,0.12) 0, transparent 55%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 100% 100%, rgba(252,211,77,0.16) 0, transparent 55%),
                #020617;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 16px 24px;
        }

        .preview-card {
            position: relative;
            max-width: 920px;
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, rgba(248,250,252,0.1) 0, rgba(15,23,42,1) 55%);
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(15,23,42,0.85);
            padding: 24px 28px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .preview-header-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
        }

        .preview-label {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.12em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        .preview-controls-mini {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .preview-dot {
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: #10b981;
        }

        .preview-shimmer {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 15% 0, rgba(251,191,36,0.26) 0, transparent 55%);
            opacity: 0.22;
            mix-blend-mode: screen;
        }

        .sema-ring {
            position: absolute;
            inset: -40%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: conic-gradient(from 220deg, transparent 0 50%, rgba(59,130,246,0.28) 50 70%, rgba(236,72,153,0.28) 70 100%);
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0.9);
            transition: var(--transition);
            filter: blur(20px);
        }

        .sema-ring.active {
            opacity: 0.8;
            animation: spin 6s linear infinite;
        }

        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(0.9); }
        }

        #previewText {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 1.6;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 10px 10px;
            display: inline-block;
            max-width: 100%;
            word-wrap: break-word;
        }

        /* Kod alanı */
        .code-wrapper {
            background: #020617;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            padding: 14px 16px 16px;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .code-card {
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #111827 0, #020617 70%);
            border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .code-header {
            padding: 8px 10px 7px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
        }

        .code-title {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 7px;
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        .code-title i {
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        .code-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .code-btn {
            width: 26px;
            height: 26px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(75,85,99,0.9);
            background: #020617;
            color: var(--muted);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .code-btn:hover {
            background: rgba(251,191,36,0.14);
            color: #facc15;
            border-color: #facc15;
        }

        .code-body {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 8px 10px;
            background: #020617;
            overflow: auto;
        }

        pre {
            margin: 0;
            font-family: "JetBrains Mono","Fira Code","Consolas",monospace;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            line-height: 1.5;
            color: #e5e7eb;
        }

        .footer-note {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            margin-top: 4px;
            text-align: right;
            padding: 0 4px 2px;
        }

        /* Scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 7px;
            height: 7px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #020617;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #4b5563;
            border-radius: 999px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #9ca3af;
        }

        @media (max-width: 1100px) {
            .app {
                grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr;
            }
            .code-wrapper {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 820px) {
            body {
                overflow: auto;
            }
            .app {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                height: auto;
                border-radius: 0;
            }
            .sidebar {
                height: auto;
                max-height: 60vh;
            }
            .right {
                height: auto;
                grid-template-rows: auto auto;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
    <!-- SOL: MENÜLER -->
    <aside class="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
            <div class="brand">
                <div class="brand-logo">
                    <i class="fas fa-palette"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <div class="brand-text-main">GS RAMS PRO</div>
                    <div class="brand-text-sub">Türk Gösterisi · Sema</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="preset-row">
                <button class="pill-btn pill-btn-primary" onclick="applyPreset('turk')">
                    <i class="fas fa-moon"></i><span>Türk Gösterisi</span>
                </button>
                <button class="pill-btn" onclick="applyPreset('sema')">
                    <i class="fas fa-circle-notch"></i><span>Modern Sema</span>
                </button>
                <button class="pill-btn" onclick="applyPreset('neon')">
                    <i class="fas fa-bolt"></i><span>Neon Glow</span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="sidebar-scroll">

            <!-- ÖNİZLEME METNİ -->
            <div class="panel-group">
                <div class="panel-header">
                    <div class="panel-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-keyboard"></i>
                        <span>Önizleme Metni</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="panel-reset" onclick="resetText()">Metni Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                    <textarea id="previewInput" class="text-input" style="resize:vertical;min-height:60px;font-size:0.8rem;"
                              oninput="updatePreview()">
🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile profesyonel Türk gösterisi ve modern sema yazıları oluştur!</textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="setSampleText('short')">Kısa</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="setSampleText('long')">Uzun</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- FONT & BOYUT -->
            <div class="panel-group">
                <div class="panel-header">
                    <div class="panel-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-font"></i>
                        <span>Font & Boyut</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="panel-reset" onclick="resetFont()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Font Ailesi</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontFamily" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat · Modern</option>
                        <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway · İnce</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif">Playfair Display · Klasik</option>
                        <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive">Dancing Script · El Yazısı</option>
                        <option value="'Caveat', cursive">Caveat · Handwriting</option>
                        <option value="'Times New Roman', serif">Times New Roman</option>
                        <option value="Arial, sans-serif">Arial</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Font Boyutu</span>
                        <span class="value" id="fontSizeLabel">28px</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="range-row">
                        <input type="range" id="fontSize" min="12" max="72" value="28" oninput="syncRangeLabel('fontSize')" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <div class="range-value-badge" id="fontSizeBadge">28px</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Ağırlık</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontWeight" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <option value="300">300 · İnce</option>
                        <option value="400" selected>400 · Normal</option>
                        <option value="500">500 · Orta</option>
                        <option value="600">600 · Yarı Kalın</option>
                        <option value="700">700 · Kalın</option>
                        <option value="800">800 · Extra Kalın</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label"><span>Stil & Dönüşüm</span></div>
                    <div class="btn-row">
                        <button class="btn" onclick="toggleSelect('fontStyle','normal')">Normal</button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="toggleSelect('fontStyle','italic')"><i class="fas fa-italic"></i> Italic</button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="toggleSelect('fontStyle','oblique')">Eğik</button>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontStyle" style="display:none" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <option value="normal" selected>normal</option>
                        <option value="italic">italic</option>
                        <option value="oblique">oblique</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label"><span>Transform</span></div>
                    <select id="textTransform" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <option value="none">Normal</option>
                        <option value="uppercase">Tümü Büyük</option>
                        <option value="lowercase">Tümü Küçük</option>
                        <option value="capitalize">Baş Harf Büyük</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomFontAll()">
                        <i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Rastgele Font Paketi
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- YAZI DİZİLİMİ -->
            <div class="panel-group">
                <div class="panel-header">
                    <div class="panel-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-align-center"></i>
                        <span>Dizilim & Boşluklar</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="panel-reset" onclick="resetLayout()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label"><span>Hizalama</span></div>
                    <div class="btn-row">
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setAlign('left')"><i class="fas fa-align-left"></i></button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setAlign('center')"><i class="fas fa-align-center"></i></button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setAlign('right')"><i class="fas fa-align-right"></i></button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setAlign('justify')"><i class="fas fa-align-justify"></i></button>
                    </div>
                    <input type="hidden" id="textAlign" value="center">
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Harf Aralığı</span>
                        <span class="value" id="letterLabel">0px</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="range-row">
                        <input type="range" id="letterSpacing" min="-2" max="12" step="0.1"
                               value="0" oninput="syncRangeLabel('letterSpacing')" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <div class="range-value-badge" id="letterSpacingBadge">0px</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Satır Yüksekliği</span>
                        <span class="value" id="lineHeightLabel">1.6</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="range-row">
                        <input type="range" id="lineHeight" min="1" max="3" step="0.1"
                               value="1.6" oninput="syncRangeLabel('lineHeight')" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <div class="range-value-badge" id="lineHeightBadge">1.6</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Kelime Aralığı</span>
                        <span class="value" id="wordLabel">0px</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="range-row">
                        <input type="range" id="wordSpacing" min="0" max="30" step="1"
                               value="0" oninput="syncRangeLabel('wordSpacing')" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <div class="range-value-badge" id="wordSpacingBadge">0px</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- RENK & GRADIENT -->
            <div class="panel-group">
                <div class="panel-header">
                    <div class="panel-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-droplet"></i>
                        <span>Yazı Rengi & Gradient</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="panel-reset" onclick="resetColor()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="color-row">
                    <div class="color-box">
                        <div class="color-title">Ana Renk</div>
                        <div id="colorPickerMain" class="mini-picker"></div>
                        <div class="color-input-row">
                            <input id="colorMainHex" class="color-hex" value="#e5e7eb" oninput="updateFromHex('main')">
                            <button class="color-mini-btn" onclick="copyColorHex('main')" title="Kopyala">
                                <i class="fas fa-copy"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="color-box">
                        <div class="color-title">Gradient 2</div>
                        <div id="colorPickerSecond" class="mini-picker"></div>
                        <div class="color-input-row">
                            <input id="colorSecondHex" class="color-hex" value="#f97316" oninput="updateFromHex('second')">
                            <button class="color-mini-btn" onclick="randomGradientColors()" title="Rastgele">
                                <i class="fas fa-dice"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin-top:8px;">
                    <label class="checkbox-pill">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="useGradient" onchange="updatePreview()"> Gradient Yazı
                    </label>
                    <label class="checkbox-pill">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="useMultiColor" onchange="updatePreview()"> Çok Renkli (Türk Gösterisi)
                    </label>
                </div>

                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomColorTheme()">
                        <i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Rastgele Renk Teması
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- DEKORASYON & STROKE & GÖLGE -->
            <div class="panel-group">
                <div class="panel-header">
                    <div class="panel-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>
                        <span>Dekorasyon & Efekt</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="panel-reset" onclick="resetDecoration()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label"><span>Metin Dekorasyonu</span></div>
                    <div class="btn-row">
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setDecoration('none')">Yok</button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setDecoration('underline')"><u>Alt Çizgi</u></button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setDecoration('overline')">Üst Çizgi</button>
                        <button class="btn" onclick="setDecoration('line-through')"><s>Üstü Çizili</s></button>
                    </div>
                    <input type="hidden" id="textDecoration" value="none">
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Stroke (Kontur)</span>
                        <span class="value" id="strokeWidthLabel">0px</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="range-row">
                        <input type="range" id="strokeWidth" min="0" max="5" value="0"
                               oninput="syncRangeLabel('strokeWidth')" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <div class="range-value-badge" id="strokeWidthBadge">0px</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="field" style="margin-top:5px;">
                        <div class="field-label"><span>Stroke Rengi</span></div>
                        <input type="text" id="strokeColor" class="text-input" value="#000000"
                               oninput="updatePreview()">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label"><span>Gölge Preset</span></div>
                    <select id="shadowType" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="soft">Soft Shadow</option>
                        <option value="hard">Sert Shadow</option>
                        <option value="glow">Neon Glow</option>
                        <option value="retro">Retro 3D</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ARKA PLAN KUTUSU -->
            <div class="panel-group">
                <div class="panel-header">
                    <div class="panel-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-square-full"></i>
                        <span>Arka Plan Kutusu</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="panel-reset" onclick="resetBox()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Kutu Aktif</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="checkbox-row">
                        <label class="checkbox-pill">
                            <input type="checkbox" id="boxEnabled" onchange="updatePreview()"> Aktif
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label"><span>Kutu Arka Plan</span></div>
                    <input type="text" id="boxBg" class="text-input" value="rgba(15,23,42,0.9)"
                           oninput="updatePreview()">
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label">
                        <span>Radius</span>
                        <span class="value" id="boxRadiusLabel">18px</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="range-row">
                        <input type="range" id="boxRadius" min="0" max="40" value="18"
                               oninput="syncRangeLabel('boxRadius')" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <div class="range-value-badge" id="boxRadiusBadge">18px</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                    <div class="field-label"><span>İç Boşluk (Padding)</span><span class="value" id="boxPaddingLabel">10px</span></div>
                    <div class="range-row">
                        <input type="range" id="boxPadding" min="0" max="40" value="10"
                               oninput="syncRangeLabel('boxPadding')" onchange="updatePreview()">
                        <div class="range-value-badge" id="boxPaddingBadge">10px</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ: ÖNİZLEME + ÇIKTI -->
    <section class="right">
        <!-- ÜST: SADECE ÖNİZLEME YAZISI -->
        <div class="preview-wrapper">
            <div class="preview-card">
                <div class="preview-header-row">
                    <div class="preview-label">Canlı Önizleme</div>
                    <div class="preview-controls-mini">
                        <div class="preview-dot"></div>
                        <span style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--muted);">inline-block / canlı CSS</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="preview-shimmer"></div>
                <div class="sema-ring" id="semaRing"></div>
                <div id="previewText">
                    🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile profesyonel Türk gösterisi ve modern sema yazıları oluştur!
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ALT: HTML + CSS ÇIKTILARI -->
        <div class="code-wrapper">
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-title">
                        <i class="fab fa-html5"></i> HTML Çıktısı
                    </div>
                    <div class="code-buttons">
                        <button class="code-btn" onclick="copyCode('html')" title="Kopyala"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i></button>
                        <button class="code-btn" onclick="downloadCode('html')" title="İndir"><i class="fas fa-download"></i></button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="code-body">
                    <pre id="htmlOutput"></pre>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-title">
                        <i class="fab fa-css3-alt"></i> CSS Çıktısı
                    </div>
                    <div class="code-buttons">
                        <button class="code-btn" onclick="copyCode('css')" title="Kopyala"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i></button>
                        <button class="code-btn" onclick="downloadCode('css')" title="İndir"><i class="fas fa-download"></i></button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="code-body">
                    <pre id="cssOutput"></pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="footer-note">
            .gs-rams-text elemanı varsayılan olarak <strong>display: inline-block</strong> ile üretilir.
        </div>
    </section>
</div>

<script>
    // ---- Renk Picker kurulumu ----
    const pickerMain = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPickerMain", {
        width: 130,
        color: "#e5e7eb",
        layout: [
            { component: iro.ui.Wheel },
            { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'value' } }
        ]
    });

    const pickerSecond = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPickerSecond", {
        width: 130,
        color: "#f97316",
        layout: [
            { component: iro.ui.Wheel },
            { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'value' } }
        ]
    });

    pickerMain.on('color:change', (c) => {
        document.getElementById('colorMainHex').value = c.hexString;
        updatePreview();
    });
    pickerSecond.on('color:change', (c) => {
        document.getElementById('colorSecondHex').value = c.hexString;
        updatePreview();
    });

    function updateFromHex(which) {
        const val = (which === 'main')
            ? document.getElementById('colorMainHex').value
            : document.getElementById('colorSecondHex').value;
        if (!/^#([0-9A-F]{3}){1,2}$/i.test(val)) return;
        if (which === 'main') pickerMain.color.hexString = val;
        else pickerSecond.color.hexString = val;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function copyColorHex(which) {
        const inputId = which === 'main' ? 'colorMainHex' : 'colorSecondHex';
        const text = document.getElementById(inputId).value;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
            alert('Renk kodu kopyalandı: ' + text);
        });
    }

    function randomGradientColors() {
        const rand = () => '#' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 16777215).toString(16).padStart(6,'0');
        const c1 = rand();
        const c2 = rand();
        document.getElementById('colorMainHex').value = c1;
        document.getElementById('colorSecondHex').value = c2;
        pickerMain.color.hexString = c1;
        pickerSecond.color.hexString = c2;
        updatePreview();
    }

    // ---- Yardımcılar ----
    function syncRangeLabel(id) {
        const val = document.getElementById(id).value;
        const label = document.getElementById(id + 'Label');
        const badge = document.getElementById(id + 'Badge');
        let suffix = 'px';
        if (id === 'lineHeight') suffix = '';
        if (label) label.textContent = val + suffix;
        if (badge) badge.textContent = val + suffix;
    }

    function setAlign(al) {
        document.getElementById('textAlign').value = al;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function toggleSelect(id, value) {
        const sel = document.getElementById(id);
        sel.value = value;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function setDecoration(dec) {
        document.getElementById('textDecoration').value = dec;
        updatePreview();
    }

    // ---- Reset Fonksiyonları ----
    function resetText() {
        document.getElementById('previewInput').value =
            '🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile profesyonel Türk gösterisi ve modern sema yazıları oluştur!';
        updatePreview();
    }

    function setSampleText(type) {
        if (type === 'short') {
            document.getElementById('previewInput').value = 'GS RAMS PRO · Türk Gösterisi · Modern Sema';
        } else {
            document.getElementById('previewInput').value =
                '🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile; Türk gösterisi, modern sema ve neon efektli yazılar üret.\n' +
                'Font, renk, gölge, stroke, gradient ve arka plan kutusunu tek panelden kontrol et!';
        }
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetFont() {
        document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Montserrat', sans-serif";
        document.getElementById('fontSize').value = 28;
        document.getElementById('fontWeight').value = 400;
        document.getElementById('fontStyle').value = 'normal';
        document.getElementById('textTransform').value = 'none';
        syncRangeLabel('fontSize');
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetLayout() {
        document.getElementById('textAlign').value = 'center';
        document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value = 0;
        document.getElementById('lineHeight').value = 1.6;
        document.getElementById('wordSpacing').value = 0;
        ['letterSpacing','lineHeight','wordSpacing'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetColor() {
        pickerMain.color.hexString = '#e5e7eb';
        pickerSecond.color.hexString = '#f97316';
        document.getElementById('colorMainHex').value = '#e5e7eb';
        document.getElementById('colorSecondHex').value = '#f97316';
        document.getElementById('useGradient').checked = false;
        document.getElementById('useMultiColor').checked = false;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetDecoration() {
        document.getElementById('textDecoration').value = 'none';
        document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value = 0;
        document.getElementById('strokeColor').value = '#000000';
        document.getElementById('shadowType').value = 'none';
        ['strokeWidth'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetBox() {
        document.getElementById('boxEnabled').checked = false;
        document.getElementById('boxBg').value = 'rgba(15,23,42,0.9)';
        document.getElementById('boxRadius').value = 18;
        document.getElementById('boxPadding').value = 10;
        ['boxRadius','boxPadding'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        updatePreview();
    }

    function randomFontAll() {
        const families = [
            "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
            "'Raleway', sans-serif",
            "'Playfair Display', serif",
            "'Dancing Script', cursive",
            "'Caveat', cursive",
            "Arial, sans-serif"
        ];
        const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * families.length);
        document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = families[randomIndex];
        document.getElementById('fontSize').value = 16 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 40); // 16–56
        document.getElementById('fontWeight').value = [300,400,500,600,700,800][Math.floor(Math.random()*6)];
        document.getElementById('fontStyle').value = ['normal','italic','oblique'][Math.floor(Math.random()*3)];
        document.getElementById('textTransform').value = ['none','uppercase','capitalize'][Math.floor(Math.random()*3)];
        ['fontSize'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        updatePreview();
    }

    function randomColorTheme() {
        randomGradientColors();
        document.getElementById('useGradient').checked = true;
        updatePreview();
    }

    // ---- Presetler ----
    function applyPreset(type) {
        if (type === 'turk') {
            document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Playfair Display', serif";
            document.getElementById('fontSize').value = 32;
```
