```html
            document.getElementById('fontWeight').value = 700;
            document.getElementById('fontStyle').value = 'normal';
            document.getElementById('textTransform').value = 'capitalize';
            pickerMain.color.hexString = '#facc15';
            pickerSecond.color.hexString = '#ef4444';
            document.getElementById('useGradient').checked = true;
            document.getElementById('useMultiColor').checked = true;
            document.getElementById('shadowType').value = 'soft';
            document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value = 1;
            document.getElementById('strokeColor').value = '#000000';
            document.getElementById('boxEnabled').checked = true;
            document.getElementById('boxBg').value = 'rgba(15,23,42,0.85)';
            document.getElementById('boxRadius').value = 24;
            document.getElementById('boxPadding').value = 16;
            ['fontSize','strokeWidth','boxRadius','boxPadding'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        } else if (type === 'sema') {
            document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Montserrat', sans-serif";
            document.getElementById('fontSize').value = 30;
            document.getElementById('fontWeight').value = 500;
            document.getElementById('fontStyle').value = 'italic';
            document.getElementById('textTransform').value = 'none';
            pickerMain.color.hexString = '#38bdf8';
            pickerSecond.color.hexString = '#a855f7';
            document.getElementById('useGradient').checked = true;
            document.getElementById('useMultiColor').checked = false;
            document.getElementById('shadowType').value = 'glow';
            document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value = 0;
            document.getElementById('boxEnabled').checked = false;
            ['fontSize','strokeWidth','boxRadius','boxPadding'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        } else if (type === 'neon') {
            document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Raleway', sans-serif";
            document.getElementById('fontSize').value = 34;
            document.getElementById('fontWeight').value = 700;
            document.getElementById('fontStyle').value = 'normal';
            document.getElementById('textTransform').value = 'uppercase';
            pickerMain.color.hexString = '#22c55e';
            pickerSecond.color.hexString = '#0ea5e9';
            document.getElementById('useGradient').checked = true;
            document.getElementById('useMultiColor').checked = false;
            document.getElementById('shadowType').value = 'glow';
            document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value = 1;
            document.getElementById('strokeColor').value = '#0f172a';
            document.getElementById('boxEnabled').checked = true;
            document.getElementById('boxBg').value = 'rgba(15,23,42,0.8)';
            document.getElementById('boxRadius').value = 20;
            document.getElementById('boxPadding').value = 14;
            ['fontSize','strokeWidth','boxRadius','boxPadding'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        }
        updatePreview();
    }

    // ---- Ana Önizleme ----
    function updatePreview() {
        const el = document.getElementById('previewText');
        const sema = document.getElementById('semaRing');

        const text = document.getElementById('previewInput').value;
        const fontFamily = document.getElementById('fontFamily').value;
        const fontSize = document.getElementById('fontSize').value + 'px';
        const fontWeight = document.getElementById('fontWeight').value;
        const fontStyle = document.getElementById('fontStyle').value;
        const textTransform = document.getElementById('textTransform').value;
        const align = document.getElementById('textAlign').value;
        const letterSpacing = document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value + 'px';
        const lineHeight = document.getElementById('lineHeight').value;
        const wordSpacing = document.getElementById('wordSpacing').value + 'px';
        const decoration = document.getElementById('textDecoration').value;
        const strokeWidth = parseInt(document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value, 10);
        const strokeColor = document.getElementById('strokeColor').value;
        const shadowType = document.getElementById('shadowType').value;
        const useGradient = document.getElementById('useGradient').checked;
        const useMultiColor = document.getElementById('useMultiColor').checked;

        // Temel stiller
        el.textContent = ''; // multi color için önce temizleyeceğiz
        if (useMultiColor) {
            const colors = ['#f97316','#ef4444','#eab308','#22c55e','#0ea5e9','#6366f1'];
            text.split('').forEach((ch, i) => {
                const span = document.createElement('span');
                span.textContent = ch;
                if (ch.trim().length === 0) {
                    span.style.marginRight = '4px';
                } else {
                    span.style.color = colors[i % colors.length];
                }
                el.appendChild(span);
            });
        } else {
            el.textContent = text;
        }

        el.style.fontFamily = fontFamily;
        el.style.fontSize = fontSize;
        el.style.fontWeight = fontWeight;
        el.style.fontStyle = fontStyle;
        el.style.textTransform = textTransform;
        el.style.textAlign = align;
        el.style.letterSpacing = letterSpacing;
        el.style.lineHeight = lineHeight;
        el.style.wordSpacing = wordSpacing;
        el.style.textDecoration = decoration;

        // Stroke
        if (strokeWidth > 0) {
            el.style.webkitTextStrokeWidth = strokeWidth + 'px';
            el.style.webkitTextStrokeColor = strokeColor;
        } else {
            el.style.webkitTextStrokeWidth = '0';
        }

        // Renk / Gradient
        const c1 = document.getElementById('colorMainHex').value;
        const c2 = document.getElementById('colorSecondHex').value;
        if (!useMultiColor) {
            if (useGradient) {
                el.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${c1}, ${c2})`;
                el.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
                el.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
            } else {
                el.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
                el.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'initial';
                el.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'initial';
                el.style.color = c1;
            }
        }

        // Shadow
        let shadow = 'none';
        switch (shadowType) {
            case 'soft':
                shadow = '0 8px 20px rgba(15,23,42,0.7)';
                break;
            case 'hard':
                shadow = '2px 3px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.9)';
                break;
            case 'glow':
                shadow = `0 0 20px ${c2},0 0 40px ${c2}`;
                break;
            case 'retro':
                shadow = '2px 2px 0 #000,4px 4px 0 #f97316';
                break;
        }
        el.style.textShadow = shadow;

        // Box
        const boxEnabled = document.getElementById('boxEnabled').checked;
        const boxBg = document.getElementById('boxBg').value;
        const boxRadius = document.getElementById('boxRadius').value + 'px';
        const boxPadding = document.getElementById('boxPadding').value + 'px';
        if (boxEnabled) {
            el.style.backgroundColor = boxBg;
            el.style.borderRadius = boxRadius;
            el.style.padding = boxPadding;
        } else {
            el.style.backgroundColor = 'transparent';
            el.style.borderRadius = '0';
            el.style.padding = '10px';
        }

        // Sema efekti
        sema.classList.add('active');
        setTimeout(() => sema.classList.remove('active'), 800);

        // Kod çıktılarını güncelle
        updateCode();
    }

    // ---- Kod Çıktısı ----
    function updateCode() {
        const text = document.getElementById('previewInput').value
            .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
            .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
            .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
            .replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
        const fontFamily = document.getElementById('fontFamily').value;
        const fontSize = document.getElementById('fontSize').value + 'px';
        const fontWeight = document.getElementById('fontWeight').value;
        const fontStyle = document.getElementById('fontStyle').value;
        const textTransform = document.getElementById('textTransform').value;
        const align = document.getElementById('textAlign').value;
        const letterSpacing = document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value + 'px';
        const lineHeight = document.getElementById('lineHeight').value;
        const wordSpacing = document.getElementById('wordSpacing').value + 'px';
        const decoration = document.getElementById('textDecoration').value;
        const strokeWidth = parseInt(document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value, 10);
        const strokeColor = document.getElementById('strokeColor').value;
        const shadowType = document.getElementById('shadowType').value;
        const useGradient = document.getElementById('useGradient').checked;
        const useMultiColor = document.getElementById('useMultiColor').checked;
        const c1 = document.getElementById('colorMainHex').value;
        const c2 = document.getElementById('colorSecondHex').value;

        const boxEnabled = document.getElementById('boxEnabled').checked;
        const boxBg = document.getElementById('boxBg').value;
        const boxRadius = document.getElementById('boxRadius').value + 'px';
        const boxPadding = document.getElementById('boxPadding').value + 'px';

        // HTML
        let html = `<!-- GS RAMS PRO çıktı -->
<div class="gs-rams-text">
    ${text}
</div>`;
        document.getElementById('htmlOutput').textContent = html;

        // CSS
        let css = `.gs-rams-text {
    display: inline-block;
    font-family: ${fontFamily};
    font-size: ${fontSize};
    font-weight: ${fontWeight};
    font-style: ${fontStyle};
    text-transform: ${textTransform};
    text-align: ${align};
    letter-spacing: ${letterSpacing};
    line-height: ${lineHeight};
    word-spacing: ${wordSpacing};
    text-decoration: ${decoration};`;

        if (!useMultiColor && !useGradient) {
            css += `
    color: ${c1};`;
        }
        if (useGradient && !useMultiColor) {
            css += `
    background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${c1}, ${c2});
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;`;
        }

        if (strokeWidth > 0) {
            css += `
    -webkit-text-stroke-width: ${strokeWidth}px;
    -webkit-text-stroke-color: ${strokeColor};`;
        }

        if (shadowType !== 'none') {
            const previewText = document.getElementById('previewText');
            css += `
    text-shadow: ${previewText.style.textShadow};`;
        }

        if (boxEnabled) {
            css += `
    background-color: ${boxBg};
    border-radius: ${boxRadius};
    padding: ${boxPadding};`;
        }

        css += `
}`;

        if (useMultiColor) {
            css += `

/* Çok renkli Türk gösterisi efekti için JS ile her harfe ayrı renk atanabilir. */`;
        }

        document.getElementById('cssOutput').textContent = css;
    }

    // ---- Kopyalama / İndirme ----
    function copyCode(type) {
        const text = type === 'html'
            ? document.getElementById('htmlOutput').textContent
            : document.getElementById('cssOutput').textContent;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
            alert((type.toUpperCase()) + ' kodu kopyalandı!');
        });
    }

    function downloadCode(type) {
        const text = type === 'html'
            ? document.getElementById('htmlOutput').textContent
            : document.getElementById('cssOutput').textContent;
        const blob = new Blob([text], { type: "text/plain;charset=utf-8" });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = type === 'html' ? 'gs-rams-text.html' : 'gs-rams-text.css';
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        a.remove();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    }

    // İlk yüklemede
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        ['fontSize','letterSpacing','lineHeight','wordSpacing','strokeWidth','boxRadius','boxPadding'].forEach(syncRangeLabel);
        updatePreview();
    });
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

İstersen bir sonraki adımda:

- Bu aracı **modüllere bölüp** her özelliği ayrı JS dosyasına ayırabiliriz (font.js, color.js, shadow.js gibi),
- Ya da **hazır tema presetleri listesi** (10–15 farklı GS / Sema stili) ekleyebiliriz.

“Şu kısma şunu da ekleyelim” dediğin bir yer varsa, direkt orayı genişletecek şekilde devam edelim.

### Gemini 3 Pro
*2025-12-09 12:29:22 +03*

I'm now integrating preset gradients with a toggle for solid colors. I'm imagining animations using CSS `@keyframes`, specifically float, pulse, and rainbow effects. I'm focusing on "Sema," "Cyber," "Elegant," and "Retro" presets to offer diverse starting points.

I'm now establishing the JavaScript logic for the theme generator. I'm focusing on state management with an object and an update function that dynamically applies styles to the preview. **Refining Language Choice**

I'm focusing on ensuring the theme generator's interface and code adhere to standard web terminology, while also considering Turkish equivalents for clarity. I'm excited about finding the right balance! I'm leaning toward using clear Turkish terms for elements like font and border, for example, "Yazı Tipi" and "Kenarlık." This approach will ensure accessibility. It's a great idea!

Harika bir fikir! O zaman kemerleri bağlayalım. 🚀

Bu versiyonda **"GS Rams Pro X"** adını verdiğimiz, tam anlamıyla bir **Tasarım Stüdyosu** oluşturuyoruz.

**Neler Yeni?**
1.  **Ultra Gelişmiş Sol Panel:** Akordeon (açılır/kapanır) menülerle düzenli, sonsuz kaydırmalı profesyonel panel.
2.  **Süper Efektler:** Neon, Glitch (Hata), 3D Derinlik, Cam (Glassmorphism) ve Arka Plan Maskeleme (Yazının içi resim/gradient olsun).
3.  **Animasyon Motoru:** Yazıya hareket katacak (Sema dönüşü, Kalp atışı, Yüzer mod).
4.  **Iro.js Entegrasyonu:** Tam profesyonel renk çarkı.
5.  **Akıllı Kod Çıktısı:** CSS ve HTML'i anlık ve düzenli veren sağ alt panel.

İşte modern web teknolojileriyle donatılmış, Türk Gösterisi ve Sema ruhunu taşıyan o kod:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>GS Rams Pro X - Ultimate Design Studio</title>
    <!-- Iro.js Renk Seçici -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- İkonlar -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <!-- Geniş Font Kütüphanesi -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;500;900&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;1,900&family=Dancing+Script:wght@700&family=Righteous&family=Monoton&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Noto+Sans+TR:wght@300;500;700&family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-dark: #0f172a;
            --panel-bg: #1e293b;
            --accent: #3b82f6; /* GS Mavi */
            --accent-hot: #ef4444; /* GS Kırmızı */
            --gold: #fbbf24;
            --text-main: #f1f5f9;
            --text-muted: #94a3b8;
            --border: #334155;
            --glass: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.7);
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; scrollbar-width: thin; }
        
        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--bg-dark);
            color: var(--text-main);
            height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
        }

        /* --- SOL PANEL (KONTROLLER) --- */
        .sidebar {
            width: 360px;
            background: var(--panel-bg);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            height: 100vh;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .sidebar-header {
            padding: 20px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            text-align: center;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b, #0f172a);
        }

        .brand-title {
            font-family: 'Righteous', cursive;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--accent-hot), var(--gold));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .sidebar-content {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 10px;
        }

        /* Akordeon Menü Stili */
        .accordion-item {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .accordion-header {
            padding: 15px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .accordion-header:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
        .accordion-header i { color: var(--accent); }
        .accordion-header span { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; flex: 1; margin-left: 10px; }

        .accordion-body {
            padding: 15px;
            display: none; /* JS ile açılacak */
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .accordion-item.active .accordion-body { display: block; }
        .accordion-item.active .accordion-header i.fa-chevron-down { transform: rotate(180deg); }

        /* Form Elemanları */
        label { display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; }
        
        input[type="range"] { width: 100%; accent-color: var(--accent); cursor: pointer; }
        
        select, input[type="text"], input[type="number"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            background: #0f172a;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: white;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .btn-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; margin-top: 15px; }
        
        .btn {
            padding: 10px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 5px;
        }

        .btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); }
        .btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: white; }
        .btn-danger { background: var(--accent-hot); color: white; }
        .btn-random { background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ec4899, #8b5cf6); color: white; }
        .btn-outline { background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-muted); }

        .color-picker-wrapper { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin: 10px 0; }

        /* --- SAĞ PANEL (PREVIEW & CODE) --- */
        .main-panel {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Üst: Önizleme Alanı */
        .preview-area {
            flex: 6; /* Alanın %60'ı */
            background-color: #000;
            background-image: 
                linear-gradient(45deg, #111 25%, transparent 25%), 
                linear-gradient(-45deg, #111 25%, transparent 25%), 
                linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, #111 75%), 
                linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, #111 75%);
            background-size: 20px 20px;
            background-position: 0 0, 0 10px, 10px -10px, -10px 0px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Sema Arka Plan Efekti */
        .sema-bg {
            position: absolute;
            width: 600px;
            height: 600px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, transparent, var(--accent-hot), var(--gold), transparent);
            opacity: 0;
            filter: blur(50px);
            transition: opacity 0.5s;
            z-index: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .sema-bg.active {
            opacity: 0.2;
            animation: spin 10s linear infinite;
        }

        @keyframes spin { 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

        /* Asıl Yazı */
        #renderText {
            font-size: 3rem;
            text-align: center;
            z-index: 2;
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            padding: 20px;
            position: relative;
            /* Default değerler */
            color: #fff;
        }

        /* Alt: Kod Çıktısı */
        .code-area {
            flex: 4; /* Alanın %40'ı */
            background: #0f172a;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .code-tabs {
            display: flex;
            background: var(--panel-bg);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .tab-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .tab-btn.active {
            color: var(--accent);
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent);
            background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1);
        }

        .code-content-wrapper {
            flex: 1;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .code-block {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            padding: 20px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: #a5b4fc;
            display: none;
        }

        .code-block.active { display: block; }
        
        .copy-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            right: 10px;
            background: var(--accent);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            z-index: 5;
        }

        /* CSS EFEKT SINIFLARI (Preview İçin) */
        .anim-float { animation: floating 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
        @keyframes floating { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-20px); } }

        .anim-pulse { animation: pulsing 2s infinite; }
        @keyframes pulsing { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }
        
        .anim-glitch { animation: glitch-anim 1s infinite linear alternate-reverse; }
        @keyframes glitch-anim { 0% { opacity: 1; transform: skewX(-10deg); } 20% { opacity: 0.8; transform: skewX(10deg); } 100% { opacity: 1; } }

    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- SOL PANEL: KONTROLLER -->
    <div class="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
            <div class="brand-title">GS RAMS PRO X</div>
            <p style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b;">Gelişmiş Tema Tasarımcısı</p>
        </div>

        <div class="sidebar-content">
            
            <!-- 1. Temel Yazı Ayarları -->
            <div class="accordion-item active">
                <div class="accordion-header" onclick="toggleAccordion(this)">
                    <span><i class="fas fa-font"></i> Temel Yazı Ayarları</span>
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="accordion-body">
                    <label>Metin İçeriği</label>
                    <input type="text" id="inputText" value="GS Rams Pro X Tasarımı" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    
                    <label>Font Ailesi</label>
                    <select id="fontFamily" onchange="updateDesign()">
                        <option value="'Inter', sans-serif">Inter (Modern)</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif">Playfair (Elegant)</option>
                        <option value="'Noto Sans TR', sans-serif">Noto Sans TR (Standart)</option>
                        <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive">Dancing Script (El Yazısı)</option>
                        <option value="'Righteous', cursive">Righteous (Fütüristik)</option>
                        <option value="'Monoton', cursive">Monoton (Neon)</option>
                        <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (Retro)</option>
                        <option value="'Cinzel Decorative', cursive">Cinzel (Epik)</option>
                    </select>

                    <label>Boyut (<span id="val-size">60px</span>)</label>
                    <input type="range" id="fontSize" min="10" max="150" value="60" oninput="updateDesign()">

                    <div class="btn-grid">
                        <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="toggleBold()"><b>B</b></button>
                        <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="toggleItalic()"><i>I</i></button>
                        <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="toggleUpper()">AA</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 2. Renk ve Dolgu -->
            <div class="accordion-item">
                <div class="accordion-header" onclick="toggleAccordion(this)">
                    <span><i class="fas fa-palette"></i> Renk ve Dolgu</span>
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="accordion-body">
                    <div class="color-picker-wrapper">
                        <div id="iroPicker"></div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <label>Dolgu Tipi</label>
                    <select id="fillType" onchange="updateDesign()">
                        <option value="solid">Düz Renk</option>
                        <option value="gradient">Gradient (Geçişli)</option>
                        <option value="stroke">Sadece Çizgi (İçi Boş)</option>
                    </select>

                    <label>Opaklık</label>
                    <input type="range" id="opacity" min="0" max="1" step="0.1" value="1" oninput="updateDesign()">
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 3. Gelişmiş Efektler (Gölge & Stroke) -->
            <div class="accordion-item">
                <div class="accordion-header" onclick="toggleAccordion(this)">
                    <span><i class="fas fa-magic"></i> Profesyonel Efektler</span>
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="accordion-body">
                    <label>Yazı Gölgesi (Shadow)</label>
                    <input type="range" id="shadowBlur" min="0" max="50" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    
                    <label>Neon Parlaması</label>
                    <input type="checkbox" id="neonEffect" onchange="updateDesign()"> Aktif Et

                    <label>3D Derinlik</label>
                    <input type="checkbox" id="depthEffect" onchange="updateDesign()"> Aktif Et
                    
                    <label>Yazı Kenarlığı (Stroke)</label>
                    <input type="range" id="strokeWidth" min="0" max="5" step="0.5" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    <input type="color" id="strokeColor" value="#ffffff" oninput="updateDesign()" style="height:30px;">
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 4. Dekorasyon ve Border -->
            <div class="accordion-item">
                <div class="accordion-header" onclick="toggleAccordion(this)">
                    <span><i class="fas fa-border-style"></i> Kutu & Dekorasyon</span>
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="accordion-body">
                    <label>Yazı Altı Çizgi</label>
                    <select id="textDecor" onchange="updateDesign()">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="underline">Düz Çizgi</option>
                        <option value="wavy">Dalgalı</option>
                        <option value="dotted">Noktalı</option>
                        <option value="double">Çift</option>
                    </select>

                    <label>Kutu Çerçevesi (Border)</label>
                    <select id="boxBorder" onchange="updateDesign()">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="solid">Düz</option>
                        <option value="dashed">Kesik</option>
                        <option value="glass">Cam Efekti (Glass)</option>
                    </select>

                    <label>Harf Aralığı</label>
                    <input type="range" id="letterSpacing" min="-5" max="20" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 5. Animasyon & Sema -->
            <div class="accordion-item">
                <div class="accordion-header" onclick="toggleAccordion(this)">
                    <span><i class="fas fa-wind"></i> Animasyon & Sema</span>
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="accordion-body">
                    <label>Arka Plan Sema Efekti</label>
                    <button class="btn btn-outline" style="width:100%" onclick="toggleSema()">
                        <i class="fas fa-sun"></i> Sema'yı Aç/Kapat
                    </button>

                    <label style="margin-top:15px">Yazı Animasyonu</label>
                    <select id="animationType" onchange="updateDesign()">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="float">Yüzme (Float)</option>
                        <option value="pulse">Kalp Atışı (Pulse)</option>
                        <option value="glitch">Hata (Glitch)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Alt Butonlar -->
            <div style="margin-top: 20px;">
                <button class="btn btn-random" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px;" onclick="randomizeAll()">
                    <i class="fas fa-dice"></i> TAMAMEN RASTGELE
                </button>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SAĞ PANEL: PREVIEW & KOD -->
    <div class="main-panel">
        
        <!-- Önizleme -->
        <div class="preview-area">
            <div class="sema-bg" id="semaBg"></div>
            <div id="renderText">GS Rams Pro X Tasarımı</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Kod Çıktısı -->
        <div class="code-area">
            <div class="code-tabs">
                <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchTab('css')">CSS Kodu</button>
                <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('html')">HTML Kodu</button>
            </div>
            
            <div class="code-content-wrapper">
                <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyActiveCode()"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Kopyala</button>
                
                <div id="cssCode" class="code-block active">
                    /* Kodlar burada görünecek */
                </div>
                
                <div id="htmlCode" class="code-block">
                    <!-- HTML burada görünecek -->
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Global Değişkenler
        let isBold = false;
        let isItalic = false;
        let isUpper = false;
        let currentColor = "#f1f5f9";
        let semaActive = false;

        // Renk Seçici Kurulumu (iro.js)
        var colorPicker = new iro.ColorPicker("#iroPicker", {
            width: 200,
            color: "#f1f5f9",
            borderWidth: 2,
            borderColor: "#fff",
            layout: [
                { component: iro.ui.Wheel, options: {} },
                { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'value' } }
            ]
        });

        colorPicker.on('color:change', function(color) {
            currentColor = color.hexString;
            updateDesign();
        });

        // Fonksiyonlar
        function toggleAccordion(header) {
            const item = header.parentElement;
            const wasActive = item.classList.contains('active');
            
            // Hepsini kapat
            document.querySelectorAll('.accordion-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('active'));
            
            // Tıklananı aç (eğer kapalıysa)
            if (!wasActive) {
                item.classList.add('active');
            }
        }

        function toggleBold() { isBold = !isBold; updateDesign(); }
        function toggleItalic() { isItalic = !isItalic; updateDesign(); }
        function toggleUpper() { isUpper = !isUpper; updateDesign(); }
        function toggleSema() {
            semaActive = !semaActive;
            const bg = document.getElementById('semaBg');
            if(semaActive) bg.classList.add('active');
            else bg.classList.remove('active');
        }

        function switchTab(tabName) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
            document.querySelectorAll('.code-block').forEach(blk => blk.classList.remove('active'));
            
            if(tabName === 'css') {
                document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn')[0].classList.add('active');
                document.getElementById('cssCode').classList.add('active');
            } else {
                document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn')[1].classList.add('active');
                document.getElementById('htmlCode').classList.add('active');
            }
        }

        // ANA GÜNCELLEME FONKSİYONU
        function updateDesign() {
            const textEl = document.getElementById('renderText');
            
            // Değerleri Al
            const text = document.getElementById('inputText').value;
            const font = document.getElementById('fontFamily').value;
            const size = document.getElementById('fontSize').value;
            const fillType = document.getElementById('fillType').value;
            const opacity = document.getElementById('opacity').value;
            const shadowBlur = document.getElementById('shadowBlur').value;
            const neon = document.getElementById('neonEffect').checked;
            const depth = document.getElementById('depthEffect').checked;
            const strokeW = document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value;
            const strokeC = document.getElementById('strokeColor').value;
            const decor = document.getElementById('textDecor').value;
            const boxBorder = document.getElementById('boxBorder').value;
            const letterSpace = document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value;
            const anim = document.getElementById('animationType').value;

            // Görsel Güncellemeler (Label değerleri)
            document.getElementById('val-size').textContent = size + 'px';

            // Temel Stiller
            textEl.textContent = text;
            textEl.style.fontFamily = font;
            textEl.style.fontSize = size + 'px';
            textEl.style.fontWeight = isBold ? 'bold' : 'normal';
            textEl.style.fontStyle = isItalic ? 'italic' : 'normal';
            textEl.style.textTransform = isUpper ? 'uppercase' : 'none';
            textEl.style.letterSpacing = letterSpace + 'px';
            textEl.style.opacity = opacity;

            // Dolgu ve Renk Mantığı
            textEl.style.background = 'none';
            textEl.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'initial';
            textEl.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'initial';
            textEl.style.color = currentColor;

            if (fillType === 'gradient') {
                textEl.style.background = `linear-gradient(45deg, ${currentColor}, #4ecdc4)`;
                textEl.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
                textEl.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
            } else if (fillType === 'stroke') {
                textEl.style.color = 'transparent';
                textEl.style.webkitTextStroke = `1px ${currentColor}`;
            }

            // Gölge ve Efektler
            let textShadows = [];
            if (shadowBlur > 0) textShadows.push(`2px 2px ${shadowBlur}px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)`);
            if (neon) textShadows.push(`0 0 10px ${currentColor}, 0 0 20px ${currentColor}, 0 0 40px ${currentColor}`);
            if (depth) textShadows.push(`1px 1px 0 #555, 2px 2px 0 #555, 3px 3px 0 #555, 4px 4px 0 #555`);
            
            textEl.style.textShadow = textShadows.length > 0 ? textShadows.join(', ') : 'none';

            // Kenar Çizgisi (Stroke) - Dolgu tipi stroke değilse
            if (fillType !== 'stroke' && strokeW > 0) {
                textEl.style.webkitTextStroke = `${strokeW}px ${strokeC}`;
            }

            // Dekorasyon
            if (decor === 'none') {
                textEl.style.textDecoration = 'none';
            } else {
                let decorStyle = decor === 'wavy' ? 'wavy' : (decor === 'dotted' ? 'dotted' : (decor === 'double' ? 'double' : 'solid'));
                textEl.style.textDecoration = `underline ${decorStyle} ${currentColor}`;
            }

            // Kutu Stili (Border & Glass)
            textEl.style.border = 'none';
            textEl.style.background = fillType === 'gradient' ? textEl.style.background : 'transparent';
            textEl.style.backdropFilter = 'none';
            textEl.style.padding = '0';
            textEl.style.borderRadius = '0';

            if (boxBorder === 'solid') {
                textEl.style.border = `3px solid ${currentColor}`;
                textEl.style.padding = '20px';
                textEl.style.borderRadius = '10px';
            } else if (boxBorder === 'dashed') {
                textEl.style.border = `3px dashed ${currentColor}`;
                textEl.style.padding = '20px';
            } else if (boxBorder === 'glass') {
                textEl.style.background = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)';
                textEl.style.backdropFilter = 'blur(10px)';
                textEl.style.border = '1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)';
                textEl.style.padding = '20px';
                textEl.style.borderRadius = '15px';
                textEl.style.boxShadow = '0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.37)';
            }

            // Animasyon Sınıfları
            textEl.className = ''; // Reset
            if (anim === 'float') textEl.classList.add('anim-float');
            if (anim === 'pulse') textEl.classList.add('anim-pulse');
            if (anim === 'glitch') textEl.classList.add('anim-glitch');

            generateCode(textEl);
        }

        // KOD ÜRETME
        function generateCode(el) {
            const css = `.gs-rams-text {
    font-family: ${el.style.fontFamily};
    font-size: ${el.style.fontSize};
    font-weight: ${el.style.fontWeight};
    font-style: ${el.style.fontStyle};
    text-transform: ${el.style.textTransform};
    letter-spacing: ${el.style.letterSpacing};
    opacity: ${el.style.opacity};
    color: ${el.style.color};
    ${el.style.webkitTextFillColor ? `-webkit-text-fill-color: ${el.style.webkitTextFillColor};` : ''}
    ${el.style.background && el.style.background !== 'transparent' && el.style.background !== 'none' ? `background: ${el.style.background};` : ''}
    ${el.style.webkitBackgroundClip ? `-webkit-background-clip: ${el.style.webkitBackgroundClip};` : ''}
    ${el.style.webkitTextStroke ? `-webkit-text-stroke: ${el.style.webkitTextStroke};` : ''}
    text-shadow: ${el.style.textShadow};
    text-decoration: ${el.style.textDecoration};
    ${el.style.border !== 'none' ? `border: ${el.style.border};` : ''}
    ${el.style.padding !== '0px' ? `padding: ${el.style.padding};` : ''}
    ${el.style.borderRadius !== '0px' ? `border-radius: ${el.style.borderRadius};` : ''}
    ${el.style.backdropFilter !== 'none' ? `backdrop-filter: ${el.style.backdropFilter};` : ''}
    display: inline-block;
}`;
            
            const html = `<div class="gs-rams-text">${el.textContent}</div>`;

            document.getElementById('cssCode').innerText = css;
            document.getElementById('htmlCode').innerText = html;
        }

        // Rastgele Yapıcı
        function randomizeAll() {
            const fonts = ["'Inter', sans-serif", "'Playfair Display', serif", "'Dancing Script', cursive", "'Righteous', cursive", "'Monoton', cursive"];
            document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)];
            
            document.getElementById('fontSize').value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 80) + 20;
            
            // Rastgele Renk
            const randomColor = '#' + Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6, '0');
            colorPicker.color.hexString = randomColor;
            
            // Efektler
            document.getElementById('fillType').value = Math.random() > 0.7 ? 'gradient' : 'solid';
            document.getElementById('boxBorder').value = Math.random() > 0.8 ? 'glass' : 'none';
            document.getElementById('neonEffect').checked = Math.random() > 0.8;
            
            updateDesign();
        }

        function copyActiveCode() {
            const activeBlock = document.querySelector('.code-block.active');
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(activeBlock.innerText).then(() => {
                const btn = document.querySelector('.copy-btn');
                btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Kopyalandı';
                setTimeout(() => btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Kopyala', 2000);
            });
        }

        // Başlangıç
        updateDesign();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
```

### 🌟 GS Rams Pro X - Yenilikler ve Kullanım Kılavuzu:

1.  **Sola Yaslı "Dashboard" Tasarımı:**
    *   Tüm menüler solda **Akordeon** (açılır-kapanır) yapıda. Böylece kalabalık yapmıyor.
    *   **Iro.js Renk Çarkı** doğrudan panele entegre edildi.

2.  **Modern Önizleme Alanı (Sağ Üst):**
    *   Yazınız ekranın sağ üst kısmında, "transparanlığı" belli eden özel bir ızgara arka planda duruyor.
    *   **"Sema'yı Aç"** butonu ile arkada dönen mistik bir aura efekti yaratabilirsiniz.

3.  **Yeni "Süper" Özellikler:**
    *   **Neon Modu:** Yazıya parlak bir ışık verir.
    *   **3D Derinlik:** Yazıyı ekrandan fırlamış gibi gösterir.
    *   **Cam Efekti (Glassmorphism):** Kutuyu buzlu cam gibi yapar (Çok popüler!).
    *   **Animasyonlar:** Glitch (Bozulma), Pulse (Kalp atışı) gibi hareketler eklendi.

4.  **Akıllı Kod Çıktısı (Sağ Alt):**
    *   CSS ve HTML sekmeli yapıda.
    *   Kodlar otomatik güncelleniyor, tek tıkla kopyalanıyor.

Nasıl buldun? Tam bir "Tasarım Stüdyosu" havasında oldu! 😎

## Prompt 4

### You
*2025-12-09 12:30:52 +03*

Özgürce geliştirmeye devam edelim yeni fonksiyonlar Yeni butonlar ve Yeni yazı dekorasyon ve yazı euro piçkili jsy renk seçici olarak seçeceğiz kullanacağız ve menüler butonlar sol alanda aşağı kaydırılmalı sayfa düzeninde olacak önizleme yazısı olacak sadece önizleme yazısı sağda üstü olacak altında CSS ve html çıkış kodları olacak ve fonksiyonları özellikleri olacak yeni fonksiyonlar yeni özellikler yeni stiller eklemeye devam edelim daha modern ve daha şık gösterişli bir tema ile 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 12:30:52 +03*

Harika, şimdi işi iyice “pro stüdyo” seviyesine çıkaralım.  
Aşağıdaki kod tam anlamıyla:

- Solda uzun, kaydırılabilir **menü + buton + fonksiyonlar**
- Sağda yukarıda **sadece önizleme yazısı**
- Sağda altta **yan yana HTML ve CSS çıktı alanları**
- Yeni dekorasyonlar: neon, glass, outline, highlight, gradient vb.
- Yeni “euro style” (modern, keskin) fontlar
- Gelişmiş renk seçici (iro.js) + ekstra renk butonları
- Bolca rastgele (random) buton, presetler, kaydet/yükle vb.

Hepsi tek HTML dosyası içinde: HTML + CSS + JS birlikte.  
Direkt kaydedip (ör: `gs-rams-pro.html`) tarayıcıda açabilirsin.

---

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>GS Rams Ultra Pro – Türk Gösterisi & Modern Sema Studio</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    <!-- iro.js renk seçici -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts (Latin + Euro style + el yazısı) -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Rajdhani:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Caveat:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Icon set (Font Awesome) -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #ff6b6b;
            --primary-soft: #ff9f7b;
            --secondary: #5f27cd;
            --accent: #4ecdc4;
            --bg-dark: #0b1120;
            --bg-panel: #020617;
            --bg-soft: #0f172a;
            --border-soft: #1f2937;
            --text-main: #e5e7eb;
            --text-soft: #9ca3af;
            --radius: 14px;
            --shadow-strong: 0 18px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
            --shadow-soft: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8);
            --transition: all 0.25s ease;
        }

        * {
            margin:0;
            padding:0;
            box-sizing:border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #1f2933 0, #020617 55%, #000 100%);
            color: var(--text-main);
            min-height:100vh;
            display:flex;
            align-items:stretch;
            justify-content:center;
        }

        .app {
            max-width: 1600px;
            width:100%;
            margin:12px;
            border-radius:20px;
            overflow:hidden;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(148,163,184,0.08) 0, rgba(15,23,42,0.98) 45%, #020617 100%);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-strong);
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns: 340px minmax(0,1fr);
        }

        /* SOL PANEL – MENÜLER / BUTONLAR (scrollable) */
        .left-panel {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #020617 0%, #020617 35%, #020617 70%, #020617 100%);
            border-right:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.25);
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            max-height:100vh;
        }
        .left-header {
            padding:18px 18px 10px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.25);
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
        }
        .brand {
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:10px;
        }
        .brand-main {
            font-weight:800;
            font-size:1.1rem;
            letter-spacing:.14em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
        }
        .brand-gradient {
            background:linear-gradient(130deg,var(--primary),var(--accent),#facc15);
            -webkit-background-clip:text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
        }
        .brand-badge {
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(248,250,252,0.3);
            color:#e5e7eb;
            text-transform:uppercase;
        }
        .mode-badge {
            font-size:.75rem;
            color:var(--text-soft);
        }

        .left-scroll {
            flex:1;
            overflow-y:auto;
            padding:10px 16px 18px;
        }
        .panel-section {
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.85);
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
            padding:14px 12px 16px;
            margin-bottom:14px;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
            backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
        }
        .panel-title {
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
            margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .panel-title-main {
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:8px;
            font-size:.9rem;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            letter-spacing:.12em;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .panel-title-main i {
            color:var(--primary-soft);
        }
        .btn-reset {
            border:none;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            color:#9ca3af;
            padding:4px 9px;
            border-radius:999px;
            font-size:.7rem;
            cursor:pointer;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.45);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .btn-reset:hover {
            color:#f9fafb;
            border-color:var(--primary-soft);
            background:rgba(148,163,184,0.15);
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .label-row {
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:4px;
        }
        .label {
            font-size:.8rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .label-value {
            font-size:.75rem;
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .select,
        .input,
        .range {
            width:100%;
            border-radius:9px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4);
            background:#020617;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            padding:8px 10px;
            font-size:.85rem;
            outline:none;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .select:focus,
        .input:focus,
        .range:focus {
            border-color:var(--accent);
            box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(78,205,196,0.4);
        }
        .range {
            appearance:none;
            height:6px;
            padding:0;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#4b5563,#111827);
        }
        .range::-webkit-slider-thumb {
            appearance:none;
            width:16px;
            height:16px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--accent));
            border:2px solid #0b1120;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            cursor:pointer;
        }

        .two-cols {
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
            gap:8px;
        }

        .btn-row {
            display:flex;
            gap:8px;
            margin-top:6px;
        }
        .btn {
            flex:1;
            border:none;
            border-radius:10px;
            padding:8px 10px;
            font-size:.8rem;
            font-weight:600;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            letter-spacing:.06em;
            cursor:pointer;
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            gap:5px;
            transition:var(--transition);
            white-space:nowrap;
        }
        .btn-primary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--primary-soft));
            color:#0b1120;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover {
            transform:translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(248,113,113,0.5);
        }
        .btn-random {
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#4ade80);
            color:#022c22;
        }
        .btn-random:hover {
            transform:translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(34,197,94,0.45);
        }
        .btn-ghost {
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .btn-ghost:hover {
            background:rgba(30,64,175,0.4);
            border-color:#60a5fa;
        }

        .check-row {
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:7px;
            margin:2px 0;
        }
        .check-row input {
            width:15px;
            height:15px;
            accent-color:var(--accent);
        }
        .check-row span {
            font-size:.78rem;
            color:#d1d5db;
        }

        .badge-row {
            display:flex;
            flex-wrap:wrap;
            gap:6px;
            margin-top:4px;
        }
        .preset-badge {
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            color:#e5e7eb;
            cursor:pointer;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.8);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .preset-badge:hover {
            border-color:var(--primary);
            color:#fef3c7;
            background:rgba(248,113,113,0.25);
        }

        /* SAĞ PANEL – ÜSTTE ÖNİZLEME, ALTTA KODLAR */
        .right-panel {
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            max-height:100vh;
        }

        .preview-top {
            padding:20px 20px 10px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top,#1f2937 0,#020617 55%,#000 100%);
        }
        .preview-frame {
            position:relative;
            max-width:900px;
            margin:0 auto;
            padding:26px 26px 22px;
            border-radius:18px;
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top left,rgba(248,113,113,0.24),transparent 55%),
                       radial-gradient(circle at bottom right,rgba(59,130,246,0.22),transparent 60%),
                       rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.55);
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .preview-header-row {
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:10px;
            font-size:.8rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .preview-header-row span i {
            color:var(--accent);
            margin-right:6px;
        }

        #previewText {
            display:inline-block;
            min-height:110px;
            width:100%;
            text-align:center;
            font-size:26px;
            line-height:1.5;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            padding:16px 10px;
            word-break:break-word;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }

        .sema-orbit {
            position:absolute;
            inset:-40%;
            pointer-events:none;
            opacity:.14;
            mix-blend-mode:screen;
            background:conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(248,113,113,.3), rgba(59,130,246,.35), rgba(34,197,94,.35), rgba(248,113,113,.3));
            filter:blur(30px);
            animation:orbit 14s linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes orbit {
            from { transform:rotate(0deg) scale(1.1); }
            to   { transform:rotate(360deg) scale(1.1); }
        }

        .preview-bottom {
            flex:1;
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
            gap:12px;
            padding:12px 16px 16px;
            background:#020617;
            overflow:hidden;
        }

        .code-card {
            background:#020617;
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
            overflow:hidden;
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
        }
        .code-head {
            padding:10px 14px;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#020617,#020617,#020617);
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
            font-size:.8rem;
        }
        .code-head-left {
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:8px;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .code-head-left i {
            color:var(--primary-soft);
        }
        .code-btn-row {
            display:flex;
            gap:5px;
        }
        .icon-btn {
            width:28px;
            height:24px;
            border-radius:7px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);
            background:#020617;
            color:#9ca3af;
            font-size:.7rem;
            cursor:pointer;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .icon-btn:hover {
            color:#f9fafb;
            border-color:var(--accent);
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
        }

        .code-body {
            flex:1;
            background:#020617;
            padding:10px 10px 12px;
            font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
            font-size:.76rem;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            overflow:auto;
            white-space:pre;
        }

        /* RESPONSIVE */
        @media (max-width:1100px) {
            .app {
                grid-template-columns: 290px minmax(0,1fr);
            }
        }
        @media (max-width:900px) {
            .app {
                grid-template-columns:1fr;
                max-height:none;
            }
            .left-panel {
                max-height:320px;
            }
            .preview-bottom {
                grid-template-columns:1fr;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width:600px) {
            .preview-frame {
                padding:16px;
            }
            #previewText {
                font-size:20px;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
    <!-- SOL: MENÜLER / BUTONLAR -->
    <aside class="left-panel">
        <div class="left-header">
            <div class="brand">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-palette" style="color:var(--primary-soft);font-size:1.1rem;"></i>
                <div>
                    <div class="brand-main brand-gradient">GS RAMS ULTRA</div>
                    <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Türk Gösterisi · Modern Sema Studio</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <div class="brand-badge">PRO</div>
                <div class="mode-badge"><i class="fa-regular fa-circle-dot"></i> Live</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="left-scroll">
            <!-- METİN İÇERİĞİ -->
            <section class="panel-section">
                <div class="panel-title">
                    <div class="panel-title-main">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-quote-left"></i>
                        Önizleme Metni
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetText()">Metni Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Metin</span>
                        <span class="label" style="opacity:.7;">(HTML &lt;br&gt; destekli)</span>
                    </div>
                    <textarea id="textInput" class="input" rows="3" style="resize:vertical;min-height:70px;"></textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="loadDemoText()">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-message"></i> Demo
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="updatePreview()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-play"></i> Uygula
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- FONT & BOYUT -->
            <section class="panel-section">
                <div class="panel-title">
                    <div class="panel-title-main">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i>
                        Font & Boyut
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetFont()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Font Ailesi</span>
                        <span class="label-value" id="fontFamilyName">Montserrat</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontFamily" class="select">
                        <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif" data-name="Montserrat">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
                        <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif" data-name="Raleway">Raleway (Elegant)</option>
                        <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif" data-name="Rajdhani">Rajdhani (Euro / Futuristic)</option>
                        <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif" data-name="Oswald">Oswald (Euro Condensed)</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif" data-name="Playfair Display">Playfair Display (Klasik)</option>
                        <option value="'Caveat', cursive" data-name="Caveat">Caveat (El Yazısı)</option>
                        <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive" data-name="Dancing Script">Dancing Script (Sema)</option>
                        <option value="Arial, sans-serif" data-name="Arial">Arial (Standart)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Boyut (px)</span>
                            <span class="label-value" id="fontSizeLabel">28</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontSize" class="range" type="range" min="12" max="72" value="28">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Ağırlık</span>
                            <span class="label-value" id="fontWeightLabel">500</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontWeight" class="range" type="range" min="300" max="800" step="100" value="500">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Harf Aralığı</span>
                            <span class="label-value" id="letterSpacingLabel">0px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="letterSpacing" class="range" type="range" min="-1" max="8" step="0.1" value="0">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Satır Yüksekliği</span>
                            <span class="label-value" id="lineHeightLabel">1.5</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="lineHeight" class="range" type="range" min="1" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.5">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomFontCombo()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Rastgele Font Set
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- RENK & GRADIENT -->
            <section class="panel-section">
                <div class="panel-title">
                    <div class="panel-title-main">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-droplet"></i>
                        Renk & Gradient
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetColor()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div id="colorPicker" style="margin:0 auto;"></div>
                <div class="form-group" style="margin-top:8px;">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Ana Renk HEX</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
                        <input id="colorHex" class="input" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:.8rem;" />
                        <button class="btn-ghost" style="flex:0 0 auto;padding:0 10px;" onclick="copyMainColor()">
                            <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="useGradient" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <span>Gradient Yazı (Çift renk)</span>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="useNeon" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <span>Neon Glow</span>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="useHighlight" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <span>Altı Fosforlu Highlight</span>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomColorSet()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Rastgele Renk Seti
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="badge-row">
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyColorPreset('galatasaray')">GS Alev</div>
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyColorPreset('night')">Gece Modu</div>
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyColorPreset('bosphorus')">Boğaz Mavisi</div>
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyColorPreset('sema')">Sema Işığı</div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- DEKORASYON & EFEKTLER -->
            <section class="panel-section">
                <div class="panel-title">
                    <div class="panel-title-main">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>
                        Dekorasyon & Efekt
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetEffects()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Metin Stili</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontStyle" class="select">
                        <option value="normal">Normal</option>
                        <option value="italic">İtalik</option>
                        <option value="oblique">Eğik</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Dekorasyon</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="textDecoration" class="select">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="underline">Altı Çizili</option>
                        <option value="overline">Üst Çizgi</option>
                        <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
                        <option value="underline overline">Çift Çizgi</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Gölge Yoğunluk</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="shadowPreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="soft">Soft</option>
                            <option value="hard">Hard</option>
                            <option value="inner">İç Gölge</option>
                            <option value="glow">Işık Halkası</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Outline</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="outlinePreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="thin">İnce</option>
                            <option value="medium">Orta</option>
                            <option value="bold">Kalın</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Border Stili</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="borderStyle" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="solid">Düz</option>
                            <option value="dashed">Kesikli</option>
                            <option value="dotted">Noktalı</option>
                            <option value="double">Çift</option>
                            <option value="glowframe">Neon Çerçeve</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Köşe Radius</span>
                            <span class="label-value" id="radiusLabel">10px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="radius" class="range" type="range" min="0" max="40" value="10">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="smallCaps" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <span>Küçük Büyük Harf (Small Caps)</span>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="trackingWide" onchange="updatePreview()">
                    <span>Geniş Harf Aralığı</span>
                </div>

                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomEffects()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-shuffle"></i> Rastgele Efekt
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- TASARIM / KAYDET / PAYLAŞ -->
            <section class="panel-section">
                <div class="panel-title">
                    <div class="panel-title-main">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i>
                        Tema / Dışa Aktar
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="badge-row">
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyThemePreset('turk-show')">Türk Gösterisi</div>
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyThemePreset('modern-sema')">Modern Sema</div>
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyThemePreset('euro-led')">Euro LED</div>
                    <div class="preset-badge" onclick="applyThemePreset('minimal')">Minimal</div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row" style="margin-top:8px;">
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="copyAllCode()">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i> HTML+CSS Kopyala
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="downloadFiles()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> İndir
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ: ÖNİZLEME + KOD -->
    <main class="right-panel">
        <!-- sadece önizleme yazısı -->
        <section class="preview-top">
            <div class="preview-frame">
                <div class="sema-orbit"></div>
                <div class="preview-header-row">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Canlı Önizleme</span>
                    <span id="liveInfo" style="font-size:.75rem;">display: inline-block; &middot; GS Rams Ultra</span>
                </div>
                <div id="previewText"></div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- altta yan yana html + css kodları -->
        <section class="preview-bottom">
            <!-- HTML -->
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-head">
                    <div class="code-head-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-html5"></i>
                        <span>HTML Çıktısı</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="code-btn-row">
                        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('html')" title="Kopyala">
                            <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <pre class="code-body" id="htmlOutput"></pre>
            </div>
            <!-- CSS -->
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-head">
                    <div class="code-head-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-css3-alt"></i>
                        <span>CSS Çıktısı</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="code-btn-row">
                        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('css')" title="Kopyala">
                            <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <pre class="code-body" id="cssOutput"></pre>
            </div>
        </section>
    </main>
</div>

<script>
    // ------- GLOBAL STATE ---------
    let state = {
        text: "🇹🇷 GS Rams Mobile ile profesyonel Türk gösterisi & modern sema tasarımları oluşturun!<br>Canlı font, renk, efekt ve tema kontrolleri ile özgürce oynayın.",
        fontFamily: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
        fontSize: 28,
        fontWeight: 500,
        fontStyle: "normal",
        letterSpacing: 0,
        lineHeight: 1.5,
        color: "#f9fafb",
        gradient: false,
        gradientSecond: "#f97316",
        neon: false,
        highlight: false,
        textDecoration: "none",
        shadowPreset: "none",
        outlinePreset: "none",
        borderStyle: "none",
        radius: 10,
        smallCaps: false,
        trackingWide: false
    };

    // ------- Renk Picker Kurulum -------
    const colorPicker = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPicker", {
        width: 170,
        color: state.color,
        layout: [
            { component: iro.ui.Wheel, options: {} },
            { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'value' } }
        ]
    });

    colorPicker.on("color:change", function(color){
        state.color = color.hexString;
        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = color.hexString;
        updatePreview();
    });

    // ------- Başlangıç Ayarları -------
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
        // Metin input
        const textInput = document.getElementById("textInput");
        textInput.value = state.text.replace(/<br>/g, "\n");

        // Font kontrolleri
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value = state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = state.color;

        // Label’lar
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing + "px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius + "px";
        document.getElementById("radius").value = state.radius;
        syncFontFamilyName();

        // Eventler
        initEvents();

        // İlk önizleme
        updatePreview();
    });

    function initEvents(){
        // Metin
        document.getElementById("textInput").addEventListener("input", () => {
            state.text = document.getElementById("textInput").value.replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
            updatePreview();
        });

        // Font ailesi
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").addEventListener("change", e => {
            state.fontFamily = e.target.value;
            syncFontFamilyName();
            updatePreview();
        });

        // Boyut ve diğer range’ler
        document.getElementById("fontSize").addEventListener("input", e => {
            state.fontSize = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").addEventListener("input", e => {
            state.fontWeight = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").addEventListener("input", e => {
            state.letterSpacing = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = e.target.value + "px";
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").addEventListener("input", e => {
            state.lineHeight = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("radius").addEventListener("input", e => {
            state.radius = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = e.target.value + "px";
            updatePreview();
        });
```
