```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Nick Style Ultra Studio – GS RAMS Nick & LED Yazı Tasarımcısı</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    <!-- iro.js color picker -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Rajdhani:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Caveat:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Icons -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #f97316;
            --primary-soft: #fb923c;
            --secondary: #22d3ee;
            --accent: #a855f7;
            --bg-dark: #020617;
            --bg-panel: #020617;
            --bg-soft: #0f172a;
            --border-soft: #1f2937;
            --text-main: #e5e7eb;
            --text-soft: #9ca3af;
            --radius: 14px;
            --shadow-strong: 0 18px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --shadow-soft: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            --transition: all 0.25s ease;
        }
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
        body{
            font-family:'Montserrat',system-ui,sans-serif;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top,#1e293b 0,#020617 50%,#000 100%);
            color:var(--text-main);
            min-height:100vh;
            display:flex;
            align-items:stretch;
            justify-content:center;
        }
        .app{
            max-width:1650px;
            width:100%;
            margin:12px;
            border-radius:20px;
            overflow:hidden;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top,rgba(148,163,184,0.1) 0,rgba(15,23,42,0.98) 40%,#020617 100%);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-strong);
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:360px minmax(0,1fr);
            max-height:calc(100vh - 24px);
        }

        /* SOL PANEL */
        .left-panel{
            background:#020617;
            border-right:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
        }
        .left-header{
            padding:16px 16px 10px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
        }
        .brand{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:10px;
        }
        .brand-main{
            font-weight:800;
            font-size:1.1rem;
            letter-spacing:.16em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
        }
        .brand-gradient{
            background:linear-gradient(120deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary),var(--accent));
            -webkit-background-clip:text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
        }
        .brand-sub{
            font-size:.72rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .pill{
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:4px;
        }
        .left-scroll{
            flex:1;
            overflow-y:auto;
            padding:10px 14px 16px;
        }
        .section{
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.96);
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
            padding:12px 10px 14px;
            margin-bottom:12px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
        }
        .section-header{
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:8px;
        }
        .section-title{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:7px;
            font-size:.82rem;
            letter-spacing:.13em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .section-title i{color:var(--primary-soft);}
        .btn-reset{
            border:none;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            color:#9ca3af;
            padding:4px 8px;
            border-radius:999px;
            font-size:.7rem;
            cursor:pointer;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .btn-reset:hover{
            color:#f9fafb;
            border-color:var(--primary-soft);
            background:rgba(148,163,184,0.18);
        }

        .form-group{margin-bottom:8px;}
        .label-row{
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:3px;
        }
        .label{font-size:.78rem;color:#9ca3af;}
        .value{font-size:.78rem;color:#e5e7eb;}
        .input,.select{
            width:100%;
            border-radius:9px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);
            background:#020617;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            padding:7px 9px;
            font-size:.83rem;
            outline:none;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .input:focus,.select:focus{
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(34,211,238,0.5);
        }
        .range{
            width:100%;
            appearance:none;
            height:6px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#4b5563,#0f172a);
            outline:none;
        }
        .range::-webkit-slider-thumb{
            appearance:none;
            width:16px;
            height:16px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary));
            border:2px solid #020617;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(148,163,184,0.4);
            cursor:pointer;
        }
        .two-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;}
        .btn-row{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-top:4px;}
        .btn{
            flex:1;
            border:none;
            border-radius:9px;
            padding:7px 8px;
            font-size:.76rem;
            font-weight:600;
            letter-spacing:.06em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            cursor:pointer;
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            gap:5px;
            transition:var(--transition);
            white-space:nowrap;
        }
        .btn-primary{
            background:linear-gradient(130deg,var(--primary),var(--primary-soft));
            color:#020617;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(248,113,113,0.55);}
        .btn-ghost{
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .btn-ghost:hover{background:rgba(30,64,175,0.45);border-color:#60a5fa;}
        .btn-random{
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#4ade80);
            color:#022c22;
        }
        .btn-random:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(22,163,74,0.55);}
        .check-row{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:6px;
            margin:2px 0;
        }
        .check-row input{width:15px;height:15px;accent-color:var(--secondary);}
        .check-row span{font-size:.78rem;color:#d1d5db;}
        .chips{
            display:flex;
            flex-wrap:wrap;
            gap:5px;
            margin-top:4px;
        }
        .chip{
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.65);
            cursor:pointer;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .chip:hover{
            border-color:var(--primary);
            background:rgba(248,113,113,0.24);
            color:#fef3c7;
        }

        /* SAĞ PANEL */
        .right-panel{
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            max-height:100%;
        }
        .preview-top{
            padding:16px 18px 10px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#1f2937 0,#020617 55%,#000 100%);
        }
        .preview-shell{
            max-width:900px;
            margin:0 auto;
            position:relative;
            border-radius:20px;
            padding:14px 14px 16px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at top left,rgba(248,113,113,0.27),transparent 60%),
                radial-gradient(circle at bottom right,rgba(56,189,248,0.24),transparent 60%),
                rgba(15,23,42,0.96);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .glow-orbit{
            position:absolute;
            inset:-40%;
            background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,
                rgba(248,113,113,.4),
                rgba(56,189,248,.4),
                rgba(34,197,94,.4),
                rgba(248,113,113,.4));
            filter:blur(32px);
            opacity:.12;
            mix-blend-mode:screen;
            pointer-events:none;
            animation:spin 16s linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes spin{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
        .preview-header-row{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
            font-size:.8rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
            margin-bottom:6px;
        }
        .preview-header-row span i{color:var(--secondary);margin-right:5px;}
        #previewNickWrapper{
            position:relative;
            padding:16px 8px 6px;
            text-align:center;
            min-height:90px;
        }
        #previewNick{
            display:inline-block;
            min-width:120px;
            min-height:50px;
            padding:10px 14px;
            font-size:26px;
            line-height:1.3;
        }

        /* alt bölüm: kodlar + bilgi */
        .bottom-grid{
            flex:1;
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;
            gap:10px;
            padding:10px 14px 14px;
            background:#020617;
            max-height:100%;
        }
        .code-card{
            background:#020617;
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.95);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .code-header{
            padding:8px 11px;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#020617,#020617,#020617);
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.95);
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            font-size:.78rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .code-header-left{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:6px;
        }
        .code-header-left i{color:var(--primary-soft);}
        .icon-btn{
            width:27px;
            height:23px;
            border-radius:7px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background:#020617;
            color:#9ca3af;
            font-size:.7rem;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            cursor:pointer;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .icon-btn:hover{
            color:#f9fafb;
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
        }
        .code-body{
            flex:1;
            padding:8px 8px 10px;
            font-family:"JetBrains Mono","Fira Code",ui-monospace,monospace;
            font-size:.75rem;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            overflow:auto;
            white-space:pre;
        }

        .info-card{
            font-size:.75rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
            padding:8px 10px;
        }
        .info-list{margin:4px 0 0 12px;}
        .info-list li{margin-bottom:3px;}

        /* MOBİL */
        @media(max-width:1150px){
            .app{grid-template-columns:310px minmax(0,1fr);}
        }
        @media(max-width:900px){
            .app{
                grid-template-columns:1fr;
                max-height:none;
            }
            .left-panel{max-height:360px;}
            .bottom-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
        }
        @media(max-width:600px){
            #previewNick{font-size:22px;}
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
    <!-- SOL -->
    <aside class="left-panel">
        <div class="left-header">
            <div class="brand">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-signature" style="color:var(--primary-soft);font-size:1.2rem;"></i>
                <div>
                    <div class="brand-main brand-gradient">NICK STYLE ULTRA</div>
                    <div class="brand-sub">GS Rams · Nick & LED Yazı Generator v2</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:4px;">
                <div class="pill"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> LIVE</div>
                <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Tüm değişiklikler anında</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="left-scroll">
            <!-- NICK GİRİŞİ -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-user-pen"></i>
                        Nick / İsim
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetNick()">
                        Sıfırla
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Nick / İsim</span>
                        <span class="label" style="opacity:.6;">(max 40 önerilir)</span>
                    </div>
                    <input id="nickInput" class="input" maxlength="60" />
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="fillNick('GS Rams')">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-fire"></i> GS Rams
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="fillNick('Türk Gösterisi')">
                        Türk Gösterisi
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row" style="margin-top:4px;">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomNick()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Rastgele Nick
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- NICK TARZ PRESETLERİ -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-star-half-stroke"></i>
                        Hazır Nick Stilleri
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="chips">
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyNickStylePreset('led-panel')">LED Panel Nick</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyNickStylePreset('turk-show')">Türk Gösterisi</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyNickStylePreset('euro-fut')">Euro Futuristik</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyNickStylePreset('hand-sign')">El Yazısı İmza</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyNickStylePreset('minimal')">Minimal Clean</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyNickStylePreset('badge')">Badge / Rozet</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyNickStylePreset('3d')">3D Sahne</div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- FONT / BOYUT / HİZALAMA -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i>
                        Font & Görünüm
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetFont()">
                        Font Sıfırla
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Font Ailesi</span>
                        <span class="value" id="fontFamilyName">Montserrat</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontFamily" class="select">
                        <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif" data-name="Montserrat">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
                        <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif" data-name="Raleway">Raleway (Elegant)</option>
                        <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif" data-name="Rajdhani">Rajdhani (Euro / Fut)</option>
                        <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif" data-name="Oswald">Oswald (Kompakt)</option>
                        <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif" data-name="Bebas Neue">Bebas Neue (Başlık)</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif" data-name="Playfair Display">Playfair Display (Klasik)</option>
                        <option value="'Caveat', cursive" data-name="Caveat">Caveat (El Yazısı)</option>
                        <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive" data-name="Dancing Script">Dancing Script (İmza)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Boyut</span>
                            <span class="value" id="fontSizeLabel">32px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontSize" type="range" class="range" min="14" max="80" value="32">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Ağırlık</span>
                            <span class="value" id="fontWeightLabel">600</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontWeight" type="range" class="range" min="300" max="900" step="100" value="600">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Harf Aralığı</span>
                            <span class="value" id="letterSpacingLabel">0px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="letterSpacing" type="range" class="range" min="-1" max="10" step="0.2" value="0">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Satır Yüksekliği</span>
                            <span class="value" id="lineHeightLabel">1.3</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="lineHeight" type="range" class="range" min="1" max="2" step="0.1" value="1.3">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Hizalama</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="textAlign" class="select">
                            <option value="center">Ortala</option>
                            <option value="left">Sol</option>
                            <option value="right">Sağ</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Stil</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="fontStyle" class="select">
                            <option value="normal">Normal</option>
                            <option value="italic">İtalik</option>
                            <option value="oblique">Eğik</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="smallCaps">
                    <span>Small Caps</span>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="trackingWide">
                    <span>Ekstra Geniş Harf Aralığı</span>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomFontCombo()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-shuffle"></i> Font Mix
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- RENK & GRADIENT & PALET -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-droplet"></i>
                        Renk & Gradient
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetColor()">Renk Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div id="colorPicker" style="margin:0 auto 4px;"></div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Ana Renk HEX</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;">
                        <input id="colorHex" class="input" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:.8rem;">
                        <button class="btn-ghost" style="flex:0 0 auto;padding:0 8px;" onclick="copyMainColor()">
                            <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="check-row">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="useGradient">
                        <span>Gradient Yazı</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="check-row">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="useNeon">
                        <span>Neon Glow</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="useHighlight">
                    <span>Altı Fosforlu Highlight</span>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Hazır Paletler</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="chips">
                        <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('gs')">GS Alev</div>
                        <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('ocean')">Okyanus</div>
                        <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('sunset')">Gün Batımı</div>
                        <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('neon-blue')">Neon Mavi</div>
                        <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('rainbow')">Rainbow</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomColorSet()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Renk Random
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- DEKORASYON / GÖLGE / OUTLINE / KUTU -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>
                        Dekorasyon & Efekt
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetEffects()">
                        Efekt Sıfırla
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Metin Dekorasyonu</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="textDecoration" class="select">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="underline">Altı Çizili</option>
                        <option value="overline">Üst Çizgi</option>
                        <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
                        <option value="underline overline">Çift Çizgi</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Gölge</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="shadowPreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="soft">Soft</option>
                            <option value="hard">Hard</option>
                            <option value="glow">Glow Halo</option>
                            <option value="3d">3D Gölge</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Outline / Stroke</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="outlinePreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="thin">İnce</option>
                            <option value="medium">Orta</option>
                            <option value="bold">Kalın</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Çerçeve</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="borderStyle" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="solid">Düz</option>
                            <option value="dashed">Kesik</option>
                            <option value="dotted">Noktalı</option>
                            <option value="double">Çift</option>
                            <option value="glowframe">Neon Çerçeve</option>
                            <option value="tag">Tag / Etiket</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Köşe Radius</span>
                            <span class="value" id="radiusLabel">12px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="radius" type="range" class="range" min="0" max="40" value="12">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Arka Plan Şerit</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="backBanner" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="pill">Pill Banner</option>
                            <option value="bar">Alt Bar</option>
                            <option value="label">Label Kutusu</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Animasyon</span>
                        </div>
                        <select id="animationPreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="pulse">Nabız</option>
                            <option value="bounce">Zıplama</option>
                            <option value="glow-loop">Glow Loop</option>
                            <option value="slide">Slide In</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomEffects()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Efekt Random
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- KAYDET / SLOT / İNDİR -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i>
                        Kayıt & Dışa Aktar
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="chips">
                    <div class="chip" onclick="saveSlot(1)">Slot 1 Kaydet</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="loadSlot(1)">Slot 1 Yükle</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="saveSlot(2)">Slot 2 Kaydet</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="loadSlot(2)">Slot 2 Yükle</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="saveSlot(3)">Slot 3 Kaydet</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="loadSlot(3)">Slot 3 Yükle</div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row" style="margin-top:6px;">
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="copyAllCode()">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i> HTML+CSS Kopyala
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="downloadFiles()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> İndir
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ: ÖNİZLEME (SADECE NICK) + KODLAR -->
    <main class="right-panel">
        <section class="preview-top">
            <div class="preview-shell">
                <div class="glow-orbit"></div>
                <div class="preview-header-row">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Nick Önizleme</span>
                    <span id="liveInfo">class: .nick-style-ultra · inline-block</span>
                </div>
                <div id="previewNickWrapper">
                    <span id="previewNick"></span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="bottom-grid">
            <!-- HTML -->
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-header-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-html5"></i>
                        <span>HTML Çıktısı</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('html')" title="HTML Kopyala">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <pre id="htmlOutput" class="code-body"></pre>
            </div>
            <!-- CSS + Bilgi -->
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-header-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-css3-alt"></i>
                        <span>CSS Çıktısı & Not</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('css')" title="CSS Kopyala">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <pre id="cssOutput" class="code-body"></pre>
            </div>
        </section>
    </main>
</div>

<script>
    // ----------------- GLOBAL STATE -----------------
    let state = {
        nick: "GS Rams",
        fontFamily: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
        fontSize: 32,
        fontWeight: 600,
        fontStyle: "normal",
        letterSpacing: 0,
        lineHeight: 1.3,
        textAlign: "center",
        color: "#f9fafb",
        gradient: false,
        gradientSecond: "#f97316",
        neon: false,
        highlight: false,
        textDecoration: "none",
        shadowPreset: "none",
        outlinePreset: "none",
        borderStyle: "none",
        radius: 12,
        backBanner: "none",
        animationPreset: "none",
        smallCaps: false,
        trackingWide: false
    };

    // ----------------- COLOR PICKER -----------------
    const colorPicker = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPicker", {
        width: 170,
        color: state.color,
        layout: [
            { component: iro.ui.Wheel },
            { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType:'value' } }
        ]
    });

    colorPicker.on("color:change", (color)=>{
        state.color = color.hexString;
        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = color.hexString;
        updatePreview();
    });

    // ----------------- INIT -----------------
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", ()=>{
        // Inputs
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value = state.nick;

        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();

        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value = state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value = state.lineHeight;

        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize + "px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing + "px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;

        document.getElementById("textAlign").value = state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").value = state.fontStyle;
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value = state.textDecoration;
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value = state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("radius").value = state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius + "px";
        document.getElementById("backBanner").value = state.backBanner;
        document.getElementById("animationPreset").value = state.animationPreset;

        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = state.color;

        document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked = state.smallCaps;
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked = state.trackingWide;
        document.getElementById("useGradient").checked = state.gradient;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;
        document.getElementById("useHighlight").checked = state.highlight;

        bindEvents();
        updatePreview();
    });

    function bindEvents(){
        // Nick
        document.getElementById("nickInput").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            state.nick = e.target.value || "Nick";
            updatePreview();
        });

        // Font family
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.fontFamily = e.target.value;
            syncFontFamilyName();
            updatePreview();
        });

        // Range’ler
        document.getElementById("fontSize").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            state.fontSize = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize + "px";
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            state.fontWeight = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            state.letterSpacing = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing + "px";
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            state.lineHeight = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("radius").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            state.radius = +e.target.value;
            document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius + "px";
            updatePreview();
        });

        // Diğer select / checkbox
        document.getElementById("textAlign").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.textAlign = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.fontStyle = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.textDecoration = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.shadowPreset = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.outlinePreset = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.borderStyle = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("backBanner").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.backBanner = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("animationPreset").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.animationPreset = e.target.value;
            updatePreview();
        });

        document.getElementById("smallCaps").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.smallCaps = e.target.checked;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.trackingWide = e.target.checked;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("useGradient").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.gradient = e.target.checked;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("useNeon").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.neon = e.target.checked;
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("useHighlight").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.highlight = e.target.checked;
            updatePreview();
        });

        // Color HEX manuel
        document.getElementById("colorHex").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            const val = e.target.value;
            if(/^#([0-9A-Fa-f]{3}){1,2}$/.test(val)){
                state.color = val;
                colorPicker.color.hexString = val;
                updatePreview();
            }
        });
    }

    function syncFontFamilyName(){
        const sel = document.getElementById("fontFamily");
        const opt = sel.options[sel.selectedIndex];
        const name = opt.getAttribute("data-name") || "Custom";
        document.getElementById("fontFamilyName").textContent = name;
    }

    // ----------------- PREVIEW -----------------
    function updatePreview(){
        const el = document.getElementById("previewNick");

        el.textContent = state.nick || "Nick";

        el.style.fontFamily = state.fontFamily;
        el.style.fontSize = state.fontSize + "px";
        el.style.fontWeight = state.fontWeight;
        el.style.fontStyle = state.fontStyle;
        el.style.letterSpacing = (state.letterSpacing + (state.trackingWide ? 2 : 0)) + "px";
        el.style.lineHeight = state.lineHeight;
        el.style.textAlign = state.textAlign;
        el.style.textDecoration = state.textDecoration;
        el.style.borderRadius = state.radius + "px";
        el.style.display = "inline-block";
        el.style.fontVariantCaps = state.smallCaps ? "small-caps" : "normal";

        // Banner / arka plan
        let bgColor = "transparent";
        let paddingY = 10;
        let paddingX = 14;
        if(state.backBanner === "pill"){
            bgColor = "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
            paddingY = 10; paddingX = 18;
        } else if(state.backBanner === "bar"){
            bgColor = "linear-gradient(to right,rgba(15,23,42,0.2),rgba(15,23,42,0.9),rgba(15,23,42,0.2))";
            paddingY = 8; paddingX = 24;
        } else if(state.backBanner === "label"){
            bgColor = "rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
            paddingY = 8; paddingX = 16;
        }

        el.style.backgroundImage = (state.highlight)
            ? "linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 55%, rgba(250,204,21,0.45) 55%, rgba(250,204,21,0.95) 100%)"
            : bgColor;

        // Gradient yazı
        if(state.gradient){
            const c1 = state.color;
            const c2 = state.gradientSecond;
            el.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(90deg,${c1},${c2})` + (state.highlight ? ", " + el.style.backgroundImage : "");
            el.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            el.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
            el.style.color = "transparent";
        } else {
            el.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
            el.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
            el.style.color = state.color;
            if(!state.highlight && state.backBanner !== "none"){
                el.style.backgroundImage = bgColor;
            }
        }

        // Padding ve border radius banner’a göre
        el.style.padding = paddingY + "px " + paddingX + "px";

        // Gölge
        let shadow = "none";
        const neonGlow = hexToRgba(state.color,0.9);
        switch(state.shadowPreset){
            case "soft":
                shadow = "0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.65)";
                break;
            case "hard":
                shadow = "3px 3px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
                break;
            case "glow":
                shadow = `0 0 10px ${neonGlow},0 0 26px ${neonGlow}`;
                break;
            case "3d":
                shadow = "2px 2px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.9),4px 4px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.7)";
                break;
        }
        el.style.textShadow = shadow;

        // Neon override
        if(state.neon){
            const c = neonGlow;
            el.style.textShadow = `0 0 10px ${c},0 0 24px ${c},0 0 42px ${c}`;
        }

        // Outline / stroke
        switch(state.outlinePreset){
            case "thin":
                el.style.webkitTextStroke = "0.6px rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
                break;
            case "medium":
                el.style.webkitTextStroke = "1px rgba(15,23,42,1)";
                break;
            case "bold":
                el.style.webkitTextStroke = "1.5px rgba(15,23,42,1)";
                break;
            default:
                el.style.webkitTextStroke = "0px transparent";
        }

        // Border
        el.style.boxShadow = "none";
        switch(state.borderStyle){
            case "solid":
                el.style.border = "2px solid " + state.color;
                break;
            case "dashed":
                el.style.border = "2px dashed " + state.color;
                break;
            case "dotted":
                el.style.border = "2px dotted " + state.color;
                break;
            case "double":
                el.style.border = "3px double " + state.color;
                break;
            case "glowframe":
                el.style.border = "2px solid " + hexToRgba(state.color,0.7);
                el.style.boxShadow = `0 0 16px ${hexToRgba(state.color,0.75)}`;
                break;
            case "tag":
                el.style.border = "2px solid rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
                el.style.boxShadow = "0 3px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
                break;
            default:
                el.style.border = "none";
        }

        // Animasyon
        el.style.animation = "none";
        const animName = "nickAnim_" + state.animationPreset;
        addAnimationCSS(state.animationPreset, animName);
        if(state.animationPreset !== "none"){
            el.style.animation = `${animName} 1.6s infinite`;
        }

        updateCodeOutputs();
    }

    // ----------------- CODE OUTPUTS -----------------
    function updateCodeOutputs(){
        const cssLines = [];
        cssLines.push(".nick-style-ultra {");
        cssLines.push("  display: inline-block;");
        cssLines.push(`  font-family: ${state.fontFamily};`);
        cssLines.push(`  font-size: ${state.fontSize}px;`);
        cssLines.push(`  font-weight: ${state.fontWeight};`);
        cssLines.push(`  font-style: ${state.fontStyle};`);
        cssLines.push(`  letter-spacing: ${state.letterSpacing + (state.trackingWide ? 2 : 0)}px;`);
        cssLines.push(`  line-height: ${state.lineHeight};`);
        cssLines.push(`  text-align: ${state.textAlign};`);
        cssLines.push(`  font-variant-caps: ${state.smallCaps ? "small-caps" : "normal"};`);
        cssLines.push(`  text-decoration: ${state.textDecoration};`);
        cssLines.push(`  border-radius: ${state.radius}px;`);

        if(state.gradient){
            cssLines.push(`  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color}, ${state.gradientSecond});`);
            cssLines.push("  -webkit-background-clip: text;");
            cssLines.push("  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;");
        } else {
            cssLines.push(`  color: ${state.color};`);
        }

        if(state.highlight){
            cssLines.push("  background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 55%, rgba(250,204,21,0.45) 55%, rgba(250,204,21,0.95) 100%);");
        } else if(state.backBanner !== "none"){
            const bg = bannerBackgroundForCSS();
            if(bg){
                cssLines.push(`  background-image: ${bg};`);
            }
        }

        if(state.shadowPreset !== "none" || state.neon){
            cssLines.push(`  text-shadow: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.textShadow};`);
        }
        if(state.outlinePreset !== "none"){
            cssLines.push(`  -webkit-text-stroke: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.webkitTextStroke};`);
        }
        if(state.borderStyle !== "none"){
            cssLines.push(`  border: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.border};`);
            cssLines.push(`  box-shadow: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.boxShadow};`);
        }
        cssLines.push("}");

        if(state.animationPreset !== "none"){
            const name = "nickAnim_" + state.animationPreset;
            cssLines.push("");
            cssLines.push(getAnimationCSS(state.animationPreset, name));
        }

        const cssCode = cssLines.join("\n");

        const htmlCode = [
            "<!-- Nick Style Ultra – HTML Çıktısı -->",
            '<span class="nick-style-ultra">',
            "  " + (state.nick || "Nick"),
            "</span>"
        ].join("\n");

        document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent = cssCode;
        document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent = htmlCode;
    }

    // ----------------- HELPERS -----------------
    function hexToRgba(hex, alpha){
        const h = hex.replace("#","");
        const full = h.length===3 ? h.split("").map(c=>c+c).join("") : h;
        const num = parseInt(full,16);
        const r=(num>>16)&255,g=(num>>8)&255,b=num&255;
        return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`;
    }

    function bannerBackgroundForCSS(){
        if(state.backBanner === "pill"){
            return "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
        }
        if(state.backBanner === "bar"){
            return "linear-gradient(to right, rgba(15,23,42,0.2), rgba(15,23,42,0.9), rgba(15,23,42,0.2))";
        }
        if(state.backBanner === "label"){
            return "rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
        }
        return "";
    }

    // Animasyon CSS üretimi
    function addAnimationCSS(preset, name){
        // Burada DOM'a style eklemeye gerek yok, CSS kodunu sadece text olarak veriyoruz.
        // preview tarafında inline animation name kullanıyoruz, keyframes'ler gerçek CSS'te
        // son kullanıcı tarafından eklenmeli – biz kodu output olarak gösteriyoruz.
    }
    function getAnimationCSS(preset, name){
        if(preset === "pulse"){
            return `@keyframes ${name} {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 0.9; }
}`;
        }
        if(preset === "bounce"){
            return `@keyframes ${name} {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  30% { transform: translateY(-6px); }
  60% { transform: translateY(2px); }
}`;
        }
        if(preset === "glow-loop"){
            return `@keyframes ${name} {
  0% { text-shadow: 0 0 6px ${hexToRgba(state.color,0.6)}; }
  50% { text-shadow: 0 0 22px ${hexToRgba(state.color,1)}; }
  100% { text-shadow: 0 0 6px ${hexToRgba(state.color,0.6)}; }
}`;
        }
        if(preset === "slide"){
            return `@keyframes ${name} {
  0% { transform: translateX(-16px); opacity: 0; }
  100% { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; }
}`;
        }
        return "";
    }

    // ----------------- RESET / PRESET / RANDOM -----------------
    function resetNick(){
        state.nick = "GS Rams";
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value = state.nick;
        updatePreview();
    }
    function fillNick(text){
        state.nick = text;
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value = text;
        updatePreview();
    }
    function randomNick(){
        const parts1 = ["GS","TR","Sema","Stage","Nick","LED","Show","Ultra","Rams","Ghost"];
        const parts2 = ["Pro","Master","X","FX","King","Legend","Storm","Light","Fire","Wave"];
        const nick = parts1[Math.floor(Math.random()*parts1.length)] + " " +
                     parts2[Math.floor(Math.random()*parts2.length)];
        state.nick = nick;
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value = nick;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetFont(){
        state.fontFamily = "'Montserrat', sans-serif";
        state.fontSize = 32;
        state.fontWeight = 600;
        state.fontStyle = "normal";
        state.letterSpacing = 0;
        state.lineHeight = 1.3;
        state.textAlign = "center";
        state.smallCaps = false;
        state.trackingWide = false;

        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value = state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value = state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").value = state.fontStyle;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize + "px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing + "px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked = false;
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked = false;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetColor(){
        state.color = "#f9fafb";
        state.gradient = false;
        state.gradientSecond = "#f97316";
        state.neon = false;
        state.highlight = false;
        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = state.color;
        document.getElementById("useGradient").checked = false;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = false;
        document.getElementById("useHighlight").checked = false;
        colorPicker.color.hexString = state.color;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetEffects(){
        state.textDecoration = "none";
        state.shadowPreset = "none";
        state.outlinePreset = "none";
        state.borderStyle = "none";
        state.radius = 12;
        state.backBanner = "none";
        state.animationPreset = "none";

        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value = "none";
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = "none";
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value = "none";
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = "none";
        document.getElementById("radius").value = state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius + "px";
        document.getElementById("backBanner").value = state.backBanner;
        document.getElementById("animationPreset").value = state.animationPreset;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function randomFontCombo(){
        const fonts = [
            "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
            "'Raleway', sans-serif",
            "'Rajdhani', sans-serif",
            "'Oswald', sans-serif",
            "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif",
            "'Playfair Display', serif",
            "'Caveat', cursive",
            "'Dancing Script', cursive"
        ];
        state.fontFamily = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random()*fonts.length)];
        state.fontSize = 20 + Math.floor(Math.random()*45);
        state.fontWeight = 300 + 100*Math.floor(Math.random()*7);
        state.letterSpacing = +(Math.random()*6).toFixed(1);
        state.lineHeight = +(1.1 + Math.random()*0.7).toFixed(1);
        state.textAlign = ["left","center","right"][Math.floor(Math.random()*3)];

        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value = state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value = state.textAlign;

        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize+"px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing+"px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function randomColorSet(){
        const base = "#"+Math.floor(Math.random()*0xffffff).toString(16).padStart(6,"0");
        const second = "#"+Math.floor(Math.random()*0xffffff).toString(16).padStart(6,"0");
        state.color = base;
        state.gradientSecond = second;
        state.gradient = Math.random() > 0.3;
        state.neon = Math.random() > 0.5;
        state.highlight = Math.random() > 0.7;

        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = state.color;
        document.getElementById("useGradient").checked = state.gradient;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;
        document.getElementById("useHighlight").checked = state.highlight;
        colorPicker.color.hexString = state.color;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function randomEffects(){
        const shadows = ["none","soft","hard","glow","3d"];
        const outlines = ["none","thin","medium","bold"];
        const borders = ["none","solid","dashed","dotted","double","glowframe","tag"];
        const banners = ["none","pill","bar","label"];
        const anims = ["none","pulse","bounce","glow-loop","slide"];

        state.shadowPreset = shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
        state.outlinePreset = outlines[Math.floor(Math.random()*outlines.length)];
        state.borderStyle = borders[Math.floor(Math.random()*borders.length)];
        state.backBanner = banners[Math.floor(Math.random()*banners.length)];
        state.animationPreset = anims[Math.floor(Math.random()*anims.length)];
        state.radius = Math.floor(Math.random()*34);

        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value = state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("backBanner").value = state.backBanner;
        document.getElementById("animationPreset").value = state.animationPreset;
        document.getElementById("radius").value = state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius + "px";

        updatePreview();
    }

    function applyColorPreset(p){
        if(p==="gs"){
            state.color = "#ffb703";
            state.gradientSecond = "#e11d48";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = true;
        } else if(p==="ocean"){
            state.color = "#0ea5e9";
            state.gradientSecond = "#22c55e";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = false;
        } else if(p==="sunset"){
            state.color = "#f97316";
            state.gradientSecond = "#facc15";
            state.gradient = true;
        } else if(p==="neon-blue"){
            state.color = "#38bdf8";
            state.gradientSecond = "#a855f7";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = true;
        } else if(p==="rainbow"){
            state.color = "#ef4444";
            state.gradientSecond = "#22c55e";
            state.gradient = true;
        }
        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = state.color;
        document.getElementById("useGradient").checked = state.gradient;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;
        colorPicker.color.hexString = state.color;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function applyNickStylePreset(name){
        if(name==="led-panel"){
            state.fontFamily = "'Rajdhani', sans-serif";
            state.fontSize = 34;
            state.fontWeight = 700;
            state.textAlign = "center";
            state.color = "#22d3ee";
            state.gradientSecond = "#a855f7";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = true;
            state.shadowPreset = "glow";
            state.borderStyle = "glowframe";
            state.backBanner = "bar";
            state.animationPreset = "glow-loop";
        } else if(name==="turk-show"){
            state.fontFamily = "'Oswald', sans-serif";
            state.fontSize = 36;
            state.fontWeight = 700;
            state.textAlign = "center";
            state.color = "#ffb703";
            state.gradientSecond = "#e11d48";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = true;
            state.shadowPreset = "3d";
            state.borderStyle = "tag";
            state.backBanner = "label";
            state.animationPreset = "bounce";
        } else if(name==="euro-fut"){
            state.fontFamily = "'Rajdhani', sans-serif";
            state.fontSize = 30;
            state.fontWeight = 600;
            state.textAlign = "center";
            state.color = "#22d3ee";
            state.gradientSecond = "#22c55e";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = false;
            state.shadowPreset = "soft";
            state.borderStyle = "solid";
            state.backBanner = "none";
            state.animationPreset = "slide";
        } else if(name==="hand-sign"){
            state.fontFamily = "'Dancing Script', cursive";
            state.fontSize = 34;
            state.fontWeight = 600;
            state.textAlign = "center";
            state.color = "#f97316";
            state.gradientSecond = "#fde68a";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = false;
            state.shadowPreset = "soft";
            state.borderStyle = "none";
            state.backBanner = "none";
            state.animationPreset = "pulse";
        } else if(name==="minimal"){
            state.fontFamily = "'Montserrat', sans-serif";
            state.fontSize = 24;
            state.fontWeight = 500;
            state.textAlign = "center";
            state.color = "#e5e7eb";
            state.gradient = false;
            state.neon = false;
            state.shadowPreset = "none";
            state.borderStyle = "none";
            state.backBanner = "none";
            state.animationPreset = "none";
        } else if(name==="badge"){
            state.fontFamily = "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif";
            state.fontSize = 30;
            state.fontWeight = 600;
            state.textAlign = "center";
            state.color = "#f9fafb";
            state.gradientSecond = "#22d3ee";
            state.gradient = false;
            state.neon = false;
            state.shadowPreset = "hard";
            state.borderStyle = "double";
            state.backBanner = "pill";
            state.animationPreset = "pulse";
        } else if(name==="3d"){
            state.fontFamily = "'Oswald', sans-serif";
            state.fontSize = 34;
            state.fontWeight = 700;
            state.textAlign = "center";
            state.color = "#f97316";
            state.gradientSecond = "#facc15";
            state.gradient = true;
            state.neon = false;
            state.shadowPreset = "3d";
            state.borderStyle = "solid";
            state.backBanner = "bar";
            state.animationPreset = "pulse";
        }

        // UI sync
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize + "px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value = state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("backBanner").value = state.backBanner;
        document.getElementById("animationPreset").value = state.animationPreset;
        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = state.color;
        document.getElementById("useGradient").checked = state.gradient;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;
        colorPicker.color.hexString = state.color;
        updatePreview();
    }

    // ----------------- KOPYALA / İNDİR / SLOT -----------------
    function copyCode(type){
        const text = type==="html"
            ? document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent
            : document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(()=>{
            alert(type.toUpperCase()+" kodu kopyalandı!");
        });
    }

    function copyAllCode(){
        const html = document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent;
        const css = document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent;
        const bundle = html + "\n\n<style>\n" + css + "\n</style>";
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(bundle).then(()=>{
            alert("HTML + CSS birlikte kopyalandı.");
        });
    }

    function downloadFiles(){
        const html = document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent;
        const css = document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent;
        downloadBlob("nick-style-ultra.html", html, "text/html");
        downloadBlob("nick-style-ultra.css", css, "text/css");
    }

    function downloadBlob(filename,content,type){
        const blob = new Blob([content],{type});
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement("a");
        a.href = url;
        a.download = filename;
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        document.body.removeChild(a);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    }

    function copyMainColor(){
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(state.color).then(()=>{
            alert("Renk kopyalandı: "+state.color);
        });
    }

    function saveSlot(n){
        const key = "nickStyleUltra_slot_"+n;
        localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(state));
        alert("Slot "+n+" kaydedildi.");
    }
    function loadSlot(n){
        const key = "nickStyleUltra_slot_"+n;
        const data = localStorage.getItem(key);
        if(!data){ alert("Slot "+n+" boş."); return; }
        state = JSON.parse(data);

        // UI güncelle
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value = state.nick;
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value = state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize+"px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing+"px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value = state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").value = state.fontStyle;
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value = state.textDecoration;
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value = state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("radius").value = state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius+"px";
        document.getElementById("backBanner").value = state.backBanner;
        document.getElementById("animationPreset").value = state.animationPreset;
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked = state.smallCaps;
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked = state.trackingWide;
        document.getElementById("colorHex").value = state.color;
        document.getElementById("useGradient").checked = state.gradient;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;
        document.getElementById("useHighlight").checked = state.highlight;
        colorPicker.color.hexString = state.color;

        updatePreview();
    }
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

Şu anda proje ne yapıyor?

- Sadece **Nick / İsim** önizlemesi,
- Solda:
  - Nick girişi + hazır nick butonları + rastgele nick,
  - Hazır **Nick tarzı presetleri** (LED panel, Türk gösterisi, Euro futuristik, imza, minimal, 3D),
  - Font, boyut, hizalama, small caps, tracking,
  - iro.js renk seçici + hazır renk paletleri + random renk + neon + highlight,
  - Gölge, outline, border, banner (pill/label/bar), animasyon presetleri,
  - 3 slotluk **kayıt / yükleme** sistemi (localStorage),
  - HTML / CSS çıktı, tek tuşla kopya veya indir.

Eğer bir sonraki adımda istersen:

- Aynı ekrana **ikinci nick slotu** (örn: sol tarafta “isim”, sağda “tag”) ekleyebiliriz,
- Ya da direkt **“CSS buton tasarımcısı”** sekmesi açıp aynı arayüzle buton tasarlatabiliriz.

Bir sonraki geliştirmede hangi yönde gidelim:  
Nick tarafını mı daha da manyaklaştırıyoruz (örn: emoji picker, simge kütüphanesi, yazıyı auto-şekillendirme) yoksa yeni sekme olarak **Buton / Banner tasarım atölyesi** mi ekleyelim?

Bu "GS Rams Ultimate Studio" versiyonu. Tam gaz ileri gidiyoruz! 🚀

İsteklerine göre şunları yaptık:
1.  **Gereksiz "Demo Başlığı" Kaldırıldı:** Artık sadece senin yazdığın "Nick" (Kullanıcı Adı/Metin) sahnede parlıyor.
2.  **Çift Renk Seçici (Dual iro.js):** Gradient (geçişli) renkler için iki farklı renk seçici ekledim.
3.  **Doku (Texture) Kütüphanesi:** Yazının içine "Metal", "Alev", "Altın", "Karbon" gibi dokular giydirme özelliği geldi.
4.  **3D Uzay:** Yazıyı sağa, sola, yukarı, aşağı yatırma (Perspective & Rotate) özellikleri.
5.  **Karışım Modları (Blend Modes):** Profesyonel tasarımcıların kullandığı katman harmanlama.
6.  **Tam Otomatik Kod:** Sen ayarı değiştirdiğin an CSS ve HTML kodu aşağıda güncelleniyor.

Bu kodu bir `.html` dosyası olarak kaydet ve tarayıcıda aç. Karşında **Ultimate Studio**:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>GS Rams Ultimate Studio - Pro Nick Maker</title>
    <!-- Iro.js Renk Seçici -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- İkonlar -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <!-- Google Fonts (Geniş Kütüphane) -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;900&family=Oswald:wght@700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Righteous&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Orbitron:wght@900&family=Pacifico&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-dark: #050505;
            --panel-bg: #111111;
            --border: #333;
            --accent: #ff4d4d; /* GS Kırmızı */
            --accent-2: #ffbf00; /* GS Sarı */
            --text: #eee;
            --glass: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; }
        
        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-dark);
            color: var(--text);
            height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 380px 1fr;
        }

        /* --- SOL PANEL (KONTROL MERKEZİ) --- */
        .sidebar {
            background: var(--panel-bg);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            overflow-y: auto;
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .sidebar-header {
            padding: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a1a1a, #000);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--accent);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .logo {
            font-family: 'Audiowide', cursive;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--text);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }
        .logo span { color: var(--accent); }

        .controls-wrapper {
            padding: 15px;
            flex: 1;
        }

        /* Akordeon Bölümler */
        .control-section {
            background: #1a1a1a;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            border: 1px solid #2a2a2a;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .section-header {
            padding: 15px;
            background: #222;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .section-header:hover { background: #2a2a2a; color: var(--accent-2); }
        
        .section-content {
            padding: 15px;
            display: none;
            border-top: 1px solid #333;
        }
        .control-section.active .section-content { display: block; }
        .control-section.active .section-header { color: var(--accent); }

        /* Form Elemanları */
        .control-group { margin-bottom: 15px; }
        label { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #888; margin-bottom: 5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
        
        input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #000;
            border: 1px solid #444;
            color: white;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-family: monospace;
        }
        input:focus, select:focus { border-color: var(--accent); outline: none; }

        input[type="range"] {
            width: 100%;
            height: 6px;
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 3px;
            appearance: none;
        }
        input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
            appearance: none;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            background: var(--accent);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* Renk Seçiciler */
        .color-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .picker-label { text-align: center; font-size: 0.7rem; margin-bottom: 5px; color: #aaa; }

        /* Butonlar */
        .btn-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; }
        .btn {
            padding: 12px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: bold;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: white; }
        .btn-secondary { background: #333; color: white; }
        .btn-random { background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff00cc, #333399); color: white; }
        .btn:hover { filter: brightness(1.2); transform: translateY(-2px); }

        /* --- SAĞ PANEL (PREVIEW & CODE) --- */
        .main-area {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-rows: 1fr 250px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #222, #000);
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Önizleme */
        .preview-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            background-image: 
                linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
                linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 40px 40px;
            perspective: 1000px; /* 3D için */
        }

        #nickRender {
            font-size: 80px;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.1;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            cursor: default;
            transition: all 0.2s ease-out; /* Hızlı tepki */
            padding: 40px;
        }

        /* Kod Alanı */
        .code-panel {
            background: #0a0a0a;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--accent);
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
        }

        .code-box {
            position: relative;
            padding: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-right: 1px solid #222;
        }

        .code-header {
            background: #151515;
            padding: 8px 15px;
            color: #888;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #222;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        textarea.code-output {
            width: 100%;
            height: calc(100% - 35px);
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: #00ff88;
            padding: 15px;
            resize: none;
        }

        /* Doku (Texture) Sınıfları */
        .texture-metal { background-image: url('https://img.freepik.com/free-photo/silver-metallic-textured-background_53876-145455.jpg'); }
        .texture-fire { background-image: url('https://img.freepik.com/free-photo/burning-fire-flame-background_53876-111867.jpg'); }
        .texture-gold { background-image: url('https://img.freepik.com/free-photo/gold-texture-background_1101-1402.jpg'); }
        .texture-galaxy { background-image: url('https://img.freepik.com/free-photo/night-sky-glows-with-stars-fantasy-galaxy-generated-by-ai_188544-15599.jpg'); }
        
        .masked-text {
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- SOL PANEL -->
    <aside class="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
            <div class="logo">GS <span>ULTIMATE</span> STUDIO</div>
        </div>

        <div class="controls-wrapper">
            
            <!-- 1. İÇERİK & FONT -->
            <div class="control-section active">
                <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
                    <i class="fas fa-keyboard"></i> İçerik ve Font
                </div>
                <div class="section-content">
                    <div class="control-group">
                        <label>Nick / Metin</label>
                        <input type="text" id="inputText" value="RAMS PARK" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    </div>
                    <div class="control-group">
                        <label>Font Ailesi</label>
                        <select id="fontFamily" onchange="updateDesign()">
                            <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
                            <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Oswald (Dik/Güçlü)</option>
                            <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue (Poster)</option>
                            <option value="'Righteous', cursive">Righteous (Fütüristik)</option>
                            <option value="'Audiowide', cursive">Audiowide (Tekno)</option>
                            <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Black Ops (Askeri)</option>
                            <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (Retro Oyun)</option>
                            <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Orbitron (Bilim Kurgu)</option>
                            <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Pacifico (El Yazısı)</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
```
