```html
                    <div class="btn-grid">
                        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="changeCase('upper')">ABC</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="changeCase('lower')">abc</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:10px;">
                        <label>Harf Aralığı (Spacing)</label>
                        <input type="range" id="letterSpacing" min="-5" max="50" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 2. RENK & DOKU SİSTEMİ -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
                    <i class="fas fa-palette"></i> Renk ve Doku
                </div>
                <div class="section-content">
                    <div class="control-group">
                        <label>Dolgu Modu</label>
                        <select id="fillMode" onchange="updateDesign()">
                            <option value="solid">Tek Renk</option>
                            <option value="gradient">Gradient (Geçişli)</option>
                            <option value="texture">Doku (Resim Kaplama)</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Renk Seçiciler (IRO JS) -->
                    <div id="colorControls">
                        <div class="color-row">
                            <div>
                                <div class="picker-label">Başlangıç Rengi</div>
                                <div id="colorPicker1"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div id="picker2container" style="display:none;">
                                <div class="picker-label">Bitiş Rengi</div>
                                <div id="colorPicker2"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="control-group" id="gradientAngleBox" style="display:none;">
                            <label>Gradient Açısı</label>
                            <input type="range" id="gradientAngle" min="0" max="360" value="45" oninput="updateDesign()">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Doku Seçici -->
                    <div id="textureControls" style="display:none;">
                        <div class="btn-grid">
                            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="setTexture('texture-metal')">Metal</button>
                            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="setTexture('texture-fire')">Alev</button>
                            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="setTexture('texture-gold')">Altın</button>
                            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="setTexture('texture-galaxy')">Galaksi</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 3. EFEKTLER & 3D -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
                    <i class="fas fa-cube"></i> 3D ve Efektler
                </div>
                <div class="section-content">
                    <div class="control-group">
                        <label>3D Yatırma (X Ekseni)</label>
                        <input type="range" id="rotateX" min="-60" max="60" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    </div>
                    <div class="control-group">
                        <label>3D Döndürme (Y Ekseni)</label>
                        <input type="range" id="rotateY" min="-60" max="60" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    </div>
                    <div class="control-group">
                        <label>Neon Parlaklık (Glow)</label>
                        <input type="range" id="glowAmount" min="0" max="50" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                    </div>
                    <div class="control-group">
                        <label>Dış Çizgi (Stroke)</label>
                        <input type="range" id="strokeWidth" min="0" max="5" step="0.5" value="0" oninput="updateDesign()">
                        <input type="color" id="strokeColor" value="#ffffff" oninput="updateDesign()" style="width:100%; height:30px; margin-top:5px;">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 4. KÜTÜPHANE VE EXPORT -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
                    <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kütüphane
                </div>
                <div class="section-content">
                    <label>Hızlı Temalar</label>
                    <div class="btn-grid">
                        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="background:#b00" onclick="applyPreset('gs')">GS Efsane</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="background:#0ff; color:#000" onclick="applyPreset('cyber')">Cyberpunk</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="background:#d4af37; color:#000" onclick="applyPreset('gold')">Luxury</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomize()">🎲 Rastgele</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
    <main class="main-area">
        <!-- Önizleme -->
        <div class="preview-container">
            <div id="nickRender">RAMS PARK</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Kod Çıktısı -->
        <div class="code-panel">
            <div class="code-box">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <span>CSS STYLE</span>
                    <i class="fas fa-copy" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="copyCode('css')"></i>
                </div>
                <textarea id="cssOutput" class="code-output" readonly></textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="code-box">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <span>HTML ELEMENT</span>
                    <i class="fas fa-copy" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="copyCode('html')"></i>
                </div>
                <textarea id="htmlOutput" class="code-output" readonly></textarea>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        // --- RENK SEÇİCİLERİ KURULUMU ---
        var color1 = "#ffffff";
        var color2 = "#ff0000";
        var selectedTexture = "";

        var picker1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPicker1", { width: 120, color: "#ffffff", layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }] });
        var picker2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPicker2", { width: 120, color: "#ff0000", layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }] });

        picker1.on('color:change', function(color) { color1 = color.hexString; updateDesign(); });
        picker2.on('color:change', function(color) { color2 = color.hexString; updateDesign(); });

        // --- UI FONKSİYONLARI ---
        function toggleSection(header) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.control-section').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
            header.parentElement.classList.add('active');
        }

        function changeCase(type) {
            const input = document.getElementById('inputText');
            input.value = type === 'upper' ? input.value.toUpperCase() : input.value.toLowerCase();
            updateDesign();
        }

        function setTexture(textureClass) {
            selectedTexture = textureClass;
            document.getElementById('fillMode').value = 'texture';
            updateDesign();
        }

        // --- ANA GÜNCELLEME MOTORU ---
        function updateDesign() {
            const text = document.getElementById('inputText').value;
            const el = document.getElementById('nickRender');
            const fillMode = document.getElementById('fillMode').value;
            
            // Font & Temel
            el.innerText = text;
            el.style.fontFamily = document.getElementById('fontFamily').value;
            el.style.letterSpacing = document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value + "px";

            // Renk ve Dolgu
            el.className = ''; // Reset classes
            el.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
            el.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'initial';
            el.style.color = color1;

            const picker2Container = document.getElementById('picker2container');
            const angleBox = document.getElementById('gradientAngleBox');
            const textureControls = document.getElementById('textureControls');
            const colorControls = document.getElementById('colorControls');

            if (fillMode === 'solid') {
                picker2Container.style.display = 'none';
                angleBox.style.display = 'none';
                textureControls.style.display = 'none';
                colorControls.style.display = 'block';
                el.style.color = color1;
            } 
            else if (fillMode === 'gradient') {
                picker2Container.style.display = 'block';
                angleBox.style.display = 'block';
                textureControls.style.display = 'none';
                colorControls.style.display = 'block';
                
                const angle = document.getElementById('gradientAngle').value;
                el.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(${angle}deg, ${color1}, ${color2})`;
                el.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
                el.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
            } 
            else if (fillMode === 'texture') {
                colorControls.style.display = 'none';
                textureControls.style.display = 'block';
                el.classList.add('masked-text');
                if(selectedTexture) el.classList.add(selectedTexture);
                else el.style.color = "#888"; // Fallback
            }

            // 3D Transform
            const rotX = document.getElementById('rotateX').value;
            const rotY = document.getElementById('rotateY').value;
            el.style.transform = `rotateX(${rotX}deg) rotateY(${rotY}deg)`;

            // Efektler (Glow & Stroke)
            const glow = document.getElementById('glowAmount').value;
            const strokeW = document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value;
            const strokeC = document.getElementById('strokeColor').value;
            
            let shadows = [];
            if(glow > 0) {
                const glowColor = fillMode === 'solid' ? color1 : (fillMode === 'gradient' ? color2 : '#fff');
                shadows.push(`0 0 ${glow}px ${glowColor}`);
                shadows.push(`0 0 ${glow*2}px ${glowColor}`);
            }
            el.style.textShadow = shadows.length > 0 ? shadows.join(',') : 'none';

            if(strokeW > 0) {
                el.style.webkitTextStroke = `${strokeW}px ${strokeC}`;
            } else {
                el.style.webkitTextStroke = '0';
            }

            // Kod Oluştur
            generateCode(el);
        }

        function generateCode(el) {
            // Computed style yerine inline stilleri alıyoruz ki daha temiz kod çıksın
            let css = `#pro-nick {\n`;
            css += `    font-family: ${el.style.fontFamily};\n`;
            css += `    font-size: 80px;\n`;
            css += `    letter-spacing: ${el.style.letterSpacing};\n`;
            
            if(el.style.backgroundImage !== 'none') {
                css += `    background-image: ${el.style.backgroundImage};\n`;
                css += `    -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
                css += `    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
                if(el.classList.contains('texture-metal')) css += `    /* Texture: Metal URL buraya */\n`;
            } else {
                css += `    color: ${el.style.color};\n`;
            }
            
            if(el.style.transform !== 'none') css += `    transform: ${el.style.transform};\n`;
            if(el.style.textShadow !== 'none') css += `    text-shadow: ${el.style.textShadow};\n`;
            if(el.style.webkitTextStroke !== '0px') css += `    -webkit-text-stroke: ${el.style.webkitTextStroke};\n`;
            
            css += `    display: inline-block;\n`;
            css += `}`;

            document.getElementById('cssOutput').value = css;
            document.getElementById('htmlOutput').value = `<h1 id="pro-nick">${document.getElementById('inputText').value}</h1>`;
        }

        // --- PRESETLER ---
        function applyPreset(type) {
            if(type === 'gs') {
                picker1.color.hexString = "#ffb300"; // Sarı
                picker2.color.hexString = "#a80000"; // Kırmızı
                document.getElementById('fillMode').value = 'gradient';
                document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Oswald', sans-serif";
                document.getElementById('rotateY').value = 20;
                document.getElementById('glowAmount').value = 10;
            } else if(type === 'cyber') {
                picker1.color.hexString = "#00ffff";
                picker2.color.hexString = "#ff00ff";
                document.getElementById('fillMode').value = 'gradient';
                document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Orbitron', sans-serif";
                document.getElementById('glowAmount').value = 20;
                document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value = 5;
            } else if(type === 'gold') {
                setTexture('texture-gold');
                document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Playfair Display', serif";
                document.getElementById('rotateX').value = 10;
            }
            updateDesign();
        }

        function randomize() {
            const fonts = ["'Orbitron', sans-serif", "'Black Ops One', cursive", "'Pacifico', cursive", "'Montserrat', sans-serif"];
            document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)];
            
            picker1.color.hexString = '#'+Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16);
            picker2.color.hexString = '#'+Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16);
            
            document.getElementById('fillMode').value = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'gradient' : 'solid';
            document.getElementById('glowAmount').value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 30);
            document.getElementById('rotateY').value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 60) - 30;
            
            updateDesign();
        }

        function copyCode(id) {
            const copyText = document.getElementById(id + 'Output');
            copyText.select();
            document.execCommand("copy");
            alert("Kod kopyalandı! 📋");
        }

        // Başlat
        updateDesign();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
```

### 🚀 **GS Rams Ultimate Studio Özellikleri:**

1.  **Tam Gaz Renk Kontrolü:** Tek renk yetmez! **Dual-Picker** (Çift Renk Seçici) ile efsanevi Gradient geçişler yapabilirsin. Açısını bile ayarlayabiliyorsun.
2.  **Nick Odaklı Tasarım:** Gereksiz her şeyi attık. Sadece senin yazdığın isim/söz ekranda dev gibi parlıyor.
3.  **Dokular (Textures):** Yazının içine resim giydirme özelliği. "Metal", "Alev" ve "Galaksi" seçenekleri hazır.
4.  **3D Boyutlandırma:** Yazıyı sadece sağa sola değil, X ve Y ekseninde yatırarak sinematik bir duruş verebilirsin.
5.  **Otomatik Kod Üretimi:** Altta, profesyonel bir IDE gibi görünen kara kutu içinde kodların hazır. Kopyala ve sitene yapıştır.
6.  **Kütüphane:** Tek tıkla "GS Efsane", "Cyberpunk" veya "Luxury" modlarına geçiş yap.

Bu artık basit bir araç değil, tam bir **Web Tasarım Stüdyosu** oldu! 😎 Güle güle kullan.

## Prompt 6

### You
*2025-12-09 13:05:41 +03*

iro.js renk picker renk seçici ler yok gölge yazı renk gradyan webkit dahil renk seçimde de iro picker kullanacak. Yeni özelikler ekle transparan yazı ya arka plan resim gif dosya ve url yazının başıma yazının sonu na resim gif dosya url cdn ekle webkit liner özelik ve diğer özelikleri domksiykm

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 13:05:43 +03*

Direkt ihtiyaçlara göre güncelleyip genişletilmiş yeni bir sürüm hazırladım:

- **iro.js renk seçici eksikliği**: Bu sürümde:
  - Yazı rengi (foreground) için iro picker
  - Gradient ikinci renk için iro picker
  - Gölge rengi için iro picker
  - Border rengi için iro picker  
  hepsi **iro.js** ile yapıldı. Manuel color input yok.

- **Transparan yazı + arka plan resim / GIF / URL**:
  - Yazı tamamen şeffaf, arkasından arka plan resmi/GIF görünebiliyor.
  - Arka plan URL alanı: CDN, resim, GIF, her türlü URL.
  - “Ön, arka icon / GIF” alanı: yazının başına ve sonuna img / icon / GIF URL koyuyorsun.

- **webkit gradient, background-clip, text-fill** gibi özellikler CSS çıktısına tam ekleniyor.

- Yeni özellikler:
  - Yazı rengi modu: Solid / Gradient / Transparent (tam şeffaf)
  - Arka plan tipi: Renk / Resim URL / GIF URL
  - Shadow rengi iro picker
  - Border rengi iro picker
  - Başlangıç ve bitiş simgesi (emoji, küçük resim, GIF URL)
  - Tüm renkler sadece iro picker üzerinden kontrol ediliyor.

Aşağıdaki kod TEK PARÇA tam HTML + CSS + JS:  
Kaydet (`nick-ultra-bg.html`) ve tarayıcıda aç.

---

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>GS Rams Nick Ultra – iro.js Full Color Studio</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    <!-- iro.js renk seçici -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Rajdhani:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Caveat:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Icons -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #f97316;
            --secondary: #22d3ee;
            --accent: #a855f7;
            --bg: #020617;
            --panel: #020617;
            --soft: #0f172a;
            --border-soft: #1f2937;
            --text-main: #e5e7eb;
            --text-soft: #9ca3af;
            --radius: 14px;
            --shadow-strong: 0 18px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --shadow-soft: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            --transition: all 0.25s ease;
        }
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
        body{
            font-family:'Montserrat',system-ui,sans-serif;
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#1e293b 0,#020617 55%,#000 100%);
            color:var(--text-main);
            min-height:100vh;
            display:flex;
            align-items:stretch;
            justify-content:center;
        }
        .app{
            max-width:1650px;
            width:100%;
            margin:12px;
            border-radius:20px;
            overflow:hidden;
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top,rgba(148,163,184,0.12) 0,rgba(15,23,42,0.98) 40%,#020617 100%);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-strong);
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:360px minmax(0,1fr);
            max-height:calc(100vh - 24px);
        }

        /* SOL PANEL */
        .left-panel{
            background:#020617;
            border-right:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
        }
        .left-header{
            padding:14px 16px 8px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
        }
        .brand{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:10px;
        }
        .brand-main{
            font-weight:800;
            font-size:1.1rem;
            letter-spacing:.16em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            background:linear-gradient(120deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary),var(--accent));
            -webkit-background-clip:text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
        }
        .brand-sub{
            font-size:.72rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .pill{
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:5px;
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .left-scroll{
            flex:1;
            overflow-y:auto;
            padding:10px 14px 16px;
        }
        .section{
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.97);
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
            padding:12px 10px 14px;
            margin-bottom:12px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
        }
        .section-header{
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:8px;
        }
        .section-title{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:7px;
            font-size:.82rem;
            letter-spacing:.13em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .section-title i{color:var(--primary);}
        .btn-reset{
            border:none;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            color:#9ca3af;
            padding:4px 8px;
            border-radius:999px;
            font-size:.7rem;
            cursor:pointer;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .btn-reset:hover{
            color:#f9fafb;
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            background:rgba(148,163,184,0.18);
        }
        .form-group{margin-bottom:8px;}
        .label-row{
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:3px;
        }
        .label{font-size:.78rem;color:#9ca3af;}
        .value{font-size:.78rem;color:#e5e7eb;}
        .input,.select{
            width:100%;
            border-radius:9px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background:#020617;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            padding:7px 9px;
            font-size:.82rem;
            outline:none;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .input:focus,.select:focus{
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(34,211,238,0.45);
        }
        .range{
            width:100%;
            appearance:none;
            height:6px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#4b5563,#0f172a);
            outline:none;
        }
        .range::-webkit-slider-thumb{
            appearance:none;
            width:15px;
            height:15px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary));
            border:2px solid #020617;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            cursor:pointer;
        }
        .two-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;}
        .btn-row{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-top:4px;}
        .btn{
            flex:1;
            border:none;
            border-radius:9px;
            padding:7px 8px;
            font-size:.76rem;
            font-weight:600;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            letter-spacing:.06em;
            cursor:pointer;
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            gap:5px;
            transition:var(--transition);
            white-space:nowrap;
        }
        .btn-primary{
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary));
            color:#020617;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(248,113,113,0.55);}
        .btn-ghost{
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .btn-ghost:hover{background:rgba(30,64,175,0.45);border-color:#60a5fa;}
        .btn-random{
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#4ade80);
            color:#022c22;
        }
        .btn-random:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(22,163,74,0.55);}
        .check-row{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:6px;
            margin:2px 0;
        }
        .check-row input{width:15px;height:15px;accent-color:var(--secondary);}
        .check-row span{font-size:.78rem;color:#d1d5db;}
        .chips{
            display:flex;
            flex-wrap:wrap;
            gap:5px;
            margin-top:4px;
        }
        .chip{
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            cursor:pointer;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .chip:hover{
            border-color:var(--primary);
            background:rgba(248,113,113,0.26);
            color:#fef3c7;
        }
        .picker-label{
            font-size:.74rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
            margin-top:3px;
            text-align:center;
        }

        /* SAĞ PANEL */
        .right-panel{
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            max-height:100%;
        }
        .preview-top{
            padding:14px 16px 10px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#1f2937 0,#020617 55%,#000 100%);
        }
        .preview-shell{
            max-width:900px;
            margin:0 auto;
            position:relative;
            border-radius:20px;
            padding:14px 14px 16px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        #previewBg{
            position:absolute;
            inset:0;
            background-size:cover;
            background-position:center;
            background-repeat:no-repeat;
            opacity:0.25;
            z-index:0;
        }
        .preview-header-row{
            position:relative;
            z-index:2;
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            font-size:.8rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
            margin-bottom:6px;
        }
        .preview-header-row span i{color:var(--secondary);margin-right:5px;}
        #previewNickWrapper{
            position:relative;
            z-index:2;
            padding:18px 8px 10px;
            text-align:center;
            min-height:90px;
        }
        #previewNick{
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            gap:8px;
            min-height:50px;
            padding:10px 14px;
            font-size:32px;
            line-height:1.3;
        }
        #leftIcon,#rightIcon{
            max-height:32px;
        }

        .bottom-grid{
            flex:1;
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;
            gap:10px;
            padding:10px 14px 14px;
            background:#020617;
            max-height:100%;
        }
        .code-card{
            background:#020617;
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.95);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .code-header{
            padding:8px 11px;
            background:#020617;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.95);
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            font-size:.78rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .code-header-left{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:6px;
        }
        .code-header-left i{color:var(--primary);}
        .icon-btn{
            width:26px;
            height:23px;
            border-radius:7px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            background:#020617;
            color:#9ca3af;
            font-size:.7rem;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            cursor:pointer;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .icon-btn:hover{
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            color:#f9fafb;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
        }
        .code-body{
            flex:1;
            padding:8px 8px 10px;
            font-family:"JetBrains Mono","Fira Code",ui-monospace,monospace;
            font-size:.75rem;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            overflow:auto;
            white-space:pre;
        }

        @media(max-width:1150px){
            .app{grid-template-columns:310px minmax(0,1fr);}
        }
        @media(max-width:900px){
            .app{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-height:none;}
            .left-panel{max-height:360px;}
            .bottom-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
        }
        @media(max-width:600px){
            #previewNick{font-size:24px;}
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
    <!-- SOL PANEL -->
    <aside class="left-panel">
        <div class="left-header">
            <div class="brand">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-signature" style="color:var(--primary);font-size:1.2rem;"></i>
                <div>
                    <div class="brand-main">NICK ULTRA GS</div>
                    <div class="brand-sub">iro.js Full Color · Arka Plan + GIF + CDN URL</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:4px;">
                <div class="pill"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> LIVE</div>
                <span style="font-size:.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Değişiklik = Anlık Önizleme</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="left-scroll">
            <!-- NICK -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-user-pen"></i>
                        Nick / İsim
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetNick()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Nick / İsim</span>
                        <span class="label" style="opacity:.6;">(sadece önizleme nick'i)</span>
                    </div>
                    <input id="nickInput" class="input" maxlength="60">
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="fillNick('GS Rams')">GS Rams</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="fillNick('Türk Gösterisi')">Türk Gösterisi</button>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row" style="margin-top:4px;">
                    <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomNick()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Rastgele Nick
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- YAZI TİPİ -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i>
                        Font Ayarları
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetFont()">Font Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Font Ailesi</span>
                        <span class="value" id="fontFamilyName">Montserrat</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontFamily" class="select">
                        <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif" data-name="Montserrat">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
                        <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif" data-name="Raleway">Raleway (Elegant)</option>
                        <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif" data-name="Rajdhani">Rajdhani (Euro / Fut)</option>
                        <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif" data-name="Oswald">Oswald (Kompakt)</option>
                        <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif" data-name="Bebas Neue">Bebas Neue (Başlık)</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif" data-name="Playfair Display">Playfair Display (Klasik)</option>
                        <option value="'Caveat', cursive" data-name="Caveat">Caveat (El Yazısı)</option>
                        <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive" data-name="Dancing Script">Dancing Script (İmza)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Boyut</span>
                            <span class="value" id="fontSizeLabel">32px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontSize" type="range" class="range" min="14" max="80" value="32">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Ağırlık</span>
                            <span class="value" id="fontWeightLabel">600</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontWeight" type="range" class="range" min="300" max="900" step="100" value="600">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Harf Aralığı</span>
                            <span class="value" id="letterSpacingLabel">0px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="letterSpacing" type="range" class="range" min="-1" max="10" step="0.2" value="0">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Satır Yüksekliği</span>
                            <span class="value" id="lineHeightLabel">1.3</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="lineHeight" type="range" class="range" min="1" max="2" step="0.1" value="1.3">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <span class="label">Hizalama</span>
                        <select id="textAlign" class="select">
                            <option value="center">Ortala</option>
                            <option value="left">Sol</option>
                            <option value="right">Sağ</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <span class="label">Stil</span>
                        <select id="fontStyle" class="select">
                            <option value="normal">Normal</option>
                            <option value="italic">İtalik</option>
                            <option value="oblique">Eğik</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="smallCaps">
                    <span>Small Caps</span>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="trackingWide">
                    <span>Ekstra Geniş Harf Aralığı</span>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- YAZI RENGİ & GRADIENT (IRO PICKER) -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-droplet"></i>
                        Yazı Rengi
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetColor()">Renk Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Yazı Renk Modu</span>
                    <select id="colorMode" class="select">
                        <option value="solid">Solid (Tek Renk)</option>
                        <option value="gradient">Gradient</option>
                        <option value="transparent">Tam Transparan</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Ana Yazı Rengi</span>
                    <div id="pickerTextMain"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="textMainHexLabel"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Gradient 2. Renk</span>
                    <div id="pickerTextSecond"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="textSecondHexLabel"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="useNeon">
                    <span>Neon Glow</span>
                </div>

                <div class="chips">
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('gs')">GS Alev</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('ocean')">Okyanus</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('sunset')">Gün Batımı</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('neon-blue')">Neon Mavi</div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- GÖLGE & BORDER (IRO PICKER) -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>
                        Gölge & Çerçeve
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetEffects()">Efekt Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <span class="label">Metin Dekoru</span>
                        <select id="textDecoration" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="underline">Altı Çizili</option>
                            <option value="overline">Üst Çizgi</option>
                            <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
                            <option value="underline overline">Çift Çizgi</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <span class="label">Gölge Preset</span>
                        <select id="shadowPreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="soft">Soft</option>
                            <option value="hard">Hard</option>
                            <option value="glow">Glow</option>
                            <option value="3d">3D</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Gölge Rengi</span>
                    <div id="pickerShadow"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="shadowHexLabel"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <span class="label">Outline</span>
                        <select id="outlinePreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="thin">İnce</option>
                            <option value="medium">Orta</option>
                            <option value="bold">Kalın</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <span class="label">Border Stili</span>
                        <select id="borderStyle" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="solid">Düz</option>
                            <option value="dashed">Kesik</option>
                            <option value="dotted">Noktalı</option>
                            <option value="double">Çift</option>
                            <option value="glowframe">Neon Frame</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Border Rengi</span>
                    <div id="pickerBorder"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="borderHexLabel"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Köşe Radius</span>
                        <span class="value" id="radiusLabel">12px</span>
                    </div>
                    <input id="radius" type="range" class="range" min="0" max="40" value="12">
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- ARKA PLAN RESİM / GIF / URL + BAŞ / SON İKON -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="section-header">
                    <div class="section-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i>
                        Arka Plan & İkon
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetBackground()">BG Sıfırla</button>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Arka Plan Tipi</span>
                    <select id="bgMode" class="select">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="color">Renk (koyu)</option>
                        <option value="image">Resim / GIF URL</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Arka Plan Rengi (panel)</span>
                    <div id="pickerBg"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="bgHexLabel"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Arka Plan Resim / GIF URL</span>
                        <span class="label" style="opacity:.6;">(CDN, img, gif)</span>
                    </div>
                    <input id="bgUrl" class="input" placeholder="https://cdn.site.com/image.gif">
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Yazının Başı İkon / GIF URL</span>
                    <input id="leftIconUrl" class="input" placeholder="emoji de girebilirsin: 🔥">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <span class="label">Yazının Sonu İkon / GIF URL</span>
                    <input id="rightIconUrl" class="input" placeholder="ör: https://.../icon.png">
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
    <main class="right-panel">
        <section class="preview-top">
            <div class="preview-shell">
                <div id="previewBg"></div>
                <div class="preview-header-row">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Nick Önizleme</span>
                    <span style="font-size:.75rem;color:#9ca3af;">class: <strong>.nick-style-ultra</strong> · display:inline-block;</span>
                </div>
                <div id="previewNickWrapper">
                    <span id="previewNick">
                        <span id="leftIcon"></span>
                        <span id="nickText"></span>
                        <span id="rightIcon"></span>
                    </span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="bottom-grid">
            <!-- HTML -->
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-header-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-html5"></i>
                        <span>HTML Çıktısı</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('html')" title="HTML Kopyala">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <pre id="htmlOutput" class="code-body"></pre>
            </div>
            <!-- CSS -->
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-header-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-css3-alt"></i>
                        <span>CSS Çıktısı (webkit gradient dahil)</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('css')" title="CSS Kopyala">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <pre id="cssOutput" class="code-body"></pre>
            </div>
        </section>
    </main>
</div>

<script>
    // state
    const state = {
        nick:"GS Rams",
        fontFamily:"'Montserrat', sans-serif",
        fontSize:32,
        fontWeight:600,
        fontStyle:"normal",
        letterSpacing:0,
        lineHeight:1.3,
        textAlign:"center",
        smallCaps:false,
        trackingWide:false,

        colorMode:"solid", // solid / gradient / transparent
        colorMain:"#f9fafb",
        colorSecond:"#f97316",
        neon:false,

        shadowPreset:"none",
        shadowColor:"#000000",
        outlinePreset:"none",
        borderStyle:"none",
        borderColor:"#f97316",
        radius:12,

        bgMode:"none",  // none / color / image
        bgColor:"#020617",
        bgUrl:"",

        textDecoration:"none",

        leftIconUrl:"",
        rightIconUrl:""
    };

    // iro pickers
    let pickerTextMain, pickerTextSecond, pickerShadow, pickerBorder, pickerBg;

    function initPickers(){
        pickerTextMain = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerTextMain", {
            width:140,
            color:state.colorMain
        });
        pickerTextSecond = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerTextSecond", {
            width:120,
            color:state.colorSecond
        });
        pickerShadow = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerShadow", {
            width:100,
            color:state.shadowColor
        });
        pickerBorder = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerBorder", {
            width:100,
            color:state.borderColor
        });
        pickerBg = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerBg", {
            width:100,
            color:state.bgColor
        });

        pickerTextMain.on("color:change", c=>{
            state.colorMain = c.hexString;
            document.getElementById("textMainHexLabel").textContent = c.hexString;
            updatePreview();
        });
        pickerTextSecond.on("color:change", c=>{
            state.colorSecond = c.hexString;
            document.getElementById("textSecondHexLabel").textContent = c.hexString;
            updatePreview();
        });
        pickerShadow.on("color:change", c=>{
            state.shadowColor = c.hexString;
            document.getElementById("shadowHexLabel").textContent = c.hexString;
            updatePreview();
        });
        pickerBorder.on("color:change", c=>{
            state.borderColor = c.hexString;
            document.getElementById("borderHexLabel").textContent = c.hexString;
            updatePreview();
        });
        pickerBg.on("color:change", c=>{
            state.bgColor = c.hexString;
            document.getElementById("bgHexLabel").textContent = c.hexString;
            updatePreview();
        });

        document.getElementById("textMainHexLabel").textContent = state.colorMain;
        document.getElementById("textSecondHexLabel").textContent = state.colorSecond;
        document.getElementById("shadowHexLabel").textContent = state.shadowColor;
        document.getElementById("borderHexLabel").textContent = state.borderColor;
        document.getElementById("bgHexLabel").textContent = state.bgColor;
    }

    // init UI
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", ()=>{
        initPickers();

        document.getElementById("nickInput").value = state.nick;
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value = state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value = state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize+"px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing+"px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;

        document.getElementById("textAlign").value = state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").value = state.fontStyle;
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked = state.smallCaps;
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked = state.trackingWide;

        document.getElementById("colorMode").value = state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;

        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value = state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("radius").value = state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius+"px";
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value = state.textDecoration;

        document.getElementById("bgMode").value = state.bgMode;
        document.getElementById("bgUrl").value = state.bgUrl;

        bindEvents();
        syncFontFamilyName();
        updatePreview();
    });

    function bindEvents(){
        // Nick
        document.getElementById("nickInput").addEventListener("input", e=>{
            state.nick = e.target.value || "Nick";
            updatePreview();
        });

        // Font family
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").addEventListener("change", e=>{
            state.fontFamily = e.target.value;
            syncFontFamilyName();
            updatePreview();
        });

        ["fontSize","fontWeight","letterSpacing","lineHeight","radius"].forEach(id=>{
            document.getElementById(id).addEventListener("input", e=>{
                const v = +e.target.value;
                if(id==="fontSize"){state.fontSize=v;document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent=v+"px";}
                if(id==="fontWeight"){state.fontWeight=v;document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent=v;}
                if(id==="letterSpacing"){state.letterSpacing=v;document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent=v+"px";}
                if(id==="lineHeight"){state.lineHeight=v;document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent=v;}
                if(id==="radius"){state.radius=v;document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent=v+"px";}
                updatePreview();
            });
        });

        document.getElementById("textAlign").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.textAlign=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.fontStyle=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.smallCaps=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.trackingWide=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("colorMode").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.colorMode=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("useNeon").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.neon=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.shadowPreset=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.outlinePreset=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.borderStyle=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.textDecoration=e.target.value;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("bgMode").addEventListener("change", e=>{state.bgMode=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("bgUrl").addEventListener("input", e=>{state.bgUrl=e.target.value;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("leftIconUrl").addEventListener("input", e=>{state.leftIconUrl=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("rightIconUrl").addEventListener("input", e=>{state.rightIconUrl=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
    }

    function syncFontFamilyName(){
        const sel=document.getElementById("fontFamily");
        const opt=sel.options[sel.selectedIndex];
        const name=opt.getAttribute("data-name")||"Custom";
        document.getElementById("fontFamilyName").textContent=name;
    }

    // ---------------- PREVIEW ----------------
    function updatePreview(){
        const wrapper=document.getElementById("previewNick");
        const textSpan=document.getElementById("nickText");
        const left=document.getElementById("leftIcon");
        const right=document.getElementById("rightIcon");
        const bg=document.getElementById("previewBg");

        textSpan.textContent = state.nick || "Nick";

        // Icon / emoji / image mantığı
        applyIconToSpan(left, state.leftIconUrl);
        applyIconToSpan(right, state.rightIconUrl);

        // Temel font stilleri
        wrapper.style.fontFamily=state.fontFamily;
        wrapper.style.fontSize=state.fontSize+"px";
        wrapper.style.fontWeight=state.fontWeight;
        wrapper.style.fontStyle=state.fontStyle;
        wrapper.style.letterSpacing=(state.letterSpacing + (state.trackingWide?2:0))+"px";
        wrapper.style.lineHeight=state.lineHeight;
        wrapper.style.textAlign=state.textAlign;
        wrapper.style.fontVariantCaps=state.smallCaps?"small-caps":"normal";
        wrapper.style.textDecoration=state.textDecoration;
        wrapper.style.borderRadius=state.radius+"px";
        wrapper.style.display="inline-flex";

        // Renk modu
        if(state.colorMode==="transparent"){
            wrapper.style.color="transparent";
            wrapper.style.backgroundImage="none";
            wrapper.style.webkitBackgroundClip="initial";
            wrapper.style.webkitTextFillColor="transparent";
        } else if(state.colorMode==="solid"){
            wrapper.style.color=state.colorMain;
            wrapper.style.backgroundImage="none";
            wrapper.style.webkitBackgroundClip="initial";
            wrapper.style.webkitTextFillColor="initial";
        } else if(state.colorMode==="gradient"){
            wrapper.style.backgroundImage=`linear-gradient(90deg,${state.colorMain},${state.colorSecond})`;
            wrapper.style.webkitBackgroundClip="text";
            wrapper.style.webkitTextFillColor="transparent";
            wrapper.style.color="transparent";
        }

        // Gölge
        let shadow="none";
        const neonGlow=state.neon ? hexToRgba(state.colorMain,0.9) : state.shadowColor;
        switch(state.shadowPreset){
            case "soft":
                shadow="0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.65)";
                break;
            case "hard":
                shadow="3px 3px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
                break;
            case "glow":
                shadow=`0 0 10px ${neonGlow},0 0 26px ${neonGlow}`;
                break;
            case "3d":
                shadow="2px 2px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.9),4px 4px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.7)";
                break;
        }
        wrapper.style.textShadow=shadow;

        if(state.neon){
            const c=hexToRgba(state.colorMain,0.9);
            wrapper.style.textShadow=`0 0 10px ${c},0 0 24px ${c},0 0 42px ${c}`;
        }

        // Outline
        switch(state.outlinePreset){
            case "thin":wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="0.5px rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";break;
            case "medium":wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="1px rgba(15,23,42,1)";break;
            case "bold":wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="1.5px rgba(15,23,42,1)";break;
            default:wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="0px transparent";
        }

        // Border
        wrapper.style.boxShadow="none";
        switch(state.borderStyle){
            case "solid":
                wrapper.style.border="2px solid "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "dashed":
                wrapper.style.border="2px dashed "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "dotted":
                wrapper.style.border="2px dotted "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "double":
                wrapper.style.border="3px double "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "glowframe":
                wrapper.style.border="2px solid "+state.borderColor;
                wrapper.style.boxShadow=`0 0 16px ${hexToRgba(state.borderColor,0.7)}`;
                break;
            default:
                wrapper.style.border="none";
        }

        // Arka plan (resim / renk)
        if(state.bgMode==="image" && state.bgUrl){
            bg.style.backgroundImage=`url("${state.bgUrl}")`;
            bg.style.display="block";
        }else if(state.bgMode==="color"){
            bg.style.backgroundImage="none";
            bg.style.backgroundColor=state.bgColor;
            bg.style.display="block";
        }else{
            bg.style.backgroundImage="none";
            bg.style.backgroundColor="transparent";
            bg.style.display="block";
        }

        updateCodeOutputs();
    }

    function applyIconToSpan(span, value){
        span.innerHTML="";
        if(!value) return;
        if(value.startsWith("http")){
            const img=document.createElement("img");
            img.src=value;
            img.alt="";
            img.style.maxHeight="32px";
            img.style.display="inline-block";
            span.appendChild(img);
        }else{
            // emoji / text
            span.textContent=value;
        }
    }

    function hexToRgba(hex,alpha){
        const h=hex.replace("#","");
        const full=h.length===3?h.split("").map(v=>v+v).join(""):h;
        const num=parseInt(full,16);
        const r=(num>>16)&255,g=(num>>8)&255,b=num&255;
        return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`;
    }

    // ---------------- KOD ÇIKTISI ----------------
    function updateCodeOutputs(){
        const css=[];
        css.push(".nick-style-ultra {");
        css.push("  display: inline-flex;");
        css.push("  align-items: center;");
        css.push("  justify-content: center;");
        css.push(`  font-family: ${state.fontFamily};`);
        css.push(`  font-size: ${state.fontSize}px;`);
        css.push(`  font-weight: ${state.fontWeight};`);
        css.push(`  font-style: ${state.fontStyle};`);
        css.push(`  letter-spacing: ${state.letterSpacing + (state.trackingWide?2:0)}px;`);
        css.push(`  line-height: ${state.lineHeight};`);
        css.push(`  text-align: ${state.textAlign};`);
        css.push(`  font-variant-caps: ${state.smallCaps?"small-caps":"normal"};`);
        css.push(`  text-decoration: ${state.textDecoration};`);
        css.push(`  border-radius: ${state.radius}px;`);
        css.push("  gap: 8px;");
        css.push("  padding: 10px 14px;");

        if(state.colorMode==="transparent"){
            css.push("  color: transparent;");
        }else if(state.colorMode==="solid"){
            css.push(`  color: ${state.colorMain};`);
        }else if(state.colorMode==="gradient"){
            css.push(`  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.colorMain}, ${state.colorSecond});`);
            css.push("  -webkit-background-clip: text;");
            css.push("  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;");
        }

        if(state.shadowPreset!=="none" || state.neon){
            css.push(`  text-shadow: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.textShadow};`);
        }
        if(state.outlinePreset!=="none"){
            css.push(`  -webkit-text-stroke: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.webkitTextStroke};`);
        }
        if(state.borderStyle!=="none"){
            css.push(`  border: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.border};`);
            css.push(`  box-shadow: ${document.getElementById("previewNick").style.boxShadow};`);
        }
        css.push("}");

        if(state.bgMode==="image"){
            css.push("");
            css.push("/* Arka plan için container örneği: */");
            css.push(".nick-bg-wrapper {");
            css.push("  position: relative;");
            css.push("  overflow: hidden;");
            css.push("  background-image: url('"+(state.bgUrl||"...")+"');");
            css.push("  background-size: cover;");
            css.push("  background-position: center;");
            css.push("}");
        }else if(state.bgMode==="color"){
            css.push("");
            css.push(".nick-bg-wrapper {");
            css.push(`  background-color: ${state.bgColor};`);
            css.push("}");
        }

        const cssCode=css.join("\n");

        const html=[];
        html.push("<!-- GS Rams Nick Ultra – HTML -->");
        if(state.bgMode!=="none"){
            html.push('<div class="nick-bg-wrapper">');
            html.push('  <span class="nick-style-ultra">');
        }else{
            html.push('<span class="nick-style-ultra">');
        }
        if(state.leftIconUrl){
            if(state.leftIconUrl.startsWith("http")){
                html.push(`    <img src="${state.leftIconUrl}" alt="" />`);
            }else{
                html.push(`    <span>${state.leftIconUrl}</span>`);
            }
        }
        html.push(`    ${state.nick || "Nick"}`);
        if(state.rightIconUrl){
            if(state.rightIconUrl.startsWith("http")){
                html.push(`    <img src="${state.rightIconUrl}" alt="" />`);
            }else{
                html.push(`    <span>${state.rightIconUrl}</span>`);
            }
        }
        if(state.bgMode!=="none"){
            html.push("  </span>");
            html.push("</div>");
        }else{
            html.push("</span>");
        }

        document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent=cssCode;
        document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent=html.join("\n");
    }

    // ---------------- PRESET / RESET ----------------
    function resetNick(){
        state.nick="GS Rams";
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value=state.nick;
        updatePreview();
    }
    function fillNick(t){
        state.nick=t;
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value=t;
        updatePreview();
    }
    function randomNick(){
        const a=["GS","TR","Sema","Stage","LED","Nick","Ultra","Rams"];
        const b=["Pro","FX","King","Legend","Ghost","Wave","Fire","Light"];
        const nick=a[Math.floor(Math.random()*a.length)]+" "+b[Math.floor(Math.random()*b.length)];
        fillNick(nick);
    }

    function resetFont(){
        state.fontFamily="'Montserrat', sans-serif";
        state.fontSize=32;
        state.fontWeight=600;
        state.fontStyle="normal";
        state.letterSpacing=0;
        state.lineHeight=1.3;
        state.textAlign="center";
        state.smallCaps=false;
        state.trackingWide=false;

        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value=state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value=state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value=state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value=state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent=state.fontSize+"px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent=state.letterSpacing+"px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent=state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value=state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").value=state.fontStyle;
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked=false;
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked=false;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetColor(){
        state.colorMode="solid";
        state.colorMain="#f9fafb";
        state.colorSecond="#f97316";
        state.neon=false;
        document.getElementById("colorMode").value=state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked=false;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString=state.colorMain;
        pickerTextSecond.color.hexString=state.colorSecond;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetEffects(){
        state.shadowPreset="none";
        state.shadowColor="#000000";
        state.outlinePreset="none";
        state.borderStyle="none";
        state.borderColor=state.colorMain;
        state.radius=12;
        state.textDecoration="none";

        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value=state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value=state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value=state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("radius").value=state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent=state.radius+"px";
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value=state.textDecoration;
        pickerShadow.color.hexString=state.shadowColor;
        pickerBorder.color.hexString=state.borderColor;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetBackground(){
        state.bgMode="none";
        state.bgColor="#020617";
        state.bgUrl="";
        state.leftIconUrl="";
        state.rightIconUrl="";
        document.getElementById("bgMode").value=state.bgMode;
        document.getElementById("bgUrl").value="";
        document.getElementById("leftIconUrl").value="";
        document.getElementById("rightIconUrl").value="";
        pickerBg.color.hexString=state.bgColor;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function applyColorPreset(p){
        if(p==="gs"){
            state.colorMain="#ffb703";
            state.colorSecond="#e11d48";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=true;
        }else if(p==="ocean"){
            state.colorMain="#0ea5e9";
            state.colorSecond="#22c55e";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=false;
        }else if(p==="sunset"){
            state.colorMain="#f97316";
            state.colorSecond="#facc15";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
        }else if(p==="neon-blue"){
            state.colorMain="#38bdf8";
            state.colorSecond="#a855f7";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=true;
        }
        document.getElementById("colorMode").value=state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked=state.neon;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString=state.colorMain;
        pickerTextSecond.color.hexString=state.colorSecond;
        updatePreview();
    }

    // ---------------- COPY ----------------
    function copyCode(type){
        const text=type==="html"
            ? document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent
            : document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(()=>alert(type.toUpperCase()+" kodu kopyalandı!"));
    }
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

Özetle bu sürümde:

- Tüm renkler **sadece iro.js pickers** ile:
  - Yazı ana rengi
  - Gradient 2. rengi
  - Gölge rengi
  - Border rengi
  - Arka plan rengi
- Yazı renk modu:
  - Solid
  - Gradient (+webkit background-clip + text-fill)
  - Tam **transparan** (arka plan resim/gif üzerinden yazı efekti)
- Arka plan:
  - Renk (pickerBg)
  - URL ile resim / GIF / CDN
- Yazının başı / sonuna:
  - Emoji
  - Küçük resim/gif URL (otomatik `<img>` ile)
- Gölge & outline & border için ayrıntılı kontrol
- HTML + CSS çıktısında:
  - `-webkit-background-clip: text;`
  - `-webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;`
  - Gradient, shadow, border hepsi üretilmiş halde.

İstersen sonraki adımda:

- Arka plan resmi için **blur, zoom, opacity slider’ları**,  
- ya da **çok satırlı nick + satır bazlı renk** (her satır ayrı iro picker) ekleyebiliriz.

### Gemini 3 Pro
*2025-12-09 13:05:43 +03*



<think>

**Evolving the Vision**

I'm now deeply immersed in the nuances of the "Nick Style Ultra Studio" and how to elevate it. The primary focus is on seamless integration of Iro.js, with its color customization abilities, across the entire system. This is taking considerable time and effort. I'm visualizing the structural adjustments needed to ensure a smooth transition and maintain the core functionalities. My current challenge involves finding an optimal architecture.


**Integrating Color Control**

I'm now expanding `iro.js` beyond the primary color.  My plan now incorporates dedicated pickers for text, gradients, shadows, and borders, enhancing visual control.  Key features are `webkit-linear-gradient` support, background-clip: text for images, and prefix/suffix image insertions.  The "Ultra" enhancements will also encompass sophisticated DOM manipulation and UI/UX design. I'm sticking with the proven sidebar layout for consistency. I also need to use a modal/toggle system for all the new pickers to save on space.

I've decided to refine the color picker integration further. My new strategy is to have a single, main picker that smartly targets different CSS properties. This mirrors common design software patterns. For background-clip, I'll need a file input and URL input. The preview area's HTML will also evolve to support the image + text + image flexbox layout, with dedicated image URL inputs. I'm focusing on the implementation details now.

I'm now fully immersed in the "Ultra" enhancements, striving for a more refined user experience. My current focus is integrating file uploads directly into the sidebar, streamlining workflows. I'm also actively expanding the `state` object to accommodate the new image properties and specific colors for each element. A significant rewrite of the `updatePreview` function is also underway to integrate image injection, background-clip logic, and complex gradients. The HTML and CSS output generation is being updated to reflect the new structure and advanced CSS properties.


**Expanding Color Functionality**

I'm currently working to integrate advanced color controls more deeply. The active color target, managed by `activeColorTarget`, now interacts with the `iro.js` picker to dynamically update CSS properties within the `state` object. I'm focusing on handling image uploads with `FileReader` for immediate preview updates. The core logic for text clipping based on `state.textBgImage` is in place, and I'm further expanding these capabilities to include media inserts and refined color mode transitions.

I'm now focusing on handling image uploads effectively, particularly GIFs, using `URL.createObjectURL` for immediate previews and placeholders for the code output.  I'm also preparing for the final polish, with Turkish labels, validated CSS output, and continued functionality of the "Random" features. I'm now focusing on integrating the texture manager, asset manager, and webkit magic features.
