Harika bir vizyon! GS Rams Pro serisini **"GS Rams Hyper Studio"** seviyesine çıkarıyoruz.

İstediğin tüm özellikleri entegre ettim:

1.  **Merkezi Iro.js Sistemi:** Tek bir profesyonel renk çarkı var, ancak üstündeki butonlarla **neyin rengini değiştirdiğini** (Yazı, 2. Renk, Gölge, Çerçeve) seçiyorsun.
2.  **Yazı İçi Resim/GIF (Text Masking):** Yazıyı transparan yapıp içine URL veya dosya yükleyerek resim/gif gömebiliyorsun.
3.  **Baş ve Son Medya:** Yazının başına ve sonuna ikon, gif veya logo ekleme paneli (Boyut ayarlı).
4.  **Webkit Özellikleri:** `text-stroke`, `text-fill-color` gibi modern CSS özellikleri tam kontrol.
5.  **Gelişmiş Çıktı:** HTML yapısı artık ikonları da kapsayan bir `container` mantığında çıktı veriyor.

İşte o **Hyper** kod:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>GS Rams Hyper Studio – Ultimate Text & Media Composer</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    <!-- Iro.js Renk Seçici -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Raleway:wght@400;800&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@500;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&family=Caveat:wght@700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Anton&family=Black+Ops+One&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- İkonlar -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-body: #050505;
            --bg-panel: #0f0f0f;
            --bg-input: #1a1a1a;
            --accent: #ff3e3e; /* GS Kırmızı */
            --accent-sec: #fca311; /* GS Sarı */
            --text-main: #e5e5e5;
            --text-muted: #a3a3a3;
            --border: #333;
            --radius: 12px;
            --shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
        }

        * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; scrollbar-width:thin; scrollbar-color:var(--accent) var(--bg-panel); }
        
        body {
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg-body);
            color: var(--text-main);
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* --- SOL PANEL (SCROLLABLE) --- */
        .sidebar {
            width: 380px;
            background: var(--bg-panel);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .brand-header {
            padding: 20px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #141414, #0f0f0f);
        }
        .brand-title {
            font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-sec));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }

        .controls-wrapper {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 15px;
        }

        /* AKILLI RENK SEÇİCİ ALANI (SABİT GİBİ) */
        .smart-color-area {
            background: #161616;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .color-targets {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .target-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 8px 5px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            background: #222;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text-muted);
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: 0.3s;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }
        .target-btn.active {
            background: rgba(255, 62, 62, 0.2);
            border-color: var(--accent);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .target-indicator {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 1px solid #fff;
        }
        #iroContainer {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* SEKSİYONLAR */
        .control-section {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #222;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .section-title {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent-sec);
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-weight: 700;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        /* Form Elemanları */
        .input-group { margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; }
        
        input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select {
            width: 100%;
            background: var(--bg-input);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: #fff;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            outline: none;
        }
        input[type="text"]:focus, select:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }

        input[type="range"] {
            width: 100%;
            height: 5px;
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 5px;
            appearance: none;
        }
        input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
            appearance: none;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            background: var(--accent);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* Dosya Yükleme Butonu */
        .file-upload-btn {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            background: #222;
            border: 1px dashed #555;
            color: #aaa;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .file-upload-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

        .btn-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px; }
        .btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            transition: 0.2s;
        }
        .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--accent), #d00000); color: white; }
        .btn-dark { background: #222; color: #ccc; }
        .btn-random { background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00b09b, #96c93d); color: #000; }

        /* --- SAĞ PANEL (PREVIEW) --- */
        .main-stage {
            flex: 1;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #1a1a1a 0%, #000 100%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Önizleme Alanı */
        .preview-area {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-image: 
                linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
                linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 40px 40px;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* HTML ÇIKTI KONTEYNERİ (Preview'daki asıl yapı) */
        #renderContainer {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 15px; /* Medya ve yazı arası boşluk */
            position: relative;
            padding: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        /* Yazı Elementi */
        #renderText {
            display: block;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.2;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        /* Medya Elementleri (Img/Gif) */
        .render-media {
            display: block;
            object-fit: contain;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        /* ALT PANEL (KOD) */
        .code-panel {
            height: 250px;
            background: #111;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        }
        .code-box {
            position: relative;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        .code-header {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #0a0a0a;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            border-bottom: 1px solid #222;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .code-content {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #4ade80;
            overflow-y: auto;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            background: #080808;
        }
        .copy-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid #444;
            color: #aaa;
            padding: 2px 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
        }
        .copy-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

        /* Mobil */
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            body { flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto; height: auto; }
            .sidebar { width: 100%; height: auto; border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
            .main-stage { height: 600px; }
            .code-panel { grid-template-columns: 1fr; height: auto; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- SOL PANEL: KONTROLLER -->
    <aside class="sidebar">
        <div class="brand-header">
            <div class="brand-title">GS RAMS HYPER</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #666;">v3.0 Ultra Studio</div>
        </div>

        <div class="controls-wrapper">
            
            <!-- 1. AKILLI RENK YÖNETİCİSİ -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-palette"></i> Renk İstasyonu</div>
                <div class="smart-color-area">
                    <div class="color-targets">
                        <button class="target-btn active" onclick="setTarget('text', this)">
                            <div class="target-indicator" id="ind-text" style="background:#fff"></div>
                            Yazı
                        </button>
                        <button class="target-btn" onclick="setTarget('grad2', this)">
                            <div class="target-indicator" id="ind-grad2" style="background:#ff3e3e"></div>
                            Gradient 2
                        </button>
                        <button class="target-btn" onclick="setTarget('shadow', this)">
                            <div class="target-indicator" id="ind-shadow" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5)"></div>
                            Gölge
                        </button>
                        <button class="target-btn" onclick="setTarget('border', this)">
                            <div class="target-indicator" id="ind-border" style="background:transparent"></div>
                            Çerçeve
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <div id="iroContainer"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 2. İÇERİK & FONT -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-font"></i> İçerik & Tipografi</div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <input type="text" id="inputText" value="GS RAMS HYPER" oninput="updateHyper()">
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <select id="fontFamily" onchange="updateHyper()">
                        <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
                        <option value="'Black Ops One', system-ui">Black Ops (Askeri/Oyun)</option>
                        <option value="'Anton', sans-serif">Anton (Manşet)</option>
                        <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue (Uzun)</option>
                        <option value="'Caveat', cursive">Caveat (El Yazısı)</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif">Playfair (Elegant)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label">Boyut: <span id="lblSize">60px</span></label>
                    <input type="range" id="fontSize" min="20" max="150" value="60" oninput="updateHyper()">
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label">Harf Aralığı: <span id="lblSpace">0px</span></label>
                    <input type="range" id="letterSpacing" min="-5" max="30" value="0" oninput="updateHyper()">
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 3. DOKU & TEXTURE (RESİM GÖMME) -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-image"></i> Doku & Maskeleme (Ultra)</div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label">Yazı İçine Resim/GIF Göm (URL)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="textureUrl" placeholder="https://... (GIF/JPG)" oninput="updateHyper()">
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="file-upload-btn">
                        Dosya Seç (PC'den Yükle)
                        <input type="file" id="textureFile" accept="image/*" style="display: none" onchange="handleFile(this, 'texture')">
                    </label>
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label"><input type="checkbox" id="enableMask" onchange="updateHyper()"> Maskeyi Aktif Et (Yazı Transparan Olur)</label>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 4. BAŞ/SON MEDYA (PREFIX/SUFFIX) -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-icons"></i> Medya & İkonlar</div>
                
                <!-- Ön -->
                <div class="input-group" style="background:#1a1a1a; padding:10px; border-radius:6px;">
                    <label class="label">Başlangıç Görseli (Sol)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="prefixUrl" placeholder="URL..." oninput="updateHyper()" style="margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <label class="file-upload-btn" style="font-size:0.7rem; padding:4px;">
                        Dosya Yükle
                        <input type="file" id="prefixFile" accept="image/*" style="display: none" onchange="handleFile(this, 'prefix')">
                    </label>
                    <div style="display:flex; gap:5px; margin-top:5px;">
                        <input type="number" id="prefixSize" value="50" style="width:60px" oninput="updateHyper()"> <span style="font-size:0.7rem; align-self:center">px</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Son -->
                <div class="input-group" style="background:#1a1a1a; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; margin-top:10px;">
                    <label class="label">Bitiş Görseli (Sağ)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="suffixUrl" placeholder="URL..." oninput="updateHyper()" style="margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <label class="file-upload-btn" style="font-size:0.7rem; padding:4px;">
                        Dosya Yükle
                        <input type="file" id="suffixFile" accept="image/*" style="display: none" onchange="handleFile(this, 'suffix')">
                    </label>
                    <div style="display:flex; gap:5px; margin-top:5px;">
                        <input type="number" id="suffixSize" value="50" style="width:60px" oninput="updateHyper()"> <span style="font-size:0.7rem; align-self:center">px</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 5. WEBKIT & EFEKTLER -->
            <div class="control-section">
                <div class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-magic"></i> Efektler & Webkit</div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label">Webkit Stroke (Kenar Çizgisi)</label>
                    <input type="range" id="strokeWidth" min="0" max="5" step="0.5" value="0" oninput="updateHyper()">
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label"><input type="checkbox" id="useGradient" onchange="updateHyper()"> Gradient Kullan</label>
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label"><input type="checkbox" id="useShadow" onchange="updateHyper()"> Gölge Aktif</label>
                    <label class="label" style="font-size:0.65rem">Gölge rengini yukarıdan "Gölge" butonuna basarak seçin.</label>
                    <input type="range" id="shadowBlur" min="0" max="50" value="10" oninput="updateHyper()">
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label class="label"><input type="checkbox" id="useBorder" onchange="updateHyper()"> Kutu Çerçevesi</label>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- BUTONLAR -->
            <div class="btn-row">
                <button class="btn btn-random" onclick="randomize()">Rastgele</button>
                <button class="btn btn-dark" onclick="resetAll()">Sıfırla</button>
            </div>

        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ PANEL: SAHNE & KOD -->
    <main class="main-stage">
        
        <!-- ÖNİZLEME -->
        <div class="preview-area">
            <!-- HTML Çıktısı Olacak Yapı -->
            <div id="renderContainer">
                <img id="renderPrefix" class="render-media" src="" style="display:none;">
                <div id="renderText">GS RAMS HYPER</div>
                <img id="renderSuffix" class="render-media" src="" style="display:none;">
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- KOD ÇIKTISI -->
        <div class="code-panel">
            <div class="code-box">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <span>HTML CODE</span>
                    <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode('html')">Kopyala</button>
                </div>
                <div class="code-content" id="htmlOutput"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="code-box" style="border-right:none;">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <span>CSS CODE</span>
                    <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode('css')">Kopyala</button>
                </div>
                <div class="code-content" id="cssOutput"></div>
            </div>
        </div>

    </main>

    <script>
        // --- DURUM YÖNETİMİ ---
        const state = {
            colors: {
                text: '#ffffff',
                grad2: '#ff3e3e',
                shadow: 'rgba(255, 62, 62, 0.6)',
                border: '#fca311'
            },
            files: {
                texture: null,
                prefix: null,
                suffix: null
            },
            activeTarget: 'text'
        };

        // --- IRO RENK SEÇİCİ ---
        const colorPicker = new iro.ColorPicker("#iroContainer", {
            width: 200,
            color: state.colors.text,
            layout: [
                { component: iro.ui.Wheel },
                { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'alpha' } }
            ]
        });

        // Renk değişince
        colorPicker.on('color:change', function(color) {
            // Aktif hedefin rengini güncelle
            state.colors[state.activeTarget] = color.rgbaString; // Alpha desteği için rgba
            
            // Göstergeyi güncelle
            document.getElementById(`ind-${state.activeTarget}`).style.background = color.rgbaString;
            
            updateHyper();
        });

        // Hedef Değiştirme (Butonlar)
        function setTarget(target, btn) {
            state.activeTarget = target;
            
            // Buton sınıflarını ayarla
            document.querySelectorAll('.target-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');
            
            // Picker'ı o hedefin rengine getir
            colorPicker.color.set(state.colors[target]);
        }

        // --- DOSYA YÜKLEME ---
        function handleFile(input, type) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function(e) {
                    state.files[type] = e.target.result; // Data URL
                    updateHyper();
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }

        // --- ANA GÜNCELLEME FONKSİYONU ---
        function updateHyper() {
            // DOM Elemanları
            const container = document.getElementById('renderContainer');
            const textEl = document.getElementById('renderText');
            const prefixEl = document.getElementById('renderPrefix');
            const suffixEl = document.getElementById('renderSuffix');

            // Değerleri Al
            const textVal = document.getElementById('inputText').value;
            const fontVal = document.getElementById('fontFamily').value;
            const sizeVal = document.getElementById('fontSize').value;
            const spacingVal = document.getElementById('letterSpacing').value;
            
            const strokeVal = document.getElementById('strokeWidth').value;
            const blurVal = document.getElementById('shadowBlur').value;
            
            const useMask = document.getElementById('enableMask').checked;
            const useGrad = document.getElementById('useGradient').checked;
            const useShadow = document.getElementById('useShadow').checked;
            const useBorder = document.getElementById('useBorder').checked;

            const texUrl = document.getElementById('textureUrl').value || state.files.texture;
            
            // Prefix/Suffix Boyut ve URL
            const preSize = document.getElementById('prefixSize').value;
            const sufSize = document.getElementById('suffixSize').value;
            const preUrl = document.getElementById('prefixUrl').value || state.files.prefix;
            const sufUrl = document.getElementById('suffixUrl').value || state.files.suffix;

            // --- GÖRSEL GÜNCELLEME ---

            // 1. Metin ve Font
            textEl.innerText = textVal;
            textEl.style.fontFamily = fontVal;
            textEl.style.fontSize = sizeVal + 'px';
            textEl.style.letterSpacing = spacingVal + 'px';
            document.getElementById('lblSize').innerText = sizeVal + 'px';
            document.getElementById('lblSpace').innerText = spacingVal + 'px';

            // 2. Renk ve Dolgu Mantığı
            let bgStyle = '';
            let textFill = state.colors.text;

            // Reset
            textEl.style.background = 'none';
            textEl.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'initial';
            textEl.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'initial';
            textEl.style.color = state.colors.text;

            if (useMask && texUrl) {
                // RESİM MASKELEME
                textEl.style.backgroundImage = `url('${texUrl}')`;
                textEl.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';
                textEl.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';
                textEl.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
                textEl.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
                textEl.style.color = 'transparent'; // Fallback
            } else if (useGrad) {
                // GRADIENT
                textEl.style.background = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.colors.text}, ${state.colors.grad2})`;
                textEl.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
                textEl.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
                textEl.style.color = 'transparent';
            }

            // 3. Webkit Stroke
            if (strokeVal > 0) {
                // Stroke rengi yazı renginin zıttı veya border rengi olabilir, şimdilik border rengini kullanalım
                textEl.style.webkitTextStroke = `${strokeVal}px ${state.colors.border}`; 
            } else {
                textEl.style.webkitTextStroke = '0';
            }

            // 4. Gölge
            if (useShadow) {
                textEl.style.textShadow = `0px 0px ${blurVal}px ${state.colors.shadow}`;
            } else {
                textEl.style.textShadow = 'none';
            }

            // 5. Container Çerçevesi
            if (useBorder) {
                container.style.border = `3px solid ${state.colors.border}`;
                container.style.borderRadius = '15px';
                container.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
                container.style.boxShadow = `0 0 20px ${state.colors.border}`;
            } else {
                container.style.border = 'none';
                container.style.background = 'transparent';
                container.style.boxShadow = 'none';
            }

            // 6. Medya Elemanları (Prefix/Suffix)
            if (preUrl) {
                prefixEl.src = preUrl;
                prefixEl.style.display = 'block';
                prefixEl.style.height = preSize + 'px';
            } else {
                prefixEl.style.display = 'none';
            }

            if (sufUrl) {
                suffixEl.src = sufUrl;
                suffixEl.style.display = 'block';
                suffixEl.style.height = sufSize + 'px';
            } else {
                suffixEl.style.display = 'none';
            }

            // --- KOD ÜRETME ---
            generateCode(textEl, container);
        }

        function generateCode(textEl, container) {
            // CSS Oluşturma
            let css = `#gs-hyper-container {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 15px;
    padding: 20px;
    ${container.style.border !== 'none' ? `border: ${container.style.border};` : ''}
    ${container.style.borderRadius ? `border-radius: ${container.style.borderRadius};` : ''}
    ${container.style.background !== 'transparent' ? `background: ${container.style.background};` : ''}
    ${container.style.boxShadow !== 'none' ? `box-shadow: ${container.style.boxShadow};` : ''}
}

.gs-hyper-text {
    font-family: ${textEl.style.fontFamily};
    font-size: ${textEl.style.fontSize};
    letter-spacing: ${textEl.style.letterSpacing};
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.2;
    ${textEl.style.textShadow !== 'none' ? `text-shadow: ${textEl.style.textShadow};` : ''}
    ${textEl.style.webkitTextStroke !== '0px' ? `-webkit-text-stroke: ${textEl.style.webkitTextStroke};` : ''}
`;

            // Background Clip Logic for CSS
            if (textEl.style.webkitBackgroundClip === 'text') {
                css += `    background-image: ${textEl.style.backgroundImage};
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    color: transparent;
}`;
            } else {
                css += `    color: ${state.colors.text};
}`;
            }

            css += `\n\n.gs-media-icon { object-fit: contain; }`;

            // HTML Oluşturma
            const preImg = document.getElementById('renderPrefix');
            const sufImg = document.getElementById('renderSuffix');
            
            let html = `<div id="gs-hyper-container">\n`;
            if (preImg.style.display !== 'none') {
                html += `    <img src="${preImg.src}" class="gs-media-icon" style="height: ${preImg.style.height};" alt="icon">\n`;
            }
            html += `    <span class="gs-hyper-text">${textEl.innerText}</span>\n`;
            if (sufImg.style.display !== 'none') {
                html += `    <img src="${sufImg.src}" class="gs-media-icon" style="height: ${sufImg.style.height};" alt="icon">\n`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;

            document.getElementById('cssOutput').textContent = css;
            document.getElementById('htmlOutput').textContent = html;
        }

        // --- YARDIMCI FONKSİYONLAR ---
        function copyCode(type) {
            const content = document.getElementById(type + 'Output').textContent;
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(content).then(() => alert('Kopyalandı!'));
        }

        function randomize() {
            const fonts = ["'Black Ops One', system-ui", "'Anton', sans-serif", "'Caveat', cursive"];
            document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)];
            
            // Rastgele Renkler
            const rCol = () => '#' + Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6, '0');
            state.colors.text = rCol();
            state.colors.grad2 = rCol();
            state.colors.shadow = rCol();
            state.colors.border = rCol();
            
            // Picker'ı güncelle
            setTarget('text', document.querySelector('.target-btn')); 
            
            // Efektleri aç
            document.getElementById('useGradient').checked = Math.random() > 0.5;
            document.getElementById('useShadow').checked = Math.random() > 0.5;
            
            updateHyper();
        }

        function resetAll() {
            document.getElementById('inputText').value = "GS RAMS HYPER";
            document.getElementById('textureUrl').value = "";
            state.files.texture = null;
            document.getElementById('enableMask').checked = false;
            updateHyper();
        }

        // Başlat
        updateHyper();

    </script>
</body>
</html>
```

### 🚀 GS Rams Hyper Studio Özellikleri:

1.  **Akıllı Iro.js Yönetimi:**
    *   Tek bir renk çarkı var. Üstündeki **"Yazı, Gradient 2, Gölge, Çerçeve"** butonlarına basarak o an neyi boyadığını seçiyorsun. Seçtiğin hedefin rengi otomatik olarak çarka yükleniyor.

2.  **Yazı İçi Maskeleme (Texture):**
    *   **"Doku & Maskeleme"** bölümünden bir URL girerek (örn: bir alev GIF'i veya altın dokusu) veya bilgisayardan dosya seçerek yazının içine gömebilirsin.
    *   **"Maskeyi Aktif Et"** kutusunu işaretlediğinde `background-clip: text` devreye girer.

3.  **Baş ve Son Medya (Prefix/Suffix):**
    *   Yazının soluna ve sağına resim/GIF ekleyebilirsin.
    *   Bunların boyutlarını (px cinsinden) panelden ayarlayabilirsin.

4.  **Webkit Gücü:**
    *   Webkit Stroke (Kenar Çizgisi) ile yazıya kontur atabilirsin.
    *   Gradient seçeneği ile iki renkli geçiş yapabilirsin.

Tam bir tasarım stüdyosu oldu! Bir sonraki adımda ne istersin? Belki de bu çıktıları **resim (PNG)** olarak indirme özelliği? 😉
