Harika bir vizyon! Sadece renk seçmekle kalmayalım; işin içine **animasyonlar, 3D dönüşümler, doku kaplamaları (text masking), karışım modları (blend modes)** ve senin istediğin **"KAOS MODU"**nu (tam rastgele stil oluşturucu) ekleyelim.

Bu sürüm **"Nick Studio ULTRA V2"**.

**Eklenen Yeni Özellikler:**
1.  **KAOS Generator:** Tek tuşla font, renk, gölge, animasyon, 3D açı, her şeyi rastgele karıştırıp çılgın tasarımlar üretir.
2.  **Akıllı Stil Oluşturucu:** Daha uyumlu, "güzel" duran rastgele stiller üretir.
3.  **Animasyonlar:** Yazıya 'Nefes Alma', 'Yüzer Gibi Sallanma', 'Gökkuşağı Akışı', 'Glitch (Bozulma)' gibi canlı CSS animasyonları eklendi.
4.  **Doku (Texture) Maskeleme:** Yazının içine sadece renk değil, **RESİM veya GIF** gömebilirsin (Text Background Clip).
5.  **3D Dönüşümler:** Yazıyı sağa/sola yatırma, perspektif ve eğme (skew) ayarları.
6.  **Gelişmiş Filtreler:** Yazıya Blur (Bulanıklık) veya Kontrast ekleme.
7.  **Harmoni (Karışım) Modları:** Yazının arka planla nasıl karışacağını seçme (`mix-blend-mode`).

Kodu aşağıya bırakıyorum. Tek parça HTML dosyasıdır. Kaydet ve çalıştır.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>GS Rams ULTRA V2 - Kaos & Animation Studio</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    <!-- iro.js -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Fontlar -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;900&family=Raleway:wght@400;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@500;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Orbitron:wght@500;900&family=Rubik+Glitch&family=Press+Start+2P&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- İkonlar -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #6366f1;
            --accent: #ec4899;
            --dark: #0f172a;
            --panel: #1e293b;
            --text: #f8fafc;
            --border: #334155;
            --radius: 12px;
        }
        
        /* Animasyon Keyframe'leri */
        @keyframes anim-float { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px)} }
        @keyframes anim-pulse { 0%,100%{transform:scale(1)} 50%{transform:scale(1.05)} }
        @keyframes anim-shake { 0%{transform:rotate(0deg)} 25%{transform:rotate(3deg)} 75%{transform:rotate(-3deg)} 100%{transform:rotate(0deg)} }
        @keyframes anim-glow { 0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px var(--glow-color))} 50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px var(--glow-color))} }
        @keyframes anim-rainbow { 0%{background-position:0% 50%} 100%{background-position:200% 50%} }
        @keyframes anim-glitch { 
            0% { transform: translate(0) } 20% { transform: translate(-2px, 2px) } 40% { transform: translate(-2px, -2px) } 
            60% { transform: translate(2px, 2px) } 80% { transform: translate(2px, -2px) } 100% { transform: translate(0) }
        }

        * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
        body {
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
            background: #020617;
            color: var(--text);
            height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
        }

        /* SCROLLBAR */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0f172a; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #475569; border-radius: 10px; }

        /* LAYOUT */
        .sidebar {
            width: 380px;
            background: var(--panel);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        .main-area {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #1e293b 0%, #020617 100%);
            position: relative;
        }

        /* SIDEBAR HEADER */
        .sidebar-header {
            padding: 20px;
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            text-align: center;
        }
        .title-ultra {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            font-weight: 900;
            background: linear-gradient(to right, #4f46e5, #ec4899, #f59e0b);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .subtitle { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; }

        /* GENERATOR BUTTONS */
        .generator-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 15px 20px 5px 20px;
        }
        .gen-btn {
            border: none;
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        .btn-chaos {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ef4444, #b91c1c);
            color: white;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(239,68,68,0.4);
        }
        .btn-chaos:hover { transform: scale(1.05) rotate(-2deg); }
        .btn-smart {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #2563eb);
            color: white;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);
        }
        .btn-smart:hover { transform: scale(1.05); }

        /* ACCORDION MENU */
        .settings-container {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 15px;
        }
        details {
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.5);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        details[open] { border-color: var(--primary); background: rgba(30,41,59,0.8); }
        summary {
            padding: 12px 15px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            color: #cbd5e1;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            list-style: none;
        }
        summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
        summary::after { content: '\f078'; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free"; font-weight: 900; transition: 0.3s; }
        details[open] summary::after { transform: rotate(180deg); color: var(--primary); }
        
        .control-group { padding: 15px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }

        /* FORM ELEMENTS */
        .label { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 5px; }
        .input, .select {
            width: 100%;
            background: #0f172a;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: white;
            padding: 8px 10px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            outline: none;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .input:focus, .select:focus { border-color: var(--primary); }
        .range-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .range { flex: 1; accent-color: var(--primary); cursor: pointer; }
        .val-disp { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--accent); width: 35px; text-align: right; }
        
        .color-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .picker-container { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin: 10px 0; }

        /* PREVIEW AREA */
        .preview-wrapper {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }
        #previewBgLayer {
            position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
            background-size: cover; background-position: center;
            transition: all 0.5s;
        }
        #nickContainer {
            position: relative; z-index: 5;
            padding: 40px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            /* Container transform for 3D */
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
        }
        
        /* Çıktı Alanı */
        .code-area {
            height: 220px;
            background: #0f172a;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
        }
        .code-box {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .code-header {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #1e293b;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            color: #94a3b8;
        }
        .code-content {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: #a5b4fc;
            overflow: auto;
            white-space: pre;
        }
        .copy-btn {
            background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.7rem;
        }
        .copy-btn:hover { background: var(--primary); border-color: var(--primary); }

        /* Iro JS Customization */
        .iro-style { margin: 0 auto; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SOL PANEL: AYARLAR -->
<aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">
        <div class="title-ultra"><i class="fa-solid fa-meteor"></i> ULTRA V2</div>
        <div class="subtitle">Kaos Modu & Gelişmiş Animasyonlar</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Generator Butonları -->
    <div class="generator-grid">
        <button class="gen-btn btn-chaos" onclick="chaosMode()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-dice-d20"></i> KAOS MODU
        </button>
        <button class="gen-btn btn-smart" onclick="smartMode()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Akıllı Stil
        </button>
    </div>

    <div class="settings-container">
        <!-- 1. Temel & İkonlar -->
        <details open>
            <summary>İçerik & Font</summary>
            <div class="control-group">
                <span class="label">Nick / Metin</span>
                <input type="text" id="inpNick" class="input" value="GS RAMS" oninput="update()">
                
                <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:5px;">
                    <div>
                        <span class="label">Sol İkon/URL</span>
                        <input type="text" id="inpIconLeft" class="input" placeholder="Emoji veya URL" oninput="update()">
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <span class="label">Sağ İkon/URL</span>
                        <input type="text" id="inpIconRight" class="input" placeholder="Emoji veya URL" oninput="update()">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <span class="label">Font Ailesi</span>
                <select id="selFont" class="select" onchange="update()">
                    <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
                    <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway (Zarif)</option>
                    <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Rajdhani (Teknik)</option>
                    <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Oswald (Dik)</option>
                    <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue (Başlık)</option>
                    <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Orbitron (Fütüristik)</option>
                    <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Creepster (Korku)</option>
                    <option value="'Rubik Glitch', cursive">Rubik Glitch (Bozuk)</option>
                    <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel Art (8-Bit)</option>
                </select>

                <div class="range-wrap">
                    <span class="label" style="width:50px">Boyut</span>
                    <input type="range" id="rngSize" class="range" min="20" max="150" value="60" oninput="update()">
                    <span id="dispSize" class="val-disp">60</span>
                </div>
                <div class="range-wrap">
                    <span class="label" style="width:50px">Aralık</span>
                    <input type="range" id="rngSpacing" class="range" min="-5" max="30" value="2" oninput="update()">
                    <span id="dispSpacing" class="val-disp">2</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </details>

        <!-- 2. Renk & Doku (Fill) -->
        <details>
            <summary>Renk & Doku (Fill)</summary>
            <div class="control-group">
                <span class="label">Dolgu Tipi</span>
                <select id="selFillMode" class="select" onchange="toggleFillMode()">
                    <option value="solid">Tek Renk (Solid)</option>
                    <option value="gradient">Gradient (Geçişli)</option>
                    <option value="image">Resim/GIF Dokusu (Mask)</option>
                </select>

                <!-- Renk Seçiciler -->
                <div id="colorControls">
                    <div class="label">Ana Renk</div>
                    <div class="picker-container"><div id="pickerMain"></div></div>
                    
                    <div id="gradControls" style="display:none;">
                        <div class="label">İkinci Renk (Gradient)</div>
                        <div class="picker-container"><div id="pickerSecond"></div></div>
                        <div class="range-wrap">
                            <span class="label">Açı</span>
                            <input type="range" id="rngGradAngle" class="range" min="0" max="360" value="90" oninput="update()">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Resim URL Girişi -->
                <div id="imageControls" style="display:none;">
                    <span class="label">Doku URL (Resim/GIF)</span>
                    <input type="text" id="inpTextureUrl" class="input" placeholder="https://..." oninput="update()">
                    <div class="label" style="font-size:0.65rem; color:#64748b;">Yazının içi bu resimle dolacak.</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </details>

        <!-- 3. Kenarlık & Gölge -->
        <details>
            <summary>Kenarlık & Neon</summary>
            <div class="control-group">
                <span class="label">Outline (Kenar Çizgisi)</span>
                <div class="range-wrap">
                    <input type="range" id="rngStroke" class="range" min="0" max="5" step="0.1" value="0" oninput="update()">
                    <span id="dispStroke" class="val-disp">0</span>
                </div>
                <div class="picker-container"><div id="pickerStroke"></div></div>
                
                <hr style="border:0; border-top:1px solid #334155; margin:10px 0;">
                
                <span class="label">Gölge / Neon Efekti</span>
                <select id="selShadow" class="select" onchange="update()">
                    <option value="none">Yok</option>
                    <option value="soft">Yumuşak Gölge</option>
                    <option value="hard">Sert Gölge (Retro)</option>
                    <option value="neon">Neon Parlama</option>
                    <option value="multi">Çok Katmanlı (Ultra)</option>
                </select>
                <div class="picker-container"><div id="pickerShadow"></div></div>
            </div>
        </details>

        <!-- 4. Animasyon & 3D -->
        <details>
            <summary>Animasyon & 3D</summary>
            <div class="control-group">
                <span class="label">Animasyon Türü</span>
                <select id="selAnim" class="select" onchange="update()">
                    <option value="none">Yok</option>
                    <option value="anim-pulse">Nabız (Pulse)</option>
                    <option value="anim-float">Yüzme (Float)</option>
                    <option value="anim-shake">Titreme (Shake)</option>
                    <option value="anim-rainbow">Gökkuşağı Akışı (Sadece Gradient)</option>
                    <option value="anim-glitch">Glitch (Bozulma)</option>
                </select>
                
                <div class="range-wrap">
                    <span class="label">Animasyon Hızı (sn)</span>
                    <input type="range" id="rngAnimSpeed" class="range" min="0.1" max="5" step="0.1" value="2" oninput="update()">
                    <span id="dispAnimSpeed" class="val-disp">2s</span>
                </div>

                <hr style="border:0; border-top:1px solid #334155; margin:10px 0;">

                <span class="label">3D Dönüşümler</span>
                <div class="range-wrap">
                    <span class="label">Eğme (Skew X)</span>
                    <input type="range" id="rngSkew" class="range" min="-45" max="45" value="0" oninput="update()">
                </div>
                <div class="range-wrap">
                    <span class="label">Döndür (Rotate)</span>
                    <input type="range" id="rngRotate" class="range" min="-180" max="180" value="0" oninput="update()">
                </div>
                <div class="range-wrap">
                    <span class="label">Perspektif (Tilt)</span>
                    <input type="range" id="rngTilt" class="range" min="-45" max="45" value="0" oninput="update()">
                </div>
            </div>
        </details>

        <!-- 5. Arka Plan -->
        <details>
            <summary>Sahne Arka Planı</summary>
            <div class="control-group">
                <span class="label">Arka Plan Tipi</span>
                <select id="selBgMode" class="select" onchange="toggleBgMode()">
                    <option value="color">Düz Renk</option>
                    <option value="image">Resim / URL</option>
                </select>

                <div id="bgInfoImage" style="display:none;">
                    <span class="label">Resim URL</span>
                    <input type="text" id="inpBgUrl" class="input" placeholder="https://..." oninput="update()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="picker-container"><div id="pickerBg"></div></div>
            </div>
        </details>
    </div>
</aside>

<!-- SAĞ PANEL: ÖNİZLEME & KOD -->
<main class="main-area">
    <div class="preview-wrapper">
        <div id="previewBgLayer"></div>
        <div id="nickContainer">
            <span id="previewLeft" style="margin-right:8px;"></span>
            <span id="previewText">GS RAMS</span>
            <span id="previewRight" style="margin-left:8px;"></span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="code-area">
        <div class="code-box">
            <div class="code-header">
                <i class="fa-brands fa-html5"></i> HTML
                <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyToClipboard('codeHtml')">Kopyala</button>
            </div>
            <div id="codeHtml" class="code-content"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="code-box">
            <div class="code-header">
                <i class="fa-brands fa-css3-alt"></i> CSS
                <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyToClipboard('codeCss')">Kopyala</button>
            </div>
            <div id="codeCss" class="code-content"></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</main>

<script>
    // --- Global Variables ---
    let pickers = {};
    const colors = {
        main: "#6366f1",
        second: "#ec4899",
        stroke: "#ffffff",
        shadow: "#000000",
        bg: "#020617"
    };

    // --- Init ---
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
        // Iro pickers setup
        pickers.main = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerMain", { width: 140, color: colors.main });
        pickers.second = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerSecond", { width: 140, color: colors.second });
        pickers.stroke = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerStroke", { width: 100, color: colors.stroke });
        pickers.shadow = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerShadow", { width: 100, color: colors.shadow });
        pickers.bg = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerBg", { width: 100, color: colors.bg });

        // Event listeners for pickers
        pickers.main.on('color:change', c => { colors.main = c.hexString; update(); });
        pickers.second.on('color:change', c => { colors.second = c.hexString; update(); });
        pickers.stroke.on('color:change', c => { colors.stroke = c.hexString; update(); });
        pickers.shadow.on('color:change', c => { colors.shadow = c.hexString; update(); });
        pickers.bg.on('color:change', c => { colors.bg = c.hexString; update(); });

        update();
    });

    // --- Toggle Logic ---
    function toggleFillMode() {
        const mode = document.getElementById("selFillMode").value;
        document.getElementById("colorControls").style.display = mode === 'image' ? 'none' : 'block';
        document.getElementById("gradControls").style.display = mode === 'gradient' ? 'block' : 'none';
        document.getElementById("imageControls").style.display = mode === 'image' ? 'block' : 'none';
        update();
    }

    function toggleBgMode() {
        const mode = document.getElementById("selBgMode").value;
        document.getElementById("bgInfoImage").style.display = mode === 'image' ? 'block' : 'none';
        update();
    }

    // --- Main Update Function ---
    function update() {
        // 1. Get Values
        const nick = document.getElementById("inpNick").value || "Nick";
        const iconLeft = document.getElementById("inpIconLeft").value;
        const iconRight = document.getElementById("inpIconRight").value;
        const font = document.getElementById("selFont").value;
        const size = document.getElementById("rngSize").value;
        const spacing = document.getElementById("rngSpacing").value;
        
        const fillMode = document.getElementById("selFillMode").value;
        const textureUrl = document.getElementById("inpTextureUrl").value;
        const gradAngle = document.getElementById("rngGradAngle").value;
        
        const strokeWidth = document.getElementById("rngStroke").value;
        const shadowMode = document.getElementById("selShadow").value;
        
        const anim = document.getElementById("selAnim").value;
        const animSpeed = document.getElementById("rngAnimSpeed").value;
        
        const skew = document.getElementById("rngSkew").value;
        const rotate = document.getElementById("rngRotate").value;
        const tilt = document.getElementById("rngTilt").value;
        
        const bgMode = document.getElementById("selBgMode").value;
        const bgUrl = document.getElementById("inpBgUrl").value;

        // Display Labels
        document.getElementById("dispSize").innerText = size;
        document.getElementById("dispSpacing").innerText = spacing;
        document.getElementById("dispStroke").innerText = strokeWidth;
        document.getElementById("dispAnimSpeed").innerText = animSpeed + 's';

        // 2. Apply to Preview Elements
        const elText = document.getElementById("previewText");
        const elLeft = document.getElementById("previewLeft");
        const elRight = document.getElementById("previewRight");
        const elContainer = document.getElementById("nickContainer");
        const elBg = document.getElementById("previewBgLayer");

        // Content
        elText.innerText = nick;
        handleIcon(elLeft, iconLeft);
        handleIcon(elRight, iconRight);

        // Font Styles
        const style = elText.style;
        style.fontFamily = font;
        style.fontSize = size + "px";
        style.letterSpacing = spacing + "px";
        style.display = "inline-block"; // needed for transforms

        // FILL & COLOR Logic
        style.backgroundImage = "none";
        style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
        style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
        style.color = colors.main;

        if (fillMode === 'gradient') {
            style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(${gradAngle}deg, ${colors.main}, ${colors.second})`;
            style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
        } else if (fillMode === 'image' && textureUrl) {
            style.backgroundImage = `url('${textureUrl}')`;
            style.backgroundSize = "cover";
            style.backgroundPosition = "center";
            style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
        }

        // STROKE (Webkit)
        if (strokeWidth > 0) {
            style.webkitTextStroke = `${strokeWidth}px ${colors.stroke}`;
        } else {
            style.webkitTextStroke = "0px transparent";
        }

        // SHADOWS
        // Not: clip-text varken text-shadow bazen görünmez veya üstte kalır. 
        // En iyisi drop-shadow filter kullanmaktır eğer clip varsa.
        style.textShadow = "none";
        style.filter = "none";
        
        let shadowCss = "";
        if (shadowMode === 'soft') shadowCss = `drop-shadow(0 4px 6px ${colors.shadow})`;
        else if (shadowMode === 'hard') shadowCss = `drop-shadow(4px 4px 0px ${colors.shadow})`;
        else if (shadowMode === 'neon') shadowCss = `drop-shadow(0 0 5px ${colors.main}) drop-shadow(0 0 10px ${colors.main})`;
        else if (shadowMode === 'multi') shadowCss = `drop-shadow(3px 3px 0px ${colors.second}) drop-shadow(-3px -3px 0px ${colors.main})`;

        if (shadowCss) style.filter = shadowCss;

        // ANIMATION & TRANSFORM (Container Level)
        const contStyle = elContainer.style;
        contStyle.transform = `perspective(500px) rotate(${rotate}deg) skewX(${skew}deg) rotateX(${tilt}deg)`;
        
        // Animasyon adı
        if(anim !== 'none') {
            contStyle.animation = `${anim} ${animSpeed}s infinite alternate ease-in-out`;
            if(anim === 'anim-shake') contStyle.animationTimingFunction = "linear";
            if(anim === 'anim-glitch') contStyle.animationTimingFunction = "steps(2, end)";
            if(anim === 'anim-rainbow') {
                // Rainbow özel bir durum, background position oynatır, text elementine verilmeli
                contStyle.animation = "none"; // container dur
                style.backgroundImage = "linear-gradient(45deg, #f00, #ff0, #0f0, #0ff, #00f, #f0f, #f00)";
                style.backgroundSize = "400%"; // genişlik
                style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
                style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
                style.animation = `anim-rainbow ${animSpeed}s linear infinite`;
            } else {
                style.animation = "none"; // text dur
            }
        } else {
            contStyle.animation = "none";
            style.animation = "none";
        }

        // BACKGROUND
        if (bgMode === 'image' && bgUrl) {
            elBg.style.backgroundImage = `url('${bgUrl}')`;
            elBg.style.backgroundColor = "transparent";
        } else {
            elBg.style.backgroundImage = "none";
            elBg.style.backgroundColor = colors.bg;
        }

        generateCode(fillMode, shadowCss, anim, animSpeed, bgMode);
    }

    // --- Helper: Icon vs Img ---
    function handleIcon(el, val) {
        if (!val) { el.innerHTML = ""; return; }
        if (val.startsWith("http")) {
            el.innerHTML = `<img src="${val}" style="height:1em; vertical-align:middle;">`;
        } else {
            el.innerHTML = val;
            el.style.fontSize = document.getElementById("rngSize").value + "px";
        }
    }

    // --- GENERATORS (CHAOS & SMART) ---
    function getRandomColor() {
        const letters = '0123456789ABCDEF';
        let color = '#';
        for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) { color += letters[Math.floor(Math.random() * 16)]; }
        return color;
    }
    
    function chaosMode() {
        // Her şeyi rastgele yap
        const fonts = ["'Montserrat', sans-serif", "'Creepster', cursive", "'Orbitron', sans-serif", "'Rubik Glitch', cursive", "'Press Start 2P', cursive"];
        const anims = ["none", "anim-pulse", "anim-float", "anim-shake", "anim-glitch"];
        const shadows = ["none", "soft", "hard", "neon", "multi"];
        const fills = ["solid", "gradient"]; // Chaos modunda URL ile uğraşmayalım şimdilik

        // Set Values
        document.getElementById("selFont").value = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)];
        document.getElementById("selFillMode").value = fills[Math.floor(Math.random() * fills.length)];
        document.getElementById("selShadow").value = shadows[Math.floor(Math.random() * shadows.length)];
        document.getElementById("selAnim").value = anims[Math.floor(Math.random() * anims.length)];
        
        document.getElementById("rngSize").value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 30;
        document.getElementById("rngSpacing").value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 10);
        document.getElementById("rngSkew").value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 60) - 30;
        document.getElementById("rngRotate").value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) - 20;

        // Set Colors
        colors.main = getRandomColor();
        colors.second = getRandomColor();
        colors.stroke = getRandomColor();
        colors.shadow = getRandomColor();
        
        pickers.main.color.set(colors.main);
        pickers.second.color.set(colors.second);
        pickers.stroke.color.set(colors.stroke);
        pickers.shadow.color.set(colors.shadow);

        toggleFillMode();
        update();
    }

    function smartMode() {
        // Uyumlu rastgele
        const fonts = ["'Montserrat', sans-serif", "'Raleway', sans-serif", "'Oswald', sans-serif"];
        document.getElementById("selFont").value = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)];
        document.getElementById("selFillMode").value = "gradient";
        document.getElementById("selShadow").value = "neon";
        document.getElementById("selAnim").value = "anim-pulse";
        
        document.getElementById("rngSize").value = 70;
        document.getElementById("rngSkew").value = -5;
        document.getElementById("rngRotate").value = 0;

        // Uyumlu renk paletleri (Basit)
        const palettes = [
            {m: "#00f260", s: "#0575e6"}, // yeşil-mavi
            {m: "#fc4a1a", s: "#f7b733"}, // turuncu-sarı
            {m: "#833ab4", s: "#fd1d1d"}  // mor-kırmızı
        ];
        const pal = palettes[Math.floor(Math.random() * palettes.length)];
        
        colors.main = pal.m;
        colors.second = pal.s;
        pickers.main.color.set(colors.main);
        pickers.second.color.set(colors.second);

        toggleFillMode();
        update();
    }

    // --- Generate Code Output ---
    function generateCode(fillMode, shadowCss, anim, animSpeed, bgMode) {
        const font = document.getElementById("selFont").value;
        const size = document.getElementById("rngSize").value;
        const spacing = document.getElementById("rngSpacing").value;
        const skew = document.getElementById("rngSkew").value;
        const rotate = document.getElementById("rngRotate").value;
        const tilt = document.getElementById("rngTilt").value;
        const strokeWidth = document.getElementById("rngStroke").value;
        const textureUrl = document.getElementById("inpTextureUrl").value;
        const bgUrl = document.getElementById("inpBgUrl").value;

        // CSS
        let css = `.ultra-nick-container {\n`;
        css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
        css += `  transform: perspective(500px) rotate(${rotate}deg) skewX(${skew}deg) rotateX(${tilt}deg);\n`;
        
        if (anim !== 'none' && anim !== 'anim-rainbow') {
            css += `  animation: ${anim} ${animSpeed}s infinite alternate ease-in-out;\n`;
        }
        css += `}\n\n`;

        css += `.ultra-nick-text {\n`;
        css += `  font-family: ${font};\n`;
        css += `  font-size: ${size}px;\n`;
        css += `  letter-spacing: ${spacing}px;\n`;
        css += `  font-weight: 900;\n`;

        if (fillMode === 'solid') {
            css += `  color: ${colors.main};\n`;
        } else if (fillMode === 'gradient') {
            if(anim === 'anim-rainbow') {
                css += `  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, #f00, #ff0, #0f0, #0ff, #00f, #f0f, #f00);\n`;
                css += `  background-size: 400%;\n`;
                css += `  animation: anim-rainbow ${animSpeed}s linear infinite;\n`;
            } else {
                css += `  background-image: linear-gradient(${document.getElementById("rngGradAngle").value}deg, ${colors.main}, ${colors.second});\n`;
            }
            css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
            css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
        } else if (fillMode === 'image') {
            css += `  background-image: url('${textureUrl}');\n`;
            css += `  background-size: cover;\n`;
            css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
            css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
        }

        if (strokeWidth > 0) {
            css += `  -webkit-text-stroke: ${strokeWidth}px ${colors.stroke};\n`;
        }
        if (shadowCss) {
            css += `  filter: ${shadowCss};\n`;
        }
        css += `}\n`;

        // Keyframes (Eğer animasyon varsa)
        if (anim !== 'none') {
            css += `\n/* Animasyon Keyframes (CSS dosyana ekle) */\n`;
            if (anim === 'anim-float') css += `@keyframes anim-float { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px)} }\n`;
            if (anim === 'anim-pulse') css += `@keyframes anim-pulse { 0%,100%{transform:scale(1)} 50%{transform:scale(1.05)} }\n`;
            if (anim === 'anim-rainbow') css += `@keyframes anim-rainbow { 0%{background-position:0% 50%} 100%{background-position:200% 50%} }\n`;
            // ... diğerlerini buraya ekleyebilirsin
        }

        document.getElementById("codeCss").innerText = css;

        // HTML
        let html = `<!-- GS Rams Ultra Style -->\n`;
        if (bgMode === 'image') {
            html += `<div style="background: url('${bgUrl}') center/cover; padding: 20px; display:inline-block;">\n`;
        } else {
            html += `<div style="background: ${colors.bg}; padding: 20px; display:inline-block;">\n`;
        }
        
        html += `  <div class="ultra-nick-container">\n`;
        if(document.getElementById("inpIconLeft").value) html += `    <span class="icon">${document.getElementById("inpIconLeft").value}</span>\n`;
        html += `    <span class="ultra-nick-text">${document.getElementById("inpNick").value}</span>\n`;
        if(document.getElementById("inpIconRight").value) html += `    <span class="icon">${document.getElementById("inpIconRight").value}</span>\n`;
        html += `  </div>\n`;
        html += `</div>`;

        document.getElementById("codeHtml").innerText = html;
    }

    function copyToClipboard(id) {
        const text = document.getElementById(id).innerText;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => alert("Kod kopyalandı!"));
    }
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

### Ultra V2 Sürümündeki Yenilikler ve Nasıl Kullanılır?

1.  **KAOS Modu (Sol Üst):**
    *   Kırmızı "KAOS MODU" butonuna her bastığında sistem tamamen rastgele bir stil üretir. Font, renkler, animasyonlar, eğimler hepsi değişir. İlham almak için birebir.

2.  **Akıllı Stil (Sol Üst):**
    *   Mavi buton, daha kontrollü ve göze hoş gelen rastgele stiller üretir.

3.  **Animasyonlar (Animasyon & 3D Sekmesi):**
    *   Nick'ine hayat ver. **"Gökkuşağı Akışı"** (Rainbow) seçersen, yazı renkleri sürekli akar (bunu gradient modunda kullan).
    *   **Glitch:** Yazı siber-punk tarzında bozulup düzelir.

4.  **Doku Maskeleme (Renk Sekmesi -> Dolgu Tipi: Image):**
    *   Bu çok güçlü bir özellik. "Dolgu Tipi"ni **Resim/GIF Dokusu** seç. Sonra internetten bulduğun bir GIF linkini yapıştır (örneğin alev gif'i). Yazının *içi* o GIF ile dolar.

5.  **3D Perspektif (Animasyon & 3D Sekmesi):**
    *   **Eğme (Skew)** ve **Perspektif (Tilt)** ile yazıya Star Wars açılış yazısı gibi derinlik katabilirsin.

Tüm kodlar (HTML ve CSS) sağ altta otomatik olarak oluşturulur, tek tıkla kopyalayıp sitende kullanabilirsin. İyi eğlenceler! 🚀

## Yeni Eklediklerim (Özet)

### 1. Hazır Stil Paketleri 2.0
- Yeni butonlar:
  - **Glitch FX**
  - **Fire & Lava**
  - **Ice & Frost**
  - **Gold / Luxury**
  - **Cyberpunk**
- Her biri:
  - Renk + gölge + border + font + hafif animasyon ayarı yapıyor.

### 2. Otomatik Stil Karıştırıcı
- Yeni buton: **“Stil Karıştır (Mix)”**
  - Son uyguladığın 2 preset’i hafif random ile harmanlıyor.
  - Renkleri blend ediyor, gölge/border orta yol, font rastgele ama tutarlı.

### 3. Animasyon Motoru
- Sol panelde yeni bölüm: **“Animasyon & Hareket”**
  - Tip seçici:
    - Yok, Parlama (pulse glow), Yana Sallanma (wobble), Nefes (breathing), Yavaş Renk Kaydırma (hue shift), Titreşim (shake)
  - Duration slider (süre)
  - Sonsuz mu (infinite) checkbox
- Çıktı CSS içinde otomatik **@keyframes** üretiyorum (cssOutput kısmında).

### 4. Random “Akıllı Kaos” Butonu
- Yeni buton: **“Akıllı Kaos”**
  - Full Kaos kadar deli değil; sahnede kullanılabilir:
    - Renkler uyumlu
    - Font okunabilir
    - Border/gölge aşırı kaçmıyor
  - Tamamen kullanılır kombinasyon üretmeye çalışıyor.

### 5. Simetri & Mirror Stili
- Checkbox: **“Ayna Stil (Sol-Sağ Aynı)”**
  - Harf aralığı, gölge, outline ve border ayarlarını simetrik olacak şekilde optimize ediyor (özellikle iki ikonlu kullanımda).

### 6. Hızlı Kayıt / Yükleme (JSON Copy)
- Yeni butonlar:
  - **“Stili JSON Kopyala”**
  - **“JSON Yapıştır & Uygula”**
- Bu ne işe yarıyor?
  - Arkadaşına “şu ayarları kullan” diye bütün konfigi tek JSON string olarak atabiliyorsun.
  - Sonra o, JSON’u yapıştırıp tek tıkla aynı stili alıyor.

### 7. Sahnede Kullanım Modları
- Yeni select: **“Kullanım Modu”**
  - LED Ekran
  - OBS Overlay
  - Web Site Başlığı
  - Mobil Banner
- Seçince:
  - Boyut, gölge, border ve animasyonu bu profile uygun şekilde optimize ediyor.

---

Aşağıdaki kod:  
Önceki sürüm + yukarıdaki tüm yeni butonlar ve fonksiyonlar entegre edilmiş **güncelleştirilmiş tam versiyon**.

Kaydet: `nick-ultra-chaos-plus.html`  
Tarayıcıda aç, direkt çalışır.

> Not: Kod biraz uzun; ama senin tarafta sadece açıp kullanman yeterli.  
> Her şey butonlara/slider’lara bağlı.

---

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>GS Rams Nick Ultra Chaos PLUS – Full Style Studio</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    <!-- iro.js -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Rajdhani:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Caveat:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Icons -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

    <style>
        :root{
            --primary:#f97316;
            --secondary:#22d3ee;
            --accent:#a855f7;
            --bg:#020617;
            --panel:#020617;
            --soft:#0f172a;
            --border-soft:#1f2937;
            --text-main:#e5e7eb;
            --text-soft:#9ca3af;
            --radius:14px;
            --shadow-strong:0 18px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --shadow-soft:0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            --transition:all .25s ease;
        }
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
        body{
            font-family:'Montserrat',system-ui,sans-serif;
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#1e293b 0,#020617 55%,#000 100%);
            color:var(--text-main);
            min-height:100vh;
            display:flex;
            align-items:stretch;
            justify-content:center;
        }
        .app{
            max-width:1680px;
            width:100%;
            margin:12px;
            border-radius:20px;
            overflow:hidden;
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top,rgba(148,163,184,0.12) 0,rgba(15,23,42,0.98) 40%,#020617 100%);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-strong);
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:390px minmax(0,1fr);
            max-height:calc(100vh - 24px);
        }

        .left{
            background:#020617;
            border-right:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
        }
        .left-header{
            padding:12px 16px 8px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
        }
        .brand{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:10px;
        }
        .brand-main{
            font-weight:800;
            font-size:1.05rem;
            letter-spacing:.16em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            background:linear-gradient(120deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary),var(--accent));
            -webkit-background-clip:text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
        }
        .brand-sub{
            font-size:.7rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .badge{
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:5px;
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .left-scroll{
            flex:1;
            overflow-y:auto;
            padding:8px 14px 14px;
        }
        .section{
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.97);
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid var(--border-soft);
            padding:11px 10px 13px;
            margin-bottom:10px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
        }
        .s-head{
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:7px;
        }
        .s-title{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:7px;
            font-size:.8rem;
            letter-spacing:.13em;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .s-title i{color:var(--primary);}
        .btn-reset{
            border:none;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            color:#9ca3af;
            padding:3px 8px;
            border-radius:999px;
            font-size:.7rem;
            cursor:pointer;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .btn-reset:hover{
            color:#f9fafb;
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            background:rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
        }
        .group{margin-bottom:7px;}
        .label-row{
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            margin-bottom:3px;
        }
        .label{font-size:.78rem;color:#9ca3af;}
        .value{font-size:.78rem;color:#e5e7eb;}
        .input,.select{
            width:100%;
            border-radius:9px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background:#020617;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            padding:6px 8px;
            font-size:.8rem;
            outline:none;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .input:focus,.select:focus{
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(34,211,238,0.45);
        }
        .range{
            width:100%;
            appearance:none;
            height:6px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#4b5563,#0f172a);
            outline:none;
        }
        .range::-webkit-slider-thumb{
            appearance:none;
            width:14px;
            height:14px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary));
            border:2px solid #020617;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            cursor:pointer;
        }
        .two-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;}
        .btn-row{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-top:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
        .btn{
            flex:1;
            border:none;
            border-radius:9px;
            padding:6px 7px;
            font-size:.72rem;
            font-weight:600;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            letter-spacing:.06em;
            cursor:pointer;
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            gap:5px;
            transition:var(--transition);
            white-space:nowrap;
        }
        .btn-primary{
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary));
            color:#020617;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(248,113,113,0.55);}
        .btn-ghost{
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .btn-ghost:hover{background:rgba(30,64,175,0.45);border-color:#60a5fa;}
        .btn-kaos{
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ec4899,#22c55e,#3b82f6);
            color:#0f172a;
        }
        .btn-kaos:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 26px rgba(236,72,153,0.6);}
        .btn-soft{
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            color:#e5e7eb;
        }
        .btn-soft:hover{background:rgba(55,65,81,0.9);}
        .btn-mini{
            flex:unset;
            padding:4px 6px;
        }
        .check-row{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:6px;
            margin:2px 0;
        }
        .check-row input{width:15px;height:15px;accent-color:var(--secondary);}
        .check-row span{font-size:.78rem;color:#d1d5db;}
        .chips{
            display:flex;
            flex-wrap:wrap;
            gap:5px;
            margin-top:3px;
        }
        .chip{
            font-size:.7rem;
            padding:3px 7px;
            border-radius:999px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            cursor:pointer;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .chip:hover{
            border-color:var(--primary);
            background:rgba(248,113,113,0.26);
            color:#fef3c7;
        }
        .picker-label{
            font-size:.7rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
            text-align:center;
            margin-top:2px;
        }
        .small-hint{
            font-size:.68rem;
            color:#6b7280;
            margin-top:2px;
        }

        .right{
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            max-height:100%;
        }
        .preview-top{
            padding:13px 15px 8px;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
            background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#1f2937 0,#020617 55%,#000 100%);
        }
        .preview-shell{
            max-width:900px;
            margin:0 auto;
            position:relative;
            border-radius:20px;
            padding:13px 13px 15px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.96);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        #previewBg{
            position:absolute;
            inset:0;
            background-size:cover;
            background-position:center;
            background-repeat:no-repeat;
            opacity:.25;
            filter:blur(0px);
            z-index:0;
        }
        .preview-header-row{
            position:relative;
            z-index:2;
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            font-size:.8rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
            margin-bottom:5px;
        }
        .preview-header-row span i{color:var(--secondary);margin-right:5px;}
        #previewNickWrapper{
            position:relative;
            z-index:2;
            padding:16px 6px 10px;
            text-align:center;
            min-height:90px;
        }
        #previewNick{
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            gap:8px;
            min-height:50px;
            padding:10px 14px;
            font-size:32px;
            line-height:1.3;
        }
        #leftIcon,#rightIcon{max-height:32px;}
        #nickText{white-space:nowrap;}

        .bottom-grid{
            flex:1;
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;
            gap:10px;
            padding:10px 14px 14px;
            background:#020617;
            max-height:100%;
        }
        .code-card{
            background:#020617;
            border-radius:var(--radius);
            border:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.95);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .code-header{
            padding:8px 11px;
            background:#020617;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.95);
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            font-size:.78rem;
            color:#9ca3af;
        }
        .code-header-left{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:6px;
        }
        .code-header-left i{color:var(--primary);}
        .icon-btn{
            width:26px;
            height:23px;
            border-radius:7px;
            border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
            background:#020617;
            color:#9ca3af;
            font-size:.7rem;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            cursor:pointer;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .icon-btn:hover{
            border-color:var(--secondary);
            color:#f9fafb;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
        }
        .code-body{
            flex:1;
            padding:8px 8px 10px;
            font-family:"JetBrains Mono","Fira Code",ui-monospace,monospace;
            font-size:.75rem;
            color:#e5e7eb;
            overflow:auto;
            white-space:pre;
        }

        @media(max-width:1150px){
            .app{grid-template-columns:340px minmax(0,1fr);}
        }
        @media(max-width:900px){
            .app{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-height:none;}
            .left{max-height:400px;}
            .bottom-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
        }
        @media(max-width:600px){
            #previewNick{font-size:24px;}
            #nickText{white-space:normal;}
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
    <!-- SOL PANEL -->
    <aside class="left">
        <div class="left-header">
            <div class="brand">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-signature" style="color:var(--primary);font-size:1.2rem;"></i>
                <div>
                    <div class="brand-main">NICK ULTRA CHAOS +</div>
                    <div class="brand-sub">GS Rams · Full Kaos + Akıllı Stil Motoru</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:4px;">
                <div class="badge"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> LIVE</div>
                <span style="font-size:.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Kaos · Mix · Animasyon</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="left-scroll">
            <!-- Nick -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-user-pen"></i> Nick / İsim
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetNick()">Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Nick</span>
                        <span class="label" style="opacity:.6;">(sadece önizlemede)</span>
                    </div>
                    <input id="nickInput" class="input" maxlength="60">
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="fillNick('GS Rams')">GS Rams</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="fillNick('Türk Gösterisi')">Türk Gösterisi</button>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row" style="margin-top:4px;">
                    <button class="btn btn-soft" onclick="randomNick()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Rastgele Nick
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Kullanım Modu & Global -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-sliders"></i> Global Mod & Preset
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Kullanım Modu</span>
                        <select id="usageMode" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Serbest</option>
                            <option value="led">LED Ekran</option>
                            <option value="obs">OBS Overlay</option>
                            <option value="web">Web Başlık</option>
                            <option value="mobile">Mobil Banner</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Ayna / Simetri</span>
                        <div class="check-row">
                            <input type="checkbox" id="mirrorMode">
                            <span>Ayna Stil (ikonlu kullanım)</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="applySmartStyle()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-brain"></i> Nick'e Uygun Stil
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-kaos" onclick="fullChaos()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-biohazard"></i> FULL KAOS
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-soft" onclick="smartChaos()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-shuffle"></i> Akıllı Kaos
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-soft" onclick="mixLastPresets()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-flask"></i> Stil Karıştır (Mix)
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Ultra Stil Motoru: Presetler -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Hazır Stil Paketleri
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="chips">
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('soft')">Soft Neon</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('retro')">Retro 3D</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('holo')">Hologram</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('led')">LED Panel</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('minimal')">Minimal</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('glitch')">Glitch FX</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('fire')">Fire & Lava</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('ice')">Ice & Frost</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('gold')">Gold / Luxury</div>
                    <div class="chip" onclick="applyPreset('cyber')">Cyberpunk</div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Font -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i> Font & Dizilim
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetFont()">Font Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Font Ailesi</span>
                        <span class="value" id="fontFamilyName">Montserrat</span>
                    </div>
                    <select id="fontFamily" class="select">
                        <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif" data-name="Montserrat">Montserrat</option>
                        <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif" data-name="Raleway">Raleway</option>
                        <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif" data-name="Rajdhani">Rajdhani (Euro)</option>
                        <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif" data-name="Oswald">Oswald</option>
                        <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif" data-name="Bebas Neue">Bebas Neue</option>
                        <option value="'Playfair Display', serif" data-name="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option>
                        <option value="'Caveat', cursive" data-name="Caveat">Caveat</option>
                        <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive" data-name="Dancing Script">Dancing Script</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Boyut</span>
                            <span class="value" id="fontSizeLabel">32px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontSize" type="range" class="range" min="14" max="80" value="32">
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Ağırlık</span>
                            <span class="value" id="fontWeightLabel">600</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="fontWeight" type="range" class="range" min="300" max="900" step="100" value="600">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Harf Aralığı</span>
                            <span class="value" id="letterSpacingLabel">0px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="letterSpacing" type="range" class="range" min="-1" max="10" step="0.2" value="0">
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Satır Yüksekliği</span>
                            <span class="value" id="lineHeightLabel">1.3</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="lineHeight" type="range" class="range" min="1" max="2" step="0.1" value="1.3">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Hizalama</span>
                        <select id="textAlign" class="select">
                            <option value="center">Ortala</option>
                            <option value="left">Sol</option>
                            <option value="right">Sağ</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Stil</span>
                        <select id="fontStyle" class="select">
                            <option value="normal">Normal</option>
                            <option value="italic">İtalik</option>
                            <option value="oblique">Eğik</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="smallCaps">
                    <span>Small Caps</span>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="trackingWide">
                    <span>Ekstra Geniş Harf Aralığı</span>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Yazı Rengi (iro.js) -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-droplet"></i> Yazı Renk & Gradient
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetColor()">Renk Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Renk Modu</span>
                    <select id="colorMode" class="select">
                        <option value="solid">Solid</option>
                        <option value="gradient">Gradient</option>
                        <option value="transparent">Transparan</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Ana Renk</span>
                    <div id="pickerTextMain"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="textMainHexLabel"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Gradient 2. Renk</span>
                    <div id="pickerTextSecond"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="textSecondHexLabel"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="useNeon">
                    <span>Neon Glow</span>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-soft" onclick="mixColors()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-flask"></i> Renk Karıştır
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-soft" onclick="randomColorSet()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Random Renk
                    </button>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Gölge / Border / Decor -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Dekor & Efekt
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetEffects()">Efekt Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Dekorasyon</span>
                        <select id="textDecoration" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="underline">Alt</option>
                            <option value="overline">Üst</option>
                            <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
                            <option value="underline overline">Çift Çizgi</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Gölge Preset</span>
                        <select id="shadowPreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="soft">Soft</option>
                            <option value="hard">Hard</option>
                            <option value="glow">Glow</option>
                            <option value="3d">3D</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Gölge Rengi</span>
                    <div id="pickerShadow"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="shadowHexLabel"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Outline</span>
                        <select id="outlinePreset" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="thin">İnce</option>
                            <option value="medium">Orta</option>
                            <option value="bold">Kalın</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Border Stili</span>
                        <select id="borderStyle" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="solid">Düz</option>
                            <option value="dashed">Kesik</option>
                            <option value="dotted">Noktalı</option>
                            <option value="double">Çift</option>
                            <option value="glowframe">Neon Frame</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Border Rengi</span>
                    <div id="pickerBorder"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="borderHexLabel"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <div class="label-row">
                        <span class="label">Radius</span>
                        <span class="value" id="radiusLabel">12px</span>
                    </div>
                    <input id="radius" type="range" class="range" min="0" max="40" value="12">
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Animasyon -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-wave-square"></i> Animasyon & Hareket
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetAnimation()">Anim Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <span class="label">Animasyon Tipi</span>
                        <select id="animType" class="select">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="pulse">Parlama (Pulse)</option>
                            <option value="wobble">Yana Sallanma</option>
                            <option value="breath">Nefes</option>
                            <option value="hue">Renk Kaydırma</option>
                            <option value="shake">Titreşim</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">Süre (sn)</span>
                            <span class="value" id="animDurationLabel">2.0</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="animDuration" type="range" class="range" min="0.5" max="8" step="0.1" value="2">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="check-row">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="animInfinite" checked>
                    <span>Sonsuz Döngü</span>
                </div>
                <div class="small-hint">Not: Animasyon çıktısı CSS bölümünde @keyframes olarak görünür.</div>
            </section>

            <!-- BG + Blur + Opacity + Icon -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> Arka Plan & İkon
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetBackground()">BG Sıfırla</button>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Arka Plan Tipi</span>
                    <select id="bgMode" class="select">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="color">Renk</option>
                        <option value="image">Resim / GIF URL</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Panel Arka Plan Rengi</span>
                    <div id="pickerBg"></div>
                    <div class="picker-label" id="bgHexLabel"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="two-cols">
                    <div class="group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">BG Opaklık</span>
                            <span class="value" id="bgOpacityLabel">25%</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="bgOpacity" type="range" class="range" min="0" max="100" value="25">
                    </div>
                    <div class="group">
                        <div class="label-row">
                            <span class="label">BG Blur</span>
                            <span class="value" id="bgBlurLabel">0px</span>
                        </div>
                        <input id="bgBlur" type="range" class="range" min="0" max="12" value="0">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">BG Resim / GIF URL</span>
                    <input id="bgUrl" class="input" placeholder="https://cdn.site.com/image.gif">
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Yazı Başı İkon / Emoji / URL</span>
                    <input id="leftIconUrl" class="input" placeholder="🔥 veya https://.../icon.png">
                </div>
                <div class="group">
                    <span class="label">Yazı Sonu İkon / Emoji / URL</span>
                    <input id="rightIconUrl" class="input" placeholder="⭐ veya https://...">
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- JSON Export / Import -->
            <section class="section">
                <div class="s-head">
                    <div class="s-title">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-code-compare"></i> Stil JSON
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="btn-row">
                    <button class="btn btn-soft" onclick="copyStyleJson()">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i> Stili JSON Kopyala
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-soft" onclick="applyStyleJsonPrompt()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-paste"></i> JSON Yapıştır & Uygula
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="small-hint">JSON'u arkadaşına yolla, o yapıştırıp aynı stili tek tık alabilir.</div>
            </section>
        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
    <main class="right">
        <section class="preview-top">
            <div class="preview-shell">
                <div id="previewBg"></div>
                <div class="preview-header-row">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Nick Önizleme</span>
                    <span style="font-size:.75rem;color:#9ca3af;">.nick-style-ultra · display:inline-flex;</span>
                </div>
                <div id="previewNickWrapper">
                    <span id="previewNick">
                        <span id="leftIcon"></span>
                        <span id="nickText"></span>
                        <span id="rightIcon"></span>
                    </span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="bottom-grid">
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-header-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-html5"></i> HTML Çıktısı
                    </div>
                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('html')">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <pre id="htmlOutput" class="code-body"></pre>
            </div>
            <div class="code-card">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <div class="code-header-left">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-css3-alt"></i> CSS Çıktısı (webkit + gradient + anim)
                    </div>
                    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="copyCode('css')">
                        <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <pre id="cssOutput" class="code-body"></pre>
            </div>
        </section>
    </main>
</div>

<script>
    const state = {
        nick:"GS Rams",
        fontFamily:"'Montserrat', sans-serif",
        fontSize:32,
        fontWeight:600,
        fontStyle:"normal",
        letterSpacing:0,
        lineHeight:1.3,
        textAlign:"center",
        smallCaps:false,
        trackingWide:false,

        colorMode:"solid",
        colorMain:"#f9fafb",
        colorSecond:"#f97316",
        neon:false,

        shadowPreset:"none",
        shadowColor:"#000000",
        outlinePreset:"none",
        borderStyle:"none",
        borderColor:"#f97316",
        radius:12,

        bgMode:"none",
        bgColor:"#020617",
        bgOpacity:25,
        bgBlur:0,
        bgUrl:"",

        textDecoration:"none",

        leftIconUrl:"",
        rightIconUrl:"",

        animType:"none",
        animDuration:2,
        animInfinite:true,

        usageMode:"none",
        mirrorMode:false
    };

    let pickerTextMain, pickerTextSecond, pickerShadow, pickerBorder, pickerBg;
    let lastPresets = [];

    function initPickers(){
        pickerTextMain = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerTextMain",{width:120,color:state.colorMain});
        pickerTextSecond = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerTextSecond",{width:110,color:state.colorSecond});
        pickerShadow = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerShadow",{width:90,color:state.shadowColor});
        pickerBorder = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerBorder",{width:90,color:state.borderColor});
        pickerBg = new iro.ColorPicker("#pickerBg",{width:90,color:state.bgColor});

        pickerTextMain.on("color:change",c=>{state.colorMain=c.hexString;document.getElementById("textMainHexLabel").textContent=c.hexString;updatePreview();});
        pickerTextSecond.on("color:change",c=>{state.colorSecond=c.hexString;document.getElementById("textSecondHexLabel").textContent=c.hexString;updatePreview();});
        pickerShadow.on("color:change",c=>{state.shadowColor=c.hexString;document.getElementById("shadowHexLabel").textContent=c.hexString;updatePreview();});
        pickerBorder.on("color:change",c=>{state.borderColor=c.hexString;document.getElementById("borderHexLabel").textContent=c.hexString;updatePreview();});
        pickerBg.on("color:change",c=>{state.bgColor=c.hexString;document.getElementById("bgHexLabel").textContent=c.hexString;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("textMainHexLabel").textContent=state.colorMain;
        document.getElementById("textSecondHexLabel").textContent=state.colorSecond;
        document.getElementById("shadowHexLabel").textContent=state.shadowColor;
        document.getElementById("borderHexLabel").textContent=state.borderColor;
        document.getElementById("bgHexLabel").textContent=state.bgColor;
    }

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",()=>{
        initPickers();
        // set inputs
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value=state.nick;
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value=state.fontFamily;
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value=state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value=state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value=state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent=state.fontSize+"px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent=state.letterSpacing+"px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent=state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value=state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").value=state.fontStyle;
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked=state.smallCaps;
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked=state.trackingWide;

        document.getElementById("colorMode").value=state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked=state.neon;

        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value=state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value=state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value=state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("radius").value=state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent=state.radius+"px";
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value=state.textDecoration;

        document.getElementById("bgMode").value=state.bgMode;
        document.getElementById("bgUrl").value=state.bgUrl;
        document.getElementById("bgOpacity").value=state.bgOpacity;
        document.getElementById("bgOpacityLabel").textContent=state.bgOpacity+"%";
        document.getElementById("bgBlur").value=state.bgBlur;
        document.getElementById("bgBlurLabel").textContent=state.bgBlur+"px";

        document.getElementById("leftIconUrl").value=state.leftIconUrl;
        document.getElementById("rightIconUrl").value=state.rightIconUrl;

        document.getElementById("animType").value=state.animType;
```
