```html
        document.getElementById("animDuration").value=state.animDuration;
        document.getElementById("animDurationLabel").textContent=state.animDuration.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById("animInfinite").checked=state.animInfinite;

        document.getElementById("usageMode").value=state.usageMode;
        document.getElementById("mirrorMode").checked=state.mirrorMode;

        bindEvents();
        syncFontFamilyName();
        updatePreview();
    });

    function bindEvents(){
        document.getElementById("nickInput").addEventListener("input",e=>{
            state.nick=e.target.value||"Nick";
            updatePreview();
        });
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").addEventListener("change",e=>{
            state.fontFamily=e.target.value;
            syncFontFamilyName();
            updatePreview();
        });
        ["fontSize","fontWeight","letterSpacing","lineHeight","radius","bgOpacity","bgBlur","animDuration"].forEach(id=>{
            document.getElementById(id).addEventListener("input",e=>{
                const v=+e.target.value;
                if(id==="fontSize"){state.fontSize=v;document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent=v+"px";}
                if(id==="fontWeight"){state.fontWeight=v;document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent=v;}
                if(id==="letterSpacing"){state.letterSpacing=v;document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent=v+"px";}
                if(id==="lineHeight"){state.lineHeight=v;document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent=v;}
                if(id==="radius"){state.radius=v;document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent=v+"px";}
                if(id==="bgOpacity"){state.bgOpacity=v;document.getElementById("bgOpacityLabel").textContent=v+"%";}
                if(id==="bgBlur"){state.bgBlur=v;document.getElementById("bgBlurLabel").textContent=v+"px";}
                if(id==="animDuration"){state.animDuration=v;document.getElementById("animDurationLabel").textContent=v.toFixed(1);}
                updatePreview();
            });
        });
        document.getElementById("textAlign").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.textAlign=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.fontStyle=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.smallCaps=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.trackingWide=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("colorMode").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.colorMode=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("useNeon").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.neon=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.shadowPreset=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.outlinePreset=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.borderStyle=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.textDecoration=e.target.value;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("bgMode").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.bgMode=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("bgUrl").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.bgUrl=e.target.value;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("leftIconUrl").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.leftIconUrl=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("rightIconUrl").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.rightIconUrl=e.target.value;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("animType").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.animType=e.target.value;updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("animInfinite").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.animInfinite=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});

        document.getElementById("usageMode").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.usageMode=e.target.value;applyUsageMode();updatePreview();});
        document.getElementById("mirrorMode").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.mirrorMode=e.target.checked;updatePreview();});
    }

    function syncFontFamilyName(){
        const sel=document.getElementById("fontFamily");
        const opt=sel.options[sel.selectedIndex];
        document.getElementById("fontFamilyName").textContent=opt.getAttribute("data-name")||"Custom";
    }

    // PREVIEW
    function updatePreview(){
        const wrapper=document.getElementById("previewNick");
        const textSpan=document.getElementById("nickText");
        const left=document.getElementById("leftIcon");
        const right=document.getElementById("rightIcon");
        const bg=document.getElementById("previewBg");

        textSpan.textContent=state.nick||"Nick";
        applyIcon(left,state.leftIconUrl);
        applyIcon(right,state.rightIconUrl);

        wrapper.style.fontFamily=state.fontFamily;
        wrapper.style.fontSize=state.fontSize+"px";
        wrapper.style.fontWeight=state.fontWeight;
        wrapper.style.fontStyle=state.fontStyle;
        const extraTrack = state.trackingWide ? 2 : 0;
        const baseLetter = state.mirrorMode ? Math.abs(state.letterSpacing) : state.letterSpacing;
        wrapper.style.letterSpacing=(baseLetter + extraTrack)+"px";
        wrapper.style.lineHeight=state.lineHeight;
        wrapper.style.textAlign=state.textAlign;
        wrapper.style.fontVariantCaps=state.smallCaps?"small-caps":"normal";
        wrapper.style.textDecoration=state.textDecoration;
        wrapper.style.borderRadius=state.radius+"px";
        wrapper.style.display="inline-flex";

        // color
        if(state.colorMode==="transparent"){
            wrapper.style.color="transparent";
            wrapper.style.backgroundImage="none";
            wrapper.style.webkitBackgroundClip="initial";
            wrapper.style.webkitTextFillColor="transparent";
        }else if(state.colorMode==="solid"){
            wrapper.style.color=state.colorMain;
            wrapper.style.backgroundImage="none";
            wrapper.style.webkitBackgroundClip="initial";
            wrapper.style.webkitTextFillColor="initial";
        }else if(state.colorMode==="gradient"){
            wrapper.style.backgroundImage=`linear-gradient(90deg,${state.colorMain},${state.colorSecond})`;
            wrapper.style.webkitBackgroundClip="text";
            wrapper.style.webkitTextFillColor="transparent";
            wrapper.style.color="transparent";
        }

        // shadow
        let shadow="none";
        const neonGlow=state.neon?hexToRgba(state.colorMain,0.9):state.shadowColor;
        switch(state.shadowPreset){
            case "soft":shadow="0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.65)";break;
            case "hard":shadow="3px 3px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";break;
            case "glow":shadow=`0 0 10px ${neonGlow},0 0 26px ${neonGlow}`;break;
            case "3d":shadow="2px 2px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.9),4px 4px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.7)";break;
        }
        wrapper.style.textShadow=shadow;
        if(state.neon){
            const c=hexToRgba(state.colorMain,0.9);
            wrapper.style.textShadow=`0 0 10px ${c},0 0 24px ${c},0 0 42px ${c}`;
        }

        // outline
        switch(state.outlinePreset){
            case "thin":wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="0.5px rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";break;
            case "medium":wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="1px rgba(15,23,42,1)";break;
            case "bold":wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="1.5px rgba(15,23,42,1)";break;
            default:wrapper.style.webkitTextStroke="0px transparent";
        }

        // border
        wrapper.style.boxShadow="none";
        switch(state.borderStyle){
            case "solid":wrapper.style.border="2px solid "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "dashed":wrapper.style.border="2px dashed "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "dotted":wrapper.style.border="2px dotted "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "double":wrapper.style.border="3px double "+state.borderColor;break;
            case "glowframe":
                wrapper.style.border="2px solid "+state.borderColor;
                wrapper.style.boxShadow=`0 0 16px ${hexToRgba(state.borderColor,0.7)}`;
                break;
            default:wrapper.style.border="none";
        }

        // background
        const op=state.bgOpacity/100;
        bg.style.filter=`blur(${state.bgBlur}px)`;
        if(state.bgMode==="image" && state.bgUrl){
            bg.style.backgroundImage=`url("${state.bgUrl}")`;
            bg.style.backgroundColor="transparent";
            bg.style.opacity=op;
        }else if(state.bgMode==="color"){
            bg.style.backgroundImage="none";
            bg.style.backgroundColor=state.bgColor;
            bg.style.opacity=op;
        }else{
            bg.style.backgroundImage="none";
            bg.style.backgroundColor="#020617";
            bg.style.opacity=0.25;
            bg.style.filter="blur(0px)";
        }

        // animation
        const animInfo = buildAnimation();
        wrapper.style.animation = animInfo.inline;

        updateCodeOutputs(animInfo.keyframes);
    }

    function applyIcon(span,value){
        span.innerHTML="";
        if(!value)return;
        if(value.startsWith("http")){
            const img=document.createElement("img");
            img.src=value;
            img.alt="";
            img.style.maxHeight="32px";
            img.style.display="inline-block";
            span.appendChild(img);
        }else{
            span.textContent=value;
        }
    }

    function hexToRgba(hex,alpha){
        const h=hex.replace("#","");
        const full=h.length===3?h.split("").map(v=>v+v).join(""):h;
        const num=parseInt(full,16);
        const r=(num>>16)&255,g=(num>>8)&255,b=num&255;
        return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`;
    }

    // Animasyon generator
    function buildAnimation(){
        if(state.animType==="none") return { inline:"none", keyframes:"" };
        const dur = state.animDuration || 2;
        const infinite = state.animInfinite ? "infinite" : "1";
        const timing = "ease-in-out";
        let name = "";
        let keyframes = "";

        switch(state.animType){
            case "pulse":
                name = "nickPulse";
                keyframes =
`@keyframes nickPulse {
  0%,100% { transform: scale(1); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0)); }
  50% { transform: scale(1.05); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,0.35)); }
}`;
                break;
            case "wobble":
                name = "nickWobble";
                keyframes =
`@keyframes nickWobble {
  0%,100% { transform: translateX(0); }
  25% { transform: translateX(-3px) rotate(-1deg); }
  75% { transform: translateX(3px) rotate(1deg); }
}`;
                break;
            case "breath":
                name = "nickBreath";
                keyframes =
`@keyframes nickBreath {
  0%,100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.02); opacity: 0.9; }
}`;
                break;
            case "hue":
                name = "nickHueShift";
                keyframes =
`@keyframes nickHueShift {
  0% { filter: hue-rotate(0deg); }
  50% { filter: hue-rotate(180deg); }
  100% { filter: hue-rotate(360deg); }
}`;
                break;
            case "shake":
                name = "nickShake";
                keyframes =
`@keyframes nickShake {
  0%,100% { transform: translate3d(0,0,0); }
  20% { transform: translate3d(-2px,0,0); }
  40% { transform: translate3d(2px,0,0); }
  60% { transform: translate3d(-2px,0,0); }
  80% { transform: translate3d(2px,0,0); }
}`;
                break;
        }
        const inline = `${name} ${dur}s ${timing} ${infinite}`;
        return { inline, keyframes };
    }

    // KOD ÇIKTISI
    function updateCodeOutputs(animKeyframes){
        const css=[];
        css.push(".nick-style-ultra {");
        css.push("  display: inline-flex;");
        css.push("  align-items: center;");
        css.push("  justify-content: center;");
        css.push("  gap: 8px;");
        css.push("  padding: 10px 14px;");
        css.push(`  font-family: ${state.fontFamily};`);
        css.push(`  font-size: ${state.fontSize}px;`);
        css.push(`  font-weight: ${state.fontWeight};`);
        css.push(`  font-style: ${state.fontStyle};`);
        css.push(`  letter-spacing: ${state.letterSpacing + (state.trackingWide?2:0)}px;`);
        css.push(`  line-height: ${state.lineHeight};`);
        css.push(`  text-align: ${state.textAlign};`);
        css.push(`  font-variant-caps: ${state.smallCaps?"small-caps":"normal"};`);
        css.push(`  text-decoration: ${state.textDecoration};`);
        css.push(`  border-radius: ${state.radius}px;`);
        if(state.colorMode==="transparent"){
            css.push("  color: transparent;");
        }else if(state.colorMode==="solid"){
            css.push(`  color: ${state.colorMain};`);
        }else if(state.colorMode==="gradient"){
            css.push(`  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.colorMain}, ${state.colorSecond});`);
            css.push("  -webkit-background-clip: text;");
            css.push("  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;");
        }
        const preview=document.getElementById("previewNick");
        if(state.shadowPreset!=="none" || state.neon){
            css.push(`  text-shadow: ${preview.style.textShadow};`);
        }
        if(state.outlinePreset!=="none"){
            css.push(`  -webkit-text-stroke: ${preview.style.webkitTextStroke};`);
        }
        if(state.borderStyle!=="none"){
            css.push(`  border: ${preview.style.border};`);
            if(preview.style.boxShadow) css.push(`  box-shadow: ${preview.style.boxShadow};`);
        }
        if(state.animType!=="none"){
            css.push(`  animation: ${preview.style.animation};`);
        }
        css.push("}");

        if(state.bgMode!=="none"){
            css.push("");
            css.push(".nick-bg-wrapper {");
            css.push("  position: relative;");
            css.push("  overflow: hidden;");
            if(state.bgMode==="image" && state.bgUrl){
                css.push(`  background-image: url('${state.bgUrl}');`);
                css.push("  background-size: cover;");
                css.push("  background-position: center;");
                css.push(`  opacity: ${(state.bgOpacity/100).toFixed(2)};`);
                if(state.bgBlur>0) css.push(`  filter: blur(${state.bgBlur}px);`);
            }else if(state.bgMode==="color"){
                css.push(`  background-color: ${state.bgColor};`);
                css.push(`  opacity: ${(state.bgOpacity/100).toFixed(2)};`);
            }
            css.push("}");
        }

        if(animKeyframes){
            css.push("");
            css.push(animKeyframes);
        }

        const cssCode=css.join("\n");

        const html=[];
        html.push("<!-- GS Rams Nick Ultra Chaos PLUS – HTML -->");
        if(state.bgMode!=="none"){
            html.push('<div class="nick-bg-wrapper">');
            html.push('  <span class="nick-style-ultra">');
        }else{
            html.push('<span class="nick-style-ultra">');
        }
        if(state.leftIconUrl){
            if(state.leftIconUrl.startsWith("http")){
                html.push(`    <img src="${state.leftIconUrl}" alt="">`);
            }else{
                html.push(`    <span>${state.leftIconUrl}</span>`);
            }
        }
        html.push(`    ${state.nick || "Nick"}`);
        if(state.rightIconUrl){
            if(state.rightIconUrl.startsWith("http")){
                html.push(`    <img src="${state.rightIconUrl}" alt="">`);
            }else{
                html.push(`    <span>${state.rightIconUrl}</span>`);
            }
        }
        if(state.bgMode!=="none"){
            html.push("  </span>");
            html.push("</div>");
        }else{
            html.push("</span>");
        }

        document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent=cssCode;
        document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent=html.join("\n");
    }

    // RESET / PRESET / RANDOM
    function resetNick(){
        state.nick="GS Rams";
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value=state.nick;
        updatePreview();
    }
    function fillNick(t){
        state.nick=t;
        document.getElementById("nickInput").value=t;
        updatePreview();
    }
    function randomNick(){
        const a=["GS","TR","Sema","Stage","LED","Nick","Ultra","Rams","Chaos","Ghost","Show","FX"];
        const b=["Pro","FX","King","Legend","Storm","Wave","Fire","Light","Show","Line","Live"];
        const nick=a[Math.floor(Math.random()*a.length)]+" "+b[Math.floor(Math.random()*b.length)];
        fillNick(nick);
    }

    function resetFont(){
        state.fontFamily="'Montserrat', sans-serif";
        state.fontSize=32;
        state.fontWeight=600;
        state.fontStyle="normal";
        state.letterSpacing=0;
        state.lineHeight=1.3;
        state.textAlign="center";
        state.smallCaps=false;
        state.trackingWide=false;

        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value=state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value=state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value=state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value=state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent=state.fontSize+"px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent=state.letterSpacing+"px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent=state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value=state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontStyle").value=state.fontStyle;
        document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked=false;
        document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked=false;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetColor(){
        state.colorMode="solid";
        state.colorMain="#f9fafb";
        state.colorSecond="#f97316";
        state.neon=false;
        document.getElementById("colorMode").value=state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked=false;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString=state.colorMain;
        pickerTextSecond.color.hexString=state.colorSecond;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetEffects(){
        state.shadowPreset="none";
        state.shadowColor="#000000";
        state.outlinePreset="none";
        state.borderStyle="none";
        state.borderColor=state.colorMain;
        state.radius=12;
        state.textDecoration="none";

        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value=state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value=state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value=state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("radius").value=state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent=state.radius+"px";
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value=state.textDecoration;
        pickerShadow.color.hexString=state.shadowColor;
        pickerBorder.color.hexString=state.borderColor;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetBackground(){
        state.bgMode="none";
        state.bgColor="#020617";
        state.bgOpacity=25;
        state.bgBlur=0;
        state.bgUrl="";
        state.leftIconUrl="";
        state.rightIconUrl="";
        document.getElementById("bgMode").value=state.bgMode;
        document.getElementById("bgUrl").value="";
        document.getElementById("leftIconUrl").value="";
        document.getElementById("rightIconUrl").value="";
        document.getElementById("bgOpacity").value=state.bgOpacity;
        document.getElementById("bgOpacityLabel").textContent=state.bgOpacity+"%";
        document.getElementById("bgBlur").value=state.bgBlur;
        document.getElementById("bgBlurLabel").textContent=state.bgBlur+"px";
        pickerBg.color.hexString=state.bgColor;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function resetAnimation(){
        state.animType="none";
        state.animDuration=2;
        state.animInfinite=true;
        document.getElementById("animType").value=state.animType;
        document.getElementById("animDuration").value=state.animDuration;
        document.getElementById("animDurationLabel").textContent=state.animDuration.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById("animInfinite").checked=state.animInfinite;
        updatePreview();
    }

    // RENK KARISTIRICI
    function mixColors(){
        const c1=state.colorMain;
        const c2=state.colorSecond;
        const mixed=blendHex(c1,c2);
        state.colorMain=mixed;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString=mixed;
        updatePreview();
    }
    function blendHex(a,b){
        const ha=a.replace("#",""),hb=b.replace("#","");
        const fa=ha.length===3?ha.split("").map(v=>v+v).join(""):ha;
        const fb=hb.length===3?hb.split("").map(v=>v+v).join(""):hb;
        const na=parseInt(fa,16),nb=parseInt(fb,16);
        const ra=(na>>16)&255,ga=(na>>8)&255,ba=na&255;
        const rb=(nb>>16)&255,gb=(nb>>8)&255,bb=nb&255;
        const r=Math.round((ra+rb)/2),g=Math.round((ga+gb)/2),b2=Math.round((ba+bb)/2);
        return "#"+[r,g,b2].map(x=>x.toString(16).padStart(2,"0")).join("");
    }

    function randomColorSet(){
        const rand=()=>"#"+Math.floor(Math.random()*0xffffff).toString(16).padStart(6,"0");
        state.colorMain=rand();
        state.colorSecond=rand();
        state.colorMode=Math.random()>0.3?"gradient":"solid";
        state.neon=Math.random()>0.5;
        document.getElementById("colorMode").value=state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked=state.neon;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString=state.colorMain;
        pickerTextSecond.color.hexString=state.colorSecond;
        updatePreview();
    }

    // PRESETLER
    function rememberPreset(name){
        lastPresets.push(name);
        if(lastPresets.length>5) lastPresets.shift();
    }

    function applyPreset(name){
        rememberPreset(name);
        if(name==="soft"){
            state.colorMain="#f9fafb";
            state.colorSecond="#22d3ee";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=false;
            state.shadowPreset="soft";
            state.outlinePreset="none";
            state.borderStyle="none";
            state.fontFamily="'Raleway', sans-serif";
        }else if(name==="retro"){
            state.colorMain="#f97316";
            state.colorSecond="#facc15";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=false;
            state.shadowPreset="3d";
            state.outlinePreset="bold";
            state.borderStyle="solid";
            state.borderColor="#000000";
            state.fontFamily="'Oswald', sans-serif";
        }else if(name==="holo"){
            state.colorMain="#22d3ee";
            state.colorSecond="#a855f7";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=true;
            state.shadowPreset="glow";
            state.outlinePreset="thin";
            state.borderStyle="glowframe";
            state.borderColor="#22d3ee";
            state.fontFamily="'Rajdhani', sans-serif";
        }else if(name==="led"){
            state.colorMain="#22d3ee";
            state.colorSecond="#22c55e";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=true;
            state.shadowPreset="glow";
            state.outlinePreset="medium";
            state.borderStyle="dotted";
            state.fontFamily="'Rajdhani', sans-serif";
        }else if(name==="minimal"){
            state.colorMain="#e5e7eb";
            state.colorMode="solid";
            state.neon=false;
            state.shadowPreset="none";
            state.outlinePreset="none";
            state.borderStyle="none";
            state.fontFamily="'Montserrat', sans-serif";
        }else if(name==="glitch"){
            state.colorMain="#f97316";
            state.colorSecond="#22d3ee";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=false;
            state.shadowPreset="hard";
            state.outlinePreset="medium";
            state.borderStyle="dashed";
            state.borderColor="#ef4444";
            state.fontFamily="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif";
            state.animType="shake";
        }else if(name==="fire"){
            state.colorMain="#f97316";
            state.colorSecond="#dc2626";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=true;
            state.shadowPreset="glow";
            state.outlinePreset="thin";
            state.borderStyle="glowframe";
            state.borderColor="#f97316";
            state.fontFamily="'Oswald', sans-serif";
            state.animType="pulse";
        }else if(name==="ice"){
            state.colorMain="#e0f2fe";
            state.colorSecond="#22d3ee";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=true;
            state.shadowPreset="soft";
            state.outlinePreset="thin";
            state.borderStyle="solid";
            state.borderColor="#0ea5e9";
            state.fontFamily="'Raleway', sans-serif";
            state.animType="breath";
        }else if(name==="gold"){
            state.colorMain="#facc15";
            state.colorSecond="#f59e0b";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=false;
            state.shadowPreset="soft";
            state.outlinePreset="medium";
            state.borderStyle="double";
            state.borderColor="#78350f";
            state.fontFamily="'Playfair Display', serif";
            state.animType="none";
        }else if(name==="cyber"){
            state.colorMain="#22d3ee";
            state.colorSecond="#a855f7";
            state.colorMode="gradient";
            state.neon=true;
            state.shadowPreset="glow";
            state.outlinePreset="medium";
            state.borderStyle="glowframe";
            state.borderColor="#22d3ee";
            state.fontFamily="'Rajdhani', sans-serif";
            state.animType="hue";
        }

        document.getElementById("colorMode").value=state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked=state.neon;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString=state.colorMain;
        pickerTextSecond.color.hexString=state.colorSecond;
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value=state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value=state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value=state.borderStyle;
        pickerBorder.color.hexString=state.borderColor;
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value=state.fontFamily;
        syncFontFamilyName();
        if(state.animType){
            document.getElementById("animType").value=state.animType;
        }
        updatePreview();
    }

    // Nick'e göre akıllı stil
    function applySmartStyle(){
        const len=(state.nick||"").length;
        if(len<=6){
            applyPreset("holo");
            state.fontSize=40;
        }else if(len<=10){
            applyPreset("soft");
            state.fontSize=34;
        }else{
            applyPreset("minimal");
            state.fontSize=26;
        }
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value=state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent=state.fontSize+"px";
        updatePreview();
    }

    // Full kaos (tam random paket)
    function fullChaos(){
        randomNick();
        randomColorSet();
        resetEffects();
        randomEffectsCore(true);
        randomBackgroundCore(true);
        randomFontCore(true);
        randomAnimationCore(true);
        updatePreview();
    }

    // Akıllı Kaos (daha kontrollü)
    function smartChaos(){
        randomNick();
        smartColorSet();
        resetEffects();
        randomEffectsCore(false);
        randomBackgroundCore(false);
        randomFontCore(false);
        randomAnimationCore(false);
        updatePreview();
    }

    function smartColorSet(){
        // daha kontrollü renkler: HSL tabanlı parlak palet
        const hue1 = Math.floor(Math.random()*360);
        const hue2 = (hue1 + 40 + Math.random()*80) % 360;
        const c1 = `hsl(${hue1}, 85%, 60%)`;
        const c2 = `hsl(${hue2}, 90%, 65%)`;
        // iro hex'e dönderemediğimiz için basit şekilde main'i yakın bir hex'ten ayarlayacağız:
        // burada sadece state.colorMode ve neon'u ayarlıyoruz, picker zaten hex ile çalışıyor.
        state.colorMode="gradient";
        state.neon=Math.random()>0.4;
        // ana/ikinciyi random hex ile ama ton olarak yakın:
        const randBright = ()=>"#"+Math.floor(0x777777 + Math.random()*0x888888).toString(16).slice(-6);
        state.colorMain=randBright();
        state.colorSecond=randBright();
        document.getElementById("colorMode").value=state.colorMode;
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked=state.neon;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString=state.colorMain;
        pickerTextSecond.color.hexString=state.colorSecond;
    }

    function randomEffectsCore(aggressive){
        const shadows=aggressive?["none","soft","hard","glow","3d"]:["none","soft","glow"];
        const outlines=aggressive?["none","thin","medium","bold"]:["none","thin","medium"];
        const borders=aggressive?["none","solid","dashed","dotted","double","glowframe"]:["none","solid","glowframe"];
        state.shadowPreset=shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
        state.outlinePreset=outlines[Math.floor(Math.random()*outlines.length)];
        state.borderStyle=borders[Math.floor(Math.random()*borders.length)];
        state.borderColor=state.colorSecond;
        const decos=["none","underline","overline","line-through","underline overline"];
        state.textDecoration=decos[Math.floor(Math.random()*decos.length)];
        state.radius=Math.floor(Math.random()*30);
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value=state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value=state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value=state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("textDecoration").value=state.textDecoration;
        document.getElementById("radius").value=state.radius;
        document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent=state.radius+"px";
        pickerBorder.color.hexString=state.borderColor;
    }

    function randomBackgroundCore(aggressive){
        const modes=aggressive?["none","color","image"]:["none","color"];
        state.bgMode=modes[Math.floor(Math.random()*modes.length)];
        state.bgOpacity=aggressive?(10+Math.floor(Math.random()*80)):(10+Math.floor(Math.random()*50));
        state.bgBlur=aggressive?Math.floor(Math.random()*8):Math.floor(Math.random()*4);
        if(state.bgMode==="image"){
            const sample=[
                "https://i.gifer.com/7VE.gif",
                "https://i.gifer.com/7Im2.gif",
                "https://images.pexels.com/photos/799443/pexels-photo-799443.jpeg"
            ];
            state.bgUrl=sample[Math.floor(Math.random()*sample.length)];
        }else{
            state.bgUrl="";
        }
        document.getElementById("bgMode").value=state.bgMode;
        document.getElementById("bgUrl").value=state.bgUrl;
        document.getElementById("bgOpacity").value=state.bgOpacity;
        document.getElementById("bgOpacityLabel").textContent=state.bgOpacity+"%";
        document.getElementById("bgBlur").value=state.bgBlur;
        document.getElementById("bgBlurLabel").textContent=state.bgBlur+"px";
    }

    function randomFontCore(aggressive){
        const fonts=[
            "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
            "'Raleway', sans-serif",
            "'Rajdhani', sans-serif",
            "'Oswald', sans-serif",
            "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif",
            "'Playfair Display', serif",
            "'Caveat', cursive",
            "'Dancing Script', cursive"
        ];
        state.fontFamily=fonts[Math.floor(Math.random()*fonts.length)];
        state.fontSize=aggressive?(20+Math.floor(Math.random()*45)):(24+Math.floor(Math.random()*32));
        state.fontWeight=aggressive?(300+100*Math.floor(Math.random()*7)):(400+100*Math.floor(Math.random()*4));
        state.letterSpacing=+(Math.random()*6).toFixed(1);
        state.lineHeight=+(1.1+Math.random()*0.7).toFixed(1);
        state.textAlign=["left","center","right"][Math.floor(Math.random()*3)];
        document.getElementById("fontFamily").value=state.fontFamily;
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value=state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value=state.letterSpacing;
        document.getElementById("lineHeight").value=state.lineHeight;
        document.getElementById("textAlign").value=state.textAlign;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent=state.fontSize+"px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent=state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent=state.letterSpacing+"px";
        document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent=state.lineHeight;
        syncFontFamilyName();
    }

    function randomAnimationCore(aggressive){
        const list = aggressive
            ? ["none","pulse","wobble","breath","hue","shake"]
            : ["none","pulse","breath","hue"];
        state.animType = list[Math.floor(Math.random()*list.length)];
        state.animDuration = +(1 + Math.random()*4).toFixed(1);
        state.animInfinite = true;
        document.getElementById("animType").value = state.animType;
        document.getElementById("animDuration").value = state.animDuration;
        document.getElementById("animDurationLabel").textContent = state.animDuration.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById("animInfinite").checked = state.animInfinite;
    }

    // Kullanım modu
    function applyUsageMode(){
        const mode = state.usageMode;
        if(mode==="led"){
            state.fontSize = 38;
            state.fontWeight = 700;
            state.shadowPreset = "hard";
            state.borderStyle = "none";
            state.animType = "none";
        }else if(mode==="obs"){
            state.fontSize = 32;
            state.fontWeight = 600;
            state.shadowPreset = "soft";
            state.borderStyle = "glowframe";
            state.animType = "breath";
        }else if(mode==="web"){
            state.fontSize = 28;
            state.fontWeight = 600;
            state.shadowPreset = "none";
            state.borderStyle = "none";
            state.animType = "none";
        }else if(mode==="mobile"){
            state.fontSize = 24;
            state.fontWeight = 600;
            state.shadowPreset = "soft";
            state.borderStyle = "solid";
            state.animType = "pulse";
        }else{
            return;
        }
        document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
        document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize + "px";
        document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
        document.getElementById("animType").value = state.animType;
    }

    // Stil karıştırıcı
    function mixLastPresets(){
        if(lastPresets.length < 2){
            alert("Önce en az iki farklı preset uygulaman lazım (mesela Fire + Cyber).");
            return;
        }
        const p1 = lastPresets[lastPresets.length-1];
        const p2 = lastPresets[lastPresets.length-2];
        // basit: renkleri karıştır, shadow ve border orta seviye, neon kalabilir.
        state.colorMain = blendHex(state.colorMain, state.colorSecond);
        state.colorSecond = randomColorNear(state.colorMain);
        state.neon = Math.random() > 0.3;
        state.shadowPreset = "soft";
        state.outlinePreset = "thin";
        state.borderStyle = "solid";
        state.borderColor = state.colorSecond;
        pickerTextMain.color.hexString = state.colorMain;
        pickerTextSecond.color.hexString = state.colorSecond;
        pickerBorder.color.hexString = state.borderColor;
        document.getElementById("colorMode").value = "gradient";
        document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;
        document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
        document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value = state.outlinePreset;
        document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function randomColorNear(baseHex){
        // küçük sapmalı renk üretelim
        return blendHex(baseHex, "#ffffff");
    }

    // JSON Export / Import
    function copyStyleJson(){
        const exportState = JSON.stringify(state, null, 2);
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(exportState).then(()=>alert("Stil JSON olarak kopyalandı!"));
    }

    function applyStyleJsonPrompt(){
        const txt = prompt("JSON yapıştır (önceden kopyaladığın stil):");
        if(!txt) return;
        try{
            const obj = JSON.parse(txt);
            Object.assign(state, obj);
            // inputları state'e göre senkronla
            document.getElementById("nickInput").value = state.nick;
            document.getElementById("fontFamily").value = state.fontFamily;
            document.getElementById("fontSize").value = state.fontSize;
            document.getElementById("fontWeight").value = state.fontWeight;
            document.getElementById("letterSpacing").value = state.letterSpacing;
            document.getElementById("lineHeight").value = state.lineHeight;
            document.getElementById("textAlign").value = state.textAlign;
            document.getElementById("fontStyle").value = state.fontStyle;
            document.getElementById("smallCaps").checked = state.smallCaps;
            document.getElementById("trackingWide").checked = state.trackingWide;
            document.getElementById("colorMode").value = state.colorMode;
            document.getElementById("useNeon").checked = state.neon;
            document.getElementById("shadowPreset").value = state.shadowPreset;
            document.getElementById("outlinePreset").value = state.outlinePreset;
            document.getElementById("borderStyle").value = state.borderStyle;
            document.getElementById("radius").value = state.radius;
            document.getElementById("bgMode").value = state.bgMode;
            document.getElementById("bgUrl").value = state.bgUrl;
            document.getElementById("bgOpacity").value = state.bgOpacity;
            document.getElementById("bgBlur").value = state.bgBlur;
            document.getElementById("leftIconUrl").value = state.leftIconUrl;
            document.getElementById("rightIconUrl").value = state.rightIconUrl;
            document.getElementById("animType").value = state.animType;
            document.getElementById("animDuration").value = state.animDuration;
            document.getElementById("animInfinite").checked = state.animInfinite;
            document.getElementById("usageMode").value = state.usageMode;
            document.getElementById("mirrorMode").checked = state.mirrorMode;
            document.getElementById("fontSizeLabel").textContent = state.fontSize+"px";
            document.getElementById("fontWeightLabel").textContent = state.fontWeight;
            document.getElementById("letterSpacingLabel").textContent = state.letterSpacing+"px";
            document.getElementById("lineHeightLabel").textContent = state.lineHeight;
            document.getElementById("bgOpacityLabel").textContent = state.bgOpacity+"%";
            document.getElementById("bgBlurLabel").textContent = state.bgBlur+"px";
            document.getElementById("radiusLabel").textContent = state.radius+"px";

            pickerTextMain.color.hexString = state.colorMain;
            pickerTextSecond.color.hexString = state.colorSecond;
            pickerShadow.color.hexString = state.shadowColor;
            pickerBorder.color.hexString = state.borderColor;
            pickerBg.color.hexString = state.bgColor;

            syncFontFamilyName();
            updatePreview();
        }catch(e){
            alert("JSON geçersiz gibi duruyor. Tekrar dene.");
        }
    }

    // copy
    function copyCode(type){
        const txt=type==="html"
            ? document.getElementById("htmlOutput").textContent
            : document.getElementById("cssOutput").textContent;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(()=>alert(type.toUpperCase()+" kodu kopyalandı!"));
    }
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

Bundan sonra istersen bir sonraki adımda:

- Ayrı sekmelerle:
  - Nick stil
  - Buton stil
  - Banner / Badge stil  
  hepsini aynı “kaos motoru” ile yönetebiliriz.

Veya:

- CSS tarafına “**canlı düzenleme textarea**” ekleyip:
  - Sen CSS’i elle editlersin,
  - Ben onu anında preview’a uygularım.

“Şu da olsun, şu efekt şart” dediğin spesifik bir şey varsa (mesela animasyonlu border, gradient border, partikül efekti hissi vs.) bir sonraki iterasyonda direkt oraya abanırız.

Harika, enerjini sevdim! "Tam Gaz" diyorsan, vitesi 5'e atıyoruz. Bu versiyonda sadece stil değil, **hareket ve doku** da ekliyoruz.

**Neler Ekledim ve Entegre Ettim?**

1.  **Canlı Animasyon Motoru (YENİ):** Artık yazı durmak zorunda değil.
    *   *Seçenekler:* Nabız (Pulse), Yüzen (Float), Titreyen (Shake), Glitch (Bozulma), RGB Akışı (Rainbow Loop).
    *   *Kod Çıktısı:* CSS çıktısına otomatik olarak `@keyframes` kodlarını da ekler.
2.  **Doku (Texture) Kaplama Modu (YENİ):**
    *   Sadece renk değil, yazının **içine** resim gömme (Masking).
    *   "Altın Kaplama", "Alev", "Galaksi" gibi desenleri yazının içine giydirebilirsin.
3.  **Hızlı Sembol Paneli (YENİ):**
    *   Nick kutusunun hemen altına en popüler oyun/havalı sembolleri (`♛`, `⚡`, `☠️`, `★`) tek tıkla ekleyebileceğin bir bar koydum.
4.  **Stil Geçmişi (History) (YENİ):**
    *   Yaptığın güzel bir stili kaybetme. "Kaydet" butonuna bas, aşağıya ufak bir kutu atar. Tıklayınca o stili geri yükler.
5.  **Gelişmiş "Chaos" Algoritması:**
    *   Kaos butonu artık animasyonları ve dokuları da rastgele seçiyor.

İşte en gelişmiş, **Ultra Studio V3**:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>GS Rams Ultra Studio V3 - Animation & Texture</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    <!-- iro.js Renk Seçici -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Fontlar -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- İkonlar -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

    <style>
        /* TEMEL AYARLAR & CSS DEĞİŞKENLERİ */
        :root {
            --primary: #f59e0b; /* Amber */
            --secondary: #ec4899; /* Pink */
            --accent: #3b82f6; /* Blue */
            --dark: #0f172a;
            --panel: #1e293b;
            --text: #e2e8f0;
            --border: #334155;
            --radius: 12px;
        }
        * { box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; }
        body {
            margin: 0; padding: 0;
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
            background: #020617;
            color: var(--text);
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* LAYOUT */
        .app-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 400px 1fr;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        /* SOL PANEL (KONTROLLER) */
        .sidebar {
            background: var(--panel);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .sidebar-header {
            padding: 15px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .brand {
            font-weight: 900;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }
        .scroll-area {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 15px;
        }
        .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
        .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 4px; }

        /* KONTROL GRUPLARI */
        .control-group {
            background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .group-title {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            color: #94a3b8;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .group-title i { color: var(--primary); margin-right: 6px; }
        
        .row { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 8px; align-items: center; }
        .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
        
        label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #cbd5e1; }
        input[type="text"], select, textarea {
            background: #020617;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: white;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            width: 100%;
            transition: 0.2s;
        }
        input[type="text"]:focus, select:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
        
        /* SLIDERS */
        input[type="range"] {
            width: 100%;
            height: 5px;
            background: #334155;
            border-radius: 5px;
            appearance: none;
        }
        input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
            appearance: none;
            width: 16px; height: 16px;
            background: var(--accent);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* BUTONLAR */
        .btn {
            border: none;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: 0.2s;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }
        .btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: white; width: 100%; }
        .btn-primary:hover { background: #2563eb; }
        .btn-chaos { 
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff0000, #ffff00, #00ff00, #00ffff, #0000ff, #ff00ff);
            background-size: 200%;
            animation: rainbow 5s linear infinite;
            color: black; 
            width: 100%;
        }
        .btn-icon { background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.9rem; }
        .btn-icon:hover { color: white; }
        
        .symbol-bar {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
            gap: 5px;
            margin-top: 5px;
        }
        .sym-btn {
            background: #334155;
            border: none;
            color: white;
            padding: 5px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }
        .sym-btn:hover { background: var(--primary); color: black; }

        /* HISTORY LIST */
        #historyList {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 5px;
            max-height: 150px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .history-item {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            padding: 6px;
            background: #0f172a;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .history-item:hover { border-color: var(--secondary); }

        /* SAĞ PANEL (PREVIEW & KOD) */
        .main-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #1e293b 0%, #020617 100%);
        }
        
        .preview-area {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
        }
        /* Grid Overlay for transparent feel */
        .preview-area::before {
            content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
            background-image: 
                linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
                linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 20px 20px;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* NICK STİLİ VE ANİMASYONLARI */
        #livePreview {
            display: inline-block;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        /* Keyframes */
        @keyframes pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }
        @keyframes shake { 0% { transform: translate(1px, 1px) rotate(0deg); } 10% { transform: translate(-1px, -2px) rotate(-1deg); } 20% { transform: translate(-3px, 0px) rotate(1deg); } 30% { transform: translate(3px, 2px) rotate(0deg); } 40% { transform: translate(1px, -1px) rotate(1deg); } 50% { transform: translate(-1px, 2px) rotate(-1deg); } 60% { transform: translate(-3px, 1px) rotate(0deg); } 70% { transform: translate(3px, 1px) rotate(-1deg); } 80% { transform: translate(-1px, -1px) rotate(1deg); } 90% { transform: translate(1px, 2px) rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: translate(1px, -2px) rotate(-1deg); } }
        @keyframes float { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } }
        @keyframes rainbow { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }
        @keyframes glitch { 2%, 64% { transform: translate(2px,0) skew(0deg); } 4%, 60% { transform: translate(-2px,0) skew(0deg); } 62% { transform: translate(0,0) skew(5deg); } }

        .anim-pulse { animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
        .anim-shake { animation: shake 0.5s infinite; }
        .anim-float { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
        .anim-glitch { animation: glitch 1s linear infinite; }
        .anim-rainbow { 
            background: linear-gradient(124deg, #ff2400, #e81d1d, #e8b71d, #e3e81d, #1de840, #1ddde8, #2b1de8, #dd00f3, #dd00f3);
            background-size: 1800% 1800%;
            animation: rainbow 6s ease infinite;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }

        /* CODE AREA */
        .code-area {
            height: 200px;
            background: #020617;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            gap: 1px;
        }
        .code-box {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .code-header {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            background: #1e293b;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #94a3b8;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .code-content {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #a5b4fc;
            overflow: auto;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
        }
        
        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .app-container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; overflow-y: auto; display: block; }
            .sidebar { height: auto; max-height: 500px; }
            .main-content { min-height: 500px; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app-container">
    <!-- SIDEBAR -->
    <aside class="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
            <div class="brand"><i class="fa-solid fa-dragon"></i> Ultra Studio V3</div>
            <button class="btn-icon" title="Reset All" onclick="fullReset()"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-right"></i></button>
        </div>

        <div class="scroll-area">
            <!-- 1. Text & Symbols -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="group-title">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-keyboard"></i> Metin & Sembol</span>
                </div>
                <input type="text" id="inpNick" value="GS Rams" placeholder="Nick buraya...">
                
                <div class="symbol-bar">
                    <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♛')">♛</button>
                    <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚡')">⚡</button>
                    <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☠️')">☠️</button>
                    <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('★')">★</button>
                    <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚔️')">⚔️</button>
                    <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☾')">☾</button>
                </div>
                <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1" onclick="randomName()">Random İsim</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 2. Font & Animation -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="group-title">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> Font & Hareket</span>
                </div>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Font</label>
                        <select id="selFont">
                            <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Modern (Montserrat)</option>
                            <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Tech (Rajdhani)</option>
                            <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Bold (Oswald)</option>
                            <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Tall (Bebas)</option>
                            <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Horror (Creepster)</option>
                            <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (8-Bit)</option>
                            <option value="'Audiowide', cursive">Sci-Fi (Audiowide)</option>
                            <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Military (Black Ops)</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Animasyon</label>
                        <select id="selAnim">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="pulse">Nabız (Pulse)</option>
                            <option value="float">Yüzen (Float)</option>
                            <option value="shake">Titreme (Shake)</option>
                            <option value="glitch">Glitch (Bozulma)</option>
                            <option value="rainbow">RGB Akışı</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Boyut: <span id="lblSize">40px</span></label>
                        <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="100" value="40">
                    </div>
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Aralık: <span id="lblSpace">0px</span></label>
                        <input type="range" id="rngSpace" min="-2" max="20" value="0">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 3. Colors & Texture -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="group-title">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Renk & Doku</span>
                    <select id="selFillMode" style="width: auto; padding: 2px; font-size:0.7rem;">
                        <option value="solid">Düz Renk</option>
                        <option value="gradient">Gradient</option>
                        <option value="texture">Resim Doku</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Color Pickers -->
                <div id="colorControls">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col">
                            <label>Ana Renk</label>
                            <div id="picker1" style="margin: 0 auto;"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col" id="colPicker2" style="display:none;">
                            <label>2. Renk</label>
                            <div id="picker2" style="margin: 0 auto;"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Texture Input -->
                <div id="textureControls" style="display:none;">
                    <label>Doku URL (Resim/GIF)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="inpTexture" placeholder="https://.../fire.jpg">
                    <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px; gap:5px;">
                        <button class="btn" style="flex:1;font-size:0.6rem;background:#334155" onclick="setTexture('gold')">Altın</button>
                        <button class="btn" style="flex:1;font-size:0.6rem;background:#334155" onclick="setTexture('fire')">Alev</button>
                        <button class="btn" style="flex:1;font-size:0.6rem;background:#334155" onclick="setTexture('galaxy')">Uzay</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 4. Effects (Shadow, Stroke) -->
            <div class="control-group">
                <div class="group-title">
                    <span><i class="fa-solid fa-magic"></i> Efektler (Stroke/Shadow)</span>
                </div>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Çerçeve (Stroke)</label>
                        <select id="selStroke">
                            <option value="0">Yok</option>
                            <option value="1px">İnce</option>
                            <option value="2px">Orta</option>
                            <option value="4px">Kalın</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Stroke Rengi</label>
                        <input type="color" id="inpStrokeColor" value="#000000" style="width:100%;height:30px;border:none;padding:0;">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col" style="margin-top:8px">
                    <label>Gölge (Shadow)</label>
                    <select id="selShadow">
                        <option value="none">Yok</option>
                        <option value="soft">Yumuşak Siyah</option>
                        <option value="hard">Sert Siyah</option>
                        <option value="neon">Neon Glow (Ana Renk)</option>
                        <option value="white">Beyaz Parlama</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>

             <!-- 5. Actions -->
             <div class="control-group" style="border-color: var(--secondary);">
                 <button class="btn btn-chaos" onclick="triggerChaos()">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-biohazard"></i> FULL CHAOS MODU
                 </button>
                 <div class="row" style="margin-top:10px;">
                     <button class="btn" style="background:#059669;color:white;flex:1;" onclick="saveToHistory()">
                         <i class="fa-solid fa-save"></i> Stili Kaydet
                     </button>
                 </div>
                 
                 <!-- History List -->
                 <label style="margin-top:10px;display:block;">Kaydedilen Stiller:</label>
                 <div id="historyList">
                     <div style="padding:10px;text-align:center;color:#64748b;font-size:0.7rem;">Henüz kayıt yok</div>
                 </div>
             </div>

        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
    <main class="main-content">
        <!-- Preview -->
        <div class="preview-area" id="bgPreview">
            <span id="livePreview">GS Rams</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Code Output -->
        <div class="code-area">
            <div class="code-box">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <span>HTML</span>
                    <i class="fa-regular fa-copy" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="copyCode('html')"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="code-content" id="codeHtml"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="code-box">
                <div class="code-header">
                    <span>CSS (Animasyonlar Dahil)</span>
                    <i class="fa-regular fa-copy" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="copyCode('css')"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="code-content" id="codeCss"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>
</div>

<script>
    // --- STATE MANAGEMENT ---
    let state = {
        nick: "GS Rams",
        font: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
        size: 40,
        space: 0,
        anim: "none",
        fillMode: "solid",
        color1: "#f59e0b",
        color2: "#ec4899",
        textureUrl: "",
        strokeWidth: "0",
        strokeColor: "#000000",
        shadow: "none"
    };

    let history = [];

    // --- IRO.JS SETUP ---
    const p1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker1", { width: 100, color: state.color1, layout:[{component: iro.ui.Wheel}] });
    const p2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker2", { width: 100, color: state.color2, layout:[{component: iro.ui.Wheel}] });

    p1.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color1 = c.hexString; render(); });
    p2.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color2 = c.hexString; render(); });

    // --- EVENT LISTENERS ---
    const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);

    // Text & Font
    el("inpNick").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.nick = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selFont").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.font = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selAnim").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.anim = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("rngSize").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.size = e.target.value; el("lblSize").innerText = e.target.value + "px"; render(); });
    el("rngSpace").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.space = e.target.value; el("lblSpace").innerText = e.target.value + "px"; render(); });

    // Fill Mode Toggle
    el("selFillMode").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        state.fillMode = e.target.value;
        const colControls = el("colorControls");
        const texControls = el("textureControls");
        const picker2 = el("colPicker2");

        if(state.fillMode === "solid") {
            colControls.style.display = "block";
            picker2.style.display = "none";
            texControls.style.display = "none";
        } else if(state.fillMode === "gradient") {
            colControls.style.display = "block";
            picker2.style.display = "flex";
            texControls.style.display = "none";
        } else {
            colControls.style.display = "none";
            texControls.style.display = "block";
        }
        render();
    });

    // Texture Input
    el("inpTexture").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.textureUrl = e.target.value; render(); });

    // Stroke & Shadow
    el("selStroke").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.strokeWidth = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("inpStrokeColor").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.strokeColor = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selShadow").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.shadow = e.target.value; render(); });

    // --- HELPER FUNCTIONS ---
    function addSym(sym) {
        state.nick += sym;
        el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
        render();
    }

    function setTexture(type) {
        let url = "";
        if(type === 'gold') url = "https://media.istockphoto.com/id/1145239569/photo/gold-foil-texture-background.jpg?s=612x612&w=0&k=20&c=PfgnbN_k3B1oF7v72s2eD9N8jZ9z4e7f8g9h0i1j2k3="; // Örnek link
        if(type === 'fire') url = "https://img.freepik.com/free-photo/burning-fire-flame-background_53876-111750.jpg";
        if(type === 'galaxy') url = "https://img.freepik.com/free-vector/watercolor-galaxy-background_23-2148119074.jpg";
        
        // Güvenilirlik için base64 veya direkt link kullanmak daha iyidir, burada konsept için placeholder
        // Gerçek kullanımda daha kalıcı linkler gerekir. Demo için basit bir pattern kullanacağım.
        if(type === 'gold') url = "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/gold-scales.png"; // Fallback pattern
        
        // Daha görsel bir demo için inline gradient kullanalım URL yerine, eğer resim yoksa.
        // Ama kullanıcı resim isterse:
        el("inpTexture").value = url;
        state.textureUrl = url;
        render();
    }

    function randomName() {
        const ad = ["Dark", "Ultra", "Hyper", "Cyber", "Ghost", "Neon", "Shadow", "Pro", "Master", "King"];
        const soyad = ["Slayer", "Rider", "Wolf", "Eagle", "Storm", "Viper", "Cobra", "Dragon", "Phoenix", "Titan"];
        state.nick = ad[Math.floor(Math.random()*ad.length)] + " " + soyad[Math.floor(Math.random()*soyad.length)];
        el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
        render();
    }

    // --- CHAOS ENGINE ---
    function triggerChaos() {
        // Random Color
        const rCol = () => "#" + Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6, '0');
        state.color1 = rCol();
        state.color2 = rCol();
        p1.color.hexString = state.color1;
        p2.color.hexString = state.color2;

        // Random Mode
        const modes = ["solid", "gradient", "gradient", "texture"]; // gradient ağırlıklı
        state.fillMode = modes[Math.floor(Math.random()*modes.length)];
        el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
        el("selFillMode").dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));

        // Random Font
        const fonts = el("selFont").options;
        state.font = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)].value;
        el("selFont").value = state.font;

        // Random Anim
        const anims = el("selAnim").options;
        state.anim = anims[Math.floor(Math.random() * anims.length)].value;
        el("selAnim").value = state.anim;

        // Random Size & Space
        state.size = Math.floor(Math.random() * 60) + 30;
        state.space = Math.floor(Math.random() * 10);
        el("rngSize").value = state.size; el("lblSize").innerText = state.size+"px";
        el("rngSpace").value = state.space; el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space+"px";

        // Random Effect
        const shadows = ["none", "soft", "hard", "neon", "white"];
        state.shadow = shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
        el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;

        randomName(); // Yeni isim de gelsin
        render();
    }

    // --- HISTORY SYSTEM ---
    function saveToHistory() {
        const snapshot = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state));
        history.unshift(snapshot);
        if(history.length > 5) history.pop();
        updateHistoryUI();
    }

    function updateHistoryUI() {
        const list = el("historyList");
        list.innerHTML = "";
        history.forEach((item, index) => {
            const div = document.createElement("div");
            div.className = "history-item";
            div.innerHTML = `<span>${item.nick}</span> <span style="opacity:0.5">${item.fillMode}</span>`;
            div.onclick = () => loadFromHistory(index);
            list.appendChild(div);
        });
    }

    function loadFromHistory(index) {
        state = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(history[index]));
        // Update UI inputs
        el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
        el("selFont").value = state.font;
        el("rngSize").value = state.size;
        el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
        el("selAnim").value = state.anim;
        el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
        el("inpTexture").value = state.textureUrl;
        el("selStroke").value = state.strokeWidth;
        el("inpStrokeColor").value = state.strokeColor;
        el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;
        p1.color.hexString = state.color1;
        p2.color.hexString = state.color2;
        
        // Trigger changes for visibility toggles
        el("selFillMode").dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
        el("rngSize").dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
        el("rngSpace").dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
        
        render();
    }

    // --- MAIN RENDER FUNCTION ---
    function render() {
        const preview = el("livePreview");
        
        // 1. Text Content
        preview.innerText = state.nick;

        // 2. Typography
        preview.style.fontFamily = state.font;
        preview.style.fontSize = state.size + "px";
        preview.style.letterSpacing = state.space + "px";
        preview.style.webkitTextStroke = state.strokeWidth + " " + state.strokeColor;

        // 3. Fill / Color
        preview.style.backgroundImage = "none";
        preview.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
        preview.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
        preview.style.color = state.color1;

        if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
            preview.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
            preview.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            preview.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
            preview.style.color = "transparent"; // fallback
        } else if (state.fillMode === "texture" && state.textureUrl) {
            preview.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.textureUrl}')`;
            preview.style.backgroundSize = "cover";
            preview.style.backgroundPosition = "center";
            preview.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            preview.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
            preview.style.color = "transparent";
        }

        // 4. Shadow
        let shadowCSS = "none";
        if(state.shadow === "soft") shadowCSS = "0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
        if(state.shadow === "hard") shadowCSS = "3px 3px 0 #000";
        if(state.shadow === "neon") shadowCSS = `0 0 10px ${state.color1}, 0 0 20px ${state.color1}`;
        if(state.shadow === "white") shadowCSS = "0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.8)";
        preview.style.textShadow = shadowCSS;

        // 5. Animation
        preview.className = ""; // reset
        if(state.anim !== "none") {
            preview.classList.add("anim-" + state.anim);
        }

        generateCode();
    }

    // --- CODE GENERATOR ---
    function generateCode() {
        let css = `.ultra-nick {\n`;
        css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
        css += `  font-family: ${state.font};\n`;
        css += `  font-size: ${state.size}px;\n`;
        css += `  letter-spacing: ${state.space}px;\n`;
        css += `  font-weight: bold;\n`;
        
        if (state.strokeWidth !== "0") {
            css += `  -webkit-text-stroke: ${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor};\n`;
        }

        // Color Logic in CSS
        if(state.fillMode === "solid") {
            css += `  color: ${state.color1};\n`;
        } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
            css += `  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2});\n`;
            css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
            css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
            css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
        } else if (state.fillMode === "texture") {
            css += `  background-image: url('${state.textureUrl || 'URL_HERE'}');\n`;
            css += `  background-size: cover;\n`;
            css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
            css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
            css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
        }

        if(state.shadow !== "none") {
            css += `  text-shadow: ${el("livePreview").style.textShadow};\n`;
        }

        // Animation logic
        if(state.anim !== "none") {
            let animName = state.anim;
            let duration = "2s";
            if(animName === "shake") duration = "0.5s";
            if(animName === "glitch") duration = "1s";
            css += `  animation: ${animName} ${duration} infinite;\n`;
        }

        css += `}`;

        // Add Keyframes to CSS output for user convenience
        if(state.anim !== "none") {
            css += `\n\n/* Animation Keyframes */\n`;
            if(state.anim === "pulse") css += `@keyframes pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }`;
            if(state.anim === "float") css += `@keyframes float { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } }`;
            if(state.anim === "shake") css += `@keyframes shake { 0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); } 25% { transform: translate(2px, 2px) rotate(1deg); } 75% { transform: translate(-2px, -2px) rotate(-1deg); } }`;
            // ... diğerleri için kısa özet
        }

        el("codeCss").textContent = css;
        el("codeHtml").textContent = `<span class="ultra-nick">${state.nick}</span>`;
    }

    function copyCode(type) {
        const txt = type === 'html' ? el("codeHtml").textContent : el("codeCss").textContent;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(() => alert("Kopyalandı!"));
    }
    
    function fullReset() {
        location.reload();
    }

    // Init
    render();
    el("selFillMode").dispatchEvent(new Event('change')); // Init visibility
</script>

</body>
</html>
```

## Prompt 9

### You
*2025-12-09 14:18:11 +03*

Yeni fonksiyonlar yeni eklemeler ve yeni modüllerle yeni renk küçük oluşturucular otomatik oluşturuldular yazı dekorasyonları Google Sons ya da başka fontlar daha göz alıcı konutlar ve göz alıcı gradyanlar webtek lineer oluşturuldu ve buna benzer tüm dekorasyon çeşitleri ve renk ve arka plan çerçeve stilleri daha farklı daha göz alıcı çerçeve ve Border stilleri oluşturmaya devam edelim entegre edip gelişmiş tam kodu yaz 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 14:18:12 +03*

Harika, turbo moddasın, ben de kod tarafında nitroyu açıyorum.  
Bu sefer:

- Yeni **modüller**,
- Daha gelişmiş **renk üreticiler**,
- Otomatik **gradient / background / border generator**,
- Daha fazla **Google Font**,
- **Yazı dekorasyonları (underline, overline, glow, blur, outline vs.)**,
- Göz alıcı **border & frame** stilleri

hepsini tek sayfada toplayıp **tam entegre, çalışır bir HTML dosyası** vereceğim.

Aşağıdaki kodu direkt olarak `index.html` diye kaydedip açabilirsin.  
Her şey tek dosyada: HTML + CSS + JS.

---

## GS Rams Ultra Studio V4 – Full Dekorasyon & Frame Edition

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>GS Rams Ultra Studio V4 - Full FX</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

  <!-- Renk tekeri -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>

  <!-- Google Fonts (daha fazla ekledim) -->
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Poppins:wght@300;500;800&family=Rubik+Mono+One&family=Pacifico&family=Orbitron:wght@500;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <!-- Font Awesome -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

  <style>
    :root {
      --primary: #f59e0b;
      --secondary: #ec4899;
      --accent: #3b82f6;
      --dark: #020617;
      --panel: #0b1220;
      --text: #e2e8f0;
      --border: #1f2937;
      --radius: 14px;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #1f2937 0%, #020617 60%);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .app-container {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 420px 1fr;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
    }

    /* SOL PANEL */
    .sidebar {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, #111827 0%, #020617 65%);
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .sidebar-header {
      padding: 14px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    }

    .brand {
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .brand span {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary), var(--accent));
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    }

    .tag {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 2px 7px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.5);
      color: #93c5fd;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .scroll-area {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 14px;
    }

    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
      background: rgba(148,163,184,0.4);
      border-radius: 4px;
    }

    /* GRUPLAR */
    .control-group {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.9), rgba(15,23,42,0.5));
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.25);
      padding: 10px 11px;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(15,23,42,0.6);
    }

    .group-title {
```
