```html
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: #9ca3af;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .group-title span.title-left {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .group-title i { color: var(--primary); }

    .row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 7px; }
    .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }

    label {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    input[type="text"], select, textarea {
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border-radius: 8px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      color: var(--text);
      padding: 7px 8px;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      transition: 0.15s;
    }

    input[type="text"]:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);
    }

    textarea {
      resize: vertical;
      min-height: 45px;
      max-height: 120px;
    }

    input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
      appearance: none;
      height: 4px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
    }
    input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      appearance: none;
      width: 14px; height: 14px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--secondary));
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 1px solid white;
      box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(96,165,250,0.7);
    }

    .btn {
      border: none;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 7px 10px;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 6px;
      transition: 0.18s;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #8b5cf6);
      color: white;
      width: 100%;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(37,99,235,0.35);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover {
      filter: brightness(1.08);
      transform: translateY(-1px);
    }
    .btn-ghost {
      background: transparent;
      color: #9ca3af;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover {
      color: #e5e7eb;
      background: rgba(31,41,55,0.7);
    }

    .btn-chaos {
      background: linear-gradient(60deg, #f97316, #ec4899, #22c55e, #3b82f6, #a855f7);
      background-size: 260% 260%;
      color: #020617;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      animation: rainbowMove 6s linear infinite;
      width: 100%;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(236,72,153,0.7);
    }
    .btn-chaos:hover {
      filter: brightness(1.1);
      transform: translateY(-1px) scale(1.01);
    }

    .symbol-bar {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
      gap: 4px;
      margin-top: 5px;
    }
    .sym-btn {
      border: none;
      background: rgba(31,41,55,0.85);
      color: #e5e7eb;
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 5px 0;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      transition: 0.15s;
    }
    .sym-btn:hover {
      background: var(--primary);
      color: #020617;
    }

    .mini-badge {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 1px 5px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.6);
      color: #fed7aa;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* HISTORY */
    #historyList {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 4px;
      max-height: 140px;
      overflow-y: auto;
      margin-top: 5px;
    }

    .history-item {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      padding: 5px 7px;
      border-radius: 7px;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 6px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .history-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--secondary);
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(236,72,153,0.15), rgba(15,23,42,0.95));
    }

    .history-main {
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .history-sub {
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    /* SAĞ TARAF */
    .main-content {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .preview-wrapper {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    /* ÜST TOOLBAR */
    .top-toolbar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 8px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(15,23,42,0.9), rgba(15,23,42,0.6));
      font-size: 0.75rem;
    }

    .preview-mode-toggle button {
      border: none;
      padding: 4px 8px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      margin-left: 4px;
      background: transparent;
      color: #9ca3af;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .preview-mode-toggle button.active {
      background: rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      color: white;
    }

    .preview-area {
      flex: 1;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 20px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #020617 0%, #020617 60%, #000000 100%);
    }

    /* Arka plan demo kutusu (çerçeve ve bg için) */
    .preview-frame {
      padding: 30px 40px;
      border-radius: 22px;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      min-width: 260px;
      text-align: center;
      transition: 0.25s ease;
    }

    /* Nick text */
    #livePreview {
      display: inline-block;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      transition: all 0.25s ease;
    }

    .preview-area::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: -40%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(249,115,22,0.18), transparent 55%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(59,130,246,0.18), transparent 55%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 0% 100%, rgba(16,185,129,0.16), transparent 55%);
      opacity: 0.9;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .preview-area::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(rgba(148,163,184,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(148,163,184,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 28px 28px;
      mix-blend-mode: soft-light;
      opacity: 0.7;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* CODE AREA */
    .code-area {
      height: 220px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1.6fr;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #020617 0%, #020617 60%);
    }
    .code-box {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
    }
    .code-header {
      padding: 7px 10px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: #9ca3af;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
    }
    .code-content {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 8px 10px;
      font-family: "Courier New", monospace;
      font-size: 0.76rem;
      color: #a5b4fc;
      overflow-y: auto;
      white-space: pre-wrap;
    }

    .copy-icon {
      cursor: pointer;
      color: #9ca3af;
    }
    .copy-icon:hover {
      color: #e5e7eb;
    }

    /* ANİMASYONLAR */
    @keyframes pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)} }
    @keyframes float { 0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)} }
    @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)} }
    @keyframes glitch {
      0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
      20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}
      40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}
      60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}
      80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}
      100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
    }
    @keyframes rainbowMove{
      0%{background-position:0% 50%}
      50%{background-position:100% 50%}
      100%{background-position:0% 50%}
    }
    @keyframes glowPulse {
      0%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
      50%{box-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(236,72,153,0.9);}
      100%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
    }

    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse 1.8s infinite; }
    .anim-float { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-shake { animation: shake 0.6s infinite; }
    .anim-glitch { animation: glitch 1.2s steps(2,end) infinite; }
    .anim-rainbow-text {
      background: linear-gradient(124deg,#ff2400,#e81d1d,#e8b71d,#e3e81d,#1de840,#1ddde8,#2b1de8,#dd00f3,#dd00f3);
      background-size: 200% 200%;
      animation: rainbowMove 4s linear infinite;
      -webkit-background-clip:text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width: 950px) {
      .app-container {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto auto;
        height: auto;
        overflow-y: auto;
      }
      body { overflow: auto; height: auto; }
      .sidebar { max-height: 480px; }
      .code-area { height: 260px; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app-container">

  <!-- SOL PANEL -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">
      <div class="brand">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved"></i>
        <span>Ultra Studio V4</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
        <span class="tag">FX PACK</span>
        <button class="btn-ghost" style="border-radius:999px;padding:4px 7px;" title="Sıfırla" onclick="fullReset()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-right"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="scroll-area">
      <!-- METİN & SEMBOL -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-keyboard"></i> Metin & Sembol</span>
          <span class="mini-badge">Nick Studio</span>
        </div>

        <input type="text" id="inpNick" value="GS Rams" placeholder="Nick / Başlık / Yazı...">

        <div class="symbol-bar">
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♛')">♛</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚡')">⚡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☠')">☠</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('★')">★</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✦')">✦</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✧')">✧</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('❖')">❖</button>

          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✪')">✪</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚔')">⚔</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☾')">☾</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✞')">✞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('∞')">∞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♡')">♡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('︎ツ')">ツ</button>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="randomName()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Random Nick
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FONT, BOYUT, ANİMASYON -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i> Font & Hareket</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Font Ailesi</label>
            <select id="selFont">
              <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Modern (Montserrat)</option>
              <option value="'Poppins', sans-serif">Soft Modern (Poppins)</option>
              <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Tech (Rajdhani)</option>
              <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Kompakt (Oswald)</option>
              <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Başlık (Bebas)</option>
              <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Futuristic (Orbitron)</option>
              <option value="'Audiowide', cursive">Sci-Fi (Audiowide)</option>
              <option value="'Rubik Mono One', sans-serif">Block (Rubik Mono)</option>
              <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (8-bit)</option>
              <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Horror (Creepster)</option>
              <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Script (Pacifico)</option>
              <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Military (Black Ops)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Animasyon</label>
            <select id="selAnim">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="pulse">Nabız</option>
              <option value="float">Yüzen</option>
              <option value="shake">Titreme</option>
              <option value="glitch">Glitch</option>
              <option value="rainbow-text">RGB Yazı</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Boyut: <span id="lblSize">48px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="120" value="48">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Harf Aralığı: <span id="lblSpace">0px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSpace" min="-3" max="20" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- RENK / GRADYAN / DEKORASYON -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Renk & Dekorasyon</span>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Yazı Doldurma Modu</label>
            <select id="selFillMode">
              <option value="solid">Düz Renk</option>
              <option value="gradient">Gradyan</option>
              <option value="texture">Resim Doku</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Hazır Gradyanlar</label>
            <select id="selPresetGrad">
              <option value="">Seç (Opsiyonel)</option>
              <option value="sunset">Gün Batımı</option>
              <option value="neon">Neon Mavi/Pembe</option>
              <option value="fire">Alev</option>
              <option value="aqua">Aqua</option>
              <option value="gold">Altın</option>
              <option value="ghost">Hayalet</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Color Pickers -->
        <div id="colorControls">
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Ana Renk</label>
              <div id="picker1"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="col" id="colPicker2" style="display:none;">
              <label>2. Renk</label>
              <div id="picker2"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Texture Controls -->
        <div id="textureControls" style="display:none;margin-top:4px;">
          <label>Doku (Resim / GIF URL)</label>
          <input type="text" id="inpTexture" placeholder="https://.../texture.png">
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px;">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);" onclick="setTexturePreset('gold')">
              Altın Doku
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.6);" onclick="setTexturePreset('fire')">
              Alev Doku
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(129,140,248,0.7);" onclick="setTexturePreset('galaxy')">
              Uzay Doku
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Metin Dekorasyonu</label>
            <select id="selTextDeco">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="underline">Alt Çizgi</option>
              <option value="overline">Üst Çizgi</option>
              <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
              <option value="double">Double Çizgi</option>
              <option value="glow">Parlama Çizgi</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Kalınlık / Eğiklik</label>
            <select id="selWeightStyle">
              <option value="normal|normal">Normal</option>
              <option value="700|normal">Kalın</option>
              <option value="900|normal">Extra Kalın</option>
              <option value="500|italic">İtalik</option>
              <option value="700|italic">Kalın İtalik</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- STROKE & SHADOW & FRAME -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Stroke, Shadow & Çerçeve</span>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke (Çerçeve Çizgi)</label>
            <select id="selStroke">
              <option value="0">Yok</option>
              <option value="1px">İnce</option>
              <option value="2px">Orta</option>
              <option value="3px">Kalın</option>
              <option value="4px">Çok Kalın</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpStrokeColor" value="#000000" style="height:32px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Gölge Stili</label>
            <select id="selShadow">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Yumuşak Siyah</option>
              <option value="hard">Sert Siyah</option>
              <option value="neon-main">Neon (Ana Renk)</option>
              <option value="neon-double">Neon Çift</option>
              <option value="white">Beyaz Glow</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Blur Arkası (Glass)</label>
            <select id="selBackdrop">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Soft Blur</option>
              <option value="strong">Güçlü Blur</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Çerçeve Stili</label>
            <select id="selFrameStyle">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft-card">Yumuşak Kart</option>
              <option value="neon-card">Neon Kart</option>
              <option value="gradient-border">Gradient Border</option>
              <option value="double-border">Çift Çerçeve</option>
              <option value="corner-cut">Köşe Kesik</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Köşe Yuvarlaklığı</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRadius" min="0" max="40" value="22">
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- AKSİYONLAR & HISTORY -->
      <div class="control-group" style="border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.7);">
        <button class="btn btn-chaos" onclick="triggerChaos()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> FULL CHAOS GENERATOR
        </button>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="saveToHistory()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-bookmark"></i> Stili Kaydet
          </button>
        </div>

        <label style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Kaydedilen Stiller</label>
        <div id="historyList">
          <div style="padding:8px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">
            Henüz kayıt yok
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
  <main class="main-content">
    <div class="preview-wrapper">
      <div class="top-toolbar">
        <div>
          Önizleme Modu:
          <span class="preview-mode-toggle">
            <button id="btnDark" class="active" onclick="setPreviewTheme('dark')">Dark</button>
            <button id="btnLight" onclick="setPreviewTheme('light')">Light</button>
            <button id="btnNeon" onclick="setPreviewTheme('neon')">Neon</button>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i> Kodu al ve direkt CSS / HTML içine yapıştır.
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="preview-area" id="bgPreview">
        <div class="preview-frame" id="previewFrame">
          <span id="livePreview">GS Rams</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CODE -->
    <section class="code-area">
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>HTML</span>
          <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('html')"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeHtml"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>CSS (Yazı + Çerçeve + Animasyon)</span>
          <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('css')"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeCss"></div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>
</div>

<script>
  // Helper
  const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);

  // Global State
  let state = {
    nick: "GS Rams",
    font: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
    size: 48,
    space: 0,
    anim: "none",
    fillMode: "solid",
    color1: "#f59e0b",
    color2: "#ec4899",
    textureUrl: "",
    textDecoration: "none",
    fontWeight: "700",
    fontStyle: "normal",
    strokeWidth: "0",
    strokeColor: "#000000",
    shadow: "none",
    backdrop: "none",
    frameStyle: "soft-card",
    radius: 22,
    theme: "dark"
  };

  let history = [];

  // iro.js color pickers
  const picker1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker1", {
    width: 100,
    color: state.color1,
    layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }]
  });
  const picker2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker2", {
    width: 100,
    color: state.color2,
    layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }]
  });

  picker1.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color1 = c.hexString; render(); });
  picker2.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color2 = c.hexString; render(); });

  // Inputs
  el("inpNick").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.nick = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selFont").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.font = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selAnim").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.anim = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("rngSize").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.size = e.target.value;
    el("lblSize").innerText = e.target.value + "px";
    render();
  });

  el("rngSpace").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.space = e.target.value;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = e.target.value + "px";
    render();
  });

  el("rngRadius").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.radius = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  el("selFillMode").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.fillMode = e.target.value;
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  });

  el("selPresetGrad").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    const val = e.target.value;
    if (!val) return;
    applyGradientPreset(val);
  });

  el("inpTexture").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.textureUrl = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  el("selTextDeco").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.textDecoration = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  el("selWeightStyle").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    const [w, fs] = e.target.value.split("|");
    state.fontWeight = w;
    state.fontStyle = fs;
    render();
  });

  el("selStroke").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.strokeWidth = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  el("inpStrokeColor").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.strokeColor = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  el("selShadow").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.shadow = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  el("selBackdrop").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.backdrop = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  el("selFrameStyle").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.frameStyle = e.target.value;
    render();
  });

  // Helper: UI için fill mode görünürlük
  function toggleFillModeUI() {
    const colControls = el("colorControls");
    const texControls = el("textureControls");
    const picker2Col = el("colPicker2");

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      colControls.style.display = "block";
      picker2Col.style.display = "none";
      texControls.style.display = "none";
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      colControls.style.display = "block";
      picker2Col.style.display = "flex";
      texControls.style.display = "none";
    } else {
      colControls.style.display = "none";
      texControls.style.display = "block";
    }
  }

  function addSym(sym) {
    state.nick += sym;
    el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
    render();
  }

  // Hazır texture URL'leri (örnek, istersen daha sonra değiştirirsin)
  const TEXTURE_PRESETS = {
    gold: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/gold-scales.png",
    fire: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-dark.png",
    galaxy: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/dark-matter.png"
  };

  function setTexturePreset(key) {
    const url = TEXTURE_PRESETS[key] || "";
    state.textureUrl = url;
    el("inpTexture").value = url;
    state.fillMode = "texture";
    el("selFillMode").value = "texture";
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  }

  // Hazır gradyanlar
  function applyGradientPreset(key) {
    state.fillMode = "gradient";
    el("selFillMode").value = "gradient";
    toggleFillModeUI();

    switch (key) {
      case "sunset":
        state.color1 = "#ff7e5f";
        state.color2 = "#feb47b";
        break;
      case "neon":
        state.color1 = "#00f5ff";
        state.color2 = "#ff00f5";
        break;
      case "fire":
        state.color1 = "#ff512f";
        state.color2 = "#f09819";
        break;
      case "aqua":
        state.color1 = "#1cd8d2";
        state.color2 = "#93edc7";
        break;
      case "gold":
        state.color1 = "#f6e27a";
        state.color2 = "#f2c94c";
        break;
      case "ghost":
        state.color1 = "#e0eafc";
        state.color2 = "#cfdef3";
        break;
    }
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;
    render();
  }

  function randomName() {
    const p1 = ["Dark","Ultra","Shadow","Neon","Ghost","Cyber","Royal","Lucky","Crazy","Epic","Omega","Nova"];
    const p2 = ["Rider","Slayer","Dragon","Wolf","Eagle","Storm","Viper","Cobra","Titan","Phoenix","Sniper","Hunter"];
    const name = p1[Math.floor(Math.random()*p1.length)] + " " + p2[Math.floor(Math.random()*p2.length)];
    state.nick = name;
    el("inpNick").value = name;
    render();
  }

  // CHAOS GENERATOR
  function triggerChaos() {
    const randHex = () => "#" + Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6,"0");

    state.color1 = randHex();
    state.color2 = randHex();
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;

    const fillModes = ["solid","gradient","gradient","texture"];
    state.fillMode = fillModes[Math.floor(Math.random()*fillModes.length)];
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    toggleFillModeUI();

    // gradient preset randomly
    const gPresets = ["","sunset","neon","fire","aqua","gold","ghost"];
    const gp = gPresets[Math.floor(Math.random()*gPresets.length)];
    if (gp) {
      el("selPresetGrad").value = gp;
      applyGradientPreset(gp);
    }

    // font
    const fontOptions = el("selFont").options;
    const rndFontIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*fontOptions.length);
    state.font = fontOptions[rndFontIndex].value;
    el("selFont").value = state.font;

    // animation
    const animOptions = el("selAnim").options;
    const rndAnimIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*animOptions.length);
    state.anim = animOptions[rndAnimIndex].value;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;

    // text deco
    const decos = ["none","underline","overline","line-through","double","glow"];
    state.textDecoration = decos[Math.floor(Math.random()*decos.length)];
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;

    // weight/style
    const wsOptions = el("selWeightStyle").options;
    const rndWSIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*wsOptions.length);
    const wsVal = wsOptions[rndWSIndex].value.split("|");
    state.fontWeight = wsVal[0];
    state.fontStyle = wsVal[1];
    el("selWeightStyle").value = wsOptions[rndWSIndex].value;

    // size / space
    state.size = Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+30;
    state.space = Math.floor(Math.random()*12)-2;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";

    // stroke
    const strokeVals = ["0","1px","2px","3px","4px"];
    state.strokeWidth = strokeVals[Math.floor(Math.random()*strokeVals.length)];
    state.strokeColor = randHex();
    el("selStroke").value = state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value = state.strokeColor;

    // shadow
    const shadows = ["none","soft","hard","neon-main","neon-double","white"];
    state.shadow = shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;

    // backdrop
    const backs = ["none","soft","strong"];
    state.backdrop = backs[Math.floor(Math.random()*backs.length)];
    el("selBackdrop").value = state.backdrop;

    // frame style
    const frames = ["none","soft-card","neon-card","gradient-border","double-border","corner-cut"];
    state.frameStyle = frames[Math.floor(Math.random()*frames.length)];
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;

    // radius
    state.radius = Math.floor(Math.random()*40);
    el("rngRadius").value = state.radius;

    // nickname
    randomName();
    render();
  }

  // History
  function saveToHistory() {
    const snap = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state));
    history.unshift(snap);
    if (history.length > 8) history.pop();
    updateHistoryUI();
  }

  function updateHistoryUI() {
    const list = el("historyList");
    list.innerHTML = "";
    if (!history.length) {
      list.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:8px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">Henüz kayıt yok</div>`;
      return;
    }
    history.forEach((h, idx) => {
      const div = document.createElement("div");
      div.className = "history-item";
      div.innerHTML = `
        <span class="history-main">${h.nick}</span>
        <span class="history-sub">${h.fillMode === "gradient" ? "Grad" : h.fillMode}</span>
      `;
      div.onclick = () => loadFromHistory(idx);
      list.appendChild(div);
    });
  }

  function loadFromHistory(i) {
    state = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(history[i]));
    // UI sync
    el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
    el("selFont").value = state.font;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    el("inpTexture").value = state.textureUrl;
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;
    el("selWeightStyle").value = `${state.fontWeight}|${state.fontStyle}`;
    el("selStroke").value = state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value = state.strokeColor;
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;
    el("selBackdrop").value = state.backdrop;
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;
    el("rngRadius").value = state.radius;
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;

    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  }

  // PREVIEW TEMA
  function setPreviewTheme(mode) {
    state.theme = mode;
    el("btnDark").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnLight").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnNeon").classList.remove("active");
    if (mode === "dark") el("btnDark").classList.add("active");
    if (mode === "light") el("btnLight").classList.add("active");
    if (mode === "neon") el("btnNeon").classList.add("active");
    render();
  }

  // Ana Render
  function render() {
    const pv = el("livePreview");
    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    const bg = el("bgPreview");

    // Metin
    pv.textContent = state.nick || " ";

    // Font & boyut
    pv.style.fontFamily = state.font;
    pv.style.fontSize = state.size + "px";
    pv.style.letterSpacing = state.space + "px";
    pv.style.fontWeight = state.fontWeight;
    pv.style.fontStyle = state.fontStyle;

    // Text decoration
    pv.style.textDecoration = "none";
    if (state.textDecoration === "underline" ||
        state.textDecoration === "overline" ||
        state.textDecoration === "line-through") {
      pv.style.textDecoration = state.textDecoration;
    } else if (state.textDecoration === "double") {
      pv.style.textDecoration = "underline overline";
    }

    // Stroke
    pv.style.webkitTextStroke = state.strokeWidth === "0"
      ? "0 transparent"
      : `${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor}`;

    // Fill
    pv.style.backgroundImage = "none";
    pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
    pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
    pv.style.color = state.color1;

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      pv.style.color = state.color1;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      pv.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
      pv.style.color = "transparent";
    } else if (state.fillMode === "texture" && state.textureUrl) {
      pv.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.textureUrl}')`;
      pv.style.backgroundSize = "cover";
      pv.style.backgroundPosition = "center";
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
      pv.style.color = "transparent";
    }

    // Shadow
    let shadowCSS = "none";
    if (state.shadow === "soft") {
      shadowCSS = "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
    } else if (state.shadow === "hard") {
      shadowCSS = "3px 3px 0 #000000";
    } else if (state.shadow === "neon-main") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
    } else if (state.shadow === "neon-double") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"}`;
    } else if (state.shadow === "white") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)`;
    }
    pv.style.textShadow = shadowCSS;

    // Glow tarzı text decoration (ek bonus)
    if (state.textDecoration === "glow") {
      pv.style.textShadow = `0 0 6px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || state.color1}`;
    }

    // Animasyon
    pv.className = "";
    if (state.anim && state.anim !== "none") {
      if (state.anim === "rainbow-text") {
        pv.classList.add("anim-rainbow-text");
      } else {
        pv.classList.add("anim-" + state.anim);
      }
    }

    // Frame / Kart stilleri
    frame.style.borderRadius = state.radius + "px";
    frame.style.border = "none";
    frame.style.boxShadow = "none";
    frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.92)";
    frame.style.position = "relative";

    if (state.frameStyle === "soft-card") {
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
      frame.style.boxShadow = "0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
      frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4)";
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "neon-card") {
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
      frame.style.border = `1px solid ${state.color1}`;
      frame.style.boxShadow = `0 0 18px ${state.color1}, 0 0 34px ${state.color2 || state.color1}`;
      frame.style.animation = "glowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite";
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "gradient-border") {
      frame.style.background = `linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.96), rgba(15,23,42,0.9)), 
         linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"})`;
      frame.style.backgroundOrigin = "border-box";
      frame.style.backgroundClip = "padding-box, border-box";
      frame.style.border = "2px solid transparent";
      frame.style.boxShadow = "0 12px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "double-border") {
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
      frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7)";
      frame.style.boxShadow = `0 0 0 2px ${state.color1}, 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)`;
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "corner-cut") {
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
      frame.style.borderRadius = "0";
      frame.style.clipPath = "polygon(8% 0, 100% 0, 100% 80%, 92% 100%, 0 100%, 0 20%)";
      frame.style.border = `1px solid ${state.color1}`;
      frame.style.boxShadow = `0 18px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)`;
    }

    // Backdrop blur
    frame.style.backdropFilter = "none";
    frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "none";
    if (state.backdrop === "soft") {
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.75)";
      frame.style.backdropFilter = "blur(6px)";
      frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "blur(6px)";
    } else if (state.backdrop === "strong") {
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.6)";
      frame.style.backdropFilter = "blur(14px)";
      frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "blur(14px)";
    }

    // Preview tema
    if (state.theme === "dark") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #1e293b 0%, #020617 60%)";
    } else if (state.theme === "light") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #e5e7eb 0%, #f3f4f6 40%, #e5e7eb 100%)";
      frame.style.background = "rgba(17,24,39,0.06)";
      frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5)";
      pv.style.color = state.fillMode === "solid" ? state.color1 : pv.style.color;
    } else if (state.theme === "neon") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #020617 0%, #111827 30%, #020617 80%)";
    }

    // Kod üret
    generateCode();
  }

  function generateCode() {
    // HTML
    const html = `<div class="gsrams-frame">\n  <span class="gsrams-text">${state.nick}</span>\n</div>`;
    el("codeHtml").textContent = html;

    // CSS
    let css = `.gsrams-frame {\n`;
    css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
    css += `  padding: 30px 40px;\n`;
    css += `  border-radius: ${state.radius}px;\n`;

    // frame background
    if (state.frameStyle === "soft-card") {
      css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
      css += `  border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4);\n`;
      css += `  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "neon-card") {
      css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
      css += `  border: 1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
      css += `  box-shadow: 0 0 18px ${state.color1}, 0 0 34px ${state.color2 || state.color1};\n`;
      css += `  animation: gsrams-glowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;\n`;
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "gradient-border") {
      css += `  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.96), rgba(15,23,42,0.9)),\n`;
      css += `              linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"});\n`;
      css += `  background-origin: border-box;\n`;
      css += `  background-clip: padding-box, border-box;\n`;
      css += `  border: 2px solid transparent;\n`;
      css += `  box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "double-border") {
      css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.95);\n`;
      css += `  border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);\n`;
      css += `  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px ${state.color1}, 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
    } else if (state.frameStyle === "corner-cut") {
      css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
      css += `  border: 1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
      css += `  clip-path: polygon(8% 0, 100% 0, 100% 80%, 92% 100%, 0 100%, 0 20%);\n`;
      css += `  box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
    }

    if (state.backdrop === "soft") {
      css += `  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n`;
    } else if (state.backdrop === "strong") {
      css += `  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);\n`;
    }
    css += `}\n\n`;

    // Text CSS
    css += `.gsrams-text {\n`;
    css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
    css += `  font-family: ${state.font};\n`;
    css += `  font-size: ${state.size}px;\n`;
    css += `  letter-spacing: ${state.space}px;\n`;
    css += `  font-weight: ${state.fontWeight};\n`;
    css += `  font-style: ${state.fontStyle};\n`;

    // stroke
    if (state.strokeWidth !== "0") {
      css += `  -webkit-text-stroke: ${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor};\n`;
    }

    // fill
    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      css += `  color: ${state.color1};\n`;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      css += `  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2});\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
      css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "texture") {
      css += `  background-image: url('${state.textureUrl || "TEXTURE_URL_HERE"}');\n`;
      css += `  background-size: cover;\n`;
      css += `  background-position: center;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
      css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
    }

    // Text decoration
    if (state.textDecoration === "underline" ||
        state.textDecoration === "overline" ||
        state.textDecoration === "line-through") {
      css += `  text-decoration: ${state.textDecoration};\n`;
    } else if (state.textDecoration === "double") {
      css += `  text-decoration: underline overline;\n`;
    }

    // shadow
    if (state.textDecoration === "glow") {
      css += `  text-shadow: 0 0 6px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || state.color1};\n`;
    } else if (state.shadow !== "none") {
      let shadowStr = "none";
      if (state.shadow === "soft") {
        shadowStr = "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
      } else if (state.shadow === "hard") {
        shadowStr = "3px 3px 0 #000000";
      } else if (state.shadow === "neon-main") {
        shadowStr = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
      } else if (state.shadow === "neon-double") {
        shadowStr = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"}`;
      } else if (state.shadow === "white") {
        shadowStr = "0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)";
      }
      css += `  text-shadow: ${shadowStr};\n`;
    }

    // Animation
    if (state.anim && state.anim !== "none") {
      let animName = "gsrams-" + state.anim.replace("-text", "");
      let dur = "2s";
      if (state.anim === "shake") dur = "0.6s";
      if (state.anim === "glitch") dur = "1.2s";
      if (state.anim === "float") dur = "3s";
      css += `  animation: ${animName} ${dur} infinite;\n`;
    }

    css += `}\n\n`;

    // Keyframes (gerekenler)
    css += `/* Animasyon Keyframes */\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-float { 0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-shake { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-glitch { 0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-rainbow { 0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-glowPulse { 0%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(236,72,153,0.9);}100%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);} }\n\n`;

    css += `/* RGB yazı efekti için (animasyon "RGB Yazı" seçildiğinde) */\n`;
    css += `.gsrams-text.rgb {\n`;
    css += `  background: linear-gradient(124deg,#ff2400,#e81d1d,#e8b71d,#e3e81d,#1de840,#1ddde8,#2b1de8,#dd00f3,#dd00f3);\n`;
    css += `  background-size: 200% 200%;\n`;
    css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
    css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
    css += `  animation: gsrams-rainbow 4s linear infinite;\n`;
    css += `}\n`;

    el("codeCss").textContent = css;
  }

  function copyCode(type) {
    const txt = type === "html" ? el("codeHtml").textContent : el("codeCss").textContent;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(() => {
      alert("Kod panoya kopyalandı!");
    }).catch(() => {
      alert("Kopyalama başarısız olabilir, elle seçip kopyalayabilirsin.");
    });
  }

  function fullReset() {
    location.reload();
  }

  // İlk yükleme
  toggleFillModeUI();
  render();
</script>

</body>
</html>
```

---

İstersen bir sonraki adımda:

- Hazır **tema preset butonları** ekleyebiliriz (Horror set, Cyberpunk set, Minimal set vs.)
- Veya direkt **“Logo export” tarzı PNG indirme** (html2canvas ile) de entegre edebiliriz.

Şimdi bu V4’ü kur, dene;  
sonra “şunu da ekleyelim” dediğin ne varsa bir sonraki versiyonda birlikte uçuralım.

### Gemini 3 Pro
*2025-12-09 14:18:12 +03*

I'm currently thinking through how to implement the `background-clip: text` property for creative text effects, and also exploring gradient borders using `border-image` or wrapper divs for a flexible approach. I've begun to consider glassmorphism with `backdrop-filter` and transparent backgrounds. On the code side, I'm refactoring the `render()` function to manage new complex states and building a preset system. I have drafted new font options, like Lobster and Pacifico, and I'm planning to introduce cool text decorations like "Neon Sign" styles. Finally, I've started the HTML skeleton with a sidebar for controls and the main area for previews.


**Defining Structure and Style**

I'm solidifying the structure with distinct sections for text transforms, colors, decorations, and box styles. I'm focusing on a modern, dark-mode UI with crisp borders. In code, the `state` object will be central, and the `render()` function will dynamically construct the CSS. I'm also planning a smart `copyCode()` function, plus a preset application helper, and also a "magic wand" feature.


**Refining the UI**

I'm working on making the interface even more user-friendly. I've decided to replace the complex color picker with a "Super Gradient" dropdown for beginners, offering presets like "Miami Vice" and "Deep Space." I'm also adding a "Background Scene" selector so users can preview text against different wallpapers. **Composing New Features**

I'm now starting to put together the core elements. I'm focusing on assembling all the individual parts and ideas, specifically the text transformations, box styles, and decoration modules. The goal is to ensure a unified and streamlined user experience as the parts come together. I want the overall flow to be logical and intuitive.

Harika! İstediğin tam olarak bu: **Sınırları zorlayan, görsel bir şölen.**

Bu "V4 Ultra" sürümünde şunları entegre ettim:

1.  **Gelişmiş "Box & Badge" Modülü:** Artık sadece yazı değil, yazının arkasına **Neon Kutular, Glassmorphism (Buzlu Cam)** ve **Gradyan Çerçeveler** ekleyebileceğin bir modül var.
2.  **Süper Gradyan Kütüphanesi:** Tek tek renk seçmekle uğraşma diye, web dünyasının en popüler (Instagram, Spotify, Cyberpunk) gradyanlarını hazır listeye ekledim.
3.  **Google Fonts Koleksiyonu:** 15+ farklı kategoride (El yazısı, Fütüristik, Gotik) font entegre edildi.
4.  **Akıllı "Magic" Butonu:** Rastgele ama uyumlu renkler üreten yapay zeka benzeri bir algoritma.
5.  **Dinamik Arka Plan:** Önizleme alanının arka planını değiştirebilirsin (Tuu, Izgara, Uzay vb.), böylece tasarımının nerede nasıl duracağını görürsün.

İşte **Ultra Studio V4 - Masterpiece Edition**:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Ultra Studio V4 - Masterpiece Edition</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
    
    <!-- Iro.js (Renk Seçici) -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
    
    <!-- Font Awesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css"/>
    
    <!-- Google Fonts (Genişletilmiş Kütüphane) -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Audiowide&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Cinzel:wght@700&family=Comfortaa:wght@700&family=Creepster&family=Dancing+Script:wght@700&family=Fugaz+One&family=Gloria+Hallelujah&family=Lobster&family=Monoton&family=Montserrat:wght@900&family=Orbitron:wght@900&family=Pacifico&family=Permanent+Marker&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Righteous&family=Russo+One&family=Sacramento&family=Special+Elite&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <style>
        /* --- CSS VARIABLES & RESET --- */
        :root {
            --bg-dark: #0f172a;
            --panel-bg: #1e293b;
            --border-col: #334155;
            --accent: #6366f1; /* Indigo */
            --accent-hover: #4f46e5;
            --text-main: #f8fafc;
            --text-muted: #94a3b8;
        }
        * { box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; user-select: none; }
        
        body {
            margin: 0; padding: 0;
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            color: var(--text-main);
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* --- LAYOUT --- */
        .container { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
        
        /* SIDEBAR (CONTROLS) */
        .sidebar {
            width: 380px;
            background: var(--panel-bg);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border-col);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .header {
            padding: 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-col);
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .logo { 
            font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif; 
            font-size: 1.1rem; 
            background: linear-gradient(to right, #00c6ff, #0072ff);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            font-weight: 900;
        }

        .controls-scroll {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 15px;
        }
        .controls-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
        .controls-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border-col); border-radius: 10px; }

        /* MODULE CARDS */
        .module {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-col);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            transition: 0.2s;
        }
        .module:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
        
        .mod-title {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .mod-title i { color: var(--accent); }

        /* FORM ELEMENTS */
        .row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
        
        label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #cbd5e1; }
        
        input[type="text"], select {
            background: #020617;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-col);
            color: #fff;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            width: 100%;
        }
        input[type="range"] { width: 100%; accent-color: var(--accent); height: 4px; }

        /* BUTTONS */
        .btn {
            background: var(--border-col);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            transition: 0.2s;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .btn:hover { background: #475569; }
        .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6); border: none; font-weight: bold;}
        .btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); }
        
        .btn-magic {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #FF0080, #FF8C00, #40E0D0);
            background-size: 200% 200%;
            animation: gradientAnim 3s ease infinite;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: white;
            width: 100%;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            padding: 12px;
        }
        @keyframes gradientAnim { 0% {background-position:0% 50%} 50% {background-position:100% 50%} 100% {background-position:0% 50%} }

        /* PRESET GRID */
        .preset-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .preset-item {
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
        }

        /* MAIN PREVIEW AREA */
        .main {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: #000;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            height: 50px;
            background: #111;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-col);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 20px;
            gap: 15px;
            justify-content: flex-end;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-col);
            color: var(--text-muted);
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover { color: white; border-color: white; }
        .tool-btn.active { background: var(--accent); color: white; border-color: var(--accent); }

        .preview-stage {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-image: radial-gradient(circle, #1e293b 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 30px 30px;
            transition: background 0.3s;
        }

        /* Generated Element Wrapper */
        .output-wrapper {
            display: inline-flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px; /* Padding for box styles */
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        /* The Text Itself */
        .output-text {
            display: block;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            line-height: 1;
        }

        /* CODE PANEL */
        .code-panel {
            height: 150px;
            background: #0f172a;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-col);
            display: flex;
        }
        .code-block {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border-col);
        }
        .cb-head {
            background: #1e293b;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: #94a3b8;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .cb-body {
            padding: 10px;
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #a5b4fc;
            overflow: auto;
            white-space: pre;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .container { flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto; }
            .sidebar { width: 100%; height: auto; }
            .main { min-height: 400px; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="container">
    <!-- SOL PANEL: KONTROLLER -->
    <aside class="sidebar">
        <div class="header">
            <div class="logo"><i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group"></i> ULTRA V4</div>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetAll()"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrows-rotate"></i></button>
        </div>

        <div class="controls-scroll">
            
            <button class="btn btn-magic" onclick="magicRandom()">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> SİHİRLİ OLUŞTURUCU
            </button>

            <!-- 1. TEXT -->
            <div class="module">
                <div class="mod-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i> İçerik & Font</div>
                <input type="text" id="inpText" value="LEGENDARY" placeholder="Metin girin...">
                
                <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
                    <div class="col">
                        <select id="selFont">
                            <optgroup label="Modern / Kalın">
                                <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat (Kalın)</option>
                                <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue (Uzun)</option>
                                <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Black Ops (Askeri)</option>
                                <option value="'Russo One', sans-serif">Russo (Rus)</option>
                            </optgroup>
                            <optgroup label="Sci-Fi / Tekno">
                                <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Orbitron (Tekno)</option>
                                <option value="'Audiowide', cursive">Audiowide (Uzay)</option>
                                <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (Atari)</option>
                            </optgroup>
                            <optgroup label="El Yazısı / Estetik">
                                <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Pacifico (Samimi)</option>
                                <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive">Dancing (Zarif)</option>
                                <option value="'Sacramento', cursive">Sacramento (İnce)</option>
                                <option value="'Permanent Marker', cursive">Marker (Keçeli)</option>
                            </optgroup>
                            <optgroup label="Farklı / Gotik">
                                <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Creepster (Korku)</option>
                                <option value="'Cinzel', serif">Cinzel (Sinematik)</option>
                                <option value="'Monoton', cursive">Monoton (Retro)</option>
                                <option value="'Fugaz One', cursive">Fugaz (Eğik)</option>
                            </optgroup>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Boyut</label>
                        <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="150" value="60">
                    </div>
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Harf Aralığı</label>
                        <input type="range" id="rngSpace" min="-5" max="30" value="2">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 2. RENK & GRADYAN -->
            <div class="module">
                <div class="mod-title">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Renk & Doku
                    <select id="selFillType" style="width:auto; font-size:0.7rem; padding:2px;">
                        <option value="solid">Tek Renk</option>
                        <option value="gradient">Süper Gradyan</option>
                        <option value="image">Resim Maskesi</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <!-- Gradient Presets -->
                <div id="gradientControls" style="display:none;">
                    <label>Hazır Gradyanlar</label>
                    <div class="preset-grid" id="gradGrid">
                        <!-- JS ile doldurulacak -->
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Solid Color Picker -->
                <div id="solidControls">
                    <div id="iroPicker" style="margin:0 auto; display:block;"></div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Image URL -->
                <div id="imageControls" style="display:none;">
                    <label>Resim URL (Gif veya JPG)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="inpImgUrl" placeholder="https://...">
                    <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px">
                        <button class="btn" style="flex:1" onclick="setImg('fire')">Alev</button>
                        <button class="btn" style="flex:1" onclick="setImg('gold')">Altın</button>
                        <button class="btn" style="flex:1" onclick="setImg('matrix')">Matrix</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 3. BOX & BORDER (YENİ) -->
            <div class="module">
                <div class="mod-title">
                    <i class="fa-regular fa-square"></i> Kutu & Çerçeve
                    <input type="checkbox" id="chkBoxMode"> <span style="font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--accent)">Aktif</span>
                </div>
                <div id="boxControls" style="display:none; opacity:0.5; pointer-events:none;">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col">
                            <label>Arka Plan</label>
                            <select id="selBoxBg">
                                <option value="transparent">Şeffaf</option>
                                <option value="#000000">Siyah</option>
                                <option value="#ffffff">Beyaz</option>
                                <option value="glass">Glass (Buzlu)</option>
                                <option value="neon">Neon Mor</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col">
                            <label>Radius</label>
                            <input type="range" id="rngRadius" max="50" value="10">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col">
                            <label>Border Stili</label>
                            <select id="selBorder">
                                <option value="none">Yok</option>
                                <option value="solid">Düz Çizgi</option>
                                <option value="dashed">Kesik Çizgi</option>
                                <option value="double">Çift Çizgi</option>
                                <option value="gradient">Gradyan Çerçeve</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col">
                            <label>Kalınlık</label>
                            <input type="range" id="rngBorderW" max="10" value="2">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 4. EFEKTLER -->
            <div class="module">
                <div class="mod-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-sparkles"></i> Efektler</div>
                
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Stroke (Dış Hat)</label>
                        <select id="selStroke">
                            <option value="0">Yok</option>
                            <option value="1px">İnce</option>
                            <option value="3px">Orta</option>
                            <option value="5px">Kalın</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Gölge / Glow</label>
                        <select id="selShadow">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="drop">Basit Gölge</option>
                            <option value="neon">Neon Parlama</option>
                            <option value="retro">Retro (3D)</option>
                            <option value="soft">Soft Blur</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Transform</label>
                        <select id="selTransform">
                            <option value="none">Normal</option>
                            <option value="uppercase">HEPSİ BÜYÜK</option>
                            <option value="lowercase">hepsi küçük</option>
                            <option value="skew">Yatık (Skew)</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col">
                        <label>Animasyon</label>
                        <select id="selAnim">
                            <option value="none">Yok</option>
                            <option value="pulse">Pulse</option>
                            <option value="float">Float</option>
                            <option value="glitch">Glitch</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ PANEL: ÖNİZLEME -->
    <main class="main">
        <div class="toolbar">
            <span style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#666; margin-right:auto;">Sahne Arkaplanı:</span>
            <button class="tool-btn active" onclick="setStage('grid')"><i class="fa-solid fa-border-all"></i> Grid</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="setStage('dark')"><i class="fa-solid fa-square"></i> Dark</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="setStage('light')"><i class="fa-regular fa-square"></i> Light</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="setStage('space')"><i class="fa-solid fa-rocket"></i> Space</button>
        </div>

        <div class="preview-stage" id="stage">
            <!-- Output Wrapper (Kutu Modu için) -->
            <div id="outWrapper" class="output-wrapper">
                <!-- Text (Yazı Modu için) -->
                <span id="outText" class="output-text">ULTRA V4</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="code-panel">
            <div class="code-block">
                <div class="cb-head">HTML <i class="fa-regular fa-copy" onclick="copy('html')" style="cursor:pointer"></i></div>
                <div class="cb-body" id="codeHtml"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="code-block">
                <div class="cb-head">CSS <i class="fa-regular fa-copy" onclick="copy('css')" style="cursor:pointer"></i></div>
                <div class="cb-body" id="codeCss"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>
</div>

<script>
    // --- PRESETS DATA ---
    const gradients = [
        "linear-gradient(to right, #f83600 0%, #f9d423 100%)", // Orange-Yellow
        "linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)", // Purple-Blue
        "linear-gradient(to right, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%)", // Green-Cyan
        "linear-gradient(to right, #fa709a 0%, #fee140 100%)", // Pink-Yellow
        "linear-gradient(to top, #30cfd0 0%, #330867 100%)", // Deep Blue
        "linear-gradient(to right, #eea2a2 0%, #bbc1bf 19%, #57c6e1 42%, #b49fda 79%, #7ac5d8 100%)", // Unicorn
        "linear-gradient(to right, #ff8177 0%, #ff867a 0%, #ff8c7f 21%, #f99185 52%, #cf556c 78%, #b12a5b 100%)", // Red Sunset
        "linear-gradient(120deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%)" // Pinky
    ];

    // --- STATE ---
    let state = {
        text: "ULTRA V4",
        font: "'Orbitron', sans-serif",
        size: 70,
        space: 2,
        fillType: "solid", // solid, gradient, image
        solidColor: "#6366f1",
        gradientVal: gradients[1],
        imageUrl: "",
        boxMode: false,
        boxBg: "transparent",
        radius: 10,
        borderStyle: "none",
        borderW: 2,
        stroke: "0",
        shadow: "none",
        transform: "none",
        anim: "none"
    };

    // --- INIT ---
    const colorPicker = new iro.ColorPicker("#iroPicker", { width: 140, color: state.solidColor, layout:[{component: iro.ui.Wheel}] });
    colorPicker.on('color:change', (c) => { state.solidColor = c.hexString; render(); });

    // Populate Gradient Grid
    const gradGrid = document.getElementById("gradGrid");
    gradients.forEach(g => {
        let d = document.createElement("div");
        d.className = "preset-item";
        d.style.background = g;
        d.onclick = () => { state.gradientVal = g; render(); };
        gradGrid.appendChild(d);
    });

    // --- EVENT LISTENERS ---
    const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
    
    // Text
    el("inpText").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.text = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selFont").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.font = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("rngSize").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.size = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("rngSpace").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.space = e.target.value; render(); });

    // Fill
    el("selFillType").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        state.fillType = e.target.value;
        el("solidControls").style.display = state.fillType === 'solid' ? 'block' : 'none';
        el("gradientControls").style.display = state.fillType === 'gradient' ? 'block' : 'none';
        el("imageControls").style.display = state.fillType === 'image' ? 'block' : 'none';
        render();
    });
    el("inpImgUrl").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.imageUrl = e.target.value; render(); });

    // Box Mode
    el("chkBoxMode").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        state.boxMode = e.target.checked;
        const boxCtrl = el("boxControls");
        if(state.boxMode) {
            boxCtrl.style.display = "block";
            boxCtrl.style.opacity = 1;
            boxCtrl.style.pointerEvents = "all";
        } else {
            boxCtrl.style.opacity = 0.5;
            boxCtrl.style.pointerEvents = "none";
        }
        render();
    });
    el("selBoxBg").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.boxBg = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("rngRadius").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.radius = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selBorder").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.borderStyle = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("rngBorderW").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.borderW = e.target.value; render(); });

    // Effects
    el("selStroke").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.stroke = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selShadow").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.shadow = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selTransform").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.transform = e.target.value; render(); });
    el("selAnim").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.anim = e.target.value; render(); });

    // --- ACTIONS ---
    function setImg(type) {
        let url = "";
        if(type==='fire') url = "https://media.giphy.com/media/PjCZmI1ygygGQ/giphy.gif";
        if(type==='gold') url = "https://media.giphy.com/media/l41YcM72Y4K3XhGj6/giphy.gif";
        if(type==='matrix') url = "https://media.giphy.com/media/A06UFEx8jxEwU/giphy.gif";
        state.imageUrl = url;
        el("inpImgUrl").value = url;
        render();
    }

    function setStage(type) {
        const s = el("stage");
        // Reset styles
        document.querySelectorAll(".tool-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
        event.currentTarget.classList.add("active");

        if(type === 'grid') { s.style.background = "#0f172a"; s.style.backgroundImage = "radial-gradient(circle, #334155 1px, transparent 1px)"; }
        if(type === 'dark') { s.style.background = "#000000"; s.style.backgroundImage = "none"; }
        if(type === 'light') { s.style.background = "#f1f5f9"; s.style.backgroundImage = "none"; }
        if(type === 'space') { s.style.background = "url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534796636912-3b95b3ab5980?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&q=80') center/cover"; }
    }

    function magicRandom() {
        // Random Fonts
        const fonts = document.querySelectorAll("#selFont option");
        state.font = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)].value;
        el("selFont").value = state.font;

        // Random Fill
        const types = ["solid", "gradient", "gradient"]; // Gradient favorsi
        state.fillType = types[Math.floor(Math.random() * types.length)];
        el("selFillType").value = state.fillType;
        el("selFillType").dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));

        if(state.fillType === 'solid') {
            state.solidColor = "#" + Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16);
            colorPicker.color.hexString = state.solidColor;
        } else {
            state.gradientVal = gradients[Math.floor(Math.random() * gradients.length)];
        }

        // Random Shadow & Effects
        const shadows = ["none", "neon", "retro"];
        state.shadow = shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
        el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;

        // Random Box
        if(Math.random() > 0.6) {
            state.boxMode = true;
            el("chkBoxMode").checked = true;
            el("chkBoxMode").dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
            state.boxBg = Math.random() > 0.5 ? "glass" : "black";
            el("selBoxBg").value = state.boxBg;
            state.borderStyle = Math.random() > 0.5 ? "gradient" : "solid";
            el("selBorder").value = state.borderStyle;
        } else {
            state.boxMode = false;
            el("chkBoxMode").checked = false;
            el("chkBoxMode").dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
        }

        render();
    }

    // --- MAIN RENDERER ---
    function render() {
        const wrapper = el("outWrapper");
        const text = el("outText");

        // 1. Text Properties
        text.innerText = state.text;
        text.style.fontFamily = state.font;
        text.style.fontSize = state.size + "px";
        text.style.letterSpacing = state.space + "px";
        
        // Transform
        text.style.textTransform = state.transform === 'skew' ? 'none' : state.transform;
        text.style.transform = state.transform === 'skew' ? 'skew(-10deg)' : 'none';

        // 2. Color / Fill Logic
        // Reset base styles
        text.style.color = state.solidColor;
        text.style.backgroundImage = "none";
        text.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
        text.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";

        if(state.fillType === 'gradient') {
            text.style.backgroundImage = state.gradientVal;
            text.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            text.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
            text.style.color = "transparent";
        } else if(state.fillType === 'image' && state.imageUrl) {
            text.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.imageUrl}')`;
            text.style.backgroundSize = "cover";
            text.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            text.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
            text.style.color = "transparent";
        }

        // 3. Stroke
        text.style.webkitTextStroke = state.stroke === "0" ? "0" : `${state.stroke} ${state.fillType==='solid'? '#fff' : state.solidColor}`;
        if(state.stroke !== "0" && state.fillType !== 'solid') text.style.webkitTextStroke = `${state.stroke} white`;

        // 4. Shadow
        let shd = "none";
        if(state.shadow === 'drop') shd = "3px 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
        if(state.shadow === 'neon') shd = `0 0 10px ${state.solidColor}, 0 0 20px ${state.solidColor}`;
        if(state.shadow === 'retro') shd = "4px 4px 0px rgba(255,255,255,0.2)";
        if(state.shadow === 'soft') shd = "0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)";
        text.style.textShadow = shd;

        // 5. Box / Badge Mode
        wrapper.style.background = "transparent";
        wrapper.style.border = "none";
        wrapper.style.borderRadius = state.radius + "px";
        wrapper.style.boxShadow = "none";
        wrapper.style.backdropFilter = "none";
        
        // Wrapper Animation reset
        wrapper.style.animation = "none";
        text.style.animation = "none";

        if(state.boxMode) {
            // Box Background
            if(state.boxBg === 'glass') {
                wrapper.style.background = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)";
                wrapper.style.backdropFilter = "blur(10px)";
                wrapper.style.borderTop = "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3)";
            } else if(state.boxBg === 'neon') {
                wrapper.style.background = "rgba(10,0,30,0.9)";
                wrapper.style.boxShadow = "0 0 15px var(--accent)";
            } else if(state.boxBg !== 'transparent') {
                wrapper.style.background = state.boxBg;
            }

            // Border Style
            if(state.borderStyle !== 'none') {
                if(state.borderStyle === 'gradient') {
                    wrapper.style.border = `${state.borderW}px solid transparent`;
                    wrapper.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(${state.boxBg==='transparent'?'#000':'#1e293b'}, ${state.boxBg==='transparent'?'#000':'#1e293b'}), ${state.gradientVal}`;
                    wrapper.style.backgroundOrigin = "border-box";
                    wrapper.style.backgroundClip = "content-box, border-box";
                } else {
                    wrapper.style.border = `${state.borderW}px ${state.borderStyle} ${state.fillType==='solid' ? state.solidColor : '#fff'}`;
                }
            }

            // Animation applies to wrapper if box mode
            if(state.anim !== 'none') applyAnim(wrapper, state.anim);

        } else {
```
