```html
                <option value="none">Yok (Sadece Yazı)</option>
                <option value="glass">Glassmorphism (Buzlu Cam)</option>
                <option value="neon-box">Neon Kutu</option>
                <option value="cyber-bracket">Cyber Köşeler</option>
                <option value="solid-card">Koyu Kart</option>
                <option value="gradient-border">Renkli Kenarlık</option>
            </select>

            <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
                <div class="col">
                    <label>Genişlik (Padding)</label>
                    <input type="range" id="rngPad" min="10" max="100" value="40">
                </div>
                <div class="col">
                    <label>Köşe (Radius)</label>
                    <input type="range" id="rngRad" min="0" max="50" value="12">
                </div>
            </div>

            <label>Hizalama (Yatay - Dikey)</label>
            <div class="row">
                <button class="btn btn-dark" onclick="setAlignment('flex-start', 'center')"><i class="fa-solid fa-align-left"></i></button>
                <button class="btn btn-dark" onclick="setAlignment('center', 'center')"><i class="fa-solid fa-align-center"></i></button>
                <button class="btn btn-dark" onclick="setAlignment('flex-end', 'center')"><i class="fa-solid fa-align-right"></i></button>
            </div>
        </div>

      </div> <!-- End Tab 1 -->

      <!-- TAB 2: PAKETLER -->
      <div id="tab-packs" class="tab-pane">
        <div class="group-label">🚀 Tek Tıkla Hazır Stiller</div>
        <div class="preset-grid">
            <div class="preset-card" onclick="loadPreset('cyber')">
                <div class="preset-preview" style="color:#0ff; text-shadow:0 0 10px #0ff;">CYBER</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem;">Neon & Glitch</div>
            </div>
            <div class="preset-card" onclick="loadPreset('gold')">
                <div class="preset-preview" style="background:linear-gradient(to bottom, #ffd700, #b8860b); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;">GOLD</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem;">Luxury Stil</div>
            </div>
            <div class="preset-card" onclick="loadPreset('horror')">
                <div class="preset-preview" style="font-family:'Creepster'; color:#ef4444; text-shadow:2px 2px 0 #000;">HORROR</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem;">Kanlı & Korku</div>
            </div>
            <div class="preset-card" onclick="loadPreset('pixel')">
                <div class="preset-preview" style="font-family:'Press Start 2P'; font-size:0.8rem; color:#4ade80;">PIXEL</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem;">Retro 8-Bit</div>
            </div>
             <div class="preset-card" onclick="loadPreset('fire')">
                <div class="preset-preview" style="color:#f97316; font-weight:900;">FIRE</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem;">Alevli GIF</div>
            </div>
            <div class="preset-card" onclick="loadPreset('glass')">
                <div class="preset-preview" style="color:#fff; opacity:0.8;">GLASS</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem;">Modern Cam</div>
            </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- TAB 3: EXPORT -->
      <div id="tab-export" class="tab-pane">
        <div class="control-group">
            <div class="group-label">💾 Kaydet ve Paylaş</div>
            <p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#94a3b8; margin-bottom:15px;">
                Tasarımını yüksek kaliteli PNG olarak indirebilirsin. Arka plan transparan (şeffaf) olacaktır.
            </p>
            
            <button id="btnDownload" class="btn btn-success" onclick="downloadPNG()">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-camera"></i> PNG OLARAK İNDİR
            </button>
            <br>
            <div class="row">
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="copyCSS()">
                    <i class="fa-brands fa-css3-alt"></i> CSS Kodu Kopyala
                </button>
            </div>
            
            <div style="margin-top:15px; font-size:0.75rem; color:#64748b; border-top:1px solid var(--border); padding-top:10px;">
                * Hareketli GIF'ler PNG formatında sabit resim olarak çıkar. Hareketli çıktı almak için ekran kaydı almalısınız.
            </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- SAĞ PANEL: ÖNİZLEME -->
  <main class="main-area">
    <div class="preview-container">
        <!-- Bu DIV html2canvas ile yakalanacak -->
        <div id="captureArea">
            <div id="previewText">GS RAMS</div>
        </div>
    </div>
  </main>
</div>

<script>
    // --- STATE MANAGEMENT ---
    const state = {
        text: "GS RAMS",
        font: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
        size: 60,
        fillType: "solid", // solid, gradient, image
        color1: "#6366f1",
        color2: "#ec4899",
        imgUrl: "",
        strokeWidth: "0",
        strokeColor: "#000000",
        shadow: "none",
        blend: "normal",
        frame: "glass",
        padding: 40,
        radius: 12,
        alignX: "center",
        alignY: "center"
    };

    // --- ELEMENTS ---
    const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
    const pvText = el('previewText');
    const pvBox = el('captureArea');

    // --- COLOR PICKERS (iro.js) ---
    const picker1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker1", { width: 120, color: state.color1, layout:[{component: iro.ui.Wheel}] });
    const picker2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker2", { width: 120, color: state.color2, layout:[{component: iro.ui.Wheel}] });

    picker1.on('color:change', (c) => { state.color1 = c.hexString; updatePreview(); });
    picker2.on('color:change', (c) => { state.color2 = c.hexString; updatePreview(); });

    // --- EVENT LISTENERS ---
    el('inpText').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.text = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    el('selFont').addEventListener('change', (e) => { state.font = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    el('rngSize').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.size = e.target.value; el('lblSize').innerText=e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    
    el('selFillType').addEventListener('change', (e) => { 
        state.fillType = e.target.value; 
        toggleColorInputs();
        updatePreview(); 
    });

    el('inpImgUrl').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.imgUrl = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });

    el('selStroke').addEventListener('change', (e) => { state.strokeWidth = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    el('inpStrokeColor').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.strokeColor = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    el('selShadow').addEventListener('change', (e) => { state.shadow = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    el('selBlend').addEventListener('change', (e) => { state.blend = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });

    el('selFrame').addEventListener('change', (e) => { state.frame = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    el('rngPad').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.padding = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });
    el('rngRad').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.radius = e.target.value; updatePreview(); });


    // --- FUNCTIONS ---

    function switchTab(tabId) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab-pane').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        
        el(tabId).classList.add('active');
        // Button active state logic
        const btnIndex = ['tab-edit','tab-packs','tab-export'].indexOf(tabId);
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn')[btnIndex].classList.add('active');
    }

    function toggleColorInputs() {
        const type = state.fillType;
        el('colPicker2').style.display = (type === 'gradient') ? 'block' : 'none';
        el('pnlColors').style.display = (type === 'image') ? 'none' : 'block';
        el('pnlImage').style.display = (type === 'image') ? 'block' : 'none';
    }

    function addSymbol(sym) {
        state.text += sym;
        el('inpText').value = state.text;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function setAlignment(x, y) {
        state.alignX = x; // flex-start, center, flex-end
        state.alignY = y;
        updatePreview();
    }

    function setPresetImg(type) {
        const gifs = {
            fire: "https://i.giphy.com/media/3o7aCRZYNerX4ovPwQ/giphy.webp",
            water: "https://media.giphy.com/media/l0HlOHDx87V9M5zWg/giphy.gif",
            galaxy: "https://media.giphy.com/media/U3qYN8S0j3bpK/giphy.gif"
        };
        state.imgUrl = gifs[type] || "";
        el('inpImgUrl').value = state.imgUrl;
        state.fillType = 'image';
        el('selFillType').value = 'image';
        toggleColorInputs();
        updatePreview();
    }

    function updatePreview() {
        // Text Properties
        pvText.textContent = state.text;
        pvText.style.fontFamily = state.font;
        pvText.style.fontSize = state.size + "px";
        pvText.style.mixBlendMode = state.blend;
        
        // Stroke
        pvText.style.webkitTextStroke = state.strokeWidth === "0" ? "0 transparent" : `${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor}`;

        // Fill & Color
        pvText.style.backgroundImage = "none";
        pvText.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
        pvText.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
        pvText.style.color = state.color1;

        if (state.fillType === 'gradient') {
            pvText.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
            pvText.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            pvText.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
        } else if (state.fillType === 'image' && state.imgUrl) {
            pvText.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.imgUrl}')`;
            pvText.style.backgroundSize = "cover";
            pvText.style.backgroundPosition = "center";
            pvText.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
            pvText.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
            pvText.style.color = "transparent"; // Fallback
        }

        // Shadow / Glow
        pvText.style.filter = "none";
        pvText.style.textShadow = "none";

        if (state.shadow === 'drop') {
            pvText.style.textShadow = "4px 4px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.8)";
        } else if (state.shadow === 'neon') {
            // Neon effect depends on color
            const glowCol = state.fillType === 'solid' ? state.color1 : '#ffffff';
            pvText.style.textShadow = `0 0 10px ${glowCol}, 0 0 20px ${glowCol}, 0 0 40px ${glowCol}`;
        } else if (state.shadow === 'hard') {
            pvText.style.textShadow = `3px 3px 0 #000, -1px -1px 0 #fff`;
        }

        // FRAME STYLES
        pvBox.style.padding = `${state.padding}px`;
        pvBox.style.borderRadius = `${state.radius}px`;
        
        // Reset Frame
        pvBox.style.background = "transparent";
        pvBox.style.border = "none";
        pvBox.style.boxShadow = "none";
        pvBox.style.backdropFilter = "none";
        pvBox.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "none";

        if (state.frame === 'glass') {
            pvBox.style.background = "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)";
            pvBox.style.backdropFilter = "blur(10px)";
            pvBox.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "blur(10px)";
            pvBox.style.border = "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)";
            pvBox.style.boxShadow = "0 8px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.37)";
        } else if (state.frame === 'neon-box') {
            pvBox.style.border = `2px solid ${state.color1}`;
            pvBox.style.boxShadow = `0 0 15px ${state.color1}, inset 0 0 15px ${state.color1}`;
            pvBox.style.background = "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)";
        } else if (state.frame === 'solid-card') {
            pvBox.style.background = "#0f172a";
            pvBox.style.boxShadow = "0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)";
            pvBox.style.border = "1px solid #334155";
        } else if (state.frame === 'gradient-border') {
            pvBox.style.background = `linear-gradient(#0f172a, #0f172a) padding-box, linear-gradient(to right, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2}) border-box`;
            pvBox.style.border = "3px solid transparent";
        } else if (state.frame === 'cyber-bracket') {
            pvBox.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
            pvBox.style.borderLeft = `4px solid ${state.color1}`;
            pvBox.style.borderRight = `4px solid ${state.color1}`;
        }
        
        // Alignment of content inside the flex box is handled by the container if we wanted full positioning, 
        // but user asked for positioning.
        // Let's apply alignment to the BOX (captureArea) itself is tricky because captureArea is the frame.
        // Actually, alignment usually means aligning the text inside the frame.
        pvBox.style.display = "flex";
        pvBox.style.alignItems = state.alignY;
        pvBox.style.justifyContent = state.alignX;
        // Ensure text center works visually if multiple lines
        pvText.style.textAlign = (state.alignX === 'center') ? 'center' : (state.alignX === 'flex-end' ? 'right' : 'left');
    }

    // --- PRESETS ---
    function loadPreset(key) {
        if(key === 'cyber') {
            state.font = "'Orbitron', sans-serif";
            state.fillType = "gradient";
            state.color1 = "#00f3ff";
            state.color2 = "#bd00ff";
            state.shadow = "neon";
            state.frame = "neon-box";
        } else if (key === 'gold') {
            state.font = "'Montserrat', sans-serif";
            state.fillType = "gradient";
            state.color1 = "#ffd700";
            state.color2 = "#b8860b";
            state.shadow = "drop";
            state.frame = "solid-card";
            state.text = "GOLD MEMBER";
        } else if (key === 'horror') {
            state.font = "'Creepster', cursive";
            state.fillType = "solid";
            state.color1 = "#ef4444";
            state.shadow = "hard";
            state.frame = "none";
            state.strokeWidth = "1px";
            state.strokeColor = "#500000";
        } else if (key === 'pixel') {
            state.font = "'Press Start 2P', cursive";
            state.fillType = "solid";
            state.color1 = "#4ade80";
            state.frame = "solid-card";
            state.size = 30;
            state.shadow = "none";
        } else if (key === 'fire') {
            setPresetImg('fire');
            state.font = "'Black Ops One', cursive";
            state.frame = "none";
            state.shadow = "drop";
        } else if (key === 'glass') {
            state.fillType = "solid";
            state.color1 = "#ffffff";
            state.frame = "glass";
            state.shadow = "none";
        }

        // Sync UI
        el('inpText').value = state.text;
        el('selFont').value = state.font;
        el('selFillType').value = state.fillType;
        el('selFrame').value = state.frame;
        el('selShadow').value = state.shadow;
        el('rngSize').value = state.size;
        picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
        if(state.color2) picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;

        toggleColorInputs();
        updatePreview();
        switchTab('tab-edit'); // Switch back to see result
    }

    // --- EXPORT PNG ---
    function downloadPNG() {
        const capture = document.getElementById('captureArea');
        const btn = document.getElementById('btnDownload');
        
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Hazırlanıyor...';
        
        // html2canvas ayarları
        html2canvas(capture, {
            backgroundColor: null, // Transparan
            scale: 2, // Yüksek çözünürlük
            useCORS: true, // Cross-origin görseller için
            logging: false
        }).then(canvas => {
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.download = 'gs-rams-design.png';
            link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
            link.click();
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> İNDİRİLDİ';
            setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-camera"></i> PNG OLARAK İNDİR'; }, 2000);
        }).catch(err => {
            console.error(err);
            btn.innerHTML = 'Hata Oluştu';
            alert("Resim oluşturulamadı. Eğer dışarıdan GIF/Resim URL'si kullandıysanız, güvenlik nedeniyle engellenmiş olabilir.");
        });
    }

    function copyCSS() {
        // Basit bir CSS oluşturucu
        const cssCode = `
.design-box {
    display: inline-flex;
    padding: ${state.padding}px;
    border-radius: ${state.radius}px;
    ${state.frame === 'glass' ? 'background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);' : ''}
    ${state.frame === 'solid-card' ? 'background: #0f172a; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);' : ''}
    /* Diğer özellikler buraya eklenebilir */
}
.design-text {
    font-family: ${state.font};
    font-size: ${state.size}px;
    ${state.fillType === 'gradient' ? `background: linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2}); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;` : `color: ${state.color1};`}
}
        `;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(cssCode);
        alert("CSS Kodu Kopyalandı!");
    }

    function resetAll() {
        if(confirm("Tüm ayarları sıfırlamak istiyor musun?")) location.reload();
    }

    // INIT
    toggleColorInputs();
    updatePreview();

</script>
</body>
</html>
```

### V5 Özellikleri Nasıl Kullanılır?

1.  **PNG İndir (İndir Sekmesi):** Tasarımı bitirince "İndir" sekmesine gelip butona bas. Arka plan şeffaf bir şekilde iner. (Logo olarak kullanabilirsin).
2.  **GIF Ekleme (Editör -> Renk & GIF):** Dolgu tipini "Resim / GIF" seç. İnternetten bulduğun bir GIF linkini yapıştır (örneğin Giphy linkleri). Yazı o GIF ile boyanır.
3.  **Paketler (Paketler Sekmesi):** "Cyber", "Gold" veya "Horror" kartlarına tıkla. Saniyesinde bütün ayarlar o moda geçer.
4.  **Mobil:** Telefonundan açtığında ekran otomatik olarak bölünür. Üstte tasarımını görürsün, altta ayarları yaparsın.

Bundan sonraki aşamada istersen **çoklu katman (layers)**, **hazır logo ikonları** ekleyerek tam bir Photoshop-lite yapabiliriz! 🔥

## Prompt 11

### You
*2025-12-09 14:26:55 +03*

Yeni özelikler le devam edelim özgürce fonksiyon lari çoğalt ekle entegre et devam edelim geliştirmeye 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 14:26:55 +03*

Tam gaz devam o zaman, V6’ya geçiyoruz.  
Bu sefer daha da “oyuncak” ekleyelim:

- Yazıyı döndürme (rotate)
- Satır yüksekliği, hizalama (sol-orta-sağ)
- Kenarlara **parçacık / ışık efekti** (sahte glow noktalar)
- Arka plana **noise / grid pattern** presetleri
- **PNG kalite modu** (HD / Normal)
- **JSON olarak stil kaydet–yükle** (preset paylaşım için)
- “Sadece yazı, çerçevesiz” modu (logo gibi kullanmak için)
- Bir de küçük “yardım ipucu” alanı

Tamamını tek HTML içinde, direkt çalışır halde veriyorum. Bunu `index.html` olarak kaydet, tarayıcıda aç.

> Not: Önceki V5 sürümün yerine bunu koyabilirsin; tüm önceki özellikler duruyor + yenileri eklendi.

---

## Ultra Studio V6 – Gelişmiş Özellikler

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Ultra Studio V6 - GS Rams Nick Studio</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

  <!-- Renk tekeri -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>

  <!-- html2canvas (PNG export) -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>

  <!-- Google Fonts -->
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Poppins:wght@300;500;800&family=Rubik+Mono+One&family=Pacifico&family=Orbitron:wght@500;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <!-- Font Awesome -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

  <style>
    :root {
      --primary: #f59e0b;
      --secondary: #ec4899;
      --accent: #3b82f6;
      --dark: #020617;
      --panel: #0b1220;
      --text: #e2e8f0;
      --border: #1f2937;
      --radius: 14px;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #1f2937 0%, #020617 60%);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .app-container {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 430px 1fr;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
    }

    /* SOL PANEL */
    .sidebar {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, #111827 0%, #020617 65%);
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .sidebar-header {
      padding: 14px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    }

    .brand {
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .brand span {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary), var(--accent));
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    }

    .tag {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 2px 7px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.5);
      color: #93c5fd;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .scroll-area {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 14px;
    }

    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
      background: rgba(148,163,184,0.4);
      border-radius: 4px;
    }

    .control-group {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.9), rgba(15,23,42,0.5));
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.25);
      padding: 10px 11px;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(15,23,42,0.6);
    }

    .group-title {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: #9ca3af;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .group-title span.title-left {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .group-title i { color: var(--primary); }

    .row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 7px; }
    .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }

    label {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    input[type="text"], select, textarea {
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border-radius: 8px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      color: var(--text);
      padding: 7px 8px;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      transition: 0.15s;
    }

    input[type="text"]:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);
    }

    textarea {
      resize: vertical;
      min-height: 45px;
      max-height: 120px;
    }

    input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
      appearance: none;
      height: 4px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
    }
    input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      appearance: none;
      width: 14px; height: 14px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--secondary));
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 1px solid white;
      box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(96,165,250,0.7);
    }

    .btn {
      border: none;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 7px 10px;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 6px;
      transition: 0.18s;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #8b5cf6);
      color: white;
      width: 100%;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(37,99,235,0.35);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); transform: translateY(-1px); }

    .btn-ghost {
      background: transparent;
      color: #9ca3af;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover {
      color: #e5e7eb;
      background: rgba(31,41,55,0.7);
    }

    .btn-chaos {
      background: linear-gradient(60deg, #f97316, #ec4899, #22c55e, #3b82f6, #a855f7);
      background-size: 260% 260%;
      color: #020617;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      animation: rainbowMove 6s linear infinite;
      width: 100%;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(236,72,153,0.7);
    }
    .btn-chaos:hover {
      filter: brightness(1.1);
      transform: translateY(-1px) scale(1.01);
    }

    .symbol-bar {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
      gap: 4px;
      margin-top: 5px;
    }
    .sym-btn {
      border: none;
      background: rgba(31,41,55,0.85);
      color: #e5e7eb;
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 5px 0;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      transition: 0.15s;
    }
    .sym-btn:hover {
      background: var(--primary);
      color: #020617;
    }

    .mini-badge {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 1px 5px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.6);
      color: #fed7aa;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    #historyList {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 4px;
      max-height: 140px;
      overflow-y: auto;
      margin-top: 5px;
    }

    .history-item {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      padding: 5px 7px;
      border-radius: 7px;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 6px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .history-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--secondary);
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(236,72,153,0.15), rgba(15,23,42,0.95));
    }

    .history-main {
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .history-sub { opacity: 0.6; }

    /* SAĞ TARAF */
    .main-content {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .preview-wrapper {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .top-toolbar {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 6px;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 8px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(15,23,42,0.9), rgba(15,23,42,0.6));
      font-size: 0.75rem;
    }

    .preview-mode-toggle button {
      border: none;
      padding: 4px 8px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      margin-left: 4px;
      background: transparent;
      color: #9ca3af;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .preview-mode-toggle button.active {
      background: rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      color: white;
    }

    .preview-area {
      flex: 1;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 20px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #020617 0%, #020617 60%, #000000 100%);
    }

    /* Arka plan layer (GIF / resim) */
    .bg-image-layer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
      background-position: center;
      background-size: cover;
      opacity: 0.7;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* Pattern overlay */
    .bg-pattern-layer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      opacity: 0.45;
      mix-blend-mode: soft-light;
      pointer-events: none;
      background-size: 28px 28px;
    }

    .preview-frame {
      padding: 30px 40px;
      border-radius: 22px;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      min-width: 260px;
      text-align: center;
      transition: 0.25s ease;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    #livePreview {
      display: inline-block;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 3;
      transition: all 0.25s ease;
    }

    /* Parçacık / glow noktaları */
    .particle {
      position: absolute;
      width: 6px;
      height: 6px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, #ffffff 0, transparent 70%);
      opacity: 0.0;
      pointer-events: none;
      animation: particleFloat 5s linear infinite;
    }

    @keyframes particleFloat {
      0% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 0; }
      20% { opacity: 0.9; }
      80% { opacity: 0.9; }
      100% { transform: translateY(-20px); opacity: 0; }
    }

    .code-area {
      height: 250px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1.6fr;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #020617 0%, #020617 60%);
    }
    .code-box {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
    }
    .code-header {
      padding: 7px 10px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: #9ca3af;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
    }
    .code-content {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 8px 10px;
      font-family: "Courier New", monospace;
      font-size: 0.76rem;
      color: #a5b4fc;
      overflow-y: auto;
      white-space: pre-wrap;
    }

    .copy-icon {
      cursor: pointer;
      color: #9ca3af;
    }
    .copy-icon:hover {
      color: #e5e7eb;
    }

    .preset-bar {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 4px;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .preset-chip {
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
      padding: 3px 7px;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.7);
      color: #e5e7eb;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .preset-chip span.dot {
      width: 10px;
      height: 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      display: inline-block;
    }
    .preset-chip:hover {
      background: rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      border-color: rgba(129,140,248,0.9);
    }

    /* ANİMASYONLAR */
    @keyframes pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)} }
    @keyframes float { 0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)} }
    @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)} }
    @keyframes glitch {
      0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
      20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}
      40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}
      60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}
      80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}
      100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
    }
    @keyframes rainbowMove{
      0%{background-position:0% 50%}
      50%{background-position:100% 50%}
      100%{background-position:0% 50%}
    }
    @keyframes glowPulse {
      0%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
      50%{box-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(236,72,153,0.9);}
      100%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
    }

    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse 1.8s infinite; }
    .anim-float { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-shake { animation: shake 0.6s infinite; }
    .anim-glitch { animation: glitch 1.2s steps(2,end) infinite; }
    .anim-rainbow-text {
      background: linear-gradient(124deg,#ff2400,#e81d1d,#e8b71d,#e3e81d,#1de840,#1ddde8,#2b1de8,#dd00f3,#dd00f3);
      background-size: 200% 200%;
      animation: rainbowMove 4s linear infinite;
      -webkit-background-clip:text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width: 950px) {
      body {
        overflow: auto;
        height: auto;
      }
      .app-container {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto auto auto;
        height: auto;
      }
      .sidebar {
        max-height: none;
        order: 1;
      }
      .main-content {
        order: 2;
        min-height: 420px;
      }
      .preview-area {
        min-height: 320px;
      }
      .code-area {
        order: 3;
        height: 260px;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .code-box {
        border-right: none;
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 520px) {
      .symbol-bar { grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); }
      .preview-frame { padding: 20px; min-width: auto; }
      #livePreview { font-size: 34px !important; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app-container">

  <!-- SOL PANEL -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">
      <div class="brand">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved"></i>
        <span>Ultra Studio V6</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
        <span class="tag">Dev Mode</span>
        <button class="btn-ghost" style="border-radius:999px;padding:4px 7px;" title="Sıfırla" onclick="fullReset()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-right"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="scroll-area">
      <!-- METİN & SEMBOL -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-keyboard"></i> Metin & Sembol</span>
          <span class="mini-badge">GS Rams Studio</span>
        </div>

        <input type="text" id="inpNick" value="GS Rams" placeholder="Nick / Başlık / Yazı...">

        <div class="symbol-bar">
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♛')">♛</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚡')">⚡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☠')">☠</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('★')">★</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✦')">✦</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✧')">✧</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('❖')">❖</button>

          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✪')">✪</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚔')">⚔</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☾')">☾</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✞')">✞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('∞')">∞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♡')">♡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('︎ツ')">ツ</button>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="randomName()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Random Nick
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FONT, BOYUT, ANİMASYON -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i> Font & Hareket</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Font Ailesi</label>
            <select id="selFont">
              <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Modern (Montserrat)</option>
              <option value="'Poppins', sans-serif">Soft Modern (Poppins)</option>
              <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Tech (Rajdhani)</option>
              <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Kompakt (Oswald)</option>
              <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Başlık (Bebas)</option>
              <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Futuristic (Orbitron)</option>
              <option value="'Audiowide', cursive">Sci-Fi (Audiowide)</option>
              <option value="'Rubik Mono One', sans-serif">Block (Rubik Mono)</option>
              <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (8-bit)</option>
              <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Horror (Creepster)</option>
              <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Script (Pacifico)</option>
              <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Military (Black Ops)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Animasyon</label>
            <select id="selAnim">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="pulse">Nabız</option>
              <option value="float">Yüzen</option>
              <option value="shake">Titreme</option>
              <option value="glitch">Glitch</option>
              <option value="rainbow-text">RGB Yazı</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Boyut: <span id="lblSize">48px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="120" value="48">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Harf Aralığı: <span id="lblSpace">0px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSpace" min="-3" max="20" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Döndür (Rotate): <span id="lblRotate">0°</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRotate" min="-30" max="30" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Satır Yüksekliği</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngLineHeight" min="80" max="160" value="100">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Hizalama</label>
            <select id="selAlign">
              <option value="center">Ortala</option>
              <option value="left">Sola</option>
              <option value="right">Sağa</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Sadece Yazı Modu</label>
            <select id="selOnlyText">
              <option value="no">Normal (Kart + Yazı)</option>
              <option value="yes">Sadece Yazı (Logo)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- RENK / GRADYAN / DEKORASYON -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Renk & Dekorasyon</span>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Yazı Doldurma Modu</label>
            <select id="selFillMode">
              <option value="solid">Düz Renk</option>
              <option value="gradient">Gradyan</option>
              <option value="texture">Resim Doku</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Hazır Gradyanlar</label>
            <select id="selPresetGrad">
              <option value="">Seç (Opsiyonel)</option>
              <option value="sunset">Gün Batımı</option>
              <option value="neon">Neon Mavi/Pembe</option>
              <option value="fire">Alev</option>
              <option value="aqua">Aqua</option>
              <option value="gold">Altın</option>
              <option value="ghost">Hayalet</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Color Pickers -->
        <div id="colorControls">
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Ana Renk</label>
              <div id="picker1"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="col" id="colPicker2" style="display:none;">
              <label>2. Renk</label>
              <div id="picker2"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Texture Controls -->
        <div id="textureControls" style="display:none;margin-top:4px;">
          <label>Doku (Resim / GIF URL)</label>
          <input type="text" id="inpTexture" placeholder="https://.../texture.png">
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px;">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);" onclick="setTexturePreset('gold')">
              Altın Doku
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.6);" onclick="setTexturePreset('fire')">
              Alev Doku
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(129,140,248,0.7);" onclick="setTexturePreset('galaxy')">
              Uzay Doku
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Metin Dekorasyonu</label>
            <select id="selTextDeco">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="underline">Alt Çizgi</option>
              <option value="overline">Üst Çizgi</option>
              <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
              <option value="double">Double Çizgi</option>
              <option value="glow">Parlama Çizgi</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Kalınlık / Eğiklik</label>
            <select id="selWeightStyle">
              <option value="normal|normal">Normal</option>
              <option value="700|normal">Kalın</option>
              <option value="900|normal">Extra Kalın</option>
              <option value="500|italic">İtalik</option>
              <option value="700|italic">Kalın İtalik</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Renk preset butonları -->
        <label style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.7rem;">Renk Efekt Paketleri</label>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('fire')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff512f,#f09819)"></span> Fire
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('neon')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00f5ff,#ff00f5)"></span> Neon
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('gold')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f6e27a,#f2c94c)"></span> Gold
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('aqua')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1cd8d2,#93edc7)"></span> Aqua
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('ghost')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#e0eafc,#cfdef3)"></span> Ghost
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- STROKE & SHADOW & FRAME & PARTICLE -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Stroke, Shadow & Çerçeve</span>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke (Çerçeve Çizgi)</label>
            <select id="selStroke">
              <option value="0">Yok</option>
              <option value="1px">İnce</option>
              <option value="2px">Orta</option>
              <option value="3px">Kalın</option>
              <option value="4px">Çok Kalın</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpStrokeColor" value="#000000" style="height:32px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Gölge Stili</label>
            <select id="selShadow">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Yumuşak Siyah</option>
              <option value="hard">Sert Siyah</option>
              <option value="neon-main">Neon (Ana Renk)</option>
              <option value="neon-double">Neon Çift</option>
              <option value="white">Beyaz Glow</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Blur Arkası (Glass)</label>
            <select id="selBackdrop">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Soft Blur</option>
              <option value="strong">Güçlü Blur</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Çerçeve Stili</label>
            <select id="selFrameStyle">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft-card">Yumuşak Kart</option>
              <option value="neon-card">Neon Kart</option>
              <option value="gradient-border">Gradient Border</option>
              <option value="double-border">Çift Çerçeve</option>
              <option value="corner-cut">Köşe Kesik</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Köşe Yuvarlaklığı</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRadius" min="0" max="40" value="22">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Parçacık Efekti</label>
            <select id="selParticles">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="light">Az</option>
              <option value="medium">Orta</option>
              <option value="crazy">Çok</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Parçacık Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpParticleColor" value="#ffffff" style="height:32px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ARKA PLAN GIF / RESİM + PATTERN + PNG EXPORT -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> Arka Plan & PNG</span>
        </div>

        <label>Arka Plan GIF / Resim URL</label>
        <input type="text" id="inpBgImage" placeholder="https://.../arkaplan.gif">

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>BG Konum</label>
            <select id="selBgPos">
              <option value="center">Ortala</option>
              <option value="top">Yukarı</option>
              <option value="bottom">Aşağı</option>
              <option value="left">Sol</option>
              <option value="right">Sağ</option>
              <option value="custom">Custom (%)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>BG Boyut</label>
            <select id="selBgSize">
              <option value="cover">Cover</option>
              <option value="contain">Contain</option>
              <option value="auto">Auto</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" id="bgCustomPosRow" style="display:none;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>X (%)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBgX" min="0" max="100" value="50">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Y (%)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBgY" min="0" max="100" value="50">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Pattern Overlay</label>
            <select id="selPattern">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="grid">Grid Çizgili</option>
              <option value="dots">Nokta Pattern</option>
              <option value="noise">Noise (Gürültü)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>PNG Kalitesi</label>
            <select id="selPngScale">
              <option value="2">Normal (x2)</option>
              <option value="3" selected>Yüksek (x3)</option>
              <option value="4">Ultra (x4)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <div class="col" style="flex:1;">
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;">
              <input type="checkbox" id="chkTransparent" checked>
              <span>PNG Transparan Arka Plan</span>
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="exportPNG()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i> PNG Olarak İndir
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- YAZI EFEKT PAKETLERİ + HISTORY + JSON -->
      <div class="control-group" style="border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.7);">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-magic"></i> Yazı Efekt Paketleri</span>
        </div>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('horror')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-ghost"></i> Horror
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('cyber')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-microchip"></i> Cyber
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('minimal')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch"></i> Minimal
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('royal')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i> Royal
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('pixel')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-gamepad"></i> Pixel
          </button>
        </div>

        <button class="btn btn-chaos" style="margin-top:8px;" onclick="triggerChaos()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> FULL CHAOS GENERATOR
        </button>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="saveToHistory()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-bookmark"></i> Stili Kaydet
          </button>
        </div>

        <label style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Kaydedilen Stiller</label>
        <div id="historyList">
          <div style="padding:8px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">
            Henüz kayıt yok
          </div>
        </div>

        <hr style="border-color:rgba(55,65,81,0.9);margin:8px 0;">

        <label style="font-size:0.7rem;">JSON Dışa / İçe Aktar</label>
        <div class="row">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);" onclick="exportJSON()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> JSON Dışa Aktar
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);" onclick="importJSONPrompt()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-upload"></i> JSON İçe Aktar
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
  <main class="main-content">
    <div class="preview-wrapper">
      <div class="top-toolbar">
        <div>
          Önizleme Modu:
          <span class="preview-mode-toggle">
            <button id="btnDark" class="active" onclick="setPreviewTheme('dark')">Dark</button>
            <button id="btnLight" onclick="setPreviewTheme('light')">Light</button>
            <button id="btnNeon" onclick="setPreviewTheme('neon')">Neon</button>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div id="hintText">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i> İpucu: Chaos bas, beğendiğin çıktıyı history'ye kaydet.
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="preview-area" id="bgPreview">
        <div class="bg-image-layer" id="bgImageLayer"></div>
        <div class="bg-pattern-layer" id="bgPatternLayer"></div>

        <!-- PNG Export için sadece bu frame alınacak -->
        <div class="preview-frame" id="previewFrame">
          <span id="livePreview">GS Rams</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CODE -->
    <section class="code-area">
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>HTML</span>
          <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('html')"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeHtml"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>CSS (Yazı + Çerçeve + Animasyon)</span>
          <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('css')"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeCss"></div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>
</div>

<script>
  const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);

  let state = {
    nick: "GS Rams",
    font: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
    size: 48,
    space: 0,
    anim: "none",
    fillMode: "solid",
    color1: "#f59e0b",
    color2: "#ec4899",
    textureUrl: "",
    textDecoration: "none",
    fontWeight: "700",
    fontStyle: "normal",
    strokeWidth: "0",
    strokeColor: "#000000",
    shadow: "none",
    backdrop: "none",
    frameStyle: "soft-card",
    radius: 22,
    theme: "dark",
    bgImage: "",
    bgPosMode: "center",
    bgSize: "cover",
    bgX: 50,
    bgY: 50,
    rotate: 0,
    lineHeight: 1.0,
    align: "center",
    onlyText: "no",
    pattern: "none",
    particles: "none",
    particleColor: "#ffffff",
    pngScale: 3
  };

  let history = [];

  // iRO COLOR PICKERS
  const picker1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker1", {
    width: 100,
    color: state.color1,
    layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }]
  });
  const picker2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker2", {
    width: 100,
    color: state.color2,
    layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }]
  });

  picker1.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color1 = c.hexString; render(); });
  picker2.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color2 = c.hexString; render(); });

  // INPUT EVENTS
  el("inpNick").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.nick = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selFont").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.font = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selAnim").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.anim = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("rngSize").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.size = e.target.value;
    el("lblSize").innerText = e.target.value + "px";
    render();
  });

  el("rngSpace").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.space = e.target.value;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = e.target.value + "px";
    render();
  });

  el("rngRadius").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.radius = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("rngRotate").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.rotate = parseInt(e.target.value,10);
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";
    render();
  });

  el("rngLineHeight").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.lineHeight = e.target.value / 100;
    render();
  });

  el("selAlign").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.align = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selOnlyText").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.onlyText = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selFillMode").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.fillMode = e.target.value;
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  });

  el("selPresetGrad").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    const val = e.target.value;
    if (!val) return;
    applyGradientPreset(val);
  });

  el("inpTexture").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.textureUrl = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selTextDeco").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.textDecoration = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selWeightStyle").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    const [w, fs] = e.target.value.split("|");
    state.fontWeight = w;
    state.fontStyle = fs;
    render();
  });

  el("selStroke").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.strokeWidth = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("inpStrokeColor").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.strokeColor = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selShadow").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.shadow = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selBackdrop").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.backdrop = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selFrameStyle").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.frameStyle = e.target.value; render(); });

  // BG image controls
  el("inpBgImage").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.bgImage = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selBgPos").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.bgPosMode = e.target.value;
    el("bgCustomPosRow").style.display = e.target.value === "custom" ? "flex" : "none";
    render();
  });

  el("selBgSize").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.bgSize = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("rngBgX").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.bgX = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("rngBgY").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.bgY = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selPattern").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.pattern = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selParticles").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.particles = e.target.value; renderParticles(); });
  el("inpParticleColor").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.particleColor = e.target.value; renderParticlesColor(); });

  el("selPngScale").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.pngScale = parseInt(e.target.value,10); });

  // HELPER: Fill mode UI
  function toggleFillModeUI() {
    const colControls = el("colorControls");
    const texControls = el("textureControls");
    const picker2Col = el("colPicker2");

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      colControls.style.display = "block";
      picker2Col.style.display = "none";
      texControls.style.display = "none";
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      colControls.style.display = "block";
      picker2Col.style.display = "flex";
      texControls.style.display = "none";
    } else {
      colControls.style.display = "none";
      texControls.style.display = "block";
    }
  }

  function addSym(sym) {
    state.nick += sym;
    el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
    render();
  }

  const TEXTURE_PRESETS = {
    gold: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/gold-scales.png",
    fire: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-dark.png",
    galaxy: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/dark-matter.png"
  };

  function setTexturePreset(key) {
    const url = TEXTURE_PRESETS[key] || "";
    state.textureUrl = url;
    el("inpTexture").value = url;
    state.fillMode = "texture";
    el("selFillMode").value = "texture";
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  }

  // Gradient preset
  function applyGradientPreset(key) {
    state.fillMode = "gradient";
    el("selFillMode").value = "gradient";
    toggleFillModeUI();

    switch (key) {
      case "sunset":
        state.color1 = "#ff7e5f"; state.color2 = "#feb47b"; break;
      case "neon":
        state.color1 = "#00f5ff"; state.color2 = "#ff00f5"; break;
      case "fire":
        state.color1 = "#ff512f"; state.color2 = "#f09819"; break;
      case "aqua":
        state.color1 = "#1cd8d2"; state.color2 = "#93edc7"; break;
      case "gold":
        state.color1 = "#f6e27a"; state.color2 = "#f2c94c"; break;
      case "ghost":
        state.color1 = "#e0eafc"; state.color2 = "#cfdef3"; break;
    }
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;
    render();
  }

  // Color preset paketi (kısayol)
  function applyColorPreset(key) {
    applyGradientPreset(key);
  }

  function randomName() {
    const p1 = ["Dark","Ultra","Shadow","Neon","Ghost","Cyber","Royal","Lucky","Crazy","Epic","Omega","Nova"];
    const p2 = ["Rider","Slayer","Dragon","Wolf","Eagle","Storm","Viper","Cobra","Titan","Phoenix","Sniper","Hunter"];
    const name = p1[Math.floor(Math.random()*p1.length)] + " " + p2[Math.floor(Math.random()*p2.length)];
    state.nick = name;
    el("inpNick").value = name;
    render();
  }

  // Text Efekt Preset Paketleri
  function applyTextPreset(type) {
    if (type === "horror") {
      state.font = "'Creepster', cursive";
      state.fillMode = "gradient";
      state.color1 = "#ff0000";
      state.color2 = "#000000";
      state.shadow = "hard";
      state.textDecoration = "glow";
      state.anim = "shake";
      state.frameStyle = "corner-cut";
      state.size = 56;
      state.space = 1;
      state.rotate = -4;
      state.align = "center";
    } else if (type === "cyber") {
      state.font = "'Orbitron', sans-serif";
      state.fillMode = "gradient";
      state.color1 = "#00f5ff";
      state.color2 = "#ff00f5";
      state.shadow = "neon-double";
      state.textDecoration = "none";
      state.anim = "float";
      state.frameStyle = "neon-card";
      state.size = 52;
      state.space = 3;
      state.rotate = 0;
      state.align = "center";
    } else if (type === "minimal") {
      state.font = "'Poppins', sans-serif";
      state.fillMode = "solid";
      state.color1 = "#e5e7eb";
      state.shadow = "soft";
      state.textDecoration = "none";
      state.anim = "none";
      state.frameStyle = "soft-card";
      state.size = 42;
      state.space = 1;
      state.rotate = 0;
      state.align = "left";
    } else if (type === "royal") {
      state.font = "'Black Ops One', cursive";
      state.fillMode = "gradient";
      state.color1 = "#f6e27a";
      state.color2 = "#f59e0b";
      state.shadow = "neon-main";
      state.textDecoration = "underline";
      state.anim = "pulse";
      state.frameStyle = "double-border";
      state.size = 54;
      state.space = 2;
      state.rotate = 2;
      state.align = "center";
    } else if (type === "pixel") {
      state.font = "'Press Start 2P', cursive";
      state.fillMode = "solid";
      state.color1 = "#22c55e";
      state.shadow = "hard";
      state.textDecoration = "none";
      state.anim = "glitch";
      state.frameStyle = "soft-card";
      state.size = 32;
      state.space = 2;
      state.rotate = 0;
      state.align = "center";
    }

    // UI senkron
    el("selFont").value = state.font;
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";
    el("rngRotate").value = state.rotate;
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";
    el("selAlign").value = state.align;
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2 || state.color1;
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  }

  // CHAOS GENERATOR
  function triggerChaos() {
    const randHex = () => "#" + Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6,"0");

    state.color1 = randHex();
    state.color2 = randHex();
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;

    const fillModes = ["solid","gradient","gradient","texture"];
    state.fillMode = fillModes[Math.floor(Math.random()*fillModes.length)];
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    toggleFillModeUI();

    const gPresets = ["","sunset","neon","fire","aqua","gold","ghost"];
    const gp = gPresets[Math.floor(Math.random()*gPresets.length)];
    if (gp) {
      el("selPresetGrad").value = gp;
      applyGradientPreset(gp);
    }

    const fontOptions = el("selFont").options;
    const rndFontIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*fontOptions.length);
    state.font = fontOptions[rndFontIndex].value;
    el("selFont").value = state.font;

    const animOptions = el("selAnim").options;
    const rndAnimIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*animOptions.length);
    state.anim = animOptions[rndAnimIndex].value;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;

    const decos = ["none","underline","overline","line-through","double","glow"];
    state.textDecoration = decos[Math.floor(Math.random()*decos.length)];
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;

    const wsOptions = el("selWeightStyle").options;
    const rndWSIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*wsOptions.length);
    const wsVal = wsOptions[rndWSIndex].value.split("|");
    state.fontWeight = wsVal[0];
    state.fontStyle = wsVal[1];
    el("selWeightStyle").value = wsOptions[rndWSIndex].value;

    state.size = Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+30;
    state.space = Math.floor(Math.random()*12)-2;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";

    state.rotate = Math.floor(Math.random()*60)-30;
    el("rngRotate").value = state.rotate;
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";

    const aligns = ["left","center","right"];
    state.align = aligns[Math.floor(Math.random()*aligns.length)];
    el("selAlign").value = state.align;

    const strokeVals = ["0","1px","2px","3px","4px"];
    state.strokeWidth = strokeVals[Math.floor(Math.random()*strokeVals.length)];
    state.strokeColor = randHex();
    el("selStroke").value = state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value = state.strokeColor;

    const shadows = ["none","soft","hard","neon-main","neon-double","white"];
    state.shadow = shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;

    const backs = ["none","soft","strong"];
    state.backdrop = backs[Math.floor(Math.random()*backs.length)];
    el("selBackdrop").value = state.backdrop;

    const frames = ["none","soft-card","neon-card","gradient-border","double-border","corner-cut"];
    state.frameStyle = frames[Math.floor(Math.random()*frames.length)];
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;

    state.radius = Math.floor(Math.random()*40);
    el("rngRadius").value = state.radius;

    const patterns = ["none","grid","dots","noise"];
    state.pattern = patterns[Math.floor(Math.random()*patterns.length)];
    el("selPattern").value = state.pattern;

    const particleLevels = ["none","light","medium","crazy"];
    state.particles = particleLevels[Math.floor(Math.random()*particleLevels.length)];
    el("selParticles").value = state.particles;
    state.particleColor = randHex();
    el("inpParticleColor").value = state.particleColor;

    const sampleBG = [
      "",
      "https://i.gifer.com/7SCX.gif",
      "https://i.gifer.com/1amw.gif",
      "https://i.gifer.com/76vL.gif"
    ];
    state.bgImage = sampleBG[Math.floor(Math.random()*sampleBG.length)];
    el("inpBgImage").value = state.bgImage;

    randomName();
    render();
    renderParticles();
  }

  // History
  function saveToHistory() {
    const snap = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state));
    history.unshift(snap);
    if (history.length > 8) history.pop();
    updateHistoryUI();
  }

  function updateHistoryUI() {
    const list = el("historyList");
    list.innerHTML = "";
    if (!history.length) {
      list.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:8px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">Henüz kayıt yok</div>`;
      return;
    }
    history.forEach((h, idx) => {
      const div = document.createElement("div");
      div.className = "history-item";
      div.innerHTML = `
        <span class="history-main">${h.nick}</span>
        <span class="history-sub">${h.fillMode === "gradient" ? "Grad" : h.fillMode}</span>
      `;
      div.onclick = () => loadFromHistory(idx);
      list.appendChild(div);
    });
  }

  function loadFromHistory(i) {
    state = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(history[i]));
    syncUIFromState();
    render();
    renderParticles();
  }

  function syncUIFromState() {
    el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
    el("selFont").value = state.font;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";
    el("rngRadius").value = state.radius;
    el("rngRotate").value = state.rotate;
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";
    el("rngLineHeight").value = state.lineHeight * 100;
    el("selAlign").value = state.align;
    el("selOnlyText").value = state.onlyText;
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    el("inpTexture").value = state.textureUrl;
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;
    el("selWeightStyle").value = `${state.fontWeight}|${state.fontStyle}`;
    el("selStroke").value = state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value = state.strokeColor;
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;
    el("selBackdrop").value = state.backdrop;
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;
    el("inpBgImage").value = state.bgImage;
    el("selBgPos").value = state.bgPosMode;
    el("selBgSize").value = state.bgSize;
    el("rngBgX").value = state.bgX;
    el("rngBgY").value = state.bgY;
    el("selPattern").value = state.pattern;
    el("selParticles").value = state.particles;
    el("inpParticleColor").value = state.particleColor;
    el("selPngScale").value = state.pngScale;
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2 || state.color1;
    toggleFillModeUI();
  }

  // Preview tema
  function setPreviewTheme(mode) {
    state.theme = mode;
    el("btnDark").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnLight").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnNeon").classList.remove("active");
    if (mode === "dark") el("btnDark").classList.add("active");
    if (mode === "light") el("btnLight").classList.add("active");
    if (mode === "neon") el("btnNeon").classList.add("active");
    render();
  }

  // Pattern render
  function renderPattern() {
    const layer = el("bgPatternLayer");
    if (state.pattern === "none") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage = "none";
      return;
    }
    if (state.pattern === "grid") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage =
        "linear-gradient(rgba(148,163,184,0.22) 1px, transparent 1px)," +
        "linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(148,163,184,0.22) 1px, transparent 1px)";
    } else if (state.pattern === "dots") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage =
        "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(148,163,184,0.35) 1px, transparent 1px)";
      layer.style.backgroundSize = "14px 14px";
    } else if (state.pattern === "noise") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage = "url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-light.png')";
      layer.style.backgroundSize = "auto";
    }
  }

  // Parçacıklar
  function clearParticles() {
    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    const particles = frame.querySelectorAll(".particle");
    particles.forEach(p => p.remove());
  }

  function renderParticles() {
    clearParticles();
    if (state.particles === "none") return;

    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    let count = 0;
    if (state.particles === "light") count = 6;
    else if (state.particles === "medium") count = 12;
    else if (state.particles === "crazy") count = 24;

    const rect = frame.getBoundingClientRect();
    for (let i=0;i<count;i++) {
      const p = document.createElement("div");
      p.className = "particle";
      const size = 3 + Math.random()*6;
      p.style.width = size + "px";
      p.style.height = size + "px";
      p.style.background = `radial-gradient(circle, ${state.particleColor} 0, transparent 70%)`;
      p.style.left = (Math.random()*100) + "%";
      p.style.top = (Math.random()*100) + "%";
      p.style.animationDelay = (Math.random()*4) + "s";
      frame.appendChild(p);
    }
  }

  function renderParticlesColor() {
    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    const particles = frame.querySelectorAll(".particle");
    particles.forEach(p => {
      p.style.background = `radial-gradient(circle, ${state.particleColor} 0, transparent 70%)`;
    });
  }

  // Ana Render
  function render() {
    const pv = el("livePreview");
    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    const bg = el("bgPreview");
    const bgLayer = el("bgImageLayer");

    pv.textContent = state.nick || " ";

    pv.style.fontFamily = state.font;
    pv.style.fontSize = state.size + "px";
    pv.style.letterSpacing = state.space + "px";
    pv.style.fontWeight = state.fontWeight;
    pv.style.fontStyle = state.fontStyle;
    pv.style.lineHeight = state.lineHeight;
    pv.style.transform = `rotate(${state.rotate}deg)`;
    pv.style.textAlign = state.align;
    frame.style.textAlign = state.align;
    frame.style.justifyContent = state.align === "left" ? "flex-start" :
                                 state.align === "right" ? "flex-end" : "center";

    // Sadece yazı modu
    if (state.onlyText === "yes") {
      frame.style.background = "transparent";
      frame.style.border = "none";
      frame.style.boxShadow = "none";
      frame.style.backdropFilter = "none";
      frame.style.padding = "0";
    } else {
      frame.style.padding = "30px 40px";
    }

    // Text decoration
    pv.style.textDecoration = "none";
    if (["underline","overline","line-through"].includes(state.textDecoration)) {
      pv.style.textDecoration = state.textDecoration;
    } else if (state.textDecoration === "double") {
      pv.style.textDecoration = "underline overline";
    }

    // Stroke
    pv.style.webkitTextStroke = state.strokeWidth === "0"
      ? "0 transparent"
      : `${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor}`;

    // Fill
    pv.style.backgroundImage = "none";
    pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
    pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
    pv.style.color = state.color1;

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      pv.style.color = state.color1;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      pv.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
      pv.style.color = "transparent";
    } else if (state.fillMode === "texture" && state.textureUrl) {
      pv.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.textureUrl}')`;
      pv.style.backgroundSize = "cover";
      pv.style.backgroundPosition = "center";
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
      pv.style.color = "transparent";
    }

    // Shadow
    let shadowCSS = "none";
    if (state.shadow === "soft") {
      shadowCSS = "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
    } else if (state.shadow === "hard") {
      shadowCSS = "3px 3px 0 #000000";
    } else if (state.shadow === "neon-main") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
    } else if (state.shadow === "neon-double") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"}`;
    } else if (state.shadow === "white") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)`;
    }
    pv.style.textShadow = shadowCSS;

    if (state.textDecoration === "glow") {
      pv.style.textShadow = `0 0 6px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || state.color1}`;
    }

    // Animasyon
    pv.className = "";
    if (state.anim && state.anim !== "none") {
      if (state.anim === "rainbow-text") {
        pv.classList.add("anim-rainbow-text");
      } else {
        pv.classList.add("anim-" + state.anim);
      }
    }

    // Frame styles (yalnızca onlyText değilse)
    if (state.onlyText === "no") {
      frame.style.animation = "none";
      frame.style.borderRadius = state.radius + "px";
      frame.style.border = "none";
      frame.style.boxShadow = "none";
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.92)";
      frame.style.position = "relative";
      frame.style.clipPath = "none";

      if (state.frameStyle === "soft-card") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
        frame.style.boxShadow = "0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4)";
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "neon-card") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border = `1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow = `0 0 18px ${state.color1}, 0 0 34px ${state.color2 || state.color1}`;
        frame.style.animation = "glowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite";
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "gradient-border") {
        frame.style.background = `linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.96), rgba(15,23,42,0.9)), 
           linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"})`;
        frame.style.backgroundOrigin = "border-box";
        frame.style.backgroundClip = "padding-box, border-box";
        frame.style.border = "2px solid transparent";
        frame.style.boxShadow = "0 12px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "double-border") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
        frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7)";
        frame.style.boxShadow = `0 0 0 2px ${state.color1}, 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)`;
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "corner-cut") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
        frame.style.borderRadius = "0";
        frame.style.clipPath = "polygon(8% 0, 100% 0, 100% 80%, 92% 100%, 0 100%, 0 20%)";
        frame.style.border = `1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow = `0 18px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)`;
      }

      // Backdrop
      frame.style.backdropFilter = "none";
      frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "none";
      if (state.backdrop === "soft") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.75)";
        frame.style.backdropFilter = "blur(6px)";
        frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "blur(6px)";
      } else if (state.backdrop === "strong") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.6)";
        frame.style.backdropFilter = "blur(14px)";
        frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "blur(14px)";
      }
    }

    // BG Theme
    if (state.theme === "dark") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #1e293b 0%, #020617 60%)";
    } else if (state.theme === "light") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #e5e7eb 0%, #f3f4f6 40%, #e5e7eb 100%)";
      if (state.onlyText === "no") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(17,24,39,0.06)";
        frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5)";
      }
    } else if (state.theme === "neon") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #020617 0%, #111827 30%, #020617 80%)";
    }

    // BG image layer
    if (state.bgImage) {
      bgLayer.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.bgImage}')`;
      bgLayer.style.backgroundSize = state.bgSize;
      if (state.bgPosMode === "custom") {
        bgLayer.style.backgroundPosition = `${state.bgX}% ${state.bgY}%`;
      } else {
        bgLayer.style.backgroundPosition = state.bgPosMode;
      }
      bgLayer.style.opacity = 0.8;
    } else {
      bgLayer.style.backgroundImage = "none";
    }

    renderPattern();
    generateCode();
  }

  function generateCode() {
```
