```html
    const html = `<div class="gsrams-frame">\n  <span class="gsrams-text">${state.nick}</span>\n</div>`;
    el("codeHtml").textContent = html;

    let css = `.gsrams-frame {\n`;
    css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
    if (state.onlyText === "no") {
      css += `  padding: 30px 40px;\n`;
      css += `  border-radius: ${state.radius}px;\n`;
      if (state.frameStyle === "soft-card") {
        css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
        css += `  border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4);\n`;
        css += `  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "neon-card") {
        css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
        css += `  border: 1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
        css += `  box-shadow: 0 0 18px ${state.color1}, 0 0 34px ${state.color2 || state.color1};\n`;
        css += `  animation: gsrams-glowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;\n`;
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "gradient-border") {
        css += `  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.96), rgba(15,23,42,0.9)),\n`;
        css += `              linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"});\n`;
        css += `  background-origin: border-box;\n`;
        css += `  background-clip: padding-box, border-box;\n`;
        css += `  border: 2px solid transparent;\n`;
        css += `  box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "double-border") {
        css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.95);\n`;
        css += `  border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);\n`;
        css += `  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px ${state.color1}, 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "corner-cut") {
        css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
        css += `  border: 1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
        css += `  clip-path: polygon(8% 0, 100% 0, 100% 80%, 92% 100%, 0 100%, 0 20%);\n`;
        css += `  box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
      }

      if (state.backdrop === "soft") {
        css += `  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n`;
      } else if (state.backdrop === "strong") {
        css += `  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);\n`;
      }
    }
    css += `}\n\n`;

    css += `.gsrams-text {\n`;
    css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
    css += `  font-family: ${state.font};\n`;
    css += `  font-size: ${state.size}px;\n`;
    css += `  letter-spacing: ${state.space}px;\n`;
    css += `  font-weight: ${state.fontWeight};\n`;
    css += `  font-style: ${state.fontStyle};\n`;
    css += `  line-height: ${state.lineHeight};\n`;
    css += `  transform: rotate(${state.rotate}deg);\n`;

    if (state.strokeWidth !== "0") {
      css += `  -webkit-text-stroke: ${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor};\n`;
    }

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      css += `  color: ${state.color1};\n`;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      css += `  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2});\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
      css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "texture") {
      css += `  background-image: url('${state.textureUrl || "TEXTURE_URL_HERE"}');\n`;
      css += `  background-size: cover;\n`;
      css += `  background-position: center;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
      css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
    }

    if (["underline","overline","line-through"].includes(state.textDecoration)) {
      css += `  text-decoration: ${state.textDecoration};\n`;
    } else if (state.textDecoration === "double") {
      css += `  text-decoration: underline overline;\n`;
    }

    if (state.textDecoration === "glow") {
      css += `  text-shadow: 0 0 6px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || state.color1};\n`;
    } else if (state.shadow !== "none") {
      let shadowStr = "none";
      if (state.shadow === "soft") {
        shadowStr = "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
      } else if (state.shadow === "hard") {
        shadowStr = "3px 3px 0 #000000";
      } else if (state.shadow === "neon-main") {
        shadowStr = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
      } else if (state.shadow === "neon-double") {
        shadowStr = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"}`;
      } else if (state.shadow === "white") {
        shadowStr = "0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)";
      }
      css += `  text-shadow: ${shadowStr};\n`;
    }

    if (state.anim && state.anim !== "none") {
      let animName = "gsrams-" + state.anim.replace("-text", "");
      let dur = "2s";
      if (state.anim === "shake") dur = "0.6s";
      if (state.anim === "glitch") dur = "1.2s";
      if (state.anim === "float") dur = "3s";
      css += `  animation: ${animName} ${dur} infinite;\n`;
    }

    css += `}\n\n`;
    css += `/* Animasyon Keyframes */\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-float { 0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-shake { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-glitch { 0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-rainbow { 0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%} }\n`;
    css += `@keyframes gsrams-glowPulse { 0%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(236,72,153,0.9);}100%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);} }\n\n`;
    css += `.gsrams-text.rgb {\n`;
    css += `  background: linear-gradient(124deg,#ff2400,#e81d1d,#e8b71d,#e3e81d,#1de840,#1ddde8,#2b1de8,#dd00f3,#dd00f3);\n`;
    css += `  background-size: 200% 200%;\n`;
    css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
    css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
    css += `  animation: gsrams-rainbow 4s linear infinite;\n`;
    css += `}\n`;

    el("codeCss").textContent = css;
  }

  function copyCode(type) {
    const txt = type === "html" ? el("codeHtml").textContent : el("codeCss").textContent;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(() => {
      alert("Kod panoya kopyalandı!");
    }).catch(() => {
      alert("Kopyalama başarısız olabilir, elle seçip kopyalayabilirsin.");
    });
  }

  // PNG EXPORT
  function exportPNG() {
    const node = el("previewFrame");
    const transparent = el("chkTransparent").checked;
    const scale = state.pngScale || 3;

    const oldBg = node.style.background;
    const oldBoxShadow = node.style.boxShadow;
    const oldBorder = node.style.border;

    if (transparent) {
      node.style.background = "transparent";
      node.style.boxShadow = "none";
      node.style.border = "none";
    }

    html2canvas(node, {
      backgroundColor: null,
      scale: scale,
      useCORS: true
    }).then(canvas => {
      if (transparent) {
        node.style.background = oldBg;
        node.style.boxShadow = oldBoxShadow;
        node.style.border = oldBorder;
      }
      const link = document.createElement("a");
      link.download = (state.nick || "gs-rams") + ".png";
      link.href = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
      link.click();
    }).catch(() => {
      if (transparent) {
        node.style.background = oldBg;
        node.style.boxShadow = oldBoxShadow;
        node.style.border = oldBorder;
      }
      alert("PNG alınırken hata oluştu. Farklı bir tarayıcıda dene veya URL'lerde CORS engeli olabilir.");
    });
  }

  function fullReset() {
    location.reload();
  }

  // JSON Export / Import
  function exportJSON() {
    const data = JSON.stringify(state, null, 2);
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(data).then(() => {
      alert("Geçerli stil JSON olarak panoya kopyalandı!");
    }).catch(() => {
      alert("Kopyalama başarısız olabilir. Aşağıdaki JSON'u elle kopyala:\n\n" + data);
    });
  }

  function importJSONPrompt() {
    const input = prompt("Daha önce dışa aktardığın JSON verisini buraya yapıştır:");
    if (!input) return;
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(input);
      state = Object.assign(state, obj);
      syncUIFromState();
      render();
      renderParticles();
      alert("JSON başarıyla yüklendi.");
    } catch (e) {
      alert("JSON formatı hatalı. Lütfen tam ve doğru JSON yapıştır.");
    }
  }

  // İlk yükleme
  toggleFillModeUI();
  render();
  renderParticles();
</script>

</body>
</html>
```

---

Özetle V6’da eklediklerimiz:

- **Rotate & Line-height & Align**
  - Yazıyı -30° / +30° arası döndürebilirsin.
  - Satır yüksekliği (özellikle uzun nick / 2 satır için).
  - Sola / sağa / ortaya hizalama.

- **Sadece Yazı Modu**
  - “Logo” gibi kullanmak için kart çerçevesini kapatıp sadece yazıyı PNG alabiliyorsun.

- **Pattern Arka Plan**
  - Grid çizgili, nokta pattern, noise overlay.

- **Parçacık Efekti**
  - Çerçeve etrafında küçük ışık noktaları.
  - Yoğunluk: Az / Orta / Çılgın.
  - Renk seçilebilir.

- **PNG kalite ayarı**
  - x2, x3, x4 scale (daha net logo için).

- **JSON dışa–içe aktar**
  - Beğendiğin stili JSON olarak kopyala.
  - Sonra JSON’ı yapıştırıp aynı stili başka zaman geri yükle.

İstersen bir sonraki adımda:

- Çok satırlı yazı için ayrı satır yönetimi,
- Otomatik **avatar + nick** compositing (profil resmi + nick aynı PNG’de),
- Ya da direkt “Discord / YouTube banner ölçülerine göre hazır şablonlar” da ekleyebiliriz.

“Şu tür bir şablon istiyorum” dersen, V7’de onu da ekleriz.

Harika! **Ultra Studio V6 Ultimate** sürümüne geçiyoruz.

Sınırları kaldırıyoruz. Bu versiyonda **"Mühendislik" seviyesinde** yeni özellikler ekledim:

1.  **Çift Katman (Subtitle) Desteği:** Artık ana başlığın altına **Alt Başlık** (Slogan/Tagline) ekleyebilirsin.
2.  **3D Perspektif Modu:** Yazıyı ve kartı uzayda eğip bükebilirsin (X, Y ekseni + Derinlik).
3.  **Proje Sistemi (JSON):** Yaptığın tasarımı **.json dosyası olarak bilgisayarına kaydet** ve sonra "Yükle" diyerek kaldığın yerden devam et.
4.  **Canlı Parçacık (Particle) Efektleri:** Arka plana **Matrix kodları, kar yağışı veya ateş kıvılcımları** ekleyen canvas sistemi.
5.  **Daha Gelişmiş Mobil UI:** Sol menü artık çok uzun olduğu için sekmeli (tab) yapıya geçti.

Bu kod yine **Tek HTML** dosyasıdır. Kaydet ve çalıştır.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>GS Rams Ultra Studio V6 - 3D & Layers</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

  <!-- iro.js (Renk Tekeri) -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
  <!-- html2canvas (PNG Export) -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>

  <!-- Google Fonts (Genişletilmiş) -->
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Poppins:wght@300;500;800&family=Rubik+Mono+One&family=Pacifico&family=Orbitron:wght@500;800&family=Permanent+Marker&family=Kaushan+Script&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  
  <!-- Font Awesome -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

  <style>
    :root {
      --primary: #6366f1;
      --secondary: #ec4899;
      --accent: #10b981;
      --dark: #0f172a;
      --panel: #1e293b;
      --text: #f1f5f9;
      --border: #334155;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: #020617;
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* LAYOUT */
    .app-container {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 400px 1fr;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
    }

    /* SIDEBAR */
    .sidebar {
      background: var(--panel);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      z-index: 10;
    }

    .sidebar-header {
      padding: 12px 16px;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.6);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .brand {
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6366f1, #ec4899);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }

    /* TABS SYSTEM */
    .tabs-nav {
      display: flex;
      background: #0f172a;
    }
    .tab-btn {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 12px 0;
      background: transparent;
      border: none;
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
      color: #64748b;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: 0.2s;
    }
    .tab-btn:hover { color: #cbd5e1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); }
    .tab-btn.active {
      color: var(--primary);
      border-bottom-color: var(--primary);
      background: rgba(99,102,241,0.08);
    }

    .tab-content {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 14px;
      display: none; /* JS ile açılacak */
    }
    .tab-content.active { display: block; }

    /* CONTROLS */
    .control-group {
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.4);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .group-label {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #94a3b8;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      display: block;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }

    label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #cbd5e1; }
    input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select {
      background: #020617;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: white;
      padding: 8px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      width: 100%;
    }
    input[type="range"] { width: 100%; cursor: pointer; }

    /* Button Styles */
    .btn {
      border: none;
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 8px 12px;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 6px;
      transition: 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
    .btn-primary:hover { background: #4f46e5; }
    .btn-accent { background: var(--accent); color: #020617; }
    .btn-danger { background: #ef4444; color: white; }
    .btn-ghost { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #cbd5e1; }
    
    .btn-chaos {
      width: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff0000, #ff7300, #fffb00, #48ff00, #00ffd5, #002bff, #7a00ff, #ff00c8, #ff0000);
      background-size: 400%;
      animation: glowing 20s linear infinite;
      color: #000;
      font-weight: 900;
      margin-top: 10px;
      padding: 10px;
    }
    @keyframes glowing { 0% { background-position: 0 0; } 50% { background-position: 400% 0; } 100% { background-position: 0 0; } }

    /* PREVIEW AREA */
    .main-content {
      position: relative;
      background: #000;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .preview-area {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      perspective: 1000px; /* 3D derinlik için kritik */
    }

    /* Arka plan katmanları */
    #bgImageLayer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center;
      z-index: 1;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    #canvasParticles {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 2;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* 3D Wrapper: Döndürme işlemi buna yapılacak */
    .card-3d-wrapper {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 10;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      transition: transform 0.1s linear; /* Smooth hareket */
    }

    /* Çerçeve ve İçerik */
    .preview-frame {
      position: relative;
      padding: 40px 60px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      text-align: center;
      /* Default değerler JS ile ezilecek */
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
      transform-style: preserve-3d; /* Çocuk elemanlar da 3d olsun */
    }

    .main-text {
      display: block;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      line-height: 1.1;
    }
    .sub-text {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 5px;
      font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      opacity: 0.9;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    /* TOOLBAR */
    .top-toolbar {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 50;
      padding: 10px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
    .project-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .app-container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto 1fr; }
      .sidebar { height: 45vh; order: 2; }
      .main-content { height: 55vh; order: 1; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app-container">
  <!-- SOL PANEL -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">
      <div class="brand"><i class="fa-solid fa-cube"></i> ULTRA V6</div>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="resetAll()" title="Sıfırla"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-right"></i></button>
    </div>

    <!-- TABS -->
    <nav class="tabs-nav">
      <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="openTab('tab1')">Yazı</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="openTab('tab2')">Stil & Renk</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="openTab('tab3')">3D & FX</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="openTab('tab4')">Çıktı</button>
    </nav>

    <!-- TAB 1: YAZI KATMANLARI -->
    <div id="tab1" class="tab-content active">
      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label">Ana Başlık</span>
        <input type="text" id="inpMain" value="GS Rams" placeholder="Ana Yazı...">
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Font</label>
            <select id="selFontMain">
              <!-- JS ile dolacak -->
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Boyut</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSizeMain" min="20" max="150" value="60">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label">Alt Başlık (Slogan)</span>
        <div class="row">
          <input type="checkbox" id="chkSub" checked onchange="toggleSub()">
          <input type="text" id="inpSub" value="DESIGN STUDIO" placeholder="Alt Başlık...">
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Font</label>
            <select id="selFontSub">
               <!-- JS ile dolacak -->
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Boyut</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSizeSub" min="10" max="60" value="18">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
           <div class="col"><label>Renk</label><input type="color" id="colSub" value="#cbd5e1" style="height:30px;padding:0;"></div>
           <div class="col"><label>Harf Aralığı</label><input type="range" id="rngSpaceSub" min="0" max="20" value="6"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="control-group">
        <button class="btn btn-chaos" onclick="randomize()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> CHAOS GENERATOR
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- TAB 2: STİL & RENK -->
    <div id="tab2" class="tab-content">
      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label">Ana Renk (Gradient)</span>
        <div id="colorPickerContainer"></div> <!-- iro.js -->
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
           <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1" onclick="setGradient('fire')">Fire</button>
           <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1" onclick="setGradient('neon')">Neon</button>
           <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1" onclick="setGradient('gold')">Gold</button>
           <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1" onclick="setGradient('ice')">Ice</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label">Çerçeve & Gölge</span>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
             <label>Çerçeve Tipi</label>
             <select id="selFrame">
               <option value="none">Yok</option>
               <option value="glass">Glassmorphism</option>
               <option value="neon">Neon Border</option>
               <option value="tech">Tech Corners</option>
               <option value="double">Double Line</option>
             </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Yuvarlaklık</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRadius" min="0" max="50" value="16">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
           <div class="col">
             <label>Gölge Efekti</label>
             <select id="selShadow">
               <option value="none">Yok</option>
               <option value="soft">Soft</option>
               <option value="hard">Hard (Retro)</option>
               <option value="glow">Neon Glow</option>
             </select>
           </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- TAB 3: 3D & FX -->
    <div id="tab3" class="tab-content">
      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label"><i class="fa-solid fa-cubes"></i> 3D Transform</span>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Döndür X (Tilt)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRotateX" min="-45" max="45" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Döndür Y (Pan)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRotateY" min="-45" max="45" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
           <div class="col"><label>Perspektif (Derinlik)</label><input type="range" id="rngPersp" min="300" max="2000" value="800"></div>
           <div class="col"><label>Eğiklik (Skew)</label><input type="range" id="rngSkew" min="-20" max="20" value="0"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="width:100%" onclick="reset3D()">3D Sıfırla</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Animasyon & Parçacık</span>
        <div class="row">
           <div class="col">
             <label>Yazı Animasyonu</label>
             <select id="selAnim">
               <option value="none">Yok</option>
               <option value="pulse">Nabız</option>
               <option value="float">Yüzen</option>
               <option value="glitch">Glitch</option>
               <option value="shake">Titreme</option>
             </select>
           </div>
           <div class="col">
             <label>Arka Plan Parçacık</label>
             <select id="selParticles" onchange="initParticles()">
               <option value="none">Yok</option>
               <option value="snow">Kar / Toz</option>
               <option value="matrix">Matrix Kodları</option>
               <option value="sparks">Ateş Kıvılcım</option>
             </select>
           </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label">Arka Plan Resim</span>
        <input type="text" id="inpBgUrl" placeholder="Resim / GIF URL...">
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px;">
           <div class="col"><label>Opaklık</label><input type="range" id="rngBgOp" min="0" max="100" value="50"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- TAB 4: ÇIKTI & PROJE -->
    <div id="tab4" class="tab-content">
      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label">Projeyi Yönet</span>
        <div class="row">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1" onclick="saveProject()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i> JSON Kaydet
          </button>
          <label class="btn btn-accent" style="flex:1; cursor:pointer;">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-folder-open"></i> Yükle
            <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept=".json" style="display:none" onchange="loadProject(this)">
          </label>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:0.65rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:5px;">Projeyi bilgisayarına indirip daha sonra tekrar düzenleyebilirsin.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="control-group">
        <span class="group-label">Dışa Aktar (Export)</span>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <input type="checkbox" id="chkTransBg" checked> <span>Transparan Arka Plan (PNG)</span>
        </label>
        <button class="btn btn-success" style="width:100%; background:#10b981; color:#fff;" onclick="exportImage()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> PNG Olarak İndir
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
  <main class="main-content">
    <div class="top-toolbar">
      <div style="color:var(--text); font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700;">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i> Önizleme
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-area" id="previewArea">
      <!-- Arka planlar -->
      <div id="bgImageLayer"></div>
      <canvas id="canvasParticles"></canvas>

      <!-- 3D Wrapper -->
      <div class="card-3d-wrapper" id="cardWrapper">
        <div class="preview-frame" id="previewFrame">
          <span class="main-text" id="dispMain">GS Rams</span>
          <span class="sub-text" id="dispSub">DESIGN STUDIO</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </main>
</div>

<script>
  // FONT LİSTESİ
  const fontList = [
    { name: "Modern", val: "'Montserrat', sans-serif" },
    { name: "Tech", val: "'Rajdhani', sans-serif" },
    { name: "Impact", val: "'Oswald', sans-serif" },
    { name: "Title", val: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif" },
    { name: "Horror", val: "'Creepster', cursive" },
    { name: "Pixel", val: "'Press Start 2P', cursive" },
    { name: "Sci-Fi", val: "'Audiowide', cursive" },
    { name: "Military", val: "'Black Ops One', cursive" },
    { name: "Futuristic", val: "'Orbitron', sans-serif" },
    { name: "Graffiti", val: "'Permanent Marker', cursive" },
    { name: "Hand", val: "'Kaushan Script', cursive" }
  ];

  // STATE (Durum)
  let state = {
    mainText: "GS Rams",
    subText: "DESIGN STUDIO",
    subEnabled: true,
    fontMain: fontList[0].val,
    fontSub: fontList[1].val,
    sizeMain: 60,
    sizeSub: 18,
    spaceSub: 6,
    colorSub: "#cbd5e1",
    
    color1: "#6366f1",
    color2: "#ec4899",
    
    frameType: "glass",
    radius: 16,
    shadowType: "glow",
    
    rotateX: 0,
    rotateY: 0,
    perspective: 800,
    skew: 0,
    
    anim: "none",
    particleType: "none",
    bgUrl: "",
    bgOpacity: 50
  };

  // UI ELEMENTS
  const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
  
  // INIT
  window.onload = () => {
    initFonts();
    render();
    initParticles();
  };

  function initFonts() {
    const s1 = el("selFontMain");
    const s2 = el("selFontSub");
    fontList.forEach(f => {
      let opt = `<option value="${f.val}">${f.name}</option>`;
      s1.innerHTML += opt;
      s2.innerHTML += opt;
    });
    // Defaults
    s1.value = state.fontMain;
    s2.value = state.fontSub;
  }

  // TAB SYSTEM
  window.openTab = (tId) => {
    document.querySelectorAll(".tab-content").forEach(c => c.classList.remove("active"));
    document.querySelectorAll(".tab-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
    el(tId).classList.add("active");
    // Button active state logic needs event target, simplified here:
    const btns = document.querySelectorAll(".tab-btn");
    if(tId=='tab1') btns[0].classList.add("active");
    if(tId=='tab2') btns[1].classList.add("active");
    if(tId=='tab3') btns[2].classList.add("active");
    if(tId=='tab4') btns[3].classList.add("active");
  };

  // COLOR PICKER
  const colorPicker = new iro.ColorPicker("#colorPickerContainer", {
    width: 140,
    layout: [
      { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'hue' } },
      { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'saturation' } }
    ]
  });
  // Sadece hue değişince color1 ve color2'yi hafif kaydırarak güncelle
  colorPicker.on("color:change", (c) => {
    const hsl = c.hsl;
    state.color1 = `hsl(${hsl.h}, ${hsl.s}%, 60%)`;
    state.color2 = `hsl(${(hsl.h + 40) % 360}, ${hsl.s}%, 50%)`; 
    render();
  });

  // INPUT LISTENERS
  const bind = (id, key, type="val") => {
    el(id).addEventListener(type === "val" ? "input" : "change", (e) => {
      state[key] = type==="check" ? e.target.checked : e.target.value;
      render();
    });
  };

  bind("inpMain", "mainText");
  bind("selFontMain", "fontMain", "change");
  bind("rngSizeMain", "sizeMain");
  
  bind("inpSub", "subText");
  bind("selFontSub", "fontSub", "change");
  bind("rngSizeSub", "sizeSub");
  bind("rngSpaceSub", "spaceSub");
  bind("colSub", "colorSub");

  bind("selFrame", "frameType", "change");
  bind("rngRadius", "radius");
  bind("selShadow", "shadowType", "change");

  bind("rngRotateX", "rotateX");
  bind("rngRotateY", "rotateY");
  bind("rngPersp", "perspective");
  bind("rngSkew", "skew");

  bind("selAnim", "anim", "change");
  bind("inpBgUrl", "bgUrl");
  bind("rngBgOp", "bgOpacity");

  // ÖZEL FONKSİYONLAR
  window.toggleSub = () => {
    state.subEnabled = el("chkSub").checked;
    render();
  };

  window.setGradient = (type) => {
    if(type === 'fire') { state.color1 = "#ef4444"; state.color2 = "#f59e0b"; }
    if(type === 'neon') { state.color1 = "#d946ef"; state.color2 = "#8b5cf6"; }
    if(type === 'gold') { state.color1 = "#eab308"; state.color2 = "#fde047"; }
    if(type === 'ice')  { state.color1 = "#06b6d4"; state.color2 = "#3b82f6"; }
    render();
  };

  window.reset3D = () => {
    state.rotateX = 0; state.rotateY = 0; state.skew = 0;
    el("rngRotateX").value = 0;
    el("rngRotateY").value = 0;
    el("rngSkew").value = 0;
    render();
  };

  // ANA RENDER FONKSİYONU
  function render() {
    const f = el("previewFrame");
    const wrapper = el("cardWrapper");
    const t1 = el("dispMain");
    const t2 = el("dispSub");
    const bgL = el("bgImageLayer");

    // Text Content
    t1.innerText = state.mainText;
    t2.innerText = state.subText;
    t2.style.display = state.subEnabled ? "block" : "none";

    // Typography
    t1.style.fontFamily = state.fontMain;
    t1.style.fontSize = state.sizeMain + "px";
    // Gradient Text for Main
    t1.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
    t1.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
    t1.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";

    t2.style.fontFamily = state.fontSub;
    t2.style.fontSize = state.sizeSub + "px";
    t2.style.letterSpacing = state.spaceSub + "px";
    t2.style.color = state.colorSub;
    t2.style.webkitTextFillColor = state.colorSub; // override gradient

    // Frame Style
    f.style.borderRadius = state.radius + "px";
    f.style.boxShadow = "none";
    f.style.border = "none";
    f.style.background = "transparent";
    f.style.backdropFilter = "none";
    f.style.clipPath = "none";

    if (state.frameType === "glass") {
      f.style.background = "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)";
      f.style.backdropFilter = "blur(10px)";
      f.style.border = "1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)";
    } else if (state.frameType === "neon") {
      f.style.background = "rgba(0,0,0,0.8)";
      f.style.border = `2px solid ${state.color1}`;
      f.style.boxShadow = `0 0 15px ${state.color1}`;
    } else if (state.frameType === "tech") {
      f.style.background = "#0f172a";
      f.style.clipPath = "polygon(10% 0, 100% 0, 100% 90%, 90% 100%, 0 100%, 0 10%)";
      f.style.borderLeft = `4px solid ${state.color2}`;
    } else if (state.frameType === "double") {
      f.style.border = "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)";
      f.style.boxShadow = `inset 0 0 0 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 2px ${state.color1}`;
      f.style.background = "rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
    }

    // Shadow
    if (state.shadowType === "soft") f.style.boxShadow = "0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
    if (state.shadowType === "hard") f.style.boxShadow = "6px 6px 0px #000";
    if (state.shadowType === "glow") {
        const exist = f.style.boxShadow;
        f.style.boxShadow = (exist && exist !== "none" ? exist + ", " : "") + `0 0 20px ${state.color1}80`;
    }

    // 3D Transforms
    el("previewArea").style.perspective = state.perspective + "px";
    wrapper.style.transform = `rotateX(${state.rotateX}deg) rotateY(${state.rotateY}deg) skew(${state.skew}deg)`;

    // Animation (Basit CSS class)
    f.className = "preview-frame"; // reset
    if (state.anim !== "none") f.classList.add("anim-" + state.anim);

    // BG Image
    if(state.bgUrl) {
        bgL.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.bgUrl}')`;
        bgL.style.opacity = state.bgOpacity / 100;
    } else {
        bgL.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
    }
  }

  window.randomize = () => {
    state.sizeMain = Math.floor(Math.random() * 60) + 40;
    state.rotateX = Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) - 20;
    state.rotateY = Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) - 20;
    state.fontMain = fontList[Math.floor(Math.random()*fontList.length)].val;
    const frames = ["glass","neon","tech","double"];
    state.frameType = frames[Math.floor(Math.random()*frames.length)];
    setGradient(['fire','neon','gold','ice'][Math.floor(Math.random()*4)]);
    
    // UI Update
    el("rngSizeMain").value = state.sizeMain;
    el("rngRotateX").value = state.rotateX;
    el("rngRotateY").value = state.rotateY;
    el("selFontMain").value = state.fontMain;
    el("selFrame").value = state.frameType;
    render();
  };

  // --- PARTICLE SYSTEM (CANVAS) ---
  let pInterval;
  window.initParticles = () => {
    const type = el("selParticles").value;
    state.particleType = type;
    const cvs = el("canvasParticles");
    const ctx = cvs.getContext("2d");
    const parent = el("previewArea");

    // Stop previous
    if(pInterval) clearInterval(pInterval);
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,cvs.width,cvs.height);

    if (type === "none") return;

    // Resize
    cvs.width = parent.clientWidth;
    cvs.height = parent.clientHeight;

    let particles = [];
    const count = 50;

    // Init items
    for(let i=0; i<count; i++) {
        particles.push({
            x: Math.random() * cvs.width,
            y: Math.random() * cvs.height,
            s: Math.random() * 3 + 1, // speed
            sz: Math.random() * 3, // size
            c: String.fromCharCode(0x30A0 + Math.random() * 96) // matrix char
        });
    }

    pInterval = setInterval(() => {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, cvs.width, cvs.height);
        
        particles.forEach(p => {
            if(type === "snow") {
                ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.6)";
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.sz, 0, Math.PI*2);
                ctx.fill();
                p.y += p.s;
                p.x += Math.sin(p.y/20) * 0.5;
            } 
            else if (type === "matrix") {
                ctx.fillStyle = "#0f0";
                ctx.font = "14px monospace";
                ctx.fillText(p.c, p.x, p.y);
                p.y += p.s * 3;
                if(Math.random()>0.95) p.c = String.fromCharCode(0x30A0 + Math.random() * 96);
            }
            else if (type === "sparks") {
                ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, ${Math.floor(Math.random()*100)}, 0, ${Math.random()})`;
                ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y, p.sz, p.sz*3);
                p.y -= p.s * 2; // Upwards
            }

            // Reset
            if(p.y > cvs.height && type !== "sparks") p.y = 0;
            if(p.y < 0 && type === "sparks") p.y = cvs.height;
        });
    }, 30);
  };

  // --- JSON PROJECT SYSTEM ---
  window.saveProject = () => {
    const dataStr = "data:text/json;charset=utf-8," + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(state));
    const dlAnchorElem = document.createElement('a');
    dlAnchorElem.setAttribute("href", dataStr);
    dlAnchorElem.setAttribute("download", (state.mainText || "ultra-project") + ".json");
    dlAnchorElem.click();
  };

  window.loadProject = (input) => {
    const file = input.files[0];
    if(!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = (e) => {
        try {
            const json = JSON.parse(e.target.result);
            state = json;
            // UI Update (manual update for all fields needed in real production, doing core ones here)
            el("inpMain").value = state.mainText;
            el("inpSub").value = state.subText;
            el("selFrame").value = state.frameType;
            el("selParticles").value = state.particleType;
            // Re-render
            render();
            initParticles();
            alert("Proje başarıyla yüklendi!");
        } catch(err) {
            alert("Dosya bozuk veya okunamadı.");
        }
    };
    reader.readAsText(file);
    input.value = ""; // reset input
  };

  // --- EXPORT PNG ---
  window.exportImage = () => {
    const node = el("previewArea");
    const isTransparent = el("chkTransBg").checked;
    
    // Geçici stil ayarları
    const oldBg = node.style.background;
    if(isTransparent) {
       node.style.background = "transparent"; 
       // Canvas particle'larını da dahil etmek için trick lazım ama basit modda 
       // html2canvas canvas'ı alır.
    }

    html2canvas(node, {
       backgroundColor: null,
       scale: 2 // Yüksek kalite
    }).then(canvas => {
       if(isTransparent) node.style.background = oldBg;
       
       const link = document.createElement("a");
       link.download = state.mainText + "_ULTRA.png";
       link.href = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
       link.click();
    });
  };
  
  window.resetAll = () => location.reload();

</script>

<!-- CSS ANIMATIONS -->
<style>
  .anim-pulse { animation: pulse 1.5s infinite; }
  .anim-float { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
  .anim-shake { animation: shake 0.5s infinite; }
  .anim-glitch { animation: glitch 1s steps(2, end) infinite; }

  @keyframes pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1)} 50%{transform:scale(1.05)} 100%{transform:scale(1)} }
  @keyframes float { 0%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px)} 100%{transform:translateY(0)} }
  @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)} 25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)} 75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)} }
  @keyframes glitch { 
    0%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 80% 0)} 
    20%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0)} 
    40%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 50% 0)} 
    60%{clip-path:inset(80% 0 5% 0)} 
    100%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 80% 0)} 
  }
</style>

</body>
</html>
```

### 🚀 Neler Yeni (V6 Özet):
1.  **Tab Menü Sistemi:** Sol taraftaki kalabalığı bitirdik. "Yazı", "Stil", "3D", "Çıktı" sekmeleri geldi.
2.  **Alt Başlık (Slogan):** Artık sadece "GS Rams" değil, altına "DESIGN STUDIO" gibi ikinci bir yazı yazıp ayrı font/boyut verebilirsin.
3.  **Gerçek 3D Kontrol:** X ve Y ekseninde döndürme (Perspective) özelliği ile yazıya "Star Wars" gibi derinlik verebilirsin.
4.  **Parçacık Sistemi (Particles):** "Matrix", "Kar Yağışı" veya "Kıvılcım" efektlerini tek tıkla arkaya atabilirsin (Canvas teknolojisi).
5.  **Proje Kaydet/Yükle:** JSON formatında tasarımını yedekle, yarın yükleyip devam et.
6.  **Chaos Generator:** Tek tuşla rastgele tasarım oluşturup ilham alabilirsin.

Keyfini çıkar, geliştirmeye devam etmek istersen buradayım!

## Prompt 12

### You
*2025-12-09 14:58:58 +03*

Geliştirmeye devam edelim özgürce yeni özelikler ekle fonksiyonlar ekle önerdiğin özellikler var sa ekle entegre et devam edelim 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 14:58:59 +03*

Tamam, bu artık “Ultra Studio” değil, “Bosch çamaşır makinesi paneli” seviyesine gidiyor.  
V7’yi yapalım: daha akıllı, daha oyunlu, daha otomatik.

Aşağıya **tam çalışan yeni sürüm (V7)**’yi tek HTML dosyası olarak bırakıyorum.  
Önce; eklediğim yeni şeyleri hızlıca özetleyeyim, sonra direkt kodu vereceğim.

---

## V7’de eklediklerim (yeni özellikler)

### 1. Hazır Canvas Modları (Preset Tuval Boyutu)
Üstte yeni bir menü:

- **Serbest** (şu anki gibi)
- **Avatar 512x512**
- **YouTube Banner 2560x1440**
- **Discord Banner 1920x480**
- **Mobil Header 1080x1920**

Seçince:
- Tuval oranı değişiyor  
- PNG export, bu boyuta göre alınıyor

### 2. Çok Satırlı Metin Desteği
- Metin girişinin altına **“Satıra böl”** butonu:
  - Boşluklara göre kelimeleri böler
  - 2–3 satıra dengeli dağıtır  
- Bu sayede uzun nick / sloganları daha güzel yerleşir.

### 3. Otomatik Kenar Boşluğu (Margin/Pad) Kontrolü
Yeni slider’lar:

- **Yatay İç Boşluk**
- **Dikey İç Boşluk**

Kartın içindeki yazıyı oynatmadan, iç boşlukları ayarlayabiliyorsun.

### 4. Konumlandırma (X / Y Ofset)
Yeni kontroller:

- **X Pozisyonu** (sol–sağ)
- **Y Pozisyonu** (yukarı–aşağı)

Özellikle banner modlarında, yazıyı “sol üste”, “sağ alta” almak için.

### 5. Kenar Glow Çizgileri (Border Glow)
- “Çerçeve Stili” kısmına ek efekt:
  - **Glow Border**: kartın kenarlarını neon ışık gibi parlatıyor.

### 6. Animasyon Hız Kontrolü
- Yeni seçenek:

  - **Animasyon Hızı**: Yavaş / Normal / Hızlı

V7, CSS’e `animation-duration` uyarlıyor.

### 7. Otomatik “Avatar + Nick” Modu (Mini Kompozit)
Yeni bir **Avatar Modu**:

- URL ile **avatar resmi** giriyorsun.
- Sağ panelde yazının soluna küçük dairesel avatar ekliyor.
- PNG export’ta avatar + nick birleşik çıkıyor.
- Ayarlar:
  - Avatar URL
  - Avatar boyutu slider
  - Kenarlık rengi & kalınlığı

### 8. Otomatik “Logo Yerleşimi” (Köşe Seçimi)
Avatar modundayken:

- **Logo Pozisyonu**: Sol-Orta, Sol-Alt, Sağ-Orta, Sağ-Alt
- Bu, avatar + yazı grubunun tuval içinde nereye oturacağını ayarlıyor.

### 9. “Minimal Kod” Modu
- Kod sekmesinde toggle:
  - **Detaylı CSS**
  - **Minimal CSS**
- Minimal modda:
  - Sadece en kritik CSS’leri veriyor
  - Daha rahat kopyalanabilir, kısa

### 10. “Random Theme Generator”
- Chaos’dan farklı, daha kontrollü:
  - Sadece arka plan / pattern / tema renklerini rastgele seçiyor
  - Yazı stilini çok dağıtmıyor
- “Random Theme” butonu eklendi.

---

## Ultra Studio V7 – Tümleşik Kod

Bunu `index.html` olarak kaydedip açman yeterli. V6’nın yerini alabilir; V6’daki her şey + bunlar var.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Ultra Studio V7 - GS Rams Nick Studio</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

  <!-- Renk tekeri -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>

  <!-- html2canvas (PNG export) -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>

  <!-- Google Fonts -->
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Poppins:wght@300;500;800&family=Rubik+Mono+One&family=Pacifico&family=Orbitron:wght@500;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <!-- Font Awesome -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

  <style>
    :root {
      --primary: #f59e0b;
      --secondary: #ec4899;
      --accent: #3b82f6;
      --dark: #020617;
      --panel: #0b1220;
      --text: #e2e8f0;
      --border: #1f2937;
      --radius: 14px;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #1f2937 0%, #020617 60%);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .app-container {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 430px 1fr;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
    }

    /* SOL PANEL */
    .sidebar {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, #111827 0%, #020617 65%);
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .sidebar-header {
      padding: 10px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    }

    .brand {
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .brand span {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary), var(--accent));
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    }

    .tag {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 2px 7px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.5);
      color: #93c5fd;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .scroll-area {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 12px;
    }

    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
      background: rgba(148,163,184,0.4);
      border-radius: 4px;
    }

    .control-group {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.9), rgba(15,23,42,0.5));
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.25);
      padding: 9px 10px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(15,23,42,0.6);
    }

    .group-title {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: #9ca3af;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .group-title span.title-left {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .group-title i { color: var(--primary); }

    .row { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }

    label {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    input[type="text"], select, textarea {
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border-radius: 8px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      color: var(--text);
      padding: 6px 7px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      transition: 0.15s;
    }

    input[type="text"]:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);
    }

    textarea {
      resize: vertical;
      min-height: 45px;
      max-height: 110px;
    }

    input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
      appearance: none;
      height: 4px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
    }
    input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      appearance: none;
      width: 14px; height: 14px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--secondary));
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 1px solid white;
      box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(96,165,250,0.7);
    }

    .btn {
      border: none;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 6px 9px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 6px;
      transition: 0.18s;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #8b5cf6);
      color: white;
      width: 100%;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(37,99,235,0.35);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); transform: translateY(-1px); }

    .btn-ghost {
      background: transparent;
      color: #9ca3af;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover {
      color: #e5e7eb;
      background: rgba(31,41,55,0.7);
    }

    .btn-chaos {
      background: linear-gradient(60deg, #f97316, #ec4899, #22c55e, #3b82f6, #a855f7);
      background-size: 260% 260%;
      color: #020617;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      animation: rainbowMove 6s linear infinite;
      width: 100%;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(236,72,153,0.7);
    }
    .btn-chaos:hover {
      filter: brightness(1.1);
      transform: translateY(-1px) scale(1.01);
    }

    .symbol-bar {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
      gap: 3px;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .sym-btn {
      border: none;
      background: rgba(31,41,55,0.85);
      color: #e5e7eb;
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 4px 0;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      transition: 0.15s;
    }
    .sym-btn:hover {
      background: var(--primary);
      color: #020617;
    }

    .mini-badge {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 1px 5px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.6);
      color: #fed7aa;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    #historyList {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 4px;
      max-height: 120px;
      overflow-y: auto;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .history-item {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      padding: 5px 7px;
      border-radius: 7px;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 6px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .history-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--secondary);
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(236,72,153,0.15), rgba(15,23,42,0.95));
    }

    .history-main {
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .history-sub { opacity: 0.6; }

    /* SAĞ TARAF */
    .main-content {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .preview-wrapper {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .top-toolbar {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 6px;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 6px 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(15,23,42,0.9), rgba(15,23,42,0.6));
      font-size: 0.72rem;
    }

    .preview-mode-toggle button {
      border: none;
      padding: 3px 7px;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      margin-left: 3px;
      background: transparent;
      color: #9ca3af;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .preview-mode-toggle button.active {
      background: rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      color: white;
    }

    .canvas-mode-toggle {
      display:flex;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      gap:4px;
      margin-top:3px;
    }
    .canvas-chip {
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
      padding:2px 6px;
      font-size:0.65rem;
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.7);
      color:#e5e7eb;
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .canvas-chip.active {
      background:rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      border-color:rgba(129,140,248,0.9);
    }

    .preview-area {
      flex: 1;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 16px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #020617 0%, #020617 60%, #000000 100%);
    }

    /* Canvas boyut kutusu */
    .canvas-box {
      position: relative;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
    }
    .canvas-bg {
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      border-radius:18px;
      border:1px dashed rgba(148,163,184,0.3);
      pointer-events:none;
    }

    /* Arka plan layer (GIF / resim) */
    .bg-image-layer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
      background-position: center;
      background-size: cover;
      opacity: 0.7;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* Pattern overlay */
    .bg-pattern-layer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      opacity: 0.45;
      mix-blend-mode: soft-light;
      pointer-events: none;
      background-size: 28px 28px;
    }

    .preview-frame {
      padding: 26px 34px;
      border-radius: 22px;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      min-width: 240px;
      text-align: center;
      transition: 0.25s ease;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    /* Avatar + Text container */
    .avatar-wrapper{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:10px;
    }
    .avatar-wrapper.avatar-left  { flex-direction:row; }
    .avatar-wrapper.avatar-right { flex-direction:row-reverse; }

    .avatar-img{
      border-radius:50%;
      object-fit:cover;
      flex-shrink:0;
    }

    #livePreview {
      display: inline-block;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 3;
      transition: all 0.25s ease;
    }

    /* Parçacık / glow noktaları */
    .particle {
      position: absolute;
      width: 6px;
      height: 6px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, #ffffff 0, transparent 70%);
      opacity: 0.0;
      pointer-events: none;
      animation: particleFloat 5s linear infinite;
    }

    @keyframes particleFloat {
      0% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 0; }
      20% { opacity: 0.9; }
      80% { opacity: 0.9; }
      100% { transform: translateY(-20px); opacity: 0; }
    }

    .code-area {
      height: 240px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1.6fr;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
      background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #020617 0%, #020617 60%);
    }
    .code-box {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
    }
    .code-header {
      padding: 6px 9px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: #9ca3af;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
    }
    .code-content {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 7px 9px;
      font-family: "Courier New", monospace;
      font-size: 0.74rem;
      color: #a5b4fc;
      overflow-y: auto;
      white-space: pre-wrap;
    }

    .copy-icon {
      cursor: pointer;
      color: #9ca3af;
    }
    .copy-icon:hover {
      color: #e5e7eb;
    }

    .preset-bar {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 4px;
      margin-top: 3px;
    }
    .preset-chip {
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
      padding: 2px 6px;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.7);
      color: #e5e7eb;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .preset-chip span.dot {
      width: 10px;
      height: 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      display: inline-block;
    }
    .preset-chip:hover {
      background: rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      border-color: rgba(129,140,248,0.9);
    }

    /* ANİMASYONLAR */
    @keyframes pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)} }
    @keyframes float { 0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)} }
    @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)} }
    @keyframes glitch {
      0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
      20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}
      40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}
      60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}
      80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}
      100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
    }
    @keyframes rainbowMove{
      0%{background-position:0% 50%}
      50%{background-position:100% 50%}
      100%{background-position:0% 50%}
    }
    @keyframes glowPulse {
      0%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
      50%{box-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(236,72,153,0.9);}
      100%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
    }

    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse var(--anim-speed,1.8s) infinite; }
    .anim-float { animation: float var(--anim-speed,3s) ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-shake { animation: shake var(--anim-speed,0.6s) infinite; }
    .anim-glitch { animation: glitch var(--anim-speed,1.2s) steps(2,end) infinite; }
    .anim-rainbow-text {
      background: linear-gradient(124deg,#ff2400,#e81d1d,#e8b71d,#e3e81d,#1de840,#1ddde8,#2b1de8,#dd00f3,#dd00f3);
      background-size: 200% 200%;
      animation: rainbowMove var(--anim-speed,4s) linear infinite;
      -webkit-background-clip:text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width: 950px) {
      body {
        overflow: auto;
        height: auto;
      }
      .app-container {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto auto auto;
        height: auto;
      }
      .sidebar {
        max-height: none;
        order: 1;
      }
      .main-content {
        order: 2;
        min-height: 420px;
      }
      .preview-area {
        min-height: 320px;
      }
      .code-area {
        order: 3;
        height: 260px;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .code-box {
        border-right: none;
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 520px) {
      .symbol-bar { grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); }
      .preview-frame { padding: 18px; min-width: auto; }
      #livePreview { font-size: 34px !important; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app-container">

  <!-- SOL PANEL -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">
      <div class="brand">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved"></i>
        <span>Ultra Studio V7</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
        <span class="tag">Pro Dev</span>
        <button class="btn-ghost" style="border-radius:999px;padding:4px 7px;" title="Sıfırla" onclick="fullReset()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-right"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="scroll-area">
      <!-- METİN & SEMBOL -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-keyboard"></i> Metin & Sembol</span>
          <span class="mini-badge">GS Rams Studio</span>
        </div>

        <textarea id="inpNick" placeholder="Nick / başlık / slogan...">GS Rams</textarea>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);" onclick="autoSplitLines()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-lines-leaning"></i> Satıra Böl
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="randomName()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Random Nick
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="symbol-bar">
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♛')">♛</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚡')">⚡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☠')">☠</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('★')">★</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✦')">✦</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✧')">✧</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('❖')">❖</button>

          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✪')">✪</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚔')">⚔</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☾')">☾</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✞')">✞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('∞')">∞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♡')">♡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('︎ツ')">ツ</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FONT, BOYUT, HAREKET, KONUM -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i> Font, Hareket & Konum</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Font Ailesi</label>
            <select id="selFont">
              <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Modern (Montserrat)</option>
              <option value="'Poppins', sans-serif">Soft Modern (Poppins)</option>
              <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Tech (Rajdhani)</option>
              <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Kompakt (Oswald)</option>
              <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Başlık (Bebas)</option>
              <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Futuristic (Orbitron)</option>
              <option value="'Audiowide', cursive">Sci-Fi (Audiowide)</option>
              <option value="'Rubik Mono One', sans-serif">Block (Rubik Mono)</option>
              <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (8-bit)</option>
              <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Horror (Creepster)</option>
              <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Script (Pacifico)</option>
              <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Military (Black Ops)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Animasyon</label>
            <select id="selAnim">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="pulse">Nabız</option>
              <option value="float">Yüzen</option>
              <option value="shake">Titreme</option>
              <option value="glitch">Glitch</option>
              <option value="rainbow-text">RGB Yazı</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Animasyon Hızı</label>
            <select id="selAnimSpeed">
              <option value="slow">Yavaş</option>
              <option value="normal" selected>Normal</option>
              <option value="fast">Hızlı</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Hizalama</label>
            <select id="selAlign">
              <option value="center">Ortala</option>
              <option value="left">Sola</option>
              <option value="right">Sağa</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Boyut: <span id="lblSize">48px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="120" value="48">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Harf Aralığı: <span id="lblSpace">0px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSpace" min="-3" max="20" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Döndür (Rotate): <span id="lblRotate">0°</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRotate" min="-30" max="30" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Satır Yüksekliği</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngLineHeight" min="80" max="160" value="110">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Yatay İç Boşluk</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngPadX" min="10" max="120" value="34">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Dikey İç Boşluk</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngPadY" min="10" max="80" value="26">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>X Pozisyonu</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngOffsetX" min="-50" max="50" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Y Pozisyonu</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngOffsetY" min="-50" max="50" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Sadece Yazı Modu</label>
            <select id="selOnlyText">
              <option value="no">Kart + Yazı</option>
              <option value="yes">Sadece Yazı (Logo)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Metin Dekorasyonu</label>
            <select id="selTextDeco">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="underline">Alt Çizgi</option>
              <option value="overline">Üst Çizgi</option>
              <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
              <option value="double">Double Çizgi</option>
              <option value="glow">Parlama Çizgi</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Kalınlık / Eğiklik</label>
            <select id="selWeightStyle">
              <option value="normal|normal">Normal</option>
              <option value="700|normal">Kalın</option>
              <option value="900|normal">Extra Kalın</option>
              <option value="500|italic">İtalik</option>
              <option value="700|italic">Kalın İtalik</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- RENK / GRADYAN / DEKORASYON -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Renk & Doku</span>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Yazı Doldurma Modu</label>
            <select id="selFillMode">
              <option value="solid">Düz Renk</option>
              <option value="gradient">Gradyan</option>
              <option value="texture">Resim Doku</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Hazır Gradyanlar</label>
            <select id="selPresetGrad">
              <option value="">Seç (Opsiyonel)</option>
              <option value="sunset">Gün Batımı</option>
              <option value="neon">Neon Mavi/Pembe</option>
              <option value="fire">Alev</option>
              <option value="aqua">Aqua</option>
              <option value="gold">Altın</option>
              <option value="ghost">Hayalet</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Color Pickers -->
        <div id="colorControls">
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Ana Renk</label>
              <div id="picker1"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="col" id="colPicker2" style="display:none;">
              <label>2. Renk</label>
              <div id="picker2"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Texture Controls -->
        <div id="textureControls" style="display:none;margin-top:4px;">
          <label>Doku (Resim / GIF URL)</label>
          <input type="text" id="inpTexture" placeholder="https://.../texture.png">
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);" onclick="setTexturePreset('gold')">
              Altın Doku
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.6);" onclick="setTexturePreset('fire')">
              Alev Doku
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(129,140,248,0.7);" onclick="setTexturePreset('galaxy')">
              Uzay Doku
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Renk preset butonları -->
        <label style="margin-top:4px;font-size:0.7rem;">Renk Efekt Paketleri</label>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('fire')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff512f,#f09819)"></span> Fire
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('neon')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00f5ff,#ff00f5)"></span> Neon
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('gold')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f6e27a,#f2c94c)"></span> Gold
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('aqua')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1cd8d2,#93edc7)"></span> Aqua
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('ghost')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#e0eafc,#cfdef3)"></span> Ghost
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- STROKE & SHADOW & FRAME & PARTICLE -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Stroke, Shadow & Çerçeve</span>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke (Çizgi)</label>
            <select id="selStroke">
              <option value="0">Yok</option>
              <option value="1px">İnce</option>
              <option value="2px">Orta</option>
              <option value="3px">Kalın</option>
              <option value="4px">Çok Kalın</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpStrokeColor" value="#000000" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Gölge Stili</label>
            <select id="selShadow">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Yumuşak Siyah</option>
              <option value="hard">Sert Siyah</option>
              <option value="neon-main">Neon (Ana Renk)</option>
              <option value="neon-double">Neon Çift</option>
              <option value="white">Beyaz Glow</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Blur Arkası (Glass)</label>
            <select id="selBackdrop">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Soft Blur</option>
              <option value="strong">Güçlü Blur</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Çerçeve Stili</label>
            <select id="selFrameStyle">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft-card">Yumuşak Kart</option>
              <option value="neon-card">Neon Kart</option>
              <option value="gradient-border">Gradient Border</option>
              <option value="double-border">Çift Çerçeve</option>
              <option value="corner-cut">Köşe Kesik</option>
              <option value="glow-border">Glow Border</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Köşe Yuvarlaklığı</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRadius" min="0" max="40" value="22">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Parçacık Efekti</label>
            <select id="selParticles">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="light">Az</option>
              <option value="medium">Orta</option>
              <option value="crazy">Çok</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Parçacık Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpParticleColor" value="#ffffff" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- AVATAR + LOGO MODU -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-astronaut"></i> Avatar & Logo Modu</span>
        </div>

        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Avatar Kullan</label>
            <select id="selAvatarMode">
              <option value="off">Kapalı</option>
              <option value="left">Sol</option>
              <option value="right">Sağ</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Avatar Boyut</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngAvatarSize" min="32" max="120" value="64">
          </div>
        </div>

        <label>Avatar URL</label>
        <input type="text" id="inpAvatarUrl" placeholder="https://.../avatar.png">

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Avatar Kenarlık</label>
            <select id="selAvatarBorderMode">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="solid">Düz</option>
              <option value="glow">Glow</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Kenarlık Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpAvatarBorderColor" value="#f97316" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Köşe Konumu</label>
            <select id="selLogoPos">
              <option value="center">Ortada</option>
              <option value="top-left">Sol-Üst</option>
              <option value="bottom-left">Sol-Alt</option>
              <option value="top-right">Sağ-Üst</option>
              <option value="bottom-right">Sağ-Alt</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ARKA PLAN GIF / RESİM + PATTERN + PNG EXPORT -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> Arka Plan & PNG</span>
        </div>

        <label>Arka Plan GIF / Resim URL</label>
        <input type="text" id="inpBgImage" placeholder="https://.../arkaplan.gif">

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>BG Konum</label>
            <select id="selBgPos">
              <option value="center">Ortala</option>
              <option value="top">Yukarı</option>
              <option value="bottom">Aşağı</option>
              <option value="left">Sol</option>
              <option value="right">Sağ</option>
              <option value="custom">Custom (%)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>BG Boyut</label>
            <select id="selBgSize">
              <option value="cover">Cover</option>
              <option value="contain">Contain</option>
              <option value="auto">Auto</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" id="bgCustomPosRow" style="display:none;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>X (%)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBgX" min="0" max="100" value="50">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Y (%)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBgY" min="0" max="100" value="50">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Pattern Overlay</label>
            <select id="selPattern">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="grid">Grid Çizgili</option>
              <option value="dots">Nokta Pattern</option>
              <option value="noise">Noise (Gürültü)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>PNG Kalitesi</label>
            <select id="selPngScale">
              <option value="2">Normal (x2)</option>
              <option value="3" selected>Yüksek (x3)</option>
              <option value="4">Ultra (x4)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col" style="flex:1;">
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;">
              <input type="checkbox" id="chkTransparent" checked>
              <span>PNG Transparan Arka Plan</span>
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="exportPNG()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i> PNG Olarak İndir
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- YAZI EFEKT PAKETLERİ + HISTORY + JSON + THEME RANDOM -->
      <div class="control-group" style="border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.7);">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span class="title-left"><i class="fa-solid fa-magic"></i> Preset & Kayıt & JSON</span>
        </div>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('horror')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-ghost"></i> Horror
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('cyber')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-microchip"></i> Cyber
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('minimal')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch"></i> Minimal
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('royal')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i> Royal
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('pixel')">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-gamepad"></i> Pixel
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="btn btn-chaos" style="flex:1;" onclick="triggerChaos()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> FULL CHAOS
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.7);" onclick="randomTheme()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-sparkles"></i> Random Theme
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="saveToHistory()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-bookmark"></i> Stili Kaydet
          </button>
        </div>

        <label style="margin-top:4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Kaydedilen Stiller</label>
        <div id="historyList">
          <div style="padding:6px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">
            Henüz kayıt yok
          </div>
        </div>
```
