```html
        <hr style="border-color:rgba(55,65,81,0.9);margin:6px 0;">

        <label style="font-size:0.7rem;">JSON Dışa / İçe Aktar</label>
        <div class="row">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);" onclick="exportJSON()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Dışa Aktar
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);" onclick="importJSONPrompt()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-upload"></i> İçe Aktar
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
  <main class="main-content">
    <div class="preview-wrapper">
      <div class="top-toolbar">
        <div>
          Önizleme Modu:
          <span class="preview-mode-toggle">
            <button id="btnDark" class="active" onclick="setPreviewTheme('dark')">Dark</button>
            <button id="btnLight" onclick="setPreviewTheme('light')">Light</button>
            <button id="btnNeon" onclick="setPreviewTheme('neon')">Neon</button>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;">
          <div>Canvas Modu:</div>
          <div class="canvas-mode-toggle">
            <span class="canvas-chip active" data-mode="free" onclick="setCanvasMode('free', this)">Serbest</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="avatar" onclick="setCanvasMode('avatar', this)">Avatar 512</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="yt" onclick="setCanvasMode('yt', this)">YouTube 2560x1440</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="disc" onclick="setCanvasMode('disc', this)">Discord 1920x480</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="mobile" onclick="setCanvasMode('mobile', this)">Mobil 1080x1920</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="preview-area" id="bgPreview">
        <div class="bg-image-layer" id="bgImageLayer"></div>
        <div class="bg-pattern-layer" id="bgPatternLayer"></div>

        <div class="canvas-box" id="canvasBox">
          <div class="canvas-bg" id="canvasBg"></div>

          <!-- PNG Export için sadece bu frame alınacak -->
          <div class="preview-frame" id="previewFrame">
            <div id="avatarContainer" class="avatar-wrapper avatar-left">
              <img id="avatarImg" class="avatar-img" src="" alt="" style="display:none;">
              <span id="livePreview">GS Rams</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CODE -->
    <section class="code-area">
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>HTML</span>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <span style="font-size:0.65rem;">
              <label style="cursor:pointer;">
                <input type="checkbox" id="chkMinimalCss">
                Minimal CSS
              </label>
            </span>
            <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('html')"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeHtml"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>CSS</span>
          <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('css')"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeCss"></div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>
</div>

<script>
  const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);

  let state = {
    nick: "GS Rams",
    font: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
    size: 48,
    space: 0,
    anim: "none",
    animSpeed: "normal",
    fillMode: "solid",
    color1: "#f59e0b",
    color2: "#ec4899",
    textureUrl: "",
    textDecoration: "none",
    fontWeight: "700",
    fontStyle: "normal",
    strokeWidth: "0",
    strokeColor: "#000000",
    shadow: "none",
    backdrop: "none",
    frameStyle: "soft-card",
    radius: 22,
    theme: "dark",
    bgImage: "",
    bgPosMode: "center",
    bgSize: "cover",
    bgX: 50,
    bgY: 50,
    rotate: 0,
    lineHeight: 1.1,
    align: "center",
    onlyText: "no",
    pattern: "none",
    particles: "none",
    particleColor: "#ffffff",
    padX: 34,
    padY: 26,
    offsetX: 0,
    offsetY: 0,
    pngScale: 3,
    canvasMode: "free",

    avatarMode: "off",
    avatarUrl: "",
    avatarSize: 64,
    avatarBorderMode: "none",
    avatarBorderColor: "#f97316",
    logoPos: "center"
  };

  let history = [];

  // iRO COLOR PICKERS
  const picker1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker1", {
    width: 90,
    color: state.color1,
    layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }]
  });
  const picker2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker2", {
    width: 90,
    color: state.color2,
    layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Wheel }]
  });

  picker1.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color1 = c.hexString; render(); });
  picker2.on("color:change", (c) => { state.color2 = c.hexString; render(); });

  // INPUT EVENTS
  el("inpNick").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.nick = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selFont").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.font = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selAnim").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.anim = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selAnimSpeed").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.animSpeed = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("rngSize").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.size = e.target.value;
    el("lblSize").innerText = e.target.value + "px";
    render();
  });

  el("rngSpace").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.space = e.target.value;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = e.target.value + "px";
    render();
  });

  el("rngRadius").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.radius = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("rngRotate").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.rotate = parseInt(e.target.value,10);
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";
    render();
  });

  el("rngLineHeight").addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    state.lineHeight = e.target.value / 100;
    render();
  });

  el("rngPadX").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.padX = parseInt(e.target.value,10); render(); });
  el("rngPadY").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.padY = parseInt(e.target.value,10); render(); });

  el("rngOffsetX").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.offsetX = parseInt(e.target.value,10); render(); });
  el("rngOffsetY").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.offsetY = parseInt(e.target.value,10); render(); });

  el("selAlign").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.align = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selOnlyText").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.onlyText = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selFillMode").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.fillMode = e.target.value;
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  });

  el("selPresetGrad").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    const val = e.target.value;
    if (!val) return;
    applyGradientPreset(val);
  });

  el("inpTexture").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.textureUrl = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selTextDeco").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.textDecoration = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selWeightStyle").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    const [w, fs] = e.target.value.split("|");
    state.fontWeight = w;
    state.fontStyle = fs;
    render();
  });

  el("selStroke").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.strokeWidth = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("inpStrokeColor").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.strokeColor = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selShadow").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.shadow = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selBackdrop").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.backdrop = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selFrameStyle").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.frameStyle = e.target.value; render(); });

  // Avatar controls
  el("selAvatarMode").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.avatarMode = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("rngAvatarSize").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.avatarSize = parseInt(e.target.value,10); render(); });
  el("inpAvatarUrl").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.avatarUrl = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selAvatarBorderMode").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.avatarBorderMode = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("inpAvatarBorderColor").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.avatarBorderColor = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("selLogoPos").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.logoPos = e.target.value; render(); });

  // BG image controls
  el("inpBgImage").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.bgImage = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selBgPos").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    state.bgPosMode = e.target.value;
    el("bgCustomPosRow").style.display = e.target.value === "custom" ? "flex" : "none";
    render();
  });

  el("selBgSize").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.bgSize = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("rngBgX").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.bgX = e.target.value; render(); });
  el("rngBgY").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.bgY = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selPattern").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.pattern = e.target.value; render(); });

  el("selParticles").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.particles = e.target.value; renderParticles(); });
  el("inpParticleColor").addEventListener("input", (e) => { state.particleColor = e.target.value; renderParticlesColor(); });

  el("selPngScale").addEventListener("change", (e) => { state.pngScale = parseInt(e.target.value,10); });

  el("chkMinimalCss").addEventListener("change", generateCode);

  // HELPER: Fill mode UI
  function toggleFillModeUI() {
    const colControls = el("colorControls");
    const texControls = el("textureControls");
    const picker2Col = el("colPicker2");

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      colControls.style.display = "block";
      picker2Col.style.display = "none";
      texControls.style.display = "none";
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      colControls.style.display = "block";
      picker2Col.style.display = "flex";
      texControls.style.display = "none";
    } else {
      colControls.style.display = "none";
      texControls.style.display = "block";
    }
  }

  function addSym(sym) {
    state.nick += sym;
    el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
    render();
  }

  function autoSplitLines() {
    const text = el("inpNick").value.trim();
    if (!text) return;
    const words = text.split(/\s+/);
    if (words.length <= 2) return;
    const mid = Math.ceil(words.length / 2);
    const part1 = words.slice(0, mid).join(" ");
    const part2 = words.slice(mid).join(" ");
    el("inpNick").value = part1 + "\n" + part2;
    state.nick = el("inpNick").value;
    render();
  }

  const TEXTURE_PRESETS = {
    gold: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/gold-scales.png",
    fire: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-dark.png",
    galaxy: "https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/dark-matter.png"
  };

  function setTexturePreset(key) {
    const url = TEXTURE_PRESETS[key] || "";
    state.textureUrl = url;
    el("inpTexture").value = url;
    state.fillMode = "texture";
    el("selFillMode").value = "texture";
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  }

  // Gradient preset
  function applyGradientPreset(key) {
    state.fillMode = "gradient";
    el("selFillMode").value = "gradient";
    toggleFillModeUI();

    switch (key) {
      case "sunset":
        state.color1 = "#ff7e5f"; state.color2 = "#feb47b"; break;
      case "neon":
        state.color1 = "#00f5ff"; state.color2 = "#ff00f5"; break;
      case "fire":
        state.color1 = "#ff512f"; state.color2 = "#f09819"; break;
      case "aqua":
        state.color1 = "#1cd8d2"; state.color2 = "#93edc7"; break;
      case "gold":
        state.color1 = "#f6e27a"; state.color2 = "#f2c94c"; break;
      case "ghost":
        state.color1 = "#e0eafc"; state.color2 = "#cfdef3"; break;
    }
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;
    render();
  }

  // Color preset paketi (kısayol)
  function applyColorPreset(key) {
    applyGradientPreset(key);
  }

  function randomName() {
    const p1 = ["Dark","Ultra","Shadow","Neon","Ghost","Cyber","Royal","Lucky","Crazy","Epic","Omega","Nova"];
    const p2 = ["Rider","Slayer","Dragon","Wolf","Eagle","Storm","Viper","Cobra","Titan","Phoenix","Sniper","Hunter"];
    const name = p1[Math.floor(Math.random()*p1.length)] + " " + p2[Math.floor(Math.random()*p2.length)];
    state.nick = name;
    el("inpNick").value = name;
    render();
  }

  // Text Efekt Preset Paketleri
  function applyTextPreset(type) {
    if (type === "horror") {
      state.font = "'Creepster', cursive";
      state.fillMode = "gradient";
      state.color1 = "#ff0000";
      state.color2 = "#000000";
      state.shadow = "hard";
      state.textDecoration = "glow";
      state.anim = "shake";
      state.animSpeed = "fast";
      state.frameStyle = "corner-cut";
      state.size = 56;
      state.space = 1;
      state.rotate = -4;
      state.align = "center";
    } else if (type === "cyber") {
      state.font = "'Orbitron', sans-serif";
      state.fillMode = "gradient";
      state.color1 = "#00f5ff";
      state.color2 = "#ff00f5";
      state.shadow = "neon-double";
      state.textDecoration = "none";
      state.anim = "float";
      state.animSpeed = "normal";
      state.frameStyle = "neon-card";
      state.size = 52;
      state.space = 3;
      state.rotate = 0;
      state.align = "center";
    } else if (type === "minimal") {
      state.font = "'Poppins', sans-serif";
      state.fillMode = "solid";
      state.color1 = "#e5e7eb";
      state.shadow = "soft";
      state.textDecoration = "none";
      state.anim = "none";
      state.frameStyle = "soft-card";
      state.size = 42;
      state.space = 1;
      state.rotate = 0;
      state.align = "left";
    } else if (type === "royal") {
      state.font = "'Black Ops One', cursive";
      state.fillMode = "gradient";
      state.color1 = "#f6e27a";
      state.color2 = "#f59e0b";
      state.shadow = "neon-main";
      state.textDecoration = "underline";
      state.anim = "pulse";
      state.animSpeed = "slow";
      state.frameStyle = "double-border";
      state.size = 54;
      state.space = 2;
      state.rotate = 2;
      state.align = "center";
    } else if (type === "pixel") {
      state.font = "'Press Start 2P', cursive";
      state.fillMode = "solid";
      state.color1 = "#22c55e";
      state.shadow = "hard";
      state.textDecoration = "none";
      state.anim = "glitch";
      state.animSpeed = "fast";
      state.frameStyle = "soft-card";
      state.size = 32;
      state.space = 2;
      state.rotate = 0;
      state.align = "center";
    }

    // UI senkron
    el("selFont").value = state.font;
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;
    el("selAnimSpeed").value = state.animSpeed;
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";
    el("rngRotate").value = state.rotate;
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";
    el("selAlign").value = state.align;
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2 || state.color1;
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  }

  // CHAOS GENERATOR
  function triggerChaos() {
    const randHex = () => "#" + Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6,"0");

    state.color1 = randHex();
    state.color2 = randHex();
    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2;

    const fillModes = ["solid","gradient","gradient","texture"];
    state.fillMode = fillModes[Math.floor(Math.random()*fillModes.length)];
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    toggleFillModeUI();

    const gPresets = ["","sunset","neon","fire","aqua","gold","ghost"];
    const gp = gPresets[Math.floor(Math.random()*gPresets.length)];
    if (gp) {
      el("selPresetGrad").value = gp;
      applyGradientPreset(gp);
    }

    const fontOptions = el("selFont").options;
    const rndFontIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*fontOptions.length);
    state.font = fontOptions[rndFontIndex].value;
    el("selFont").value = state.font;

    const animOptions = el("selAnim").options;
    const rndAnimIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*animOptions.length);
    state.anim = animOptions[rndAnimIndex].value;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;

    const speeds = ["slow","normal","fast"];
    state.animSpeed = speeds[Math.floor(Math.random()*speeds.length)];
    el("selAnimSpeed").value = state.animSpeed;

    const decos = ["none","underline","overline","line-through","double","glow"];
    state.textDecoration = decos[Math.floor(Math.random()*decos.length)];
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;

    const wsOptions = el("selWeightStyle").options;
    const rndWSIndex = Math.floor(Math.random()*wsOptions.length);
    const wsVal = wsOptions[rndWSIndex].value.split("|");
    state.fontWeight = wsVal[0];
    state.fontStyle = wsVal[1];
    el("selWeightStyle").value = wsOptions[rndWSIndex].value;

    state.size = Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+30;
    state.space = Math.floor(Math.random()*12)-2;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";

    state.rotate = Math.floor(Math.random()*60)-30;
    el("rngRotate").value = state.rotate;
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";

    const aligns = ["left","center","right"];
    state.align = aligns[Math.floor(Math.random()*aligns.length)];
    el("selAlign").value = state.align;

    const strokeVals = ["0","1px","2px","3px","4px"];
    state.strokeWidth = strokeVals[Math.floor(Math.random()*strokeVals.length)];
    state.strokeColor = randHex();
    el("selStroke").value = state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value = state.strokeColor;

    const shadows = ["none","soft","hard","neon-main","neon-double","white"];
    state.shadow = shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;

    const backs = ["none","soft","strong"];
    state.backdrop = backs[Math.floor(Math.random()*backs.length)];
    el("selBackdrop").value = state.backdrop;

    const frames = ["none","soft-card","neon-card","gradient-border","double-border","corner-cut","glow-border"];
    state.frameStyle = frames[Math.floor(Math.random()*frames.length)];
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;

    state.radius = Math.floor(Math.random()*40);
    el("rngRadius").value = state.radius;

    const patterns = ["none","grid","dots","noise"];
    state.pattern = patterns[Math.floor(Math.random()*patterns.length)];
    el("selPattern").value = state.pattern;

    const particleLevels = ["none","light","medium","crazy"];
    state.particles = particleLevels[Math.floor(Math.random()*particleLevels.length)];
    el("selParticles").value = state.particles;
    state.particleColor = randHex();
    el("inpParticleColor").value = state.particleColor;

    const sampleBG = [
      "",
      "https://i.gifer.com/7SCX.gif",
      "https://i.gifer.com/1amw.gif",
      "https://i.gifer.com/76vL.gif"
    ];
    state.bgImage = sampleBG[Math.floor(Math.random()*sampleBG.length)];
    el("inpBgImage").value = state.bgImage;

    randomName();
    render();
    renderParticles();
  }

  // Random Theme (sadece arka plan + pattern + tema)
  function randomTheme() {
    const themes = ["dark","light","neon"];
    state.theme = themes[Math.floor(Math.random()*themes.length)];
    setPreviewTheme(state.theme);

    const patterns = ["none","grid","dots","noise"];
    state.pattern = patterns[Math.floor(Math.random()*patterns.length)];
    el("selPattern").value = state.pattern;

    const brushes = ["sunset","neon","fire","aqua","gold","ghost"];
    const g = brushes[Math.floor(Math.random()*brushes.length)];
    applyGradientPreset(g);

    const sampleBG = [
      "",
      "https://i.gifer.com/7SCX.gif",
      "https://i.gifer.com/1amw.gif",
      "https://i.gifer.com/76vL.gif"
    ];
    state.bgImage = sampleBG[Math.floor(Math.random()*sampleBG.length)];
    el("inpBgImage").value = state.bgImage;

    render();
  }

  // History
  function saveToHistory() {
    const snap = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state));
    history.unshift(snap);
    if (history.length > 8) history.pop();
    updateHistoryUI();
  }

  function updateHistoryUI() {
    const list = el("historyList");
    list.innerHTML = "";
    if (!history.length) {
      list.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:6px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">Henüz kayıt yok</div>`;
      return;
    }
    history.forEach((h, idx) => {
      const div = document.createElement("div");
      div.className = "history-item";
      div.innerHTML = `
        <span class="history-main">${h.nick.replace(/\n/g," / ")}</span>
        <span class="history-sub">${h.fillMode === "gradient" ? "Grad" : h.fillMode}</span>
      `;
      div.onclick = () => loadFromHistory(idx);
      list.appendChild(div);
    });
  }

  function loadFromHistory(i) {
    state = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(history[i]));
    syncUIFromState();
    render();
    renderParticles();
  }

  function syncUIFromState() {
    el("inpNick").value = state.nick;
    el("selFont").value = state.font;
    el("selAnim").value = state.anim;
    el("selAnimSpeed").value = state.animSpeed;
    el("rngSize").value = state.size;
    el("lblSize").innerText = state.size + "px";
    el("rngSpace").value = state.space;
    el("lblSpace").innerText = state.space + "px";
    el("rngRadius").value = state.radius;
    el("rngRotate").value = state.rotate;
    el("lblRotate").innerText = state.rotate + "°";
    el("rngLineHeight").value = state.lineHeight * 100;
    el("selAlign").value = state.align;
    el("selOnlyText").value = state.onlyText;
    el("selFillMode").value = state.fillMode;
    el("inpTexture").value = state.textureUrl;
    el("selTextDeco").value = state.textDecoration;
    el("selWeightStyle").value = `${state.fontWeight}|${state.fontStyle}`;
    el("selStroke").value = state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value = state.strokeColor;
    el("selShadow").value = state.shadow;
    el("selBackdrop").value = state.backdrop;
    el("selFrameStyle").value = state.frameStyle;
    el("rngPadX").value = state.padX;
    el("rngPadY").value = state.padY;
    el("rngOffsetX").value = state.offsetX;
    el("rngOffsetY").value = state.offsetY;

    el("inpBgImage").value = state.bgImage;
    el("selBgPos").value = state.bgPosMode;
    el("selBgSize").value = state.bgSize;
    el("rngBgX").value = state.bgX;
    el("rngBgY").value = state.bgY;
    el("selPattern").value = state.pattern;
    el("selParticles").value = state.particles;
    el("inpParticleColor").value = state.particleColor;
    el("selPngScale").value = state.pngScale;

    el("selAvatarMode").value = state.avatarMode;
    el("rngAvatarSize").value = state.avatarSize;
    el("inpAvatarUrl").value = state.avatarUrl;
    el("selAvatarBorderMode").value = state.avatarBorderMode;
    el("inpAvatarBorderColor").value = state.avatarBorderColor;
    el("selLogoPos").value = state.logoPos;

    picker1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString = state.color2 || state.color1;
    toggleFillModeUI();
  }

  // Preview tema
  function setPreviewTheme(mode) {
    state.theme = mode;
    el("btnDark").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnLight").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnNeon").classList.remove("active");
    if (mode === "dark") el("btnDark").classList.add("active");
    if (mode === "light") el("btnLight").classList.add("active");
    if (mode === "neon") el("btnNeon").classList.add("active");
    render();
  }

  // Canvas modları
  function setCanvasMode(mode, chipEl) {
    state.canvasMode = mode;
    document.querySelectorAll(".canvas-chip").forEach(c => c.classList.remove("active"));
    if (chipEl) chipEl.classList.add("active");
    render();
  }

  // Pattern render
  function renderPattern() {
    const layer = el("bgPatternLayer");
    if (state.pattern === "none") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage = "none";
      return;
    }
    if (state.pattern === "grid") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage =
        "linear-gradient(rgba(148,163,184,0.22) 1px, transparent 1px)," +
        "linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(148,163,184,0.22) 1px, transparent 1px)";
      layer.style.backgroundSize = "28px 28px";
    } else if (state.pattern === "dots") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage =
        "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(148,163,184,0.35) 1px, transparent 1px)";
      layer.style.backgroundSize = "14px 14px";
    } else if (state.pattern === "noise") {
      layer.style.backgroundImage = "url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-light.png')";
      layer.style.backgroundSize = "auto";
    }
  }

  // Parçacıklar
  function clearParticles() {
    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    const particles = frame.querySelectorAll(".particle");
    particles.forEach(p => p.remove());
  }

  function renderParticles() {
    clearParticles();
    if (state.particles === "none") return;

    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    let count = 0;
    if (state.particles === "light") count = 6;
    else if (state.particles === "medium") count = 12;
    else if (state.particles === "crazy") count = 24;

    for (let i=0;i<count;i++) {
      const p = document.createElement("div");
      p.className = "particle";
      const size = 3 + Math.random()*6;
      p.style.width = size + "px";
      p.style.height = size + "px";
      p.style.background = `radial-gradient(circle, ${state.particleColor} 0, transparent 70%)`;
      p.style.left = (Math.random()*100) + "%";
      p.style.top = (Math.random()*100) + "%";
      p.style.animationDelay = (Math.random()*4) + "s";
      frame.appendChild(p);
    }
  }

  function renderParticlesColor() {
    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    const particles = frame.querySelectorAll(".particle");
    particles.forEach(p => {
      p.style.background = `radial-gradient(circle, ${state.particleColor} 0, transparent 70%)`;
    });
  }

  // Animasyon hızı CSS değişkeni
  function getAnimSpeedValue() {
    if (state.animSpeed === "slow") return "3s";
    if (state.animSpeed === "fast") return "1s";
    return "2s";
  }

  // Ana Render
  function render() {
    const pv = el("livePreview");
    const frame = el("previewFrame");
    const bg = el("bgPreview");
    const bgLayer = el("bgImageLayer");
    const avatarImg = el("avatarImg");
    const avatarContainer = el("avatarContainer");
    const canvasBox = el("canvasBox");
    const canvasBg = el("canvasBg");

    pv.textContent = state.nick || " ";

    // Canvas boyutu / oran
    canvasBox.style.width = "auto";
    canvasBox.style.height = "auto";
    canvasBox.style.maxWidth = "100%";
    canvasBox.style.maxHeight = "100%";

    if (state.canvasMode === "avatar") {
      canvasBox.style.width = "300px";
      canvasBox.style.height = "300px";
    } else if (state.canvasMode === "yt") {
      canvasBox.style.width = "90%";
      canvasBox.style.aspectRatio = "16 / 9";
    } else if (state.canvasMode === "disc") {
      canvasBox.style.width = "90%";
      canvasBox.style.aspectRatio = "4 / 1";
    } else if (state.canvasMode === "mobile") {
      canvasBox.style.height = "90%";
      canvasBox.style.aspectRatio = "9 / 16";
    } else {
      canvasBox.style.aspectRatio = "auto";
    }

    // Canvas border görünümü
    canvasBg.style.borderRadius = "18px";
    canvasBg.style.border = "1px dashed rgba(148,163,184,0.35)";

    pv.style.fontFamily = state.font;
    pv.style.fontSize = state.size + "px";
    pv.style.letterSpacing = state.space + "px";
    pv.style.fontWeight = state.fontWeight;
    pv.style.fontStyle = state.fontStyle;
    pv.style.lineHeight = state.lineHeight;
    pv.style.transform = `rotate(${state.rotate}deg)`;
    pv.style.textAlign = state.align;
    frame.style.textAlign = state.align;

    // Anim hızını CSS değişkenine yansıt
    pv.style.setProperty("--anim-speed", getAnimSpeedValue());

    // Ofset (konum)
    frame.style.transform = `translate(${state.offsetX}px, ${state.offsetY}px)`;

    // Hizalama
    if (state.align === "left") {
      frame.style.justifyContent = "flex-start";
    } else if (state.align === "right") {
      frame.style.justifyContent = "flex-end";
    } else {
      frame.style.justifyContent = "center";
    }

    // Sadece yazı modu
    if (state.onlyText === "yes") {
      frame.style.background = "transparent";
      frame.style.border = "none";
      frame.style.boxShadow = "none";
      frame.style.backdropFilter = "none";
      frame.style.padding = "0";
    } else {
      frame.style.padding = `${state.padY}px ${state.padX}px`;
    }

    // Text decoration
    pv.style.textDecoration = "none";
    if (["underline","overline","line-through"].includes(state.textDecoration)) {
      pv.style.textDecoration = state.textDecoration;
    } else if (state.textDecoration === "double") {
      pv.style.textDecoration = "underline overline";
    }

    // Stroke
    pv.style.webkitTextStroke = state.strokeWidth === "0"
      ? "0 transparent"
      : `${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor}`;

    // Fill
    pv.style.backgroundImage = "none";
    pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "initial";
    pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
    pv.style.color = state.color1;

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      pv.style.color = state.color1;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      pv.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
      pv.style.color = "transparent";
    } else if (state.fillMode === "texture" && state.textureUrl) {
      pv.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.textureUrl}')`;
      pv.style.backgroundSize = "cover";
      pv.style.backgroundPosition = "center";
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
      pv.style.color = "transparent";
    }

    // Shadow
    let shadowCSS = "none";
    if (state.shadow === "soft") {
      shadowCSS = "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
    } else if (state.shadow === "hard") {
      shadowCSS = "3px 3px 0 #000000";
    } else if (state.shadow === "neon-main") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
    } else if (state.shadow === "neon-double") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"}`;
    } else if (state.shadow === "white") {
      shadowCSS = `0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)`;
    }
    pv.style.textShadow = shadowCSS;

    if (state.textDecoration === "glow") {
      pv.style.textShadow = `0 0 6px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || state.color1}`;
    }

    // Animasyon
    pv.className = "";
    if (state.anim && state.anim !== "none") {
      if (state.anim === "rainbow-text") {
        pv.classList.add("anim-rainbow-text");
      } else {
        pv.classList.add("anim-" + state.anim);
      }
    }

    // Avatar modu
    avatarContainer.className = "avatar-wrapper " + (state.avatarMode === "right" ? "avatar-right" : "avatar-left");
    if (state.avatarMode === "off" || !state.avatarUrl) {
      avatarImg.style.display = "none";
    } else {
      avatarImg.style.display = "block";
      avatarImg.src = state.avatarUrl;
      avatarImg.style.width = state.avatarSize + "px";
      avatarImg.style.height = state.avatarSize + "px";
      avatarImg.style.border = "none";
      avatarImg.style.boxShadow = "none";

      if (state.avatarBorderMode === "solid") {
        avatarImg.style.border = `2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor}`;
      } else if (state.avatarBorderMode === "glow") {
        avatarImg.style.border = `2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor}`;
        avatarImg.style.boxShadow = `0 0 10px ${state.avatarBorderColor}`;
      }
    }

    // Frame styles (yalnızca onlyText değilse)
    if (state.onlyText === "no") {
      frame.style.animation = "none";
      frame.style.borderRadius = state.radius + "px";
      frame.style.border = "none";
      frame.style.boxShadow = "none";
      frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.92)";
      frame.style.position = "relative";
      frame.style.clipPath = "none";

      if (state.frameStyle === "soft-card") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
        frame.style.boxShadow = "0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4)";
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "neon-card") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border = `1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow = `0 0 18px ${state.color1}, 0 0 34px ${state.color2 || state.color1}`;
        frame.style.animation = "glowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite";
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "gradient-border") {
        frame.style.background = `linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.96), rgba(15,23,42,0.9)), 
           linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"})`;
        frame.style.backgroundOrigin = "border-box";
        frame.style.backgroundClip = "padding-box, border-box";
        frame.style.border = "2px solid transparent";
        frame.style.boxShadow = "0 12px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "double-border") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
        frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7)";
        frame.style.boxShadow = `0 0 0 2px ${state.color1}, 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)`;
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "corner-cut") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
        frame.style.borderRadius = "0";
        frame.style.clipPath = "polygon(8% 0, 100% 0, 100% 80%, 92% 100%, 0 100%, 0 20%)";
        frame.style.border = `1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow = `0 18px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)`;
      } else if (state.frameStyle === "glow-border") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border = `1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow = `0 0 15px ${state.color1}, 0 0 30px ${state.color2 || state.color1}`;
      }

      // Backdrop
      frame.style.backdropFilter = "none";
      frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "none";
      if (state.backdrop === "soft") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.75)";
        frame.style.backdropFilter = "blur(6px)";
        frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "blur(6px)";
      } else if (state.backdrop === "strong") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(15,23,42,0.6)";
        frame.style.backdropFilter = "blur(14px)";
        frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter = "blur(14px)";
      }
    }

    // Logo pozisyonu (canvas içinde)
    const boxRect = canvasBox.getBoundingClientRect();
    const frameStyle = frame.style;
    frameStyle.position = "relative";

    if (state.logoPos === "center") {
      frameStyle.alignSelf = "center";
      frameStyle.margin = "auto";
    } else {
      // display flex'te zaten ortalanıyor, offset ile oynayabiliriz.
      // Basit yaklaşım: sadece ofset sliderları kullan; ayrı konum için PNG boyutunu canvas'tan yöneteceğiz.
    }

    // BG Theme
    if (state.theme === "dark") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #1e293b 0%, #020617 60%)";
    } else if (state.theme === "light") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #e5e7eb 0%, #f3f4f6 40%, #e5e7eb 100%)";
      if (state.onlyText === "no") {
        frame.style.background = "rgba(17,24,39,0.06)";
        frame.style.border = "1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5)";
      }
    } else if (state.theme === "neon") {
      bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle at top, #020617 0%, #111827 30%, #020617 80%)";
    }

    // BG image layer
    if (state.bgImage) {
      bgLayer.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.bgImage}')`;
      bgLayer.style.backgroundSize = state.bgSize;
      if (state.bgPosMode === "custom") {
        bgLayer.style.backgroundPosition = `${state.bgX}% ${state.bgY}%`;
      } else {
        bgLayer.style.backgroundPosition = state.bgPosMode;
      }
      bgLayer.style.opacity = 0.8;
    } else {
      bgLayer.style.backgroundImage = "none";
    }

    renderPattern();
    generateCode();
  }

  function generateCode() {
    const minimal = el("chkMinimalCss").checked;

    const hasAvatar = state.avatarMode !== "off" && state.avatarUrl;

    let html;
    if (hasAvatar) {
      html = `<div class="gsrams-frame">
  <div class="gsrams-avatar-wrap ${state.avatarMode === "right" ? "avatar-right" : "avatar-left"}">
    <img class="gsrams-avatar" src="${state.avatarUrl}" alt="">
    <span class="gsrams-text">${state.nick.replace(/\n/g,"<br>")}</span>
  </div>
</div>`;
    } else {
      html = `<div class="gsrams-frame">
  <span class="gsrams-text">${state.nick.replace(/\n/g,"<br>")}</span>
</div>`;
    }
    el("codeHtml").textContent = html;

    // CSS
    let css = `.gsrams-frame {\n`;
    css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
    if (state.onlyText === "no") {
      css += `  padding: ${state.padY}px ${state.padX}px;\n`;
      css += `  border-radius: ${state.radius}px;\n`;
      if (!minimal) {
        if (state.frameStyle === "soft-card") {
          css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
          css += `  border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4);\n`;
          css += `  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
        } else if (state.frameStyle === "neon-card") {
          css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
          css += `  border: 1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
          css += `  box-shadow: 0 0 18px ${state.color1}, 0 0 34px ${state.color2 || state.color1};\n`;
        } else if (state.frameStyle === "gradient-border") {
          css += `  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.96), rgba(15,23,42,0.9)),\n`;
          css += `              linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"});\n`;
          css += `  background-origin: border-box;\n`;
          css += `  background-clip: padding-box, border-box;\n`;
          css += `  border: 2px solid transparent;\n`;
        } else if (state.frameStyle === "double-border") {
          css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.95);\n`;
          css += `  border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);\n`;
          css += `  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px ${state.color1};\n`;
        } else if (state.frameStyle === "corner-cut") {
          css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n`;
          css += `  border-radius: 0;\n`;
          css += `  clip-path: polygon(8% 0, 100% 0, 100% 80%, 92% 100%, 0 100%, 0 20%);\n`;
          css += `  border: 1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
        } else if (state.frameStyle === "glow-border") {
          css += `  background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
          css += `  border: 1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
          css += `  box-shadow: 0 0 15px ${state.color1}, 0 0 30px ${state.color2 || state.color1};\n`;
        }

        if (state.backdrop === "soft") {
          css += `  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n`;
        } else if (state.backdrop === "strong") {
          css += `  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);\n`;
        }
      }
    }
    if (!minimal) {
      css += `  transform: translate(${state.offsetX}px, ${state.offsetY}px);\n`;
    }
    css += `}\n\n`;

    if (hasAvatar) {
      css += `.gsrams-avatar-wrap {\n`;
      css += `  display:inline-flex;\n`;
      css += `  align-items:center;\n`;
      css += `  gap:10px;\n`;
      css += `}\n`;
      css += `.gsrams-avatar-wrap.avatar-right { flex-direction:row-reverse; }\n`;
      css += `.gsrams-avatar {\n`;
      css += `  width:${state.avatarSize}px;\n`;
      css += `  height:${state.avatarSize}px;\n`;
      css += `  border-radius:50%;\n`;
      css += `  object-fit:cover;\n`;
      if (!minimal) {
        if (state.avatarBorderMode === "solid") {
          css += `  border:2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor};\n`;
        } else if (state.avatarBorderMode === "glow") {
          css += `  border:2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor};\n`;
          css += `  box-shadow:0 0 10px ${state.avatarBorderColor};\n`;
        }
      }
      css += `}\n\n`;
    }

    css += `.gsrams-text {\n`;
    css += `  display: inline-block;\n`;
    css += `  font-family: ${state.font};\n`;
    css += `  font-size: ${state.size}px;\n`;
    css += `  letter-spacing: ${state.space}px;\n`;
    css += `  font-weight: ${state.fontWeight};\n`;
    css += `  font-style: ${state.fontStyle};\n`;
    css += `  line-height: ${state.lineHeight};\n`;
    css += `  transform: rotate(${state.rotate}deg);\n`;

    if (state.strokeWidth !== "0") {
      css += `  -webkit-text-stroke: ${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor};\n`;
    }

    if (state.fillMode === "solid") {
      css += `  color: ${state.color1};\n`;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "gradient") {
      css += `  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2});\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
      css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
    } else if (state.fillMode === "texture") {
      css += `  background-image: url('${state.textureUrl || "TEXTURE_URL_HERE"}');\n`;
      css += `  background-size: cover;\n`;
      css += `  background-position: center;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-background-clip: text;\n`;
      css += `  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n`;
      css += `  color: transparent;\n`;
    }

    if (["underline","overline","line-through"].includes(state.textDecoration)) {
      css += `  text-decoration: ${state.textDecoration};\n`;
    } else if (state.textDecoration === "double") {
      css += `  text-decoration: underline overline;\n`;
    }

    if (state.textDecoration === "glow") {
      css += `  text-shadow: 0 0 6px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || state.color1};\n`;
    } else if (state.shadow !== "none") {
      let shadowStr = "none";
      if (state.shadow === "soft") {
        shadowStr = "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
      } else if (state.shadow === "hard") {
        shadowStr = "3px 3px 0 #000000";
      } else if (state.shadow === "neon-main") {
        shadowStr = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
      } else if (state.shadow === "neon-double") {
        shadowStr = `0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2 || "#ffffff"}`;
      } else if (state.shadow === "white") {
        shadowStr = "0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)";
      }
      css += `  text-shadow: ${shadowStr};\n`;
    }

    if (state.anim && state.anim !== "none") {
      let animName = "gsrams-" + state.anim.replace("-text", "");
      let dur = "2s";
      if (state.animSpeed === "slow") dur = "3s";
      if (state.animSpeed === "fast") dur = "1s";
      css += `  animation: ${animName} ${dur} infinite;\n`;
    }

    css += `}\n\n`;

    if (!minimal) {
      css += `/* Animasyon Keyframes (gerekli olanları alabilirsin) */\n`;
      css += `@keyframes gsrams-pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)} }\n`;
      css += `@keyframes gsrams-float { 0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)} }\n`;
      css += `@keyframes gsrams-shake { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)} }\n`;
      css += `@keyframes gsrams-glitch { 0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);} }\n`;
      css += `@keyframes gsrams-rainbow { 0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%} }\n`;
    }

    el("codeCss").textContent = css;
  }

  function copyCode(type) {
    const txt = type === "html" ? el("codeHtml").textContent : el("codeCss").textContent;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(() => {
      alert("Kod panoya kopyalandı!");
    }).catch(() => {
      alert("Kopyalama başarısız olabilir, elle seçip kopyalayabilirsin.");
    });
  }

  // PNG EXPORT
  function exportPNG() {
    const node = el("canvasBox");
    const transparent = el("chkTransparent").checked;
    const scale = state.pngScale || 3;

    const oldBg = node.style.background;
    const oldBorder = el("canvasBg").style.border;

    if (transparent) {
      node.style.background = "transparent";
      el("canvasBg").style.border = "none";
    }

    html2canvas(node, {
      backgroundColor: null,
      scale: scale,
      useCORS: true
    }).then(canvas => {
      if (transparent) {
        node.style.background = oldBg;
        el("canvasBg").style.border = oldBorder;
      }
      const link = document.createElement("a");
      link.download = (state.nick.split("\n")[0] || "gs-rams") + ".png";
      link.href = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
      link.click();
    }).catch(() => {
      if (transparent) {
        node.style.background = oldBg;
        el("canvasBg").style.border = oldBorder;
      }
      alert("PNG alınırken hata oluştu. Farklı bir tarayıcıda dene veya URL'lerde CORS engeli olabilir.");
    });
  }

  function fullReset() {
    location.reload();
  }

  // JSON Export / Import
  function exportJSON() {
    const data = JSON.stringify(state, null, 2);
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(data).then(() => {
      alert("Geçerli stil JSON olarak panoya kopyalandı!");
    }).catch(() => {
      alert("Kopyalama başarısız olabilir. Aşağıdaki JSON'u elle kopyala:\n\n" + data);
    });
  }

  function importJSONPrompt() {
    const input = prompt("Daha önce dışa aktardığın JSON verisini buraya yapıştır:");
    if (!input) return;
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(input);
      state = Object.assign(state, obj);
      syncUIFromState();
      render();
      renderParticles();
      alert("JSON başarıyla yüklendi.");
    } catch (e) {
      alert("JSON formatı hatalı. Lütfen tam ve doğru JSON yapıştır.");
    }
  }

  // İlk yükleme
  toggleFillModeUI();
  render();
  renderParticles();
</script>

</body>
</html>
```

---

Eğer istersen bir sonraki adımda:

- Tam **katman sistemi** (metin 1, metin 2, ikon katmanı),
- Hazır **logo şablonları** (örneğin: e-spor logo template’leri),
- Veya doğrudan **projeyi kaydet–yükle (localStorage)** sistemi de ekleyebiliriz.

“Şu tip tasarıma özel preset istiyorum” dersen, V8’de direkt o tarza fokuslanırız.

### Gemini 3 Pro

The tool aligns with user requirements, adding avatar/subtext integration, uploads, and Aurora backgrounds. Harika! O zaman **V7 - "Pro Esports Edition"** moduna geçiyoruz.

Sadece bir yazı yazma aracı olmaktan çıkarıp, **tam teşekküllü bir Logo & Banner Tasarım Stüdyosu** haline getiriyorum. Artık sadece ismini değil, klan etiketini, sloganını ve hatta kendi logon/avatarını da yükleyip tasarıma dahil edebileceksin.

**V7 ile Gelen Yenilikler:**

1.  **Avatar / Logo Yükleme:** Bilgisayarından resim yükle veya URL yapıştır. Profil resmini isminin yanına veya üstüne koy.
2.  **Alt Metin (Slogan / Clan Tag):** Ana ismin altına daha küçük, farklı renkte bir yazı (Örn: "Professional Player" veya "EST 2024").
3.  **Layout (Düzen) Modları:**
    *   Yatay (Avatar Solda - Yazı Sağda)
    *   Dikey (Avatar Üstte - Yazı Altta)
    *   Sadece Yazı
4.  **Aurora (Mesh) Arka Planlar:** Hareketli, renkli, modern CSS gradyan arka planlar (resim aramaya son).
5.  **3D Tilt Efekti:** Mouse ile üzerine gelince kartın 3 boyutlu hareket etmesi (Jiroskop etkisi).
6.  **Dosya Yükleme Desteği:** Artık sadece URL değil, direkt bilgisayardan resim seçip arka plana veya avatara koyabilirsin.

İşte **Ultra Studio V7**:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Ultra Studio V7 - Pro Esports Edition</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

  <!-- Renk Tekeri -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
  <!-- PNG Export -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>
  <!-- 3D Tilt Efekti -->
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/vanilla-tilt/1.8.0/vanilla-tilt.min.js"></script>

  <!-- Fontlar -->
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Poppins:wght@300;500;800&family=Rubik+Mono+One&family=Pacifico&family=Orbitron:wght@500;800&family=Cinzel:wght@700&family=Permanent+Marker&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

  <style>
    :root {
      --primary: #8b5cf6;
      --secondary: #ec4899;
      --dark: #0f172a;
      --panel: #1e293b;
      --text: #f1f5f9;
      --border: #334155;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: #020617;
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* Sol Panel */
    .sidebar {
      width: 440px;
      background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      height: 100%;
      z-index: 10;
    }

    .header {
      padding: 15px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1e293b, #0f172a);
    }
    .brand { font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.1rem; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #fff; }
    .brand i { color: var(--secondary); margin-right: 8px; }

    .scroll-content {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 15px;
    }
    .scroll-content::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
    .scroll-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #475569; border-radius: 4px; }

    .group {
      background: #1e293b;
      border: 1px solid #334155;
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 15px;
      position: relative;
    }
    .group-head {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #94a3b8;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .group-head i { color: var(--primary); }

    .row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }

    label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #cbd5e1; }
    
    input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select, textarea {
      background: #0f172a;
      border: 1px solid #334155;
      color: #fff;
      padding: 8px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    input[type="text"]:focus { border-color: var(--primary); }
    
    input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
      height: 4px;
      background: #334155;
      border-radius: 4px;
      appearance: none;
    }
    input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      appearance: none;
      width: 14px; height: 14px;
      background: var(--secondary);
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    input[type="file"] {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: #94a3b8;
    }

    .btn {
      border: none;
      padding: 8px 12px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary)); color: #fff; width: 100%; }
    .btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .btn-outline { background: transparent; border: 1px solid #475569; color: #cbd5e1; width: 100%; }
    .btn-outline:hover { background: #334155; color: #fff; }
    
    .btn-chaos {
      background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff0000, #ff7300, #fffb00, #48ff00, #00ffd5, #002bff, #7a00ff, #ff00c8, #ff0000);
      background-size: 400%;
      color: #000;
      animation: glowing 20s linear infinite;
      width: 100%;
    }
    @keyframes glowing { 0% { background-position: 0 0; } 50% { background-position: 400% 0; } 100% { background-position: 0 0; } }

    .tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 10px; background: #0f172a; padding: 4px; border-radius: 8px; }
    .tab { flex: 1; padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-size: 0.7rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px; color: #64748b; }
    .tab.active { background: #334155; color: #fff; font-weight: bold; }

    /* Sağ Panel (Preview) */
    .main {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      position: relative;
    }

    .preview-container {
      flex: 1;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      /* Default dark BG */
      background: #020617; 
    }
    
    /* Aurora Backgrounds */
    .aurora-bg {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.6;
      background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #ee7752, #e73c7e, #23a6d5, #23d5ab);
      background-size: 400% 400%;
      animation: aurora 15s ease infinite;
      display: none;
    }
    @keyframes aurora { 0% {background-position: 0% 50%} 50% {background-position: 100% 50%} 100% {background-position: 0% 50%} }

    .custom-img-bg {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; background-size: cover; background-position: center; opacity: 0.5;
    }

    /* Pattern Overlay */
    .pattern-overlay {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; opacity: 0.3; pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* The CARD Frame */
    .card-frame {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 10;
      /* JS ile güncellenecek */
      display: flex; 
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 15px;
      padding: 30px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      
      /* 3D için */
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      transform: perspective(1000px);
    }

    /* Avatar */
    .avatar-box {
      width: 100px; height: 100px;
      background: #334155;
      border-radius: 50%;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: none; /* JS ile açılacak */
      border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
      flex-shrink: 0;
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center;
    }

    /* Text Wrapper */
    .text-wrapper {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; /* veya flex-start */
      /* 3D derinlik */
      transform: translateZ(20px);
    }

    .main-text {
      font-size: 48px;
      line-height: 1;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .sub-text {
      font-size: 16px;
      margin-top: 5px;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      opacity: 0.9;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    /* Tools Bar */
    .tools-bar {
      height: 50px;
      background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9);
      border-top: 1px solid #334155;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0 20px;
      justify-content: space-between;
      backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
    }

    /* Responsive */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      body { flex-direction: column; height: auto; overflow: auto; }
      .sidebar { width: 100%; height: auto; border-right: none; }
      .main { height: 500px; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SOL PANEL -->
<div class="sidebar">
  <div class="header">
    <div class="brand"><i class="fa-solid fa-dragon"></i> ULTRA STUDIO V7</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#94a3b8;">PRO EDITION</div>
  </div>

  <div class="scroll-content">
    
    <!-- 1. İÇERİK & LAYOUT -->
    <div class="group">
      <div class="group-head"><i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group"></i> İçerik & Düzen</div>
      
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Düzen (Layout)</label>
          <div class="tabs" id="layoutTabs">
            <div class="tab" onclick="setLayout('text-only')" id="tab-text-only">Sadece Yazı</div>
            <div class="tab active" onclick="setLayout('horizontal')" id="tab-horizontal">Yatay</div>
            <div class="tab" onclick="setLayout('vertical')" id="tab-vertical">Dikey</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col" style="flex:2;">
          <label>Ana İsim (Nick)</label>
          <input type="text" id="inpMain" value="GS Rams">
        </div>
        <div class="col" style="flex:1;">
          <label>Sembol</label>
          <select id="selSym" onchange="addSymbol(this.value)">
            <option value="">Seç..</option>
            <option value="♛">♛</option>
            <option value="⚡">⚡</option>
            <option value="☠">☠</option>
            <option value="★">★</option>
            <option value="⚔">⚔</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Alt Metin (Slogan / Clan Tag)</label>
          <input type="text" id="inpSub" value="ESPORTS TEAM">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Avatar / Logo</label>
          <input type="file" id="inpAvatarFile" accept="image/*">
          <input type="text" id="inpAvatarUrl" placeholder="Veya Resim URL..." style="margin-top:4px;">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Avatar Şekli</label>
          <select id="selAvatarShape">
            <option value="50%">Yuvarlak</option>
            <option value="12px">Kare (Soft)</option>
            <option value="0px">Kare (Keskin)</option>
            <option value="polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0% 50%)">Elmas</option>
            <option value="polygon(25% 0%, 75% 0%, 100% 50%, 75% 100%, 25% 100%, 0% 50%)">Altıgen</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="col">
           <label>Avatar Efekti</label>
           <select id="selAvatarEffect">
             <option value="none">Yok</option>
             <option value="grayscale">Siyah Beyaz</option>
             <option value="sepia">Sepia</option>
             <option value="invert">Ters Renk</option>
             <option value="glow">Parlayan Kenar</option>
           </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 2. STİL & FONT -->
    <div class="group">
      <div class="group-head"><i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Stil & Fontlar</div>
      
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Font Ailesi</label>
          <select id="selFont">
            <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat</option>
            <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Rajdhani (Tech)</option>
            <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Oswald (Bold)</option>
            <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue</option>
            <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Orbitron (Sci-Fi)</option>
            <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Black Ops (Army)</option>
            <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Creepster (Horror)</option>
            <option value="'Permanent Marker', cursive">Marker (Graffiti)</option>
            <option value="'Cinzel', serif">Cinzel (RPG/Medieval)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="col">
          <label>Ana Boyut</label>
          <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="100" value="50">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Ana Renk Tipi</label>
          <select id="selFillMode">
            <option value="solid">Tek Renk</option>
            <option value="gradient">Gradyan</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="col">
          <label>Alt Metin Rengi</label>
          <input type="color" id="inpSubColor" value="#94a3b8" style="width:100%; height:35px; padding:0; border:none;">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row" id="gradControls">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Renk 1</label>
          <div id="p1"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="col">
          <label>Renk 2</label>
          <div id="p2"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Yazı Efekti</label>
          <select id="selTextEffect">
            <option value="none">Yok</option>
            <option value="shadow-soft">Gölge (Soft)</option>
            <option value="shadow-hard">Gölge (Sert)</option>
            <option value="neon">Neon Glow</option>
            <option value="glitch">Glitch Animasyon</option>
            <option value="stroke">Sadece Çizgi (Stroke)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 3. KART & ARKA PLAN -->
    <div class="group">
      <div class="group-head"><i class="fa-regular fa-image"></i> Çerçeve & Arka Plan</div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Çerçeve Stili</label>
          <select id="selFrameStyle">
            <option value="none">Yok (Sadece İçerik)</option>
            <option value="glass">Glassmorphism</option>
            <option value="cyber">Cyberpunk Border</option>
            <option value="gradient">Gradient Border</option>
            <option value="minimal">Minimal Dark</option>
            <option value="paper">Eski Kağıt</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="col">
          <label>Arka Plan Tipi</label>
          <select id="selBgType">
            <option value="dark">Koyu Gri</option>
            <option value="aurora">Aurora (Animasyonlu)</option>
            <option value="custom">Resim Yükle / URL</option>
            <option value="transparent">Transparan (PNG için)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row" id="bgUploadRow" style="display:none;">
        <div class="col">
          <label>BG Resim Seç</label>
          <input type="file" id="inpBgFile" accept="image/*">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
         <div class="col">
           <label>Genişlik (Padding)</label>
           <input type="range" id="rngPad" min="10" max="100" value="40">
         </div>
         <div class="col">
           <label>Yuvarlaklık</label>
           <input type="range" id="rngRad" min="0" max="50" value="20">
         </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="row">
        <button class="btn btn-chaos" onclick="randomize()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> CHAOS RANDOMIZER
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- EXPORT -->
    <div class="group">
      <div class="group-head"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Dışa Aktar</div>
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col">
          <label>Kalite</label>
          <select id="selQuality">
            <option value="2">2x (HD)</option>
            <option value="4" selected>4x (Ultra)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="exportPNG()">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-camera"></i> Tasarımı PNG İndir
      </button>
      <div style="font-size:0.65rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:5px; text-align:center;">
        Not: PNG alırken 3D efekt ve animasyonlar sabitlenir.
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
<div class="main">
  <div class="preview-container" id="previewArea">
    <!-- Background Layers -->
    <div class="aurora-bg" id="auroraLayer"></div>
    <div class="custom-img-bg" id="customBgLayer"></div>
    <div class="pattern-overlay" id="patternLayer" style="background-image: radial-gradient(#ffffff 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 20px 20px;"></div>

    <!-- THE CARD -->
    <div class="card-frame" id="card" data-tilt data-tilt-glare data-tilt-max-glare="0.3">
      
      <div class="avatar-box" id="avatarBox"></div>
      
      <div class="text-wrapper" id="textWrapper">
        <div class="main-text" id="lblMain">GS Rams</div>
        <div class="sub-text" id="lblSub">PRO PLAYER</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tools-bar">
    <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#64748b;">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-arrows-up-down-left-right"></i> Kartın üzerine gelince hareket eder (3D).
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px;">
       <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="resetAll()">Sıfırla</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // -- STATE MANAGEMENT --
  let state = {
    layout: 'horizontal', // horizontal, vertical, text-only
    mainText: "GS Rams",
    subText: "PRO PLAYER",
    font: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
    fontSize: 50,
    fillMode: 'gradient',
    color1: '#8b5cf6',
    color2: '#ec4899',
    subColor: '#94a3b8',
    textEffect: 'none',
    frameStyle: 'glass',
    bgType: 'dark',
    padding: 40,
    radius: 20,
    avatarUrl: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/300?img=12', // default placeholder
    avatarShape: '50%',
    avatarEffect: 'none'
  };

  // -- IRO COLOR PICKERS --
  const p1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#p1", { width: 60, layout: [{component: iro.ui.Wheel}], color: state.color1 });
  const p2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#p2", { width: 60, layout: [{component: iro.ui.Wheel}], color: state.color2 });

  p1.on('color:change', c => { state.color1 = c.hexString; render(); });
  p2.on('color:change', c => { state.color2 = c.hexString; render(); });

  // -- EVENT LISTENERS --
  const el = id => document.getElementById(id);

  el('inpMain').addEventListener('input', e => { state.mainText = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('inpSub').addEventListener('input', e => { state.subText = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('selFont').addEventListener('change', e => { state.font = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('rngSize').addEventListener('input', e => { state.fontSize = parseInt(e.target.value); render(); });
  el('selFillMode').addEventListener('change', e => { state.fillMode = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('inpSubColor').addEventListener('input', e => { state.subColor = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('selTextEffect').addEventListener('change', e => { state.textEffect = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('selFrameStyle').addEventListener('change', e => { state.frameStyle = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('rngPad').addEventListener('input', e => { state.padding = e.target.value; render(); });
  el('rngRad').addEventListener('input', e => { state.radius = e.target.value; render(); });
  
  // Background
  el('selBgType').addEventListener('change', e => { 
    state.bgType = e.target.value;
    el('bgUploadRow').style.display = (state.bgType === 'custom') ? 'flex' : 'none';
    renderBg();
  });
  
  // File Uploads
  el('inpBgFile').addEventListener('change', function() {
    if(this.files && this.files[0]) {
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = e => {
        el('customBgLayer').style.backgroundImage = `url(${e.target.result})`;
        el('customBgLayer').style.opacity = 1;
      }
      reader.readAsDataURL(this.files[0]);
    }
  });

  el('inpAvatarFile').addEventListener('change', function() {
    if(this.files && this.files[0]) {
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = e => {
        state.avatarUrl = e.target.result;
        renderAvatar();
      }
      reader.readAsDataURL(this.files[0]);
    }
  });

  el('inpAvatarUrl').addEventListener('input', e => {
    if(e.target.value.length > 5) {
      state.avatarUrl = e.target.value;
      renderAvatar();
    }
  });

  el('selAvatarShape').addEventListener('change', e => { state.avatarShape = e.target.value; renderAvatar(); });
  el('selAvatarEffect').addEventListener('change', e => { state.avatarEffect = e.target.value; renderAvatar(); });

  // -- FUNCTIONS --

  function setLayout(mode) {
    state.layout = mode;
    // Update Tabs
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    el('tab-'+mode).classList.add('active');
    render();
  }

  function addSymbol(sym) {
    if(!sym) return;
    state.mainText += sym;
    el('inpMain').value = state.mainText;
    render();
  }

  function renderAvatar() {
    const box = el('avatarBox');
    
    if (state.layout === 'text-only') {
      box.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }

    box.style.display = 'block';
    box.style.backgroundImage = `url('${state.avatarUrl}')`;
    
    // Shape logic
    if (state.avatarShape.includes('polygon')) {
      box.style.borderRadius = '0';
      box.style.clipPath = state.avatarShape;
      box.style.border = 'none'; // clip-path ile border düzgün çalışmaz genelde
    } else {
      box.style.clipPath = 'none';
      box.style.borderRadius = state.avatarShape;
      // Border geri gelsin
      if(state.avatarShape === '0px' || state.avatarShape === '12px' || state.avatarShape === '50%') {
        box.style.border = '3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';
      }
    }

    // Effect logic
    box.style.filter = 'none';
    box.style.boxShadow = '0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
    
    if (state.avatarEffect === 'grayscale') box.style.filter = 'grayscale(100%)';
    if (state.avatarEffect === 'sepia') box.style.filter = 'sepia(100%)';
    if (state.avatarEffect === 'invert') box.style.filter = 'invert(100%)';
    if (state.avatarEffect === 'glow') {
      box.style.boxShadow = `0 0 15px ${state.color1}, 0 0 30px ${state.color2}`;
      box.style.border = `2px solid ${state.color1}`;
    }
  }

  function renderBg() {
    const aurora = el('auroraLayer');
    const custom = el('customBgLayer');
    const area = el('previewArea');

    aurora.style.display = 'none';
    custom.style.display = 'none';
    area.style.background = '#020617';

    if (state.bgType === 'aurora') {
      aurora.style.display = 'block';
    } else if (state.bgType === 'custom') {
      custom.style.display = 'block';
    } else if (state.bgType === 'transparent') {
      area.style.backgroundImage = `
        linear-gradient(45deg, #ccc 25%, transparent 25%), 
        linear-gradient(-45deg, #ccc 25%, transparent 25%), 
        linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, #ccc 75%), 
        linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, #ccc 75%)`;
      area.style.backgroundSize = "20px 20px";
      area.style.backgroundColor = "#fff";
    }
  }

  function render() {
    const card = el('card');
    const txtWrap = el('textWrapper');
    const lblMain = el('lblMain');
    const lblSub = el('lblSub');

    // Content
    lblMain.innerText = state.mainText;
    lblSub.innerText = state.subText;

    // Layout
    card.style.flexDirection = (state.layout === 'vertical') ? 'column' : 'row';
    txtWrap.style.alignItems = (state.layout === 'vertical') ? 'center' : 'flex-start';
    if (state.layout === 'text-only') {
       card.style.flexDirection = 'row';
       txtWrap.style.alignItems = 'center';
    }
    renderAvatar(); // Avatarı gizle/göster ayarlar

    // Typography
    lblMain.style.fontFamily = state.font;
    lblSub.style.fontFamily = state.font; // Alt yazı da aynı aileden olsun uyum için
    
    lblMain.style.fontSize = state.fontSize + 'px';
    lblSub.style.fontSize = (state.fontSize * 0.35) + 'px'; // Orantılı küçült
    lblSub.style.color = state.subColor;

    // Main Color Fill
    if (state.fillMode === 'solid') {
      lblMain.style.backgroundImage = 'none';
      lblMain.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'initial';
      lblMain.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'initial';
      lblMain.style.color = state.color1;
    } else {
      lblMain.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
      lblMain.style.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
      lblMain.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
      lblMain.style.color = 'transparent'; // Fallback
    }

    // Text Effects
    lblMain.style.textShadow = 'none';
    lblMain.style.webkitTextStroke = '0';
    lblMain.classList.remove('glitch-anim'); // Remove styling class if exists (we handle inline mostly)
    
    if (state.textEffect === 'shadow-soft') {
      lblMain.style.textShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
    } else if (state.textEffect === 'shadow-hard') {
      lblMain.style.textShadow = '4px 4px 0px #000';
    } else if (state.textEffect === 'neon') {
      const c = state.fillMode==='solid' ? state.color1 : state.color2;
      lblMain.style.textShadow = `0 0 10px ${c}, 0 0 20px ${c}`;
    } else if (state.textEffect === 'stroke') {
      lblMain.style.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
      lblMain.style.webkitTextStroke = `2px ${state.color1}`;
    } else if (state.textEffect === 'glitch') {
        // Basit glitch efekti: gölge kayması
        lblMain.style.textShadow = `2px 0 ${state.color2}, -2px 0 ${state.color1}`;
    }

    // Frame Style
    card.style.background = 'transparent';
    card.style.border = 'none';
    card.style.boxShadow = 'none';
    card.style.backdropFilter = 'none';
    
    card.style.padding = state.padding + 'px';
    card.style.borderRadius = state.radius + 'px';

    if (state.frameStyle === 'glass') {
      card.style.background = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)';
      card.style.backdropFilter = 'blur(10px)';
      card.style.border = '1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)';
      card.style.boxShadow = '0 8px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.37)';
    } else if (state.frameStyle === 'cyber') {
      card.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)';
      card.style.border = `2px solid ${state.color1}`;
      card.style.boxShadow = `0 0 15px ${state.color1}`;
      // Köşegen kesikler için clip-path zor olur çünkü border var, basit tutuyoruz
    } else if (state.frameStyle === 'gradient') {
      // Çift katman hilesi yerine basit border
      card.style.border = '3px solid transparent';
      card.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(#0f172a, #0f172a), linear-gradient(to right, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
      card.style.backgroundOrigin = 'border-box';
      card.style.backgroundClip = 'padding-box, border-box';
      card.style.boxShadow = '0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.8)';
    } else if (state.frameStyle === 'minimal') {
      card.style.background = '#0f172a';
      card.style.border = '1px solid #334155';
    } else if (state.frameStyle === 'paper') {
      card.style.background = '#f1f5f9';
      lblMain.style.webkitTextFillColor = '#1e293b';
      lblMain.style.backgroundImage = 'none'; // Gradienti ez
      lblSub.style.color = '#64748b';
      card.style.boxShadow = '5px 5px 0px #94a3b8';
      card.style.border = '2px solid #1e293b';
    }
  }

  function randomize() {
    // Random Colors
    const rc = () => '#'+Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6,'0');
    state.color1 = rc();
    state.color2 = rc();
    p1.color.hexString = state.color1;
    p2.color.hexString = state.color2;

    // Random Font
    const fonts = el('selFont').options;
    state.font = fonts[Math.floor(Math.random() * fonts.length)].value;
    el('selFont').value = state.font;

    // Random Frame
    const frames = ['glass','cyber','gradient','minimal'];
    state.frameStyle = frames[Math.floor(Math.random()*frames.length)];
    el('selFrameStyle').value = state.frameStyle;

    render();
  }

  function resetAll() {
    location.reload();
  }

  function exportPNG() {
    const element = el('card');
    const scale = parseInt(el('selQuality').value);
    
    // Tilt efektini geçici olarak durdur (düz dursun diye)
    element.vanillaTilt.destroy(); 
    element.style.transform = 'none';

    html2canvas(element, {
      backgroundColor: null,
      scale: scale,
      useCORS: true,
      allowTaint: true
    }).then(canvas => {
      let link = document.createElement('a');
      link.download = `ultra-design-${Date.now()}.png`;
      link.href = canvas.toDataURL();
      link.click();
      
      // Tilt'i geri aç
      VanillaTilt.init(document.querySelector("#card"), {
        max: 25,
        speed: 400,
        glare: true,
        "max-glare": 0.3,
      });
    });
  }

  // Init
  render();
  renderBg();
  
  // Tilt Init
  VanillaTilt.init(document.querySelector("#card"), {
    max: 15,
    speed: 400,
    glare: true,
    "max-glare": 0.3,
  });

</script>
</body>
</html>
```

### V7 Pro Özelliklerinin Özeti:

1.  **Avatar Entegrasyonu:** Sol panelden bir resim seç (veya internetten URL yapıştır). Resim otomatik olarak isminin yanına gelir. "Avatar Şekli" ayarı ile onu yuvarlak, altıgen veya elmas şeklinde kesebilirsin.
2.  **Alt Metin (Subtext):** "PRO PLAYER", "EST 2024", "SNIPER" gibi unvanlarını ana ismin altına ekle. Rengini ayrı kontrol et.
3.  **Layout Değişimi:** Tek tıkla resmi üstte, ismi altta yapabilirsin (Dikey Mod) veya yan yana (Yatay Mod).
4.  **Aurora Arka Plan:** "Arka Plan Tipi" menüsünden "Aurora" seç. Çok hoş, yavaş hareket eden renkli bir arka plan gelir.
5.  **3D Tilt:** Mouse ile tasarladığın kartın üzerine gel, kart mouse hareketine göre eğilip bükülür ve parlama efekti (glare) yapar. Bu sadece görsel şovdur, PNG alırken otomatik düzelir.
6.  **Chaos Randomizer:** Yine ekledik, tek tıkla rastgele renk, font ve çerçeve stili dener.

Şimdi elinde tam bir **"Gamer Profil Tasarımcısı"** var. Bir sonraki aşamada istersen bu tasarımları hareketli **GIF** veya **Video (MP4)** olarak kaydetme özelliğine odaklanabiliriz! Nasıl devam edelim?

## Prompt 13

### You
*2025-12-09 15:04:04 +03*

Geliştirmeye devam edelim özgürce yeni özelikler ekle fonksiyonlar ekle önerdiğin özellikler var sa ekle entegre et devam edelim geliştirmeye Tam Gaz 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 15:04:04 +03*

Tam gaz modunu açıyorum, nitroya basıyorum.  
V8 geliyor: artık “nick generator” değil, ufak çaplı tasarım stüdyosu olacak.

Aşağıya direkt **tam tek dosya V8** kodunu veriyorum.  
Önce hızlıca neler eklediğimi özetleyeyim, sonra komple HTML’yi bırakacağım.

---

## V8 – Yeni Özellikler (Üstüne eklediklerim)

### 1. Çok Katmanlı Sistem (Text1 / Text2 / Badge / Alt Yazı)
Artık tek yazı değil, mini kompozisyon:

- **Ana Başlık (Text 1)** – büyük nick
- **Alt Başlık (Text 2)** – küçük slogan
- **Badge / Tag Metni** – mini etiket (PRO, VIP, GS, TR vs.)
- **Alt Çizgi Yazı** – footer gibi küçük altta

Sol panelde yeni bölüm:  
“**Katmanlar**” altında:

- Her katman için:
  - Aç/Kapa
  - Yazı içeriği
  - Boyut
  - Ofset X/Y
  - Renk (Text2 & Badge için basit renk seçici)
- Önizlemede hepsi aynı kart içinde birleşiyor.

> PNG export ve kod üretimi bu yeni katmanları da içeriyor.

---

### 2. Hazır Layout Şablonları (Logo / Banner Setup)
Yeni menü: **“Hazır Düzenler”**

Tek tıkla:

- **Logo – Ortada Avatar + Altında Nick**
- **Banner – Sol Avatar Sağda Metin**
- **Minimal – Sadece Yazı Ortada**
- **Double Text – Üst başlık, altında ince yazı**
- **Badge’li – Sağ üstte küçük rozet**

Bu şablonlar:

- Katman ofsetlerini,
- Yazı boyutlarını,
- Avatar yönünü,
- Align’ları otomatik ayarlıyor.

---

### 3. LocalStorage “Projeni Kaydet” (Tarayıcıya Kayıt)
Artık kapatınca her şey uçmuyor.

Yeni özellikler:
