- **Otomatik kaydet**: son kullandığın ayarlar tarayıcıda saklanıyor, sayfayı açınca otomatik geri yükleniyor.
- **Proje kaydet**:
  - İsim veriyorsun (örn: “GS Banner 1”)
  - LocalStorage’a ekleniyor
  - Altta **Proje Listesi**: tıklayıp geri yükleyebiliyorsun
- **Projeyi sil** butonu her kaydın yanında.

Her şey offline, tamamen senin tarayıcında.

---

### 4. PNG Export’ta Otomatik İsim + Tarih
PNG export:

- Dosya adı formatı:  
  `GS-Rams_2025-12-09_14-32-10.png` gibi
- Nick boşsa: `gs-rams-logo_...`

---

### 5. Hızlı “Sosyal Platform Presetleri”
Canvas Mode zaten vardı, şimdi yanına bir de stil geliyor:

Yeni butonlar:

- **Twitch Style**
- **YouTube Style**
- **Discord Style**
- **Mobile Story Style**

Bunlar:

- Arka plan tema rengini
- Pattern türünü
- Font & renk kombinasyonunu
- Gölge/çerçeve türünü

otomatik platform havasına göre ayarlıyor.

---

### 6. Küçük UX İyileştirmeleri
- Kod kopyala’da alert yerine daha yumuşak: küçük “Kopyalandı!” overlay.
- Chaos / Random theme yaptıktan sonra üstte **“Preset Uygulandı”** mini toast bildirimi.
- Avatar URL boşsa ama mod açıksa uyarı veren hafif kırmızı outline.

---

## V8 Tam Kod (Tek HTML Dosya)

Bunu doğrudan `index.html` yapıştırıp V7’nin yerine kullanabilirsin.  
V7’deki tüm özellikler + yukarıdaki yeniler mevcut.

> Not: Kod biraz uzun, ama her şey tek dosyada, çalışır halde.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Ultra Studio V8 - GS Rams Nick Studio</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>

  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Poppins:wght@300;500;800&family=Rubik+Mono+One&family=Pacifico&family=Orbitron:wght@500;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

  <style>
    :root {
      --primary: #f59e0b;
      --secondary: #ec4899;
      --accent: #3b82f6;
      --dark: #020617;
      --panel: #0b1220;
      --text: #e2e8f0;
      --border: #1f2937;
      --radius: 14px;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;}

    body{
      margin:0;
      background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#1f2937 0%,#020617 60%);
      color:var(--text);
      font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;
      height:100vh;
      display:flex;
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .app-container{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:440px 1fr;
      width:100%;
      height:100%;
    }
    .sidebar{
      background:radial-gradient(circle at top left,#111827 0%,#020617 65%);
      border-right:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .sidebar-header{
      padding:8px 12px;
      border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
    }
    .brand{
      font-weight:900;
      font-size:1rem;
      letter-spacing:1px;
      text-transform:uppercase;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
    }
    .brand span{
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--primary),var(--secondary),var(--accent));
      -webkit-background-clip:text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    }
    .tag{
      font-size:0.65rem;
      padding:2px 7px;
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.5);
      color:#93c5fd;
      text-transform:uppercase;
    }
    .scroll-area{
      flex:1;
      overflow-y:auto;
      padding:10px;
    }
    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;}
    .scroll-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{
      background:rgba(148,163,184,0.4);
      border-radius:4px;
    }

    .control-group{
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.9),rgba(15,23,42,0.5));
      border-radius:var(--radius);
      border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.25);
      padding:8px 9px;
      margin-bottom:8px;
      box-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(15,23,42,0.6);
    }
    .group-title{
      font-size:0.72rem;
      text-transform:uppercase;
      letter-spacing:1px;
      color:#9ca3af;
      margin-bottom:5px;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
    }
    .group-title i{color:var(--primary);}
    .row{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:5px;}
    .col{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;}
    label{font-size:0.7rem;color:#cbd5f5;}
    textarea,input[type="text"],select{
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border-radius:8px;
      border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      color:var(--text);
      padding:6px 7px;
      font-size:0.78rem;
      transition:0.15s;
    }
    textarea:focus,input[type="text"]:focus,select:focus{
      border-color:var(--accent);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);
    }
    textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:45px;max-height:110px;}
    input[type="range"]{
      width:100%;
      appearance:none;
      height:4px;
      border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
    }
    input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb{
      appearance:none;
      width:14px;height:14px;
      border-radius:50%;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--secondary));
      cursor:pointer;
      border:1px solid white;
      box-shadow:0 0 5px rgba(96,165,250,0.7);
    }

    .btn{
      border:none;
      border-radius:8px;
      padding:6px 9px;
      font-size:0.7rem;
      text-transform:uppercase;
      font-weight:700;
      cursor:pointer;
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:6px;
      transition:0.18s;
    }
    .btn-primary{
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#8b5cf6);
      color:white;
      width:100%;
      box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(37,99,235,0.35);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover{filter:brightness(1.08);transform:translateY(-1px);}
    .btn-ghost{
      background:transparent;
      color:#9ca3af;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover{
      color:#e5e7eb;
      background:rgba(31,41,55,0.7);
    }
    .btn-chaos{
      background:linear-gradient(60deg,#f97316,#ec4899,#22c55e,#3b82f6,#a855f7);
      background-size:260% 260%;
      color:#020617;
      font-weight:900;
      letter-spacing:1px;
      animation:rainbowMove 6s linear infinite;
      width:100%;
      border-radius:12px;
      box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(236,72,153,0.7);
    }
    .btn-chaos:hover{filter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateY(-1px) scale(1.01);}

    .symbol-bar{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);
      gap:3px;
      margin-top:4px;
    }
    .sym-btn{
      border:none;
      background:rgba(31,41,55,0.85);
      color:#e5e7eb;
      border-radius:6px;
      padding:4px 0;
      cursor:pointer;
      font-size:0.9rem;
      transition:0.15s;
    }
    .sym-btn:hover{background:var(--primary);color:#020617;}
    .mini-badge{
      font-size:0.65rem;
      padding:1px 5px;
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.6);
      color:#fed7aa;
      text-transform:uppercase;
    }

    #historyList{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;max-height:110px;overflow-y:auto;margin-top:4px;}
    .history-item{
      font-size:0.7rem;
      padding:5px 7px;
      border-radius:7px;
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);
      border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.9);
      display:flex;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:6px;
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .history-item:hover{
      border-color:var(--secondary);
      background:radial-gradient(circle at top left,rgba(236,72,153,0.15),rgba(15,23,42,0.95));
    }
    .history-main{white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
    .history-sub{opacity:0.6;}

    /* SAĞ PANEL */
    .main-content{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
    .preview-wrapper{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
    .top-toolbar{
      display:flex;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      gap:6px;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      padding:6px 12px;
      border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
      backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
      background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(15,23,42,0.9),rgba(15,23,42,0.6));
      font-size:0.72rem;
    }

    .preview-mode-toggle button{
      border:none;
      padding:3px 7px;
      font-size:0.68rem;
      border-radius:999px;
      margin-left:3px;
      background:transparent;
      color:#9ca3af;
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .preview-mode-toggle button.active{
      background:rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      color:white;
    }

    .canvas-mode-toggle{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:3px;}
    .canvas-chip{
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
      padding:2px 6px;
      font-size:0.65rem;
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.7);
      color:#e5e7eb;
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .canvas-chip.active{
      background:rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      border-color:rgba(129,140,248,0.9);
    }

    .preview-area{
      flex:1;
      position:relative;
      overflow:hidden;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      padding:16px;
      background:radial-gradient(circle at center,#020617 0%,#020617 60%,#000000 100%);
    }

    .canvas-box{
      position:relative;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
    }
    .canvas-bg{
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      border-radius:18px;
      border:1px dashed rgba(148,163,184,0.3);
      pointer-events:none;
    }

    .bg-image-layer{
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      background-repeat:no-repeat;
      background-position:center;
      background-size:cover;
      opacity:0.7;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    .bg-pattern-layer{
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      opacity:0.45;
      mix-blend-mode:soft-light;
      pointer-events:none;
      background-size:28px 28px;
    }

    .preview-frame{
      padding:26px 34px;
      border-radius:22px;
      position:relative;
      z-index:2;
      min-width:240px;
      text-align:center;
      transition:0.25s ease;
      display:inline-flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:4px;
    }

    .avatar-wrapper{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:10px;
    }
    .avatar-wrapper.avatar-left{flex-direction:row;}
    .avatar-wrapper.avatar-right{flex-direction:row-reverse;}
    .avatar-img{
      border-radius:50%;
      object-fit:cover;
      flex-shrink:0;
    }

    #livePrimary{display:inline-block;}
    #liveSecondary{display:inline-block;font-size:16px;opacity:0.9;}
    #liveBadge{
      display:inline-block;
      font-size:12px;
      padding:2px 8px;
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.8);
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.85);
      margin-left:4px;
    }
    #liveFooter{
      display:inline-block;
      font-size:11px;
      opacity:0.75;
      margin-top:4px;
    }

    .particle{
      position:absolute;
      width:6px;
      height:6px;
      border-radius:999px;
      background:radial-gradient(circle,#ffffff 0,transparent 70%);
      opacity:0;
      pointer-events:none;
      animation:particleFloat 5s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes particleFloat{
      0%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:0;}
      20%{opacity:0.9;}
      80%{opacity:0.9;}
      100%{transform:translateY(-20px);opacity:0;}
    }

    .code-area{
      height:250px;
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1.6fr;
      border-top:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.35);
      background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#020617 0%,#020617 60%);
    }
    .code-box{display:flex;flex-direction:column;border-right:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);}
    .code-header{
      padding:6px 9px;
      font-size:0.7rem;
      color:#9ca3af;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);
    }
    .code-content{
      flex:1;
      padding:7px 9px;
      font-family:"Courier New",monospace;
      font-size:0.74rem;
      color:#a5b4fc;
      overflow-y:auto;
      white-space:pre-wrap;
    }
    .copy-icon{cursor:pointer;color:#9ca3af;}
    .copy-icon:hover{color:#e5e7eb;}

    .preset-bar{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:3px;}
    .preset-chip{
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);
      padding:2px 6px;
      font-size:0.65rem;
      cursor:pointer;
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.7);
      color:#e5e7eb;
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:4px;
    }
    .preset-chip span.dot{
      width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:999px;display:inline-block;
    }
    .preset-chip:hover{
      background:rgba(37,99,235,0.9);
      border-color:rgba(129,140,248,0.9);
    }

    @keyframes pulse{0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)}}
    @keyframes float{0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)}}
    @keyframes shake{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)}}
    @keyframes glitch{
      0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
      20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}
      40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}
      60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}
      80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}
      100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}
    }
    @keyframes rainbowMove{
      0%{background-position:0% 50%}
      50%{background-position:100% 50%}
      100%{background-position:0% 50%}
    }
    @keyframes glowPulse{
      0%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
      50%{box-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(236,72,153,0.9);}
      100%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(59,130,246,0.4);}
    }

    .anim-pulse{animation:pulse var(--anim-speed,1.8s) infinite;}
    .anim-float{animation:float var(--anim-speed,3s) ease-in-out infinite;}
    .anim-shake{animation:shake var(--anim-speed,0.6s) infinite;}
    .anim-glitch{animation:glitch var(--anim-speed,1.2s) steps(2,end) infinite;}
    .anim-rainbow-text{
      background:linear-gradient(124deg,#ff2400,#e81d1d,#e8b71d,#e3e81d,#1de840,#1ddde8,#2b1de8,#dd00f3,#dd00f3);
      background-size:200% 200%;
      animation:rainbowMove var(--anim-speed,4s) linear infinite;
      -webkit-background-clip:text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    }

    .toast{
      position:fixed;
      right:12px;
      bottom:12px;
      background:rgba(15,23,42,0.96);
      border-radius:10px;
      padding:6px 10px;
      border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.7);
      font-size:0.7rem;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:6px;
      z-index:50;
      opacity:0;
      transform:translateY(8px);
      pointer-events:none;
      transition:0.2s;
    }
    .toast.show{
      opacity:1;
      transform:translateY(0);
      pointer-events:auto;
    }

    @media(max-width:950px){
      body{overflow:auto;height:auto;}
      .app-container{
        grid-template-columns:1fr;
        grid-template-rows:auto auto auto;
        height:auto;
      }
      .sidebar{max-height:none;order:1;}
      .main-content{order:2;min-height:420px;}
      .preview-area{min-height:320px;}
      .code-area{order:3;height:260px;grid-template-columns:1fr;}
      .code-box{border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.9);}
    }
    @media(max-width:520px){
      .symbol-bar{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);}
      .preview-frame{padding:18px;min-width:auto;}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app-container">

  <!-- SOL PANEL -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">
      <div class="brand">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved"></i>
        <span>Ultra Studio V8</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
        <span class="tag">Tam Gaz</span>
        <button class="btn-ghost" style="border-radius:999px;padding:4px 7px;" title="Sıfırla" onclick="fullReset()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-right"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="scroll-area">

      <!-- METİN ANA -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-keyboard"></i> Ana Metin</span>
          <span class="mini-badge">GS Rams Studio</span>
        </div>

        <textarea id="inpNick">GS Rams</textarea>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.6);" onclick="autoSplitLines()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-lines-leaning"></i> Satıra Böl
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="randomName()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Random Nick
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="symbol-bar">
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♛')">♛</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚡')">⚡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☠')">☠</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('★')">★</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✦')">✦</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✧')">✧</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('❖')">❖</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✪')">✪</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('⚔')">⚔</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('☾')">☾</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('✞')">✞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('∞')">∞</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('♡')">♡</button>
          <button class="sym-btn" onclick="addSym('︎ツ')">ツ</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FONT / HAREKET / KONUM -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i> Font, Hareket & Konum</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Font Ailesi</label>
            <select id="selFont">
              <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Modern (Montserrat)</option>
              <option value="'Poppins', sans-serif">Soft Modern (Poppins)</option>
              <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Tech (Rajdhani)</option>
              <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Kompakt (Oswald)</option>
              <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Başlık (Bebas)</option>
              <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Futuristic (Orbitron)</option>
              <option value="'Audiowide', cursive">Sci-Fi (Audiowide)</option>
              <option value="'Rubik Mono One', sans-serif">Block (Rubik Mono)</option>
              <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (8-bit)</option>
              <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Horror (Creepster)</option>
              <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Script (Pacifico)</option>
              <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Military (Black Ops)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Animasyon</label>
            <select id="selAnim">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="pulse">Nabız</option>
              <option value="float">Yüzen</option>
              <option value="shake">Titreme</option>
              <option value="glitch">Glitch</option>
              <option value="rainbow-text">RGB Yazı</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Animasyon Hızı</label>
            <select id="selAnimSpeed">
              <option value="slow">Yavaş</option>
              <option value="normal" selected>Normal</option>
              <option value="fast">Hızlı</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Hizalama</label>
            <select id="selAlign">
              <option value="center">Ortala</option>
              <option value="left">Sola</option>
              <option value="right">Sağa</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Boyut: <span id="lblSize">48px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="120" value="48">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Harf Aralığı: <span id="lblSpace">0px</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSpace" min="-3" max="20" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Döndür: <span id="lblRotate">0°</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRotate" min="-30" max="30" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Satır Yüksekliği</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngLineHeight" min="80" max="160" value="110">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Yatay İç Boşluk</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngPadX" min="10" max="120" value="34">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Dikey İç Boşluk</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngPadY" min="10" max="80" value="26">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>X Pozisyonu</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngOffsetX" min="-50" max="50" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Y Pozisyonu</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngOffsetY" min="-50" max="50" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Sadece Yazı Modu</label>
            <select id="selOnlyText">
              <option value="no">Kart + Yazı</option>
              <option value="yes">Sadece Yazı (Logo)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Metin Dekorasyonu</label>
            <select id="selTextDeco">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="underline">Alt Çizgi</option>
              <option value="overline">Üst Çizgi</option>
              <option value="line-through">Üstü Çizili</option>
              <option value="double">Double Çizgi</option>
              <option value="glow">Parlama Çizgi</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Kalınlık / Eğiklik</label>
            <select id="selWeightStyle">
              <option value="700|normal">Kalın</option>
              <option value="900|normal">Extra Kalın</option>
              <option value="500|italic">İtalik</option>
              <option value="700|italic">Kalın İtalik</option>
              <option value="400|normal">Normal</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- RENK / GRADYAN / TEXTURE -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Renk & Doku</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Yazı Doldurma Modu</label>
            <select id="selFillMode">
              <option value="solid">Düz Renk</option>
              <option value="gradient">Gradyan</option>
              <option value="texture">Resim Doku</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Hazır Gradyanlar</label>
            <select id="selPresetGrad">
              <option value="">Seç (Opsiyonel)</option>
              <option value="sunset">Gün Batımı</option>
              <option value="neon">Neon</option>
              <option value="fire">Alev</option>
              <option value="aqua">Aqua</option>
              <option value="gold">Altın</option>
              <option value="ghost">Hayalet</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div id="colorControls">
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Ana Renk</label>
              <div id="picker1"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="col" id="colPicker2" style="display:none;">
              <label>2. Renk</label>
              <div id="picker2"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div id="textureControls" style="display:none;margin-top:4px;">
          <label>Doku (Resim / GIF URL)</label>
          <input type="text" id="inpTexture" placeholder="https://.../texture.png">
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.5);" onclick="setTexturePreset('gold')">Altın</button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.6);" onclick="setTexturePreset('fire')">Alev</button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(129,140,248,0.7);" onclick="setTexturePreset('galaxy')">Uzay</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <label style="margin-top:4px;font-size:0.7rem;">Renk Efekt Paketleri</label>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('fire')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff512f,#f09819)"></span> Fire
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('neon')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00f5ff,#ff00f5)"></span> Neon
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('gold')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f6e27a,#f2c94c)"></span> Gold
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('aqua')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1cd8d2,#93edc7)"></span> Aqua
          </button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyColorPreset('ghost')">
            <span class="dot" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#e0eafc,#cfdef3)"></span> Ghost
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- STROKE / SHADOW / FRAME / PARTICLES -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Stroke, Shadow & Çerçeve</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke (Çizgi)</label>
            <select id="selStroke">
              <option value="0">Yok</option>
              <option value="1px">İnce</option>
              <option value="2px">Orta</option>
              <option value="3px">Kalın</option>
              <option value="4px">Çok Kalın</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Stroke Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpStrokeColor" value="#000000" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Gölge Stili</label>
            <select id="selShadow">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Yumuşak</option>
              <option value="hard">Sert</option>
              <option value="neon-main">Neon (Ana)</option>
              <option value="neon-double">Neon Çift</option>
              <option value="white">Beyaz Glow</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Blur Arkası (Glass)</label>
            <select id="selBackdrop">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="soft">Soft Blur</option>
              <option value="strong">Güçlü Blur</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Çerçeve Stili</label>
            <select id="selFrameStyle">
              <option value="soft-card">Yumuşak Kart</option>
              <option value="neon-card">Neon Kart</option>
              <option value="gradient-border">Gradient Border</option>
              <option value="double-border">Çift Çerçeve</option>
              <option value="corner-cut">Köşe Kesik</option>
              <option value="glow-border">Glow Border</option>
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Köşe Yuvarlaklığı</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngRadius" min="0" max="40" value="22">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Parçacık Efekti</label>
            <select id="selParticles">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="light">Az</option>
              <option value="medium">Orta</option>
              <option value="crazy">Çok</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Parçacık Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpParticleColor" value="#ffffff" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- AVATAR / LOGO MODU -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-user-astronaut"></i> Avatar & Logo</span>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Avatar Kullan</label>
            <select id="selAvatarMode">
              <option value="off">Kapalı</option>
              <option value="left">Sol</option>
              <option value="right">Sağ</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Avatar Boyut</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngAvatarSize" min="32" max="120" value="64">
          </div>
        </div>
        <label>Avatar URL</label>
        <input type="text" id="inpAvatarUrl" placeholder="https://.../avatar.png">
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Avatar Kenarlık</label>
            <select id="selAvatarBorderMode">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="solid">Düz</option>
              <option value="glow">Glow</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Kenarlık Rengi</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpAvatarBorderColor" value="#f97316" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Köşe Konumu (Genel)</label>
            <select id="selLogoPos">
              <option value="center">Ortada</option>
              <option value="top-left">Sol-Üst</option>
              <option value="bottom-left">Sol-Alt</option>
              <option value="top-right">Sağ-Üst</option>
              <option value="bottom-right">Sağ-Alt</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- KATMANLAR: Secondary / Badge / Footer -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group"></i> Katmanlar</span>
        </div>

        <label style="font-size:0.72rem;">Alt Başlık (Text 2)</label>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Aktif mi?</label>
            <select id="selSecEnabled">
              <option value="yes">Evet</option>
              <option value="no">Hayır</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Metin</label>
            <input type="text" id="inpSecondary" placeholder="Slogan / alt satır">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Boyut</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngSecSize" min="10" max="40" value="16">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Renk</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpSecColor" value="#e5e7eb" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>

        <label style="font-size:0.72rem;margin-top:4px;">Badge / Etiket</label>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Aktif mi?</label>
            <select id="selBadgeEnabled">
              <option value="no">Hayır</option>
              <option value="yes">Evet</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Metin</label>
            <input type="text" id="inpBadge" placeholder="PRO / VIP / GS">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Renk</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpBadgeColor" value="#f97316" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>BG Renk</label>
            <input type="color" id="inpBadgeBg" value="#111827" style="height:30px;padding:0;">
          </div>
        </div>

        <label style="font-size:0.72rem;margin-top:4px;">Alt Çizgi Yazı (Footer)</label>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Aktif mi?</label>
            <select id="selFooterEnabled">
              <option value="no">Hayır</option>
              <option value="yes">Evet</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Metin</label>
            <input type="text" id="inpFooter" placeholder="@gskullanici / link vb.">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ARKA PLAN & CANVAS & PNG -->
      <div class="control-group">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i> Arka Plan & Canvas & PNG</span>
        </div>
        <label>Arka Plan GIF / Resim URL</label>
        <input type="text" id="inpBgImage" placeholder="https://.../arkaplan.gif">
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>BG Konum</label>
            <select id="selBgPos">
              <option value="center">Ortala</option>
              <option value="top">Yukarı</option>
              <option value="bottom">Aşağı</option>
              <option value="left">Sol</option>
              <option value="right">Sağ</option>
              <option value="custom">Custom (%)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>BG Boyut</label>
            <select id="selBgSize">
              <option value="cover">Cover</option>
              <option value="contain">Contain</option>
              <option value="auto">Auto</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" id="bgCustomPosRow" style="display:none;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>X (%)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBgX" min="0" max="100" value="50">
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>Y (%)</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBgY" min="0" max="100" value="50">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:2px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label>Pattern Overlay</label>
            <select id="selPattern">
              <option value="none">Yok</option>
              <option value="grid">Grid</option>
              <option value="dots">Nokta</option>
              <option value="noise">Noise</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col">
            <label>PNG Kalitesi</label>
            <select id="selPngScale">
              <option value="2">x2</option>
              <option value="3" selected>x3</option>
              <option value="4">x4</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <div class="col">
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;">
              <input type="checkbox" id="chkTransparent" checked>
              <span>PNG Transparan Arka Plan</span>
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="exportPNG()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i> PNG Olarak İndir
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ŞABLONLAR & TEMA & LOCAL PROJELER -->
      <div class="control-group" style="border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.7);">
        <div class="group-title">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-magic"></i> Preset, Tema & Proje</span>
        </div>

        <label style="font-size:0.72rem;">Metin Presetleri</label>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('horror')"><i class="fa-solid fa-ghost"></i> Horror</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('cyber')"><i class="fa-solid fa-microchip"></i> Cyber</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('minimal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch"></i> Minimal</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('royal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i> Royal</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyTextPreset('pixel')"><i class="fa-solid fa-gamepad"></i> Pixel</button>
        </div>

        <label style="font-size:0.72rem;margin-top:4px;">Hazır Düzenler (Layout)</label>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyLayoutPreset('logo-center')"><i class="fa-solid fa-bullseye"></i> Logo Orta</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyLayoutPreset('banner-left')"><i class="fa-solid fa-align-left"></i> Banner Sol</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyLayoutPreset('minimal-text')"><i class="fa-solid fa-minus"></i> Minimal</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyLayoutPreset('double-text')"><i class="fa-solid fa-text-height"></i> Double Text</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyLayoutPreset('badge-top')"><i class="fa-solid fa-certificate"></i> Badge'li</button>
        </div>

        <label style="font-size:0.72rem;margin-top:4px;">Platform Presetleri</label>
        <div class="preset-bar">
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyPlatformPreset('twitch')"><i class="fa-brands fa-twitch"></i> Twitch</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyPlatformPreset('youtube')"><i class="fa-brands fa-youtube"></i> YouTube</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyPlatformPreset('discord')"><i class="fa-brands fa-discord"></i> Discord</button>
          <button class="preset-chip" onclick="applyPlatformPreset('story')"><i class="fa-solid fa-mobile-screen"></i> Story</button>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="btn btn-chaos" style="flex:1;" onclick="triggerChaos()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> FULL CHAOS
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px;">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.7);" onclick="randomTheme()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-sparkles"></i> Random Theme
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;" onclick="saveToHistory()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-bookmark"></i> Stili Hafızaya Al
          </button>
        </div>

        <label style="margin-top:4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#9ca3af;">Geçici Kayıtlar</label>
        <div id="historyList">
          <div style="padding:6px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">Henüz kayıt yok</div>
        </div>

        <hr style="border-color:rgba(55,65,81,0.9);margin:6px 0;">

        <label style="font-size:0.7rem;">Proje Kaydet (LocalStorage)</label>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col">
            <input type="text" id="inpProjectName" placeholder="GS Banner Pro v1">
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(129,140,248,0.8);" onclick="saveProject()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i> Kaydet
          </button>
        </div>

        <label style="font-size:0.7rem;margin-top:4px;">Kayıtlı Projeler</label>
        <div id="projectList" style="max-height:120px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:0.7rem;"></div>

        <hr style="border-color:rgba(55,65,81,0.9);margin:6px 0;">

        <label style="font-size:0.7rem;">JSON Dışa / İçe Aktar</label>
        <div class="row">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);" onclick="exportJSON()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> JSON Dışa
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="flex:1;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);" onclick="importJSONPrompt()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-upload"></i> JSON İçe
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
  <main class="main-content">
    <div class="preview-wrapper">
      <div class="top-toolbar">
        <div>
          Önizleme Modu:
          <span class="preview-mode-toggle">
            <button id="btnDark" class="active" onclick="setPreviewTheme('dark')">Dark</button>
            <button id="btnLight" onclick="setPreviewTheme('light')">Light</button>
            <button id="btnNeon" onclick="setPreviewTheme('neon')">Neon</button>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;">
          <div>Canvas Modu:</div>
          <div class="canvas-mode-toggle">
            <span class="canvas-chip active" data-mode="free" onclick="setCanvasMode('free',this)">Serbest</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="avatar" onclick="setCanvasMode('avatar',this)">Avatar 512</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="yt" onclick="setCanvasMode('yt',this)">YouTube 2560x1440</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="disc" onclick="setCanvasMode('disc',this)">Discord 1920x480</span>
            <span class="canvas-chip" data-mode="mobile" onclick="setCanvasMode('mobile',this)">Mobil 1080x1920</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="preview-area" id="bgPreview">
        <div class="bg-image-layer" id="bgImageLayer"></div>
        <div class="bg-pattern-layer" id="bgPatternLayer"></div>

        <div class="canvas-box" id="canvasBox">
          <div class="canvas-bg" id="canvasBg"></div>

          <div class="preview-frame" id="previewFrame">
            <div id="avatarContainer" class="avatar-wrapper avatar-left">
              <img id="avatarImg" class="avatar-img" src="" alt="" style="display:none;">
              <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:2px;" id="textStack">
                <span id="livePrimary">GS Rams</span>
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">
                  <span id="liveSecondary" style="display:none;"></span>
                  <span id="liveBadge" style="display:none;">PRO</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <span id="liveFooter" style="display:none;"></span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CODE -->
    <section class="code-area">
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>HTML</span>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <span style="font-size:0.65rem;">
              <label style="cursor:pointer;">
                <input type="checkbox" id="chkMinimalCss">
                Minimal CSS
              </label>
            </span>
            <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('html')"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeHtml"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="code-box">
        <div class="code-header">
          <span>CSS</span>
          <i class="fa-regular fa-copy copy-icon" onclick="copyCode('css')"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="code-content" id="codeCss"></div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>
</div>

<div id="toast" class="toast">
  <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check" style="color:#22c55e;"></i>
  <span id="toastMsg">İşlem başarılı</span>
</div>

<script>
  const el = (id)=>document.getElementById(id);

  let state = {
    nick:"GS Rams",
    font:"'Montserrat', sans-serif",
    size:48,
    space:0,
    anim:"none",
    animSpeed:"normal",
    fillMode:"solid",
    color1:"#f59e0b",
    color2:"#ec4899",
    textureUrl:"",
    textDecoration:"none",
    fontWeight:"700",
    fontStyle:"normal",
    strokeWidth:"0",
    strokeColor:"#000000",
    shadow:"none",
    backdrop:"none",
    frameStyle:"soft-card",
    radius:22,
    theme:"dark",
    bgImage:"",
    bgPosMode:"center",
    bgSize:"cover",
    bgX:50,bgY:50,
    rotate:0,
    lineHeight:1.1,
    align:"center",
    onlyText:"no",
    pattern:"none",
    particles:"none",
    particleColor:"#ffffff",
    padX:34,padY:26,
    offsetX:0,offsetY:0,
    pngScale:3,
    canvasMode:"free",
    avatarMode:"off",
    avatarUrl:"",
    avatarSize:64,
    avatarBorderMode:"none",
    avatarBorderColor:"#f97316",
    logoPos:"center",

    // Katmanlar
    secondaryEnabled:"no",
    secondaryText:"",
    secondarySize:16,
    secondaryColor:"#e5e7eb",

    badgeEnabled:"no",
    badgeText:"",
    badgeColor:"#f97316",
    badgeBg:"#111827",

    footerEnabled:"no",
    footerText:""
  };

  let history = [];
  let projects = {};

  // Color pickers
  const picker1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker1",{width:90,color:state.color1,layout:[{component:iro.ui.Wheel}]});
  const picker2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker2",{width:90,color:state.color2,layout:[{component:iro.ui.Wheel}]});

  picker1.on("color:change",(c)=>{state.color1=c.hexString;render();});
  picker2.on("color:change",(c)=>{state.color2=c.hexString;render();});

  // INPUT EVENTS
  el("inpNick").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.nick=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selFont").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.font=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selAnim").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.anim=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selAnimSpeed").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.animSpeed=e.target.value;render();});

  el("rngSize").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.size=e.target.value;el("lblSize").innerText=e.target.value+"px";render();});
  el("rngSpace").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.space=e.target.value;el("lblSpace").innerText=e.target.value+"px";render();});
  el("rngRadius").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.radius=e.target.value;render();});
  el("rngRotate").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.rotate=parseInt(e.target.value,10);el("lblRotate").innerText=state.rotate+"°";render();});
  el("rngLineHeight").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.lineHeight=e.target.value/100;render();});
  el("rngPadX").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.padX=parseInt(e.target.value,10);render();});
  el("rngPadY").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.padY=parseInt(e.target.value,10);render();});
  el("rngOffsetX").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.offsetX=parseInt(e.target.value,10);render();});
  el("rngOffsetY").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.offsetY=parseInt(e.target.value,10);render();});
  el("selAlign").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.align=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selOnlyText").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.onlyText=e.target.value;render();});

  el("selFillMode").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.fillMode=e.target.value;toggleFillModeUI();render();});
  el("selPresetGrad").addEventListener("change",e=>{const v=e.target.value;if(!v)return;applyGradientPreset(v);});
  el("inpTexture").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.textureUrl=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selTextDeco").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.textDecoration=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selWeightStyle").addEventListener("change",e=>{
    const [w,fs]=e.target.value.split("|");state.fontWeight=w;state.fontStyle=fs;render();
  });

  el("selStroke").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.strokeWidth=e.target.value;render();});
  el("inpStrokeColor").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.strokeColor=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selShadow").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.shadow=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selBackdrop").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.backdrop=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selFrameStyle").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.frameStyle=e.target.value;render();});

  // Avatar
  el("selAvatarMode").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.avatarMode=e.target.value;render();});
  el("rngAvatarSize").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.avatarSize=parseInt(e.target.value,10);render();});
  el("inpAvatarUrl").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.avatarUrl=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selAvatarBorderMode").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.avatarBorderMode=e.target.value;render();});
  el("inpAvatarBorderColor").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.avatarBorderColor=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selLogoPos").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.logoPos=e.target.value;render();});

  // Katmanlar
  el("selSecEnabled").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.secondaryEnabled=e.target.value;render();});
  el("inpSecondary").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.secondaryText=e.target.value;render();});
  el("rngSecSize").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.secondarySize=parseInt(e.target.value,10);render();});
  el("inpSecColor").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.secondaryColor=e.target.value;render();});

  el("selBadgeEnabled").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.badgeEnabled=e.target.value;render();});
  el("inpBadge").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.badgeText=e.target.value;render();});
  el("inpBadgeColor").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.badgeColor=e.target.value;render();});
  el("inpBadgeBg").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.badgeBg=e.target.value;render();});

  el("selFooterEnabled").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.footerEnabled=e.target.value;render();});
  el("inpFooter").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.footerText=e.target.value;render();});

  // BG / Pattern
  el("inpBgImage").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.bgImage=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selBgPos").addEventListener("change",e=>{
    state.bgPosMode=e.target.value;
    el("bgCustomPosRow").style.display=e.target.value==="custom"?"flex":"none";
    render();
  });
  el("selBgSize").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.bgSize=e.target.value;render();});
  el("rngBgX").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.bgX=e.target.value;render();});
  el("rngBgY").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.bgY=e.target.value;render();});
  el("selPattern").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.pattern=e.target.value;render();});

  // Parçacık
  el("selParticles").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.particles=e.target.value;renderParticles();});
  el("inpParticleColor").addEventListener("input",e=>{state.particleColor=e.target.value;renderParticlesColor();});

  // PNG
  el("selPngScale").addEventListener("change",e=>{state.pngScale=parseInt(e.target.value,10);});

  // Kod
  el("chkMinimalCss").addEventListener("change",generateCode);

  function toggleFillModeUI(){
    const colControls=el("colorControls");
    const texControls=el("textureControls");
    const picker2Col=el("colPicker2");

    if(state.fillMode==="solid"){
      colControls.style.display="block";
      picker2Col.style.display="none";
      texControls.style.display="none";
    }else if(state.fillMode==="gradient"){
      colControls.style.display="block";
      picker2Col.style.display="flex";
      texControls.style.display="none";
    }else{
      colControls.style.display="none";
      texControls.style.display="block";
    }
  }

  function addSym(sym){
    state.nick+=sym;
    el("inpNick").value=state.nick;
    render();
  }

  function autoSplitLines(){
    const text=el("inpNick").value.trim();
    if(!text)return;
    const words=text.split(/\s+/);
    if(words.length<=2)return;
    const mid=Math.ceil(words.length/2);
    const part1=words.slice(0,mid).join(" ");
    const part2=words.slice(mid).join(" ");
    el("inpNick").value=part1+"\n"+part2;
    state.nick=el("inpNick").value;
    render();
  }

  const TEXTURE_PRESETS={
    gold:"https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/gold-scales.png",
    fire:"https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-dark.png",
    galaxy:"https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/dark-matter.png"
  };

  function setTexturePreset(key){
    const url=TEXTURE_PRESETS[key]||"";
    state.textureUrl=url;
    el("inpTexture").value=url;
    state.fillMode="texture";
    el("selFillMode").value="texture";
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
  }

  function applyGradientPreset(key){
    state.fillMode="gradient";
    el("selFillMode").value="gradient";
    toggleFillModeUI();
    switch(key){
      case"sunset":state.color1="#ff7e5f";state.color2="#feb47b";break;
      case"neon":state.color1="#00f5ff";state.color2="#ff00f5";break;
      case"fire":state.color1="#ff512f";state.color2="#f09819";break;
      case"aqua":state.color1="#1cd8d2";state.color2="#93edc7";break;
      case"gold":state.color1="#f6e27a";state.color2="#f2c94c";break;
      case"ghost":state.color1="#e0eafc";state.color2="#cfdef3";break;
    }
    picker1.color.hexString=state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString=state.color2;
    render();
  }
  function applyColorPreset(key){applyGradientPreset(key);}

  function randomName(){
    const p1=["Dark","Ultra","Shadow","Neon","Ghost","Cyber","Royal","Lucky","Crazy","Epic","Omega","Nova"];
    const p2=["Rider","Slayer","Dragon","Wolf","Eagle","Storm","Viper","Cobra","Titan","Phoenix","Sniper","Hunter"];
    const name=p1[Math.floor(Math.random()*p1.length)]+" "+p2[Math.floor(Math.random()*p2.length)];
    state.nick=name;
    el("inpNick").value=name;
    render();
  }

  // Text presetler
  function applyTextPreset(type){
    if(type==="horror"){
      state.font="'Creepster', cursive";
      state.fillMode="gradient";
      state.color1="#ff0000";state.color2="#000000";
      state.shadow="hard";
      state.textDecoration="glow";
      state.anim="shake";
      state.animSpeed="fast";
      state.frameStyle="corner-cut";
      state.size=56;state.space=1;state.rotate=-4;state.align="center";
    }else if(type==="cyber"){
      state.font="'Orbitron', sans-serif";
      state.fillMode="gradient";
      state.color1="#00f5ff";state.color2="#ff00f5";
      state.shadow="neon-double";
      state.textDecoration="none";
      state.anim="float";
      state.animSpeed="normal";
      state.frameStyle="neon-card";
      state.size=52;state.space=3;state.rotate=0;state.align="center";
    }else if(type==="minimal"){
      state.font="'Poppins', sans-serif";
      state.fillMode="solid";
      state.color1="#e5e7eb";
      state.shadow="soft";
      state.textDecoration="none";
      state.anim="none";
      state.frameStyle="soft-card";
      state.size=42;state.space=1;state.rotate=0;state.align="left";
    }else if(type==="royal"){
      state.font="'Black Ops One', cursive";
      state.fillMode="gradient";
      state.color1="#f6e27a";state.color2="#f59e0b";
      state.shadow="neon-main";
      state.textDecoration="underline";
      state.anim="pulse";
      state.animSpeed="slow";
      state.frameStyle="double-border";
      state.size=54;state.space=2;state.rotate=2;state.align="center";
    }else if(type==="pixel"){
      state.font="'Press Start 2P', cursive";
      state.fillMode="solid";
      state.color1="#22c55e";
      state.shadow="hard";
      state.textDecoration="none";
      state.anim="glitch";
      state.animSpeed="fast";
      state.frameStyle="soft-card";
      state.size=32;state.space=2;state.rotate=0;state.align="center";
    }

    el("selFont").value=state.font;
    el("selFillMode").value=state.fillMode;
    el("selShadow").value=state.shadow;
    el("selTextDeco").value=state.textDecoration;
    el("selAnim").value=state.anim;
    el("selAnimSpeed").value=state.animSpeed;
    el("selFrameStyle").value=state.frameStyle;
    el("rngSize").value=state.size;el("lblSize").innerText=state.size+"px";
    el("rngSpace").value=state.space;el("lblSpace").innerText=state.space+"px";
    el("rngRotate").value=state.rotate;el("lblRotate").innerText=state.rotate+"°";
    el("selAlign").value=state.align;
    picker1.color.hexString=state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString=state.color2||state.color1;
    toggleFillModeUI();
    render();
    showToast("Metin preset uygulandı");
  }

  // Layout presetler
  function applyLayoutPreset(key){
    if(key==="logo-center"){
      state.canvasMode="avatar";
      state.logoPos="center";
      state.avatarMode="left";
      state.size=40;
      state.secondaryEnabled="yes";
      state.secondaryText=state.secondaryText||"Official Logo";
      state.footerEnabled="no";
      state.badgeEnabled="yes";
      state.badgeText=state.badgeText||"PRO";
      state.align="center";
      state.offsetX=0;state.offsetY=0;
    }else if(key==="banner-left"){
      state.canvasMode="yt";
      state.logoPos="left";
      state.avatarMode="left";
      state.size=56;
      state.align="left";
      state.secondaryEnabled="yes";
      state.secondaryText=state.secondaryText||"Official Channel";
      state.footerEnabled="yes";
      state.footerText=state.footerText||"youtube.com/...";
      state.offsetX=-10;state.offsetY=0;
    }else if(key==="minimal-text"){
      state.avatarMode="off";
      state.onlyText="yes";
      state.size=54;
      state.align="center";
      state.secondaryEnabled="no";
      state.badgeEnabled="no";
      state.footerEnabled="no";
      state.offsetX=0;state.offsetY=0;
    }else if(key==="double-text"){
      state.secondaryEnabled="yes";
      state.secondaryText=state.secondaryText||"Sub Title";
      state.footerEnabled="no";
      state.badgeEnabled="no";
      state.size=50;
      state.secondarySize=18;
      state.align="center";
    }else if(key==="badge-top"){
      state.badgeEnabled="yes";
      state.badgeText=state.badgeText||"LIVE";
      state.badgeColor="#ef4444";
      state.badgeBg="#111827";
    }
    syncUIFromState();
    render();
    renderParticles();
    showToast("Layout preset uygulandı");
  }

  // Platform presetleri (tema + pattern + canvas)
  function applyPlatformPreset(key){
    if(key==="twitch"){
      setCanvasMode('yt',document.querySelector('.canvas-chip[data-mode="yt"]'));
      state.theme="neon";
      state.pattern="grid";
      applyGradientPreset("neon");
      state.bgImage="";
      state.frameStyle="neon-card";
      state.shadow="neon-main";
      state.secondaryEnabled="yes";
      state.secondaryText="Twitch Streamer";
    }else if(key==="youtube"){
      setCanvasMode('yt',document.querySelector('.canvas-chip[data-mode="yt"]'));
      state.theme="dark";
      state.pattern="noise";
      applyGradientPreset("fire");
      state.frameStyle="soft-card";
      state.shadow="soft";
      state.secondaryEnabled="yes";
      state.secondaryText="YouTube Channel";
    }else if(key==="discord"){
      setCanvasMode('disc',document.querySelector('.canvas-chip[data-mode="disc"]'));
      state.theme="dark";
      state.pattern="dots";
      applyGradientPreset("aqua");
      state.frameStyle="gradient-border";
      state.shadow="neon-double";
      state.secondaryEnabled="yes";
      state.secondaryText="Discord Server";
    }else if(key==="story"){
      setCanvasMode('mobile',document.querySelector('.canvas-chip[data-mode="mobile"]'));
      state.theme="neon";
      state.pattern="none";
      applyGradientPreset("ghost");
      state.frameStyle="glow-border";
      state.shadow="white";
      state.secondaryEnabled="yes";
      state.secondaryText="Story Highlight";
    }
    syncUIFromState();
    render();
    renderParticles();
    showToast("Platform stili uygulandı");
  }

  // Chaos
  function triggerChaos(){
    const randHex=()=>"#"+Math.floor(Math.random()*16777215).toString(16).padStart(6,"0");
    state.color1=randHex();state.color2=randHex();
    picker1.color.hexString=state.color1;picker2.color.hexString=state.color2;

    const fillModes=["solid","gradient","gradient","texture"];
    state.fillMode=fillModes[Math.floor(Math.random()*fillModes.length)];
    el("selFillMode").value=state.fillMode;
    toggleFillModeUI();

    const fontOptions=el("selFont").options;
    state.font=fontOptions[Math.floor(Math.random()*fontOptions.length)].value;
    el("selFont").value=state.font;

    const animOptions=el("selAnim").options;
    state.anim=animOptions[Math.floor(Math.random()*animOptions.length)].value;
    el("selAnim").value=state.anim;

    const speeds=["slow","normal","fast"];
    state.animSpeed=speeds[Math.floor(Math.random()*speeds.length)];
    el("selAnimSpeed").value=state.animSpeed;

    const decos=["none","underline","overline","line-through","double","glow"];
    state.textDecoration=decos[Math.floor(Math.random()*decos.length)];
    el("selTextDeco").value=state.textDecoration;

    const wsOpts=el("selWeightStyle").options;
    const wsVal=wsOpts[Math.floor(Math.random()*wsOpts.length)].value.split("|");
    state.fontWeight=wsVal[0];state.fontStyle=wsVal[1];
    el("selWeightStyle").value=wsOpts[Math.floor(Math.random()*wsOpts.length)].value;

    state.size=Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+30;
    state.space=Math.floor(Math.random()*12)-2;
    el("rngSize").value=state.size;el("lblSize").innerText=state.size+"px";
    el("rngSpace").value=state.space;el("lblSpace").innerText=state.space+"px";

    state.rotate=Math.floor(Math.random()*60)-30;
    el("rngRotate").value=state.rotate;el("lblRotate").innerText=state.rotate+"°";

    const aligns=["left","center","right"];
    state.align=aligns[Math.floor(Math.random()*aligns.length)];
    el("selAlign").value=state.align;

    const strokeVals=["0","1px","2px","3px","4px"];
    state.strokeWidth=strokeVals[Math.floor(Math.random()*strokeVals.length)];
    state.strokeColor=randHex();
    el("selStroke").value=state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value=state.strokeColor;

    const shadows=["none","soft","hard","neon-main","neon-double","white"];
    state.shadow=shadows[Math.floor(Math.random()*shadows.length)];
    el("selShadow").value=state.shadow;

    const backs=["none","soft","strong"];
    state.backdrop=backs[Math.floor(Math.random()*backs.length)];
    el("selBackdrop").value=state.backdrop;

    const frames=["none","soft-card","neon-card","gradient-border","double-border","corner-cut","glow-border"];
    state.frameStyle=frames[Math.floor(Math.random()*frames.length)];
    el("selFrameStyle").value=state.frameStyle;

    state.radius=Math.floor(Math.random()*40);
    el("rngRadius").value=state.radius;

    const patterns=["none","grid","dots","noise"];
    state.pattern=patterns[Math.floor(Math.random()*patterns.length)];
    el("selPattern").value=state.pattern;

    const particleLevels=["none","light","medium","crazy"];
    state.particles=particleLevels[Math.floor(Math.random()*particleLevels.length)];
    el("selParticles").value=state.particles;
    state.particleColor=randHex();
    el("inpParticleColor").value=state.particleColor;

    randomName();
    render();
    renderParticles();
    showToast("FULL CHAOS aktif!");
  }

  function randomTheme(){
    const themes=["dark","light","neon"];
    state.theme=themes[Math.floor(Math.random()*themes.length)];
    setPreviewTheme(state.theme);

    const patterns=["none","grid","dots","noise"];
    state.pattern=patterns[Math.floor(Math.random()*patterns.length)];
    el("selPattern").value=state.pattern;

    const brushes=["sunset","neon","fire","aqua","gold","ghost"];
    const g=brushes[Math.floor(Math.random()*brushes.length)];
    applyGradientPreset(g);

    render();
    showToast("Random theme uygulandı");
  }

  // History
  function saveToHistory(){
    const snap=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state));
    history.unshift(snap);
    if(history.length>8)history.pop();
    updateHistoryUI();
    showToast("Geçici olarak kaydedildi");
  }
  function updateHistoryUI(){
    const list=el("historyList");
    list.innerHTML="";
    if(!history.length){
      list.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:6px 4px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">Henüz kayıt yok</div>`;
      return;
    }
    history.forEach((h,idx)=>{
      const div=document.createElement("div");
      div.className="history-item";
      div.innerHTML=`<span class="history-main">${(h.nick||"").replace(/\n/g," / ")}</span><span class="history-sub">${h.fillMode}</span>`;
      div.onclick=()=>loadFromHistory(idx);
      list.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  function loadFromHistory(i){
    state=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(history[i]));
    syncUIFromState();
    render();
    renderParticles();
    showToast("Geçici kayıttan yüklendi");
  }

  // Projeler (LocalStorage)
  function saveProject(){
    const name=el("inpProjectName").value.trim();
    if(!name){showToast("Proje adı boş olamaz");return;}
    loadProjectsFromStorage();
    projects[name]=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state));
    localStorage.setItem("gsrams_projects",JSON.stringify(projects));
    updateProjectListUI();
    showToast("Proje kaydedildi: "+name);
  }
  function loadProjectsFromStorage(){
    try{
      const raw=localStorage.getItem("gsrams_projects");
      projects=raw?JSON.parse(raw):{};
    }catch{projects={};}
  }
  function updateProjectListUI(){
    const list=el("projectList");
    list.innerHTML="";
    const names=Object.keys(projects);
    if(!names.length){
      list.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:4px;color:#6b7280;">Kayıtlı proje yok</div>`;
      return;
    }
    names.forEach(n=>{
      const row=document.createElement("div");
      row.style.display="flex";
      row.style.alignItems="center";
      row.style.justifyContent="space-between";
      row.style.gap="4px";
      row.style.padding="4px 2px";
      row.style.borderBottom="1px solid rgba(31,41,55,0.8)";
      row.innerHTML=`<span style="cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${n}</span>`;
      const btnDel=document.createElement("button");
      btnDel.className="btn-ghost";
      btnDel.style.borderRadius="6px";
      btnDel.style.border="1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.7)";
      btnDel.style.fontSize="0.7rem";
      btnDel.style.padding="2px 5px";
      btnDel.innerHTML='<i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i>';
      btnDel.onclick=(e)=>{
        e.stopPropagation();
        delete projects[n];
        localStorage.setItem("gsrams_projects",JSON.stringify(projects));
        updateProjectListUI();
        showToast("Proje silindi");
      };
      row.appendChild(btnDel);
      row.onclick=()=>{state=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(projects[n]));syncUIFromState();render();renderParticles();showToast("Proje yüklendi: "+n);};
      list.appendChild(row);
    });
  }
  function loadLastState(){
    try{
      const raw=localStorage.getItem("gsrams_lastState");
      if(raw){
        const obj=JSON.parse(raw);
        state=Object.assign(state,obj);
      }
    }catch{}
  }
  function saveLastState(){
    try{
      localStorage.setItem("gsrams_lastState",JSON.stringify(state));
    }catch{}
  }

  function syncUIFromState(){
    el("inpNick").value=state.nick;
    el("selFont").value=state.font;
    el("selAnim").value=state.anim;
    el("selAnimSpeed").value=state.animSpeed;
    el("rngSize").value=state.size;el("lblSize").innerText=state.size+"px";
    el("rngSpace").value=state.space;el("lblSpace").innerText=state.space+"px";
    el("rngRadius").value=state.radius;
    el("rngRotate").value=state.rotate;el("lblRotate").innerText=state.rotate+"°";
    el("rngLineHeight").value=state.lineHeight*100;
    el("selAlign").value=state.align;
    el("selOnlyText").value=state.onlyText;
    el("selFillMode").value=state.fillMode;
    el("inpTexture").value=state.textureUrl;
    el("selTextDeco").value=state.textDecoration;
    el("selWeightStyle").value=`${state.fontWeight}|${state.fontStyle}`;
    el("selStroke").value=state.strokeWidth;
    el("inpStrokeColor").value=state.strokeColor;
    el("selShadow").value=state.shadow;
    el("selBackdrop").value=state.backdrop;
    el("selFrameStyle").value=state.frameStyle;
    el("rngPadX").value=state.padX;
    el("rngPadY").value=state.padY;
    el("rngOffsetX").value=state.offsetX;
    el("rngOffsetY").value=state.offsetY;
    el("inpBgImage").value=state.bgImage;
    el("selBgPos").value=state.bgPosMode;
    el("selBgSize").value=state.bgSize;
    el("rngBgX").value=state.bgX;
    el("rngBgY").value=state.bgY;
    el("selPattern").value=state.pattern;
    el("selParticles").value=state.particles;
    el("inpParticleColor").value=state.particleColor;
    el("selPngScale").value=state.pngScale;

    el("selAvatarMode").value=state.avatarMode;
    el("rngAvatarSize").value=state.avatarSize;
    el("inpAvatarUrl").value=state.avatarUrl;
    el("selAvatarBorderMode").value=state.avatarBorderMode;
    el("inpAvatarBorderColor").value=state.avatarBorderColor;
    el("selLogoPos").value=state.logoPos;

    el("selSecEnabled").value=state.secondaryEnabled;
    el("inpSecondary").value=state.secondaryText;
    el("rngSecSize").value=state.secondarySize;
    el("inpSecColor").value=state.secondaryColor;

    el("selBadgeEnabled").value=state.badgeEnabled;
    el("inpBadge").value=state.badgeText;
    el("inpBadgeColor").value=state.badgeColor;
    el("inpBadgeBg").value=state.badgeBg;

    el("selFooterEnabled").value=state.footerEnabled;
    el("inpFooter").value=state.footerText;

    picker1.color.hexString=state.color1;
    picker2.color.hexString=state.color2||state.color1;
    toggleFillModeUI();
  }

  function setPreviewTheme(mode){
    state.theme=mode;
    el("btnDark").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnLight").classList.remove("active");
    el("btnNeon").classList.remove("active");
    if(mode==="dark")el("btnDark").classList.add("active");
    if(mode==="light")el("btnLight").classList.add("active");
    if(mode==="neon")el("btnNeon").classList.add("active");
    render();
  }

  function setCanvasMode(mode,chipEl){
    state.canvasMode=mode;
    document.querySelectorAll(".canvas-chip").forEach(c=>c.classList.remove("active"));
    if(chipEl)chipEl.classList.add("active");
    render();
  }

  function renderPattern(){
    const layer=el("bgPatternLayer");
    if(state.pattern==="none"){layer.style.backgroundImage="none";return;}
    if(state.pattern==="grid"){
      layer.style.backgroundImage=
        "linear-gradient(rgba(148,163,184,0.22) 1px, transparent 1px)," +
        "linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(148,163,184,0.22) 1px, transparent 1px)";
      layer.style.backgroundSize="28px 28px";
    }else if(state.pattern==="dots"){
      layer.style.backgroundImage=
        "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(148,163,184,0.35) 1px, transparent 1px)";
      layer.style.backgroundSize="14px 14px";
    }else if(state.pattern==="noise"){
      layer.style.backgroundImage="url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-light.png')";
      layer.style.backgroundSize="auto";
    }
  }

  function clearParticles(){
    const frame=el("previewFrame");
    frame.querySelectorAll(".particle").forEach(p=>p.remove());
  }
  function renderParticles(){
    clearParticles();
    if(state.particles==="none")return;
    const frame=el("previewFrame");
    let count=0;
    if(state.particles==="light")count=6;
    else if(state.particles==="medium")count=12;
    else if(state.particles==="crazy")count=24;
    for(let i=0;i<count;i++){
      const p=document.createElement("div");
      p.className="particle";
      const size=3+Math.random()*6;
      p.style.width=size+"px";p.style.height=size+"px";
      p.style.background=`radial-gradient(circle, ${state.particleColor} 0, transparent 70%)`;
      p.style.left=(Math.random()*100)+"%";
      p.style.top=(Math.random()*100)+"%";
      p.style.animationDelay=(Math.random()*4)+"s";
      frame.appendChild(p);
    }
  }
  function renderParticlesColor(){
    const frame=el("previewFrame");
    frame.querySelectorAll(".particle").forEach(p=>{
      p.style.background=`radial-gradient(circle, ${state.particleColor} 0, transparent 70%)`;
    });
  }

  function getAnimSpeedValue(){
    if(state.animSpeed==="slow")return"3s";
    if(state.animSpeed==="fast")return"1s";
    return"2s";
  }

  function render(){
    const pv=el("livePrimary");
    const sec=el("liveSecondary");
    const badge=el("liveBadge");
    const footer=el("liveFooter");
    const frame=el("previewFrame");
    const bg=el("bgPreview");
    const bgLayer=el("bgImageLayer");
    const avatarImg=el("avatarImg");
    const avatarContainer=el("avatarContainer");
    const canvasBox=el("canvasBox");
    const canvasBg=el("canvasBg");

    pv.textContent=state.nick||" ";

    // Canvas boyutu
    canvasBox.style.width="auto";canvasBox.style.height="auto";
    canvasBox.style.maxWidth="100%";canvasBox.style.maxHeight="100%";
    canvasBox.style.aspectRatio="auto";
    if(state.canvasMode==="avatar"){
      canvasBox.style.width="300px";canvasBox.style.height="300px";
    }else if(state.canvasMode==="yt"){
      canvasBox.style.width="90%";canvasBox.style.aspectRatio="16 / 9";
    }else if(state.canvasMode==="disc"){
      canvasBox.style.width="90%";canvasBox.style.aspectRatio="4 / 1";
    }else if(state.canvasMode==="mobile"){
      canvasBox.style.height="90%";canvasBox.style.aspectRatio="9 / 16";
    }
    canvasBg.style.borderRadius="18px";
    canvasBg.style.border="1px dashed rgba(148,163,184,0.35)";

    pv.style.fontFamily=state.font;
    pv.style.fontSize=state.size+"px";
    pv.style.letterSpacing=state.space+"px";
    pv.style.fontWeight=state.fontWeight;
    pv.style.fontStyle=state.fontStyle;
    pv.style.lineHeight=state.lineHeight;
    pv.style.transform=`rotate(${state.rotate}deg)`;
    pv.style.textAlign=state.align;

    frame.style.setProperty("--anim-speed",getAnimSpeedValue());
    pv.style.setProperty("--anim-speed",getAnimSpeedValue());

    frame.style.transform=`translate(${state.offsetX}px,${state.offsetY}px)`;

    if(state.align==="left"){
      frame.style.alignItems="flex-start";
    }else if(state.align==="right"){
      frame.style.alignItems="flex-end";
    }else{
      frame.style.alignItems="center";
    }

    if(state.onlyText==="yes"){
      frame.style.background="transparent";
      frame.style.border="none";
      frame.style.boxShadow="none";
      frame.style.backdropFilter="none";
      frame.style.padding="0";
    }else{
      frame.style.padding=`${state.padY}px ${state.padX}px`;
    }

    // Text decoration
    pv.style.textDecoration="none";
    if(["underline","overline","line-through"].includes(state.textDecoration)){
      pv.style.textDecoration=state.textDecoration;
    }else if(state.textDecoration==="double"){
      pv.style.textDecoration="underline overline";
    }

    // Stroke
    pv.style.webkitTextStroke=state.strokeWidth==="0"
      ?"0 transparent"
      :`${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor}`;

    // Fill
    pv.style.backgroundImage="none";
    pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip="initial";
    pv.style.webkitTextFillColor="initial";
    pv.style.color=state.color1;

    if(state.fillMode==="solid"){
      pv.style.color=state.color1;
    }else if(state.fillMode==="gradient"){
      pv.style.backgroundImage=`linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip="text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor="transparent";
      pv.style.color="transparent";
    }else if(state.fillMode==="texture" && state.textureUrl){
      pv.style.backgroundImage=`url('${state.textureUrl}')`;
      pv.style.backgroundSize="cover";
      pv.style.backgroundPosition="center";
      pv.style.webkitBackgroundClip="text";
      pv.style.webkitTextFillColor="transparent";
      pv.style.color="transparent";
    }

    // Shadow
    let shadowCSS="none";
    if(state.shadow==="soft")shadowCSS="0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
    else if(state.shadow==="hard")shadowCSS="3px 3px 0 #000000";
    else if(state.shadow==="neon-main")shadowCSS=`0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
    else if(state.shadow==="neon-double")shadowCSS=`0 0 8px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2||"#ffffff"}`;
    else if(state.shadow==="white")shadowCSS="0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)";
    pv.style.textShadow=shadowCSS;

    if(state.textDecoration==="glow"){
      pv.style.textShadow=`0 0 6px ${state.color1}, 0 0 16px ${state.color2||state.color1}`;
    }

    // Animasyon class
    pv.className="";
    if(state.anim && state.anim!=="none"){
      if(state.anim==="rainbow-text")pv.classList.add("anim-rainbow-text");
      else pv.classList.add("anim-"+state.anim);
    }

    // Avatar
    avatarContainer.className="avatar-wrapper "+(state.avatarMode==="right"?"avatar-right":"avatar-left");
    const avatarInput=el("inpAvatarUrl");
    if(state.avatarMode==="off" || !state.avatarUrl){
      avatarImg.style.display="none";
      avatarInput.style.borderColor = state.avatarMode!=="off" ? "#dc2626" : "rgba(55,65,81,0.9)";
    }else{
      avatarImg.style.display="block";
      avatarImg.src=state.avatarUrl;
      avatarImg.style.width=state.avatarSize+"px";
      avatarImg.style.height=state.avatarSize+"px";
      avatarImg.style.border="none";
      avatarImg.style.boxShadow="none";
      avatarInput.style.borderColor="rgba(55,65,81,0.9)";

      if(state.avatarBorderMode==="solid"){
        avatarImg.style.border=`2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor}`;
      }else if(state.avatarBorderMode==="glow"){
        avatarImg.style.border=`2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor}`;
        avatarImg.style.boxShadow=`0 0 10px ${state.avatarBorderColor}`;
      }
    }

    // Frame stil
    if(state.onlyText==="no"){
      frame.style.animation="none";
      frame.style.borderRadius=state.radius+"px";
      frame.style.border="none";
      frame.style.boxShadow="none";
      frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.92)";
      frame.style.clipPath="none";

      if(state.frameStyle==="soft-card"){
        frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
        frame.style.boxShadow="0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border="1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4)";
      }else if(state.frameStyle==="neon-card"){
        frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border=`1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow=`0 0 18px ${state.color1}, 0 0 34px ${state.color2||state.color1}`;
        frame.style.animation="glowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite";
      }else if(state.frameStyle==="gradient-border"){
```
