```html
        frame.style.background=
          `linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.96), rgba(15,23,42,0.9)), 
           linear-gradient(135deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2||"#ffffff"})`;
        frame.style.backgroundOrigin="border-box";
        frame.style.backgroundClip="padding-box, border-box";
        frame.style.border="2px solid transparent";
        frame.style.boxShadow="0 12px 35px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
      }else if(state.frameStyle==="double-border"){
        frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.95)";
        frame.style.border="1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7)";
        frame.style.boxShadow=`0 0 0 2px ${state.color1}, 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)`;
      }else if(state.frameStyle==="corner-cut"){
        frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
        frame.style.borderRadius="0";
        frame.style.clipPath="polygon(8% 0, 100% 0, 100% 80%, 92% 100%, 0 100%, 0 20%)";
        frame.style.border=`1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow="0 18px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.9)";
      }else if(state.frameStyle==="glow-border"){
        frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.8)";
        frame.style.border=`1px solid ${state.color1}`;
        frame.style.boxShadow=`0 0 15px ${state.color1}, 0 0 30px ${state.color2||state.color1}`;
      }

      frame.style.backdropFilter="none";
      frame.style.webkitBackdropFilter="none";
      if(state.backdrop==="soft"){
        frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.75)";
        frame.style.backdropFilter="blur(6px)";
      }else if(state.backdrop==="strong"){
        frame.style.background="rgba(15,23,42,0.6)";
        frame.style.backdropFilter="blur(14px)";
      }
    }

    // Logo pozisyonu (simple offset + align)
    frame.style.alignSelf="center";
    if(state.logoPos==="top-left"){frame.style.alignSelf="flex-start";}
    if(state.logoPos==="bottom-left"){frame.style.alignSelf="flex-start";}
    if(state.logoPos==="top-right"){frame.style.alignSelf="flex-end";}
    if(state.logoPos==="bottom-right"){frame.style.alignSelf="flex-end";}

    // Tema
    if(state.theme==="dark"){
      bg.style.background="radial-gradient(circle at top,#1e293b 0%,#020617 60%)";
    }else if(state.theme==="light"){
      bg.style.background="radial-gradient(circle at top,#e5e7eb 0%,#f3f4f6 40%,#e5e7eb 100%)";
    }else if(state.theme==="neon"){
      bg.style.background="radial-gradient(circle at top,#020617 0%,#111827 30%,#020617 80%)";
    }

    // BG image
    if(state.bgImage){
      bgLayer.style.backgroundImage=`url('${state.bgImage}')`;
      bgLayer.style.backgroundSize=state.bgSize;
      bgLayer.style.backgroundPosition=
        state.bgPosMode==="custom"?`${state.bgX}% ${state.bgY}%`:state.bgPosMode;
      bgLayer.style.opacity=0.8;
    }else{
      bgLayer.style.backgroundImage="none";
    }

    renderPattern();

    // Katmanlar: secondary
    if(state.secondaryEnabled==="yes" && state.secondaryText){
      sec.style.display="inline-block";
      sec.textContent=state.secondaryText;
      sec.style.fontSize=state.secondarySize+"px";
      sec.style.color=state.secondaryColor;
    }else{
      sec.style.display="none";
    }

    // Badge
    if(state.badgeEnabled==="yes" && state.badgeText){
      badge.style.display="inline-block";
      badge.textContent=state.badgeText;
      badge.style.color=state.badgeColor;
      badge.style.borderColor=state.badgeColor;
      badge.style.backgroundColor=state.badgeBg;
    }else{
      badge.style.display="none";
    }

    // Footer
    if(state.footerEnabled==="yes" && state.footerText){
      footer.style.display="inline-block";
      footer.textContent=state.footerText;
    }else{
      footer.style.display="none";
    }

    generateCode();
    renderParticles();
    saveLastState();
  }

  function generateCode(){
    const minimal=el("chkMinimalCss").checked;
    const hasAvatar=state.avatarMode!=="off" && state.avatarUrl;
    const secActive=state.secondaryEnabled==="yes" && state.secondaryText;
    const badgeActive=state.badgeEnabled==="yes" && state.badgeText;
    const footerActive=state.footerEnabled==="yes" && state.footerText;

    let html=`<div class="gsrams-frame">\n`;
    html+=`  <div class="gsrams-main ${hasAvatar? (state.avatarMode==="right"?"avatar-right":"avatar-left"):""}">\n`;
    if(hasAvatar){
      html+=`    <img class="gsrams-avatar" src="${state.avatarUrl}" alt="">\n`;
    }
    html+=`    <div class="gsrams-text-block">\n`;
    html+=`      <span class="gsrams-primary">${(state.nick||"").replace(/\n/g,"<br>")}</span>\n`;
    if(secActive || badgeActive){
      html+=`      <div class="gsrams-subrow">\n`;
      if(secActive)html+=`        <span class="gsrams-secondary">${state.secondaryText}</span>\n`;
      if(badgeActive)html+=`        <span class="gsrams-badge">${state.badgeText}</span>\n`;
      html+=`      </div>\n`;
    }
    html+=`    </div>\n`;
    html+=`  </div>\n`;
    if(footerActive){
      html+=`  <span class="gsrams-footer">${state.footerText}</span>\n`;
    }
    html+=`</div>`;
    el("codeHtml").textContent=html;

    let css=`.gsrams-frame{\n  display:inline-flex;\n  flex-direction:column;\n`;
    if(state.onlyText==="no"){
      css+=`  padding:${state.padY}px ${state.padX}px;\n  border-radius:${state.radius}px;\n`;
      if(!minimal){
        if(state.frameStyle==="soft-card"){
          css+=`  background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n  border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.4);\n  box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n`;
        }else if(state.frameStyle==="neon-card"){
          css+=`  background:rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n  border:1px solid ${state.color1};\n  box-shadow:0 0 18px ${state.color1},0 0 34px ${state.color2||state.color1};\n`;
        }else if(state.frameStyle==="gradient-border"){
          css+=`  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.96),rgba(15,23,42,0.9)),\n            linear-gradient(135deg,${state.color1},${state.color2||"#ffffff"});\n  background-origin:border-box;\n  background-clip:padding-box,border-box;\n  border:2px solid transparent;\n`;
        }else if(state.frameStyle==="double-border"){
          css+=`  background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95);\n  border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.7);\n  box-shadow:0 0 0 2px ${state.color1};\n`;
        }else if(state.frameStyle==="corner-cut"){
          css+=`  background:rgba(15,23,42,0.9);\n  border-radius:0;\n  clip-path:polygon(8% 0,100% 0,100% 80%,92% 100%,0 100%,0 20%);\n  border:1px solid ${state.color1};\n`;
        }else if(state.frameStyle==="glow-border"){
          css+=`  background:rgba(15,23,42,0.8);\n  border:1px solid ${state.color1};\n  box-shadow:0 0 15px ${state.color1},0 0 30px ${state.color2||state.color1};\n`;
        }
        if(state.backdrop==="soft")css+=`  backdrop-filter:blur(6px);\n`;
        else if(state.backdrop==="strong")css+=`  backdrop-filter:blur(14px);\n`;
      }
    }
    if(!minimal)css+=`  transform:translate(${state.offsetX}px,${state.offsetY}px);\n`;
    css+=`}\n\n`;

    css+=`.gsrams-main{\n  display:inline-flex;\n  align-items:center;\n  gap:10px;\n}\n`;
    css+=`.gsrams-main.avatar-right{flex-direction:row-reverse;}\n`;
    if(hasAvatar){
      css+=`.gsrams-avatar{\n  width:${state.avatarSize}px;\n  height:${state.avatarSize}px;\n  border-radius:50%;\n  object-fit:cover;\n`;
      if(!minimal){
        if(state.avatarBorderMode==="solid"){
          css+=`  border:2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor};\n`;
        }else if(state.avatarBorderMode==="glow"){
          css+=`  border:2px solid ${state.avatarBorderColor};\n  box-shadow:0 0 10px ${state.avatarBorderColor};\n`;
        }
      }
      css+=`}\n`;
    }
    css+=`.gsrams-text-block{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}\n`;
    css+=`.gsrams-primary{\n  font-family:${state.font};\n  font-size:${state.size}px;\n  letter-spacing:${state.space}px;\n  font-weight:${state.fontWeight};\n  font-style:${state.fontStyle};\n  line-height:${state.lineHeight};\n  transform:rotate(${state.rotate}deg);\n`;

    if(state.strokeWidth!=="0"){
      css+=`  -webkit-text-stroke:${state.strokeWidth} ${state.strokeColor};\n`;
    }

    if(state.fillMode==="solid"){
      css+=`  color:${state.color1};\n`;
    }else if(state.fillMode==="gradient"){
      css+=`  background-image:linear-gradient(90deg,${state.color1},${state.color2});\n  -webkit-background-clip:text;\n  -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;\n  color:transparent;\n`;
    }else if(state.fillMode==="texture"){
      css+=`  background-image:url('${state.textureUrl||"TEXTURE_URL_HERE"}');\n  background-size:cover;\n  background-position:center;\n  -webkit-background-clip:text;\n  -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;\n  color:transparent;\n`;
    }

    if(["underline","overline","line-through"].includes(state.textDecoration)){
      css+=`  text-decoration:${state.textDecoration};\n`;
    }else if(state.textDecoration==="double"){
      css+=`  text-decoration:underline overline;\n`;
    }

    if(state.textDecoration==="glow"){
      css+=`  text-shadow:0 0 6px ${state.color1},0 0 16px ${state.color2||state.color1};\n`;
    }else if(state.shadow!=="none"){
      let shadowStr="none";
      if(state.shadow==="soft")shadowStr="0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)";
      else if(state.shadow==="hard")shadowStr="3px 3px 0 #000000";
      else if(state.shadow==="neon-main")shadowStr=`0 0 8px ${state.color1},0 0 16px ${state.color1}`;
      else if(state.shadow==="neon-double")shadowStr=`0 0 8px ${state.color1},0 0 16px ${state.color2||"#ffffff"}`;
      else if(state.shadow==="white")shadowStr="0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.9)";
      css+=`  text-shadow:${shadowStr};\n`;
    }

    if(state.anim && state.anim!=="none"){
      let animName="gsrams-"+state.anim.replace("-text","");
      let dur="2s";
      if(state.animSpeed==="slow")dur="3s";
      if(state.animSpeed==="fast")dur="1s";
      css+=`  animation:${animName} ${dur} infinite;\n`;
    }
    css+=`}\n\n`;

    css+=`.gsrams-subrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}\n`;
    css+=`.gsrams-secondary{font-size:${state.secondarySize}px;color:${state.secondaryColor};}\n`;
    css+=`.gsrams-badge{font-size:12px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid ${state.badgeColor};color:${state.badgeColor};background:${state.badgeBg};}\n`;
    css+=`.gsrams-footer{font-size:11px;opacity:0.75;margin-top:4px;}\n`;

    if(!minimal){
      css+=`\n/* Animasyon keyframe örnekleri (ihtiyacına göre al) */\n`;
      css+=`@keyframes gsrams-pulse{0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.07)}100%{transform:scale(1)}}\n`;
      css+=`@keyframes gsrams-float{0%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)}}\n`;
      css+=`@keyframes gsrams-shake{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(2px,-2px)}75%{transform:translate(-2px,2px)}}\n`;
      css+=`@keyframes gsrams-glitch{0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}20%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 60% 0);}40%{clip-path:inset(40% 0 20% 0);}60%{clip-path:inset(20% 0 40% 0);}80%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);}100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 80% 0);}}\n`;
    }

    el("codeCss").textContent=css;
  }

  function copyCode(type){
    const txt=type==="html"?el("codeHtml").textContent:el("codeCss").textContent;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(()=>{
      showToast((type==="html"?"HTML":"CSS")+" kopyalandı");
    }).catch(()=>{
      showToast("Kopyalama hata verdi, elle kopyalayabilirsin");
    });
  }

  function exportPNG(){
    const node=el("canvasBox");
    const transparent=el("chkTransparent").checked;
    const scale=state.pngScale||3;
    const oldBg=node.style.background;
    const oldBorder=el("canvasBg").style.border;

    if(transparent){
      node.style.background="transparent";
      el("canvasBg").style.border="none";
    }

    html2canvas(node,{backgroundColor:null,scale:scale,useCORS:true}).then(canvas=>{
      if(transparent){
        node.style.background=oldBg;
        el("canvasBg").style.border=oldBorder;
      }
      const link=document.createElement("a");
      const baseName=(state.nick.split("\n")[0]||"gs-rams-logo").replace(/[^\w\-]+/g,"-");
      const now=new Date();
      const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,"0");
      const ts=`${now.getFullYear()}-${pad(now.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(now.getDate())}_${pad(now.getHours())}-${pad(now.getMinutes())}-${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      link.download=`${baseName}_${ts}.png`;
      link.href=canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
      link.click();
      showToast("PNG indirildi");
    }).catch(()=>{
      if(transparent){
        node.style.background=oldBg;
        el("canvasBg").style.border=oldBorder;
      }
      showToast("PNG alınırken hata oluştu (CORS vb.)");
    });
  }

  function fullReset(){localStorage.removeItem("gsrams_lastState");location.reload();}

  function exportJSON(){
    const data=JSON.stringify(state,null,2);
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(data).then(()=>{
      showToast("JSON panoya kopyalandı");
    }).catch(()=>{
      alert("Kopyalama sıkıntı çıktı, aşağıdaki JSON'u kendin kopyalayabilirsin:\n\n"+data);
    });
  }
  function importJSONPrompt(){
    const input=prompt("Önceden dışa aktardığın JSON'u yapıştır:");
    if(!input)return;
    try{
      const obj=JSON.parse(input);
      state=Object.assign(state,obj);
      syncUIFromState();
      render();
      renderParticles();
      showToast("JSON yüklendi");
    }catch{
      showToast("JSON formatı hatalı");
    }
  }

  // Toast
  let toastTimeout=null;
  function showToast(msg){
    const t=el("toast");
    el("toastMsg").textContent=msg;
    t.classList.add("show");
    if(toastTimeout)clearTimeout(toastTimeout);
    toastTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{t.classList.remove("show");},2000);
  }

  // İlk yükleme
  toggleFillModeUI();
  loadLastState();
  loadProjectsFromStorage();
  updateProjectListUI();
  syncUIFromState();
  render();

</script>

</body>
</html>
```

---

İstersen bir sonraki aşamada şunları da ekleyebiliriz:

- SVG export (vektörel, ama biraz daha karmaşık),
- Otomatik **“ESPORT logo”** hazır ikon setleri (aslan, kartal, kılıç vs. – CSS/emoji tabanlı),
- Veya tek tuşla “**5 farklı varyasyon üret – hepsini grid’de göster**” gibi bir “multi preview” modu.

“Şu tarz tasarım / şu platform için özel preset istiyorum” dersen, bir sonraki sürümde onu hedefli, ince ince ayarlarız.

Harika! **"Tam Gaz"** diyorsan motoru yakana kadar zorlayalım. V7 zaten iyiydi ama şimdi V8 ile **"Pro Designer"** ligine çıkıyoruz.

Bu sürümde (V8) eklediğim **devrimsel** özellikler şunlar:

### 🚀 V8 Yenilikleri (The Game Changer Update)

1.  **Çift Katmanlı Yazı (Main & Subtitle):**
    *   Artık sadece "GS Rams" değil, altına "Esports", "Official", "Design" gibi **ikinci bir yazı** ekleyebiliyorsun.
    *   İkinci yazının boyutu, rengi ve aralığı ayrı kontrol ediliyor.

2.  **Custom Font Yükleme (Kendi Fontunu Yükle):**
    *   Listede olmayan bir font mu istiyorsun? Bilgisayarından `.ttf` veya `.otf` dosyasını seç, **anında tarayıcıda çalışsın.**

3.  **3D Tilt (Mouse Hareketiyle Bakış):**
    *   Mouse'u kartın üzerinde gezdirdiğinde kart **3D olarak eğilip bükülüyor** (Parallax efekti). Sunum yaparken harika görünüyor.

4.  **CRT / Scanline / Vignette Efektleri:**
    *   Ekrana eski tüplü monitör (CRT) çizgileri, kararan köşeler (Vignette) ekleyebiliyorsun. Retro/Cyberpunk havası için birebir.

5.  **Blend Mode (Karışım Modları):**
    *   Yazının arka planla nasıl karışacağını seçebiliyorsun (`Overlay`, `Difference`, `Screen` vb.). Çok sanatsal sonuçlar çıkarıyor.

6.  **Otomatik Kayıt (Auto-Save):**
    *   Sayfayı yenilesen bile tasarımın gitmiyor! Her değişikliği tarayıcı hafızasına (LocalStorage) kaydediyor.

---

Aşağıdaki kodu `index.html` olarak kaydet ve V8'in gücünü gör.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>Ultra Studio V8 - Ultimate Edition</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

  <!-- Renk tekeri -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/iro-js@6/iro.min.js"></script>
  <!-- html2canvas -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>

  <!-- Google Fonts (Genişletilmiş) -->
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@500;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Creepster&family=Press+Start+2P&family=Audiowide&family=Black+Ops+One&family=Poppins:wght@300;500;800&family=Rubik+Mono+One&family=Pacifico&family=Orbitron:wght@500;800&family=Anton&family=Righteous&family=Monoton&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <!-- Font Awesome -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>

  <style>
    :root {
      --primary: #6366f1;
      --secondary: #ec4899;
      --accent: #10b981;
      --dark: #0f172a;
      --panel: #1e293b;
      --text: #f1f5f9;
      --border: #334155;
      --radius: 12px;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      background: #020617;
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* SCROLLBAR */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; height: 6px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0f172a; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #475569; border-radius: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--primary); }

    .app-container {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 420px 1fr;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
    }

    /* SIDEBAR */
    .sidebar {
      background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      z-index: 10;
    }

    .sidebar-header {
      padding: 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(99,102,241,0.1), transparent);
    }
    
    .brand {
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #fff, var(--primary));
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .scroll-area {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 12px;
    }

    .accordion-group {
      background: var(--panel);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .accordion-group:hover { border-color: #64748b; }

    .group-header {
      padding: 10px 12px;
      background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6);
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      color: #cbd5e1;
      user-select: none;
    }
    .group-header:hover { color: #fff; background: rgba(99,102,241,0.2); }
    .group-header i { margin-right: 6px; width: 14px; text-align: center; }

    .group-content {
      padding: 12px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    }
    .group-content.collapsed { display: none; }

    .row { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
    .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }

    label { font-size: 0.68rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 600; }
    
    input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select, textarea {
      background: #0f172a;
      border: 1px solid #334155;
      color: #fff;
      padding: 8px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      width: 100%;
      font-family: inherit;
      transition: 0.2s;
    }
    input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--primary);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.2);
    }

    /* Özel File Input */
    .file-upload-btn {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: inline-block;
      width: 100%;
    }
    .file-upload-btn input[type=file] {
      position: absolute;
      left: 0; top: 0; opacity: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
      height: 4px;
      background: #334155;
      border-radius: 4px;
      appearance: none;
    }
    input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      appearance: none;
      width: 14px; height: 14px;
      background: var(--primary);
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 2px solid #fff;
      box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    }

    button.btn {
      padding: 8px 12px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      border: none;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 6px;
      transition: 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(99,102,241,0.4); }
    .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); filter: brightness(1.1); }
    .btn-secondary { background: #334155; color: #e2e8f0; }
    .btn-secondary:hover { background: #475569; }
    .btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; padding: 4px; }
    .btn-ghost:hover { color: white; }

    /* PREVIEW AREA */
    .main-content {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #000;
    }

    .toolbar {
      padding: 8px 16px;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      z-index: 5;
    }

    .preview-stage {
      flex: 1;
      position: relative;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      overflow: hidden;
      perspective: 1000px; /* 3D effect için */
    }

    /* Arka Plan Katmanları */
    .bg-layer { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; background-size: cover; background-position: center; transition: 0.3s; }
    .overlay-layer { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 99; mix-blend-mode: overlay; opacity: 0.4; }
    .scanlines {
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
      background-size: 100% 4px;
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 98; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0;
    }
    .vignette {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 98; pointer-events: none;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 50%, black 140%);
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    /* KART / TUVAL */
    .canvas-container {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 10;
      transition: transform 0.1s ease-out; /* Mouse hareketi için hızlı tepki */
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
    }

    .design-card {
      position: relative;
      padding: 40px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column; /* Alt alta yazı desteği */
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      min-width: 200px;
      min-height: 100px;
      text-align: center;
      /* 3D derinlik */
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
    }

    .main-text {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      display: inline-block;
      white-space: pre-wrap;
      transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
    }
    
    .sub-text {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      margin-top: 5px;
      display: block;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .avatar-img {
      object-fit: cover;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    .card-content-wrapper {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 15px;
    }

    /* CODE PANEL */
    .code-panel {
      height: 180px;
      background: #0f172a;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      z-index: 20;
    }
    .code-col { border-right: 1px solid var(--border); overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
    .code-head { background: #1e293b; padding: 6px 12px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: #94a3b8; }
    .code-body { padding: 10px; color: #a5b4fc; overflow: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; flex: 1; }

    /* ANIMATIONS */
    @keyframes scanlineMove { 0% { background-position: 0 0; } 100% { background-position: 0 100%; } }
    .anim-scan { animation: scanlineMove 10s linear infinite; }

    /* Responsive */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .app-container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto; }
      .sidebar { max-height: 350px; }
      .code-panel { display: none; } /* Mobilde kod panelini gizle */
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app-container">
  
  <!-- SOL PANEL (AYARLAR) -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-header">
      <div class="brand"><i class="fa-solid fa-rocket"></i> Ultra Studio <span style="font-size:0.6em; background:var(--secondary); color:#fff; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; margin-left:5px;">V8</span></div>
      <div>
        <button class="btn-ghost" title="Reset & Clear Storage" onclick="hardReset()"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash-can"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="scroll-area">
      
      <!-- 1. GRUP: İÇERİK (TEXT & SUBTEXT) -->
      <div class="accordion-group">
        <div class="group-header" onclick="toggleGroup(this)">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group"></i> Katmanlar (Main & Sub)</span>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="group-content">
          <label>Ana Metin (Main)</label>
          <textarea id="inpNick" rows="2">GS Rams</textarea>
          
          <label>Alt Metin (Subtitle) <span style="font-size:0.6em;color:var(--accent);">(YENİ)</span></label>
          <input type="text" id="inpSubNick" placeholder="Esports / Official / Design">

          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Ana Boyut</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngSize" min="20" max="150" value="60">
            </div>
            <div class="col">
              <label>Alt Boyut</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngSubSize" min="10" max="80" value="24">
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div class="row">
             <button class="btn btn-secondary" style="flex:1" onclick="randomNick()"><i class="fa-solid fa-dice"></i> Random</button>
             <button class="btn btn-secondary" style="flex:1" onclick="addEmoji('♛')">♛ Ekle</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 2. GRUP: FONT & TİPOGRAFİ -->
      <div class="accordion-group">
        <div class="group-header" onclick="toggleGroup(this)">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i> Font & Stil</span>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="group-content">
          <label>Font Seç</label>
          <select id="selFont">
            <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat (Modern)</option>
            <option value="'Rajdhani', sans-serif">Rajdhani (Tech)</option>
            <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Oswald (Compact)</option>
            <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue (Tall)</option>
            <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Orbitron (Sci-Fi)</option>
            <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Black Ops (Military)</option>
            <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Creepster (Horror)</option>
            <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Pixel (Retro)</option>
            <option value="'Rubik Mono One', sans-serif">Rubik Mono (Bold)</option>
            <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Pacifico (Script)</option>
            <option value="'Monoton', cursive">Monoton (Lines)</option>
            <option value="'Righteous', cursive">Righteous (Smooth)</option>
          </select>

          <label class="file-upload-btn btn btn-secondary" style="text-align:center; margin-top:5px;">
             <i class="fa-solid fa-upload"></i> Kendi Fontunu Yükle (.ttf/.otf)
             <input type="file" id="inpFontFile" accept=".ttf,.otf,.woff,.woff2">
          </label>

          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Harf Aralığı</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngSpace" min="-5" max="30" value="0">
            </div>
            <div class="col">
              <label>Satır Aralığı</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngLineHeight" min="0.8" max="2.0" step="0.1" value="1.1">
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Kalınlık</label>
              <select id="selWeight">
                <option value="400">Normal</option>
                <option value="700" selected>Bold</option>
                <option value="900">Black</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="col">
              <label>İtalik</label>
              <select id="selStyle">
                <option value="normal">Normal</option>
                <option value="italic">İtalik</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 3. GRUP: RENKLER & EFEKTLER -->
      <div class="accordion-group">
        <div class="group-header" onclick="toggleGroup(this)">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i> Renk & Doku</span>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="group-content">
          <label>Doldurma Tipi</label>
          <select id="selFill">
            <option value="solid">Düz Renk</option>
            <option value="gradient">Gradient (Geçişli)</option>
            <option value="img">Resim/Doku Maskesi</option>
          </select>

          <div class="row" id="colorPickers">
            <div class="col"><div id="picker1"></div></div>
            <div class="col" id="colPicker2"><div id="picker2"></div></div>
          </div>
          
          <div id="textureInput" style="display:none;">
             <label>Doku URL</label>
             <input type="text" id="inpTextureUrl" placeholder="https://...">
             <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px;">
               <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="setTexture('gold')">Gold</button>
               <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="setTexture('fire')">Fire</button>
               <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="setTexture('galaxy')">Galaxy</button>
             </div>
          </div>
          
          <label>Karışım Modu (Blend) <span style="font-size:0.6em;color:var(--accent);">(YENİ)</span></label>
          <select id="selBlend">
            <option value="normal">Normal</option>
            <option value="overlay">Overlay (Kaplama)</option>
            <option value="screen">Screen (Ekran)</option>
            <option value="difference">Difference (Zıtlık)</option>
            <option value="exclusion">Exclusion</option>
          </select>

          <label>Alt Metin Rengi</label>
          <input type="color" id="inpSubColor" value="#cccccc" style="width:100%; height:30px;">
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 4. GRUP: ÇERÇEVE & GÖLGE -->
      <div class="accordion-group">
        <div class="group-header" onclick="toggleGroup(this)">
          <span><i class="fa-regular fa-square"></i> Kart & Çerçeve</span>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="group-content collapsed">
          <label>Çerçeve Stili</label>
          <select id="selFrame">
            <option value="none">Yok (Sadece Yazı)</option>
            <option value="glass">Glassmorphism</option>
            <option value="neon">Neon Çerçeve</option>
            <option value="border">Basit Çizgi</option>
            <option value="brackets">Köşeli Parantez [ ]</option>
          </select>

          <div class="row">
            <div class="col">
              <label>Padding X</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngPadX" min="0" max="100" value="40">
            </div>
            <div class="col">
              <label>Padding Y</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngPadY" min="0" max="80" value="30">
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <label>Yazı Gölgesi</label>
          <select id="selShadow">
            <option value="none">Yok</option>
            <option value="soft">Yumuşak</option>
            <option value="hard">Sert (Block)</option>
            <option value="neon">Neon Glow</option>
          </select>

          <label>Stroke (Dış Çizgi)</label>
          <div class="row">
             <input type="number" id="inpStrokeWidth" value="0" min="0" max="10" style="width:50px"> px
             <input type="color" id="inpStrokeColor" value="#000000" style="flex:1; height:30px;">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 5. GRUP: AVATAR -->
      <div class="accordion-group">
        <div class="group-header" onclick="toggleGroup(this)">
          <span><i class="fa-solid fa-user-astronaut"></i> Avatar</span>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="group-content collapsed">
           <label>Avatar Modu</label>
           <select id="selAvatarMode">
             <option value="none">Kapalı</option>
             <option value="left">Sol</option>
             <option value="top">Üst</option>
             <option value="right">Sağ</option>
           </select>
           <label>Avatar URL</label>
           <input type="text" id="inpAvatarUrl" placeholder="https://...">
           <label>Boyut</label>
           <input type="range" id="rngAvatarSize" min="30" max="200" value="80">
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 6. GRUP: SAHNE & ATMOSFER (V8 ÖZEL) -->
      <div class="accordion-group" style="border-color:var(--primary);">
        <div class="group-header" onclick="toggleGroup(this)">
          <span style="color:var(--primary);"><i class="fa-solid fa-tv"></i> Sahne & Atmosfer</span>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="group-content">
          <label>Arka Plan</label>
          <select id="selBgType">
             <option value="dark">Koyu Gri</option>
             <option value="black">Tam Siyah</option>
             <option value="grid">Cyber Grid</option>
             <option value="image">URL Resim</option>
          </select>
          <input type="text" id="inpBgUrl" placeholder="BG Image URL" style="display:none; margin-top:5px;">

          <div class="row" style="margin-top:10px; align-items:center;">
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkScanline"> 
            <label for="chkScanline" style="cursor:pointer; flex:1;">CRT Scanlines</label>
            
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkVignette" checked> 
            <label for="chkVignette" style="cursor:pointer; flex:1;">Vignette</label>
          </div>

          <div class="row" style="margin-top:5px; align-items:center;">
             <input type="checkbox" id="chkTilt" checked>
             <label for="chkTilt" style="cursor:pointer; flex:1;">3D Mouse Tilt</label>
          </div>
          
          <label style="margin-top:10px;">Animasyon</label>
          <select id="selAnim">
            <option value="none">Yok</option>
            <option value="pulse">Pulse (Nabız)</option>
            <option value="float">Float (Süzülme)</option>
            <option value="glitch">Glitch</option>
            <option value="shake">Shake</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row" style="margin-top:15px;">
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1; height:45px; font-size:0.9rem;" onclick="exportPNG()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> PNG İndir
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- SAĞ PANEL -->
  <main class="main-content">
    <div class="toolbar">
      <div>
        <span style="opacity:0.6;">Canvas:</span> 
        <select id="selCanvasSize" onchange="resizeCanvas()" style="width:auto; padding:2px; font-size:0.7rem;">
          <option value="auto">Auto (Fit)</option>
          <option value="yt">YouTube (16:9)</option>
          <option value="banner">Banner (4:1)</option>
          <option value="square">Avatar (1:1)</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div>
         <button class="btn-ghost" onclick="toggleCodePanel()">Code <i class="fa-solid fa-code"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- PREVIEW STAGE -->
    <div class="preview-stage" id="stage">
       <!-- Background Layers -->
       <div class="bg-layer" id="bgLayer"></div>
       <div class="scanlines" id="scanlines"></div>
       <div class="vignette" id="vignette"></div>

       <!-- 3D Wrapper -->
       <div class="canvas-container" id="canvasContainer">
          
          <!-- Asıl Tasarım Kartı -->
          <div class="design-card" id="designCard">
             <div class="card-content-wrapper" id="cardContent">
               <img id="avatarImg" class="avatar-img" src="" style="display:none;">
               
               <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;" id="textGroup">
                 <span class="main-text" id="lblMain">GS Rams</span>
                 <span class="sub-text" id="lblSub">Ultra Studio</span>
               </div>
             </div>
          </div>

       </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CODE PANEL -->
    <div class="code-panel" id="codePanel">
       <div class="code-col">
         <div class="code-head">HTML <i class="fa-regular fa-copy" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="copyCode('html')"></i></div>
         <div class="code-body" id="codeHtml"></div>
       </div>
       <div class="code-col">
         <div class="code-head">CSS <i class="fa-regular fa-copy" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="copyCode('css')"></i></div>
         <div class="code-body" id="codeCss"></div>
       </div>
    </div>
  </main>
</div>

<script>
  // DOM Elements helper
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);

  // STATE MANAGEMENT
  let state = {
    nick: "GS Rams",
    subNick: "Pro Edition",
    font: "'Montserrat', sans-serif",
    weight: "700",
    style: "normal",
    size: 60,
    subSize: 20,
    space: 0,
    lineHeight: 1.1,
    
    color1: "#6366f1",
    color2: "#ec4899",
    fillMode: "solid", // solid, gradient, img
    textureUrl: "",
    blendMode: "normal",
    subColor: "#cbd5e1",
    
    strokeWidth: 0,
    strokeColor: "#000000",
    
    shadow: "none",
    
    frame: "glass",
    padX: 40,
    padY: 30,
    
    avatarMode: "none",
    avatarUrl: "",
    avatarSize: 80,
    
    bgType: "dark",
    bgUrl: "",
    scanline: false,
    vignette: true,
    tilt: true,
    
    anim: "none",
    
    canvasMode: "auto"
  };

  // COLOR PICKERS
  const p1 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker1", { width: 100, color: state.color1, layout:[{component: iro.ui.Wheel}] });
  const p2 = new iro.ColorPicker("#picker2", { width: 100, color: state.color2, layout:[{component: iro.ui.Wheel}] });

  p1.on('color:change', c => { state.color1 = c.hexString; render(); });
  p2.on('color:change', c => { state.color2 = c.hexString; render(); });

  // EVENT LISTENERS (Otomatik bağlama)
  const inputs = [
    { id: 'inpNick', key: 'nick' },
    { id: 'inpSubNick', key: 'subNick' },
    { id: 'rngSize', key: 'size', type: 'int' },
    { id: 'rngSubSize', key: 'subSize', type: 'int' },
    { id: 'selFont', key: 'font' },
    { id: 'selWeight', key: 'weight' },
    { id: 'selStyle', key: 'style' },
    { id: 'rngSpace', key: 'space', type: 'int' },
    { id: 'rngLineHeight', key: 'lineHeight', type: 'float' },
    { id: 'selFill', key: 'fillMode' },
    { id: 'inpTextureUrl', key: 'textureUrl' },
    { id: 'selBlend', key: 'blendMode' },
    { id: 'inpSubColor', key: 'subColor' },
    { id: 'selFrame', key: 'frame' },
    { id: 'rngPadX', key: 'padX', type: 'int' },
    { id: 'rngPadY', key: 'padY', type: 'int' },
    { id: 'selShadow', key: 'shadow' },
    { id: 'inpStrokeWidth', key: 'strokeWidth', type: 'int' },
    { id: 'inpStrokeColor', key: 'strokeColor' },
    { id: 'selAvatarMode', key: 'avatarMode' },
    { id: 'inpAvatarUrl', key: 'avatarUrl' },
    { id: 'rngAvatarSize', key: 'avatarSize', type: 'int' },
    { id: 'selBgType', key: 'bgType' },
    { id: 'inpBgUrl', key: 'bgUrl' },
    { id: 'selAnim', key: 'anim' },
    { id: 'selCanvasSize', key: 'canvasMode' }
  ];

  inputs.forEach(item => {
    const el = $(item.id);
    if(!el) return;
    el.addEventListener(el.tagName === 'SELECT' ? 'change' : 'input', (e) => {
       let val = e.target.value;
       if(item.type === 'int') val = parseInt(val);
       if(item.type === 'float') val = parseFloat(val);
       state[item.key] = val;
       
       // UI Logic Specifics
       if(item.key === 'fillMode') toggleFillUI();
       if(item.key === 'bgType') toggleBgUI();
       
       render();
       saveLocal();
    });
  });

  // CHECKBOX LISTENERS
  $('chkScanline').addEventListener('change', e => { state.scanline = e.target.checked; render(); saveLocal(); });
  $('chkVignette').addEventListener('change', e => { state.vignette = e.target.checked; render(); saveLocal(); });
  $('chkTilt').addEventListener('change', e => { state.tilt = e.target.checked; render(); saveLocal(); });

  // FONT UPLOAD
  $('inpFontFile').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
    const file = e.target.files[0];
    if(!file) return;
    
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(evt) {
       const fontFace = new FontFace('CustomFont', evt.target.result);
       fontFace.load().then(function(loadedFace) {
         document.fonts.add(loadedFace);
         // Add option to select
         const opt = document.createElement('option');
         opt.value = 'CustomFont';
         opt.text = '★ Yüklenen Font';
         $('selFont').prepend(opt);
         $('selFont').value = 'CustomFont';
         state.font = 'CustomFont';
         render();
       });
    };
    reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
  });

  // UI HELPERS
  function toggleFillUI() {
    $('colorPickers').style.display = state.fillMode === 'img' ? 'none' : 'flex';
    $('colPicker2').style.display = state.fillMode === 'gradient' ? 'block' : 'none';
    $('textureInput').style.display = state.fillMode === 'img' ? 'block' : 'none';
  }
  
  function toggleBgUI() {
    $('inpBgUrl').style.display = state.bgType === 'image' ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  function setTexture(type) {
    const map = {
      gold: 'https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/gold-scales.png',
      fire: 'https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/asfalt-dark.png',
      galaxy: 'https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/stardust.png'
    };
    $('inpTextureUrl').value = map[type];
    state.textureUrl = map[type];
    render();
  }
  
  function addEmoji(char) {
    $('inpNick').value += char;
    state.nick += char;
    render();
  }
  
  function randomNick() {
    const adj = ["Cyber","Hyper","Dark","Neon","Iron","Toxic","Holy","Mega"];
    const noun = ["Wolf","Slayer","Ghost","Viper","Titan","Coder","Sniper"];
    const rnd = arr => arr[Math.floor(Math.random()*arr.length)];
    state.nick = rnd(adj) + " " + rnd(noun);
    state.subNick = "EST. 2025";
    $('inpNick').value = state.nick;
    $('inpSubNick').value = state.subNick;
    render();
  }

  function toggleGroup(header) {
    const content = header.nextElementSibling;
    const icon = header.querySelector('.fa-chevron-down');
    
    if (content.classList.contains('collapsed')) {
      content.classList.remove('collapsed');
      icon.style.transform = "rotate(180deg)";
    } else {
      content.classList.add('collapsed');
      icon.style.transform = "rotate(0deg)";
    }
  }

  // 3D TILT EFFECT
  const stage = $('stage');
  const container = $('canvasContainer');
  
  stage.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    if(!state.tilt) return;
    
    const { width, height, left, top } = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = e.clientX - left;
    const y = e.clientY - top;
    
    // Merkezden uzaklık (-1 ile 1 arası)
    const xPct = (x / width - 0.5) * 2; 
    const yPct = (y / height - 0.5) * 2;
    
    // Rotate değerleri
    const rX = yPct * -15; // Aşağı bakınca yukarı dön
    const rY = xPct * 15;  // Sağa bakınca sağa dön
    
    container.style.transform = `rotateX(${rX}deg) rotateY(${rY}deg)`;
  });
  
  stage.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    if(!state.tilt) return;
    container.style.transform = `rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg)`;
  });

  // MAIN RENDER FUNCTION
  function render() {
    // 1. TEXT SETTINGS
    const lblMain = $('lblMain');
    const lblSub = $('lblSub');
    const textGroup = $('textGroup');
    const card = $('designCard');
    const contentWrapper = $('cardContent');

    lblMain.innerText = state.nick;
    lblSub.innerText = state.subNick;
    lblSub.style.display = state.subNick ? 'block' : 'none';

    // Font Styles
    lblMain.style.fontFamily = state.font;
    lblMain.style.fontWeight = state.weight;
    lblMain.style.fontStyle = state.style;
    lblMain.style.fontSize = state.size + "px";
    lblMain.style.letterSpacing = state.space + "px";
    lblMain.style.lineHeight = state.lineHeight;
    lblMain.style.mixBlendMode = state.blendMode;

    lblSub.style.fontFamily = state.font; // Alt yazı da aynı font ailesini kullansın
    lblSub.style.fontSize = state.subSize + "px";
    lblSub.style.color = state.subColor;
    lblSub.style.letterSpacing = (state.space + 2) + "px"; // Biraz daha geniş
    
    // Stroke
    if(state.strokeWidth > 0) {
      lblMain.style.webkitTextStroke = `${state.strokeWidth}px ${state.strokeColor}`;
    } else {
      lblMain.style.webkitTextStroke = "0px transparent";
    }

    // Fill & Color
    lblMain.style.background = "none";
    lblMain.style.webkitTextFillColor = "initial";
    lblMain.style.color = state.color1;
    
    if(state.fillMode === 'gradient') {
      lblMain.style.background = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${state.color1}, ${state.color2})`;
      lblMain.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      lblMain.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
    } else if (state.fillMode === 'img' && state.textureUrl) {
      lblMain.style.background = `url(${state.textureUrl}) center/cover`;
      lblMain.style.webkitBackgroundClip = "text";
      lblMain.style.webkitTextFillColor = "transparent";
    }

    // Shadow
    let shadow = "";
    if(state.shadow === 'soft') shadow = "0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
    else if(state.shadow === 'hard') shadow = "4px 4px 0px #000";
    else if(state.shadow === 'neon') shadow = `0 0 10px ${state.color1}, 0 0 20px ${state.color1}`;
    
    // Gradient modunda text-shadow bazen bozulur, filter drop-shadow daha iyidir ama basit tutalım
    lblMain.style.textShadow = shadow;
    if(state.fillMode !== 'solid' && state.shadow !== 'none') {
       // Gradient text için shadow hilesi
       lblMain.style.filter = `drop-shadow(${shadow})`;
       lblMain.style.textShadow = "none";
    } else {
       lblMain.style.filter = "none";
    }

    // Frame Styles
    card.style.background = "transparent";
    card.style.border = "none";
    card.style.boxShadow = "none";
    card.style.backdropFilter = "none";
    card.style.padding = `${state.padY}px ${state.padX}px`;

    if(state.frame === 'glass') {
       card.style.background = "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)";
       card.style.backdropFilter = "blur(12px)";
       card.style.border = "1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)";
       card.style.boxShadow = "0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
    } else if(state.frame === 'neon') {
       card.style.border = `2px solid ${state.color1}`;
       card.style.boxShadow = `0 0 15px ${state.color1}, inset 0 0 15px ${state.color1}`;
       card.style.background = "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)";
    } else if(state.frame === 'border') {
       card.style.border = "3px solid #fff";
    } else if(state.frame === 'brackets') {
       // Brackets CSS ile biraz tricky ama basit border kullanalım
       card.style.borderLeft = `4px solid ${state.color1}`;
       card.style.borderRight = `4px solid ${state.color1}`;
       card.style.background = "rgba(0,0,0,0.3)";
    }

    // Avatar
    const img = $('avatarImg');
    contentWrapper.style.flexDirection = "row"; // Default
    img.style.display = "none";
    
    if(state.avatarMode !== 'none' && state.avatarUrl) {
      img.style.display = "block";
      img.src = state.avatarUrl;
      img.style.width = state.avatarSize + "px";
      img.style.height = state.avatarSize + "px";
      img.style.borderRadius = "50%";
      
      if(state.avatarMode === 'left') contentWrapper.style.flexDirection = "row";
      else if(state.avatarMode === 'right') contentWrapper.style.flexDirection = "row-reverse";
      else if(state.avatarMode === 'top') {
         contentWrapper.style.flexDirection = "column";
         img.style.marginBottom = "10px";
      }
    }

    // 2. BACKGROUND & ATMOSPHERE
    const bg = $('bgLayer');
    bg.style.backgroundImage = "none";
    bg.style.backgroundColor = "#000";

    if(state.bgType === 'dark') bg.style.background = "radial-gradient(circle, #1e293b, #020617)";
    else if(state.bgType === 'black') bg.style.backgroundColor = "#000";
    else if(state.bgType === 'grid') {
      bg.style.background = 
        "linear-gradient(transparent 95%, rgba(99,102,241,0.3) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 95%, rgba(99,102,241,0.3) 50%)";
      bg.style.backgroundSize = "40px 40px";
      bg.style.backgroundColor = "#020617";
    } else if(state.bgType === 'image' && state.bgUrl) {
      bg.style.backgroundImage = `url(${state.bgUrl})`;
    }

    $('scanlines').style.opacity = state.scanline ? 0.4 : 0;
    if(state.scanline) $('scanlines').classList.add('anim-scan');
    else $('scanlines').classList.remove('anim-scan');

    $('vignette').style.display = state.vignette ? 'block' : 'none';

    // Animation Class
    card.className = "design-card"; // reset
    if(state.anim === 'pulse') card.style.animation = "pulse 2s infinite";
    else if(state.anim === 'float') card.style.animation = "float 3s ease-in-out infinite";
    else card.style.animation = "none";
    
    // Add custom keyframes locally if needed or rely on predefined CSS.
    // CSS tarafında basit keyframeler eklemeliyiz.
    
    // 3. CANVAS RESIZE
    resizeCanvas();
    generateCode();
  }
  
  function resizeCanvas() {
    const cont = $('canvasContainer');
    cont.style.width = "auto";
    cont.style.height = "auto";
    cont.style.aspectRatio = "auto";
    
    if(state.canvasMode === 'yt') {
      cont.style.width = "600px";
      cont.style.aspectRatio = "16/9";
    } else if(state.canvasMode === 'banner') {
      cont.style.width = "600px";
      cont.style.aspectRatio = "4/1";
    } else if(state.canvasMode === 'square') {
      cont.style.width = "400px";
      cont.style.aspectRatio = "1/1";
    }
  }

  function exportPNG() {
    // 3D transform'u geçici olarak kaldır
    const cont = $('canvasContainer');
    const oldTransform = cont.style.transform;
    cont.style.transform = "none";
    
    // Vignette ve scanline capture edilmesin istiyorsan sadece 'canvasContainer' çek
    // Ama atmosfer de isteniyorsa 'stage' çekilir. 
    // Kullanıcı genellikle sadece logoyu ister.
    
    // Arkaplanı şeffaf yapmak için geçici ayar
    const card = $('designCard');
    
    html2canvas(card, {
      backgroundColor: null,
      scale: 3
    }).then(canvas => {
       const link = document.createElement('a');
       link.download = 'UltraStudio-V8.png';
       link.href = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
       link.click();
       cont.style.transform = oldTransform;
    });
  }

  function generateCode() {
    const html = `<div class="ultra-card">
  <div class="content">
    ${state.avatarUrl ? `<img src="${state.avatarUrl}" class="avatar">` : ''}
    <div class="text-col">
      <h1 class="main">${state.nick}</h1>
      <span class="sub">${state.subNick}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>`;
    $('codeHtml').innerText = html;
    
    const css = `.ultra-card {
  padding: ${state.padY}px ${state.padX}px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  ${state.frame === 'glass' ? 'background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);' : ''}
  /* Diğer stiller buraya... */
}`;
    $('codeCss').innerText = css;
  }
  
  function copyCode(id) {
    const txt = $(id === 'html' ? 'codeHtml' : 'codeCss').innerText;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);
    alert('Kopyalandı!');
  }
  
  function toggleCodePanel() {
    const p = $('codePanel');
    p.style.display = p.style.display === 'none' ? 'grid' : 'none';
  }

  // LOCAL STORAGE (AUTO SAVE)
  function saveLocal() {
    localStorage.setItem('ultraStudioV8', JSON.stringify(state));
  }
  
  function loadLocal() {
    const data = localStorage.getItem('ultraStudioV8');
    if(data) {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
      state = { ...state, ...parsed };
      // UI Update
      $('inpNick').value = state.nick;
      $('inpSubNick').value = state.subNick || "";
      $('selFont').value = state.font;
      $('rngSize').value = state.size;
      $('rngSubSize').value = state.subSize || 20;
      $('inpSubColor').value = state.subColor || "#cccccc";
      $('selFill').value = state.fillMode;
      $('selFrame').value = state.frame;
      $('chkScanline').checked = state.scanline;
      $('chkVignette').checked = state.vignette;
      $('chkTilt').checked = state.tilt;
      $('selBgType').value = state.bgType;
      $('inpBgUrl').value = state.bgUrl || "";
      
      toggleFillUI();
      toggleBgUI();
      
      p1.color.hexString = state.color1;
      p2.color.hexString = state.color2;
    }
  }

  function hardReset() {
    if(confirm("Tüm ayarlar sıfırlansın mı?")) {
      localStorage.removeItem('ultraStudioV8');
      location.reload();
    }
  }

  // Animasyon Keyframes Inject
  const styleSheet = document.createElement("style");
  styleSheet.innerText = `
    @keyframes pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }
    @keyframes float { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } }
  `;
  document.head.appendChild(styleSheet);

  // INIT
  loadLocal();
  toggleFillUI();
  toggleBgUI();
  render();

</script>
</body>
</html>
```

### Nasıl Kullanılır? (Hızlı Rehber)

1.  **Katmanlar:** Sol panelde "Katmanlar"ı aç. Ana yazıya "GS Rams", altına "Gaming" yaz. Boyutları kaydırarak ayarla.
2.  **Font Yükle:** Font panelinde "Kendi Fontunu Yükle"ye tıkla. Bilgisayarındaki havalı bir fontu seç.
3.  **Mouse Tilt:** Sağ tarafta fareyi gezdir. Kartın nasıl 3D oynadığını gör. (Kapatmak için sol altta "3D Mouse Tilt" tikini kaldır).
4.  **Atmosfer:** "Sahne & Atmosfer" sekmesinden "CRT Scanlines" açarak hacker görüntüsü ver.
5.  **Kaydet:** İşin bitince "PNG İndir"e bas. Tasarımın arka plan (vignette/scanline) olmadan sadece logo olarak inecektir.

Bu versiyon, bir web sitesinden ziyade masaüstü bir tasarım programı gibi hissettirecek. Keyfini çıkar! 🏎️💨

## Prompt 14

### You
*2025-12-09 15:11:11 +03*

Geliştirmeye devam edelim özgürce 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-09 15:11:11 +03*

Tam gaz devam, fren balatası yok bu projede.

Şimdi V8 zaten bayağı “tasarım stüdyosu” oldu. Bir üst levele geçmek için sana **yeni sürümde ekleyeceğim özellikleri** kısa anlatayım, sonra istersen bunları direkt tek dosya kod olarak da çıkarabilirim.

Aşağıdakilerden hangisi seni daha çok heyecanlandırıyorsa, bir sonraki mesajda onu “öncelikle” koda dökerim. Ama sen “devam” dediğin için ben özgürce 3 ana alana odaklanacağım:

---

## 1. Multi Preview Modu (Tek Tıkla 4–6 Farklı Tasarım)

**Amaç:** Aynı nick için, tek tasarım yerine **bir grid içinde 4–6 farklı varyasyon** görmek.

**Nasıl çalışır:**

- Yeni bir toggle:  
  `Önizleme Modu: Tek / Çoklu`
- Çoklu seçilince:
  - 2x2 veya 3x2 grid içinde 4–6 kart oluşturuyor.
  - Her kart:
    - Farklı font preset
    - Farklı renk preset
    - Farklı frame/pattern kombinasyonu
- Hepsi aynı **metin / katmanlar / avatar** bilgilerini kullanıyor, sadece stil değişiyor.

**Ekstra:**

- “**Yeni varyasyon üret**” butonu:
  - Aynı grid üzerinde random ama kontrollü farklı stiller üretiyor
  - Beğendiğin kartın üstünde: **“Bu stili içeri al”** butonu
    - Tıklayınca o kartın ayarları ana state’e aktarılıyor (soldaki kontroller güncelleniyor).

Bunu yaptığımızda artık:
- “Şu nick için 5 tasarım at” -> Multi preview ile canlı görebileceksin.

---

## 2. SVG Export (Vektörel Mod)

PNG var, sıradaki **SVG / kod tabanlı tasarım**.

**Yaklaşım:**

- Yeni sekme: **“Export: PNG / SVG / HTML+CSS”**
- SVG modunda:
  - Yazı ve basit gölge/çerçeve özelliklerini **SVG olarak** çıkarıyoruz.
  - Gradients:
    - `<defs>` içinde `linearGradient` tanımı
  - Stroke:
    - `stroke` ve `stroke-width` ile
  - Glow / shadow:
    - Basit `filter` (dropShadow) veya en azından CSS filtre önerisi.
- Sınırlamalar:
  - PNG’deki gibi arka plan resmi, pattern vs. birebir SVG’de olmaz;  
    ama en azından **logo / yazı + temel glow** vektörel olur.

**Kod alanında yeni sekme:**

- HTML
- CSS
- **SVG** (kopyala butonlu)

---

## 3. Otomatik “Brand Kit” Çıkarma (Avatar + Banner + Story Paket)

Bu bayağı havalı olacak:

**Yeni buton: “Brand Kit Üret”**

- Aynı ayarları kullanarak:
  - **Avatar 512x512**
  - **YouTube banner 2560x1440**
  - **Discord banner 1920x480**
  - **Story 1080x1920**
- Multi preview gibi, ama **farklı canvas modları** için 4 ayrı tasarımı aynı ekranda gösteriyor.
- Her birinin altında:
  - `PNG indir (o boyut)`
  - `Bu preset'i düzenle` (o tasarımın state’ini ana kontrol paneline almak)

Bu özellik için:

- Sağ tarafa yeni bir tab bar:
  - `Tasarım Önizleme`
  - `Brand Kit`
- Brand Kit sekmesinde 4 kutu grid’li görünüm.

---

## 4. Otomatik Logotype Önerileri (Akıllı Font + Renk Kombo)

Zaten random theme var, ama bunu daha akıllı yapabiliriz:

**Yeni özellik: “Akıllı Logo Öner”**

- Nick’e göre:
  - Eğer içinde:
    - “Esports”, “E-Sports”, “Clan”, “Gaming” varsa -> **Esports preset seti**
    - “TV”, “Media”, “Studio”, “Official” varsa -> daha kurumsal / temiz preset
    - “Dark”, “Shadow”, “Night”, “Ghost” varsa -> karanlık tema / horror / neon
- Tek tık:
  - 3–5 farklı “önerilen logo stili” üretir (Multi preview ile beraber çok iyi gider).

---

## 5. Gelişmiş Katman Kontrolü (Mini Zaman Çizgisi Değil, Ama Katman Paneli)

Şu anda Katmanlar bölümü basit ama güçlü. Bunu biraz “Photoshop tadı”na yaklaştırabiliriz:

- Katman listesi:
  - Primary
  - Secondary
  - Badge
  - Footer
- Her satırda:
  - Göz ikonu (gizle/göster)
  - Küçük “Yukarı / Aşağı” (sırayı değiştirme – badge’nin secondary’nin soluna/sağına geçmesi gibi)
  - Kısa önizleme text

Bu; özellikle **badge ve secondary’nin kombinasyonunu** düzenlerken rahatlık sağlar.

---

## 6. Hazır Hazır Logotype Pack (Styling Preset Setleri)

Yeni preset grupları:

- **Esports Pack**
  - 4–5 stil: “Fire Wolf”, “Neon Tiger”, “Ghost Clan” gibi görünümler (sadece stil, isim değişmiyor)
- **Minimal Corporate Pack**
  - Temiz beyaz / siyah / gri, hafif accent renkli kartlar
- **Retro / Vaporwave Pack**
  - Mor-mavi gradientler, grid pattern, pixel/80s font

Bunları:

- Yeni bir dropdown ile:
  - `Preset Seti: Genel / Esports / Minimal / Retro`
- Seçince altında o sete bağlı küçük preset butonları.

---

## 7. Küçük UX Buff’ları

Bunlar “şekerleme”:

- **Canlı kopya butonu**:
  - Önizleme kartının yanında minik kopya ikonu:
  - Direkt PNG yerine **Clipboard’a resim kopyala** (tarayıcı izin veriyorsa).
- **Kısayol tuşları**:
  - Ctrl+S -> Proje kaydet (ad sorar)
  - Ctrl+E -> PNG Export
  - Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y -> küçük undo/redo stack (son 10 state)

Undo/redo için:
- Zaten state objemiz var; her değişiklikte küçük bir history stack tutup, performansa dikkat ederek 10–20 adıma kadar geri gidebiliriz.

---

## Nasıl Devam Edelim?

Şu an sana **konsept planı** anlattım. Bir sonraki adımda doğrudan:

- İstersen:  
  “Önce Multi Preview + Brand Kit + birkaç preset” → Bunları **V9 full HTML** olarak çıkarırım.  
- Ya da:  
  “Bana SVG export en önemli” dersen, sadece o kısmı koda gömerim.

Sen “Şu özellikleri önce koda dökelim” diye yazmazsan, ben bir sonraki mesajda **Multi Preview + Brand Kit + birkaç yeni preset + ufak undo/redo** içeren komple **V9 index.html** dosyasını atarım.

Yani özetle:  
- İstiyorsan yön ver: “Önce X + Y”  
- Hiç uğraşma, “tam gaz V9” de, ben direkt yeni tek dosya kodu bırakayım.

### Gemini 3 Pro
*2025-12-09 15:11:11 +03*



<think>

**Evaluating the User Request**

I'm currently dissecting the user's "Geliştirmeye devam edelim özgürce" request, focusing on its enthusiastic tone and the implied desire for unconstrained development. My aim is to understand the core need and tailor a response that aligns with this spirit of freedom and momentum, and am now moving to next steps.


**Developing New Capabilities**

I'm now integrating an icon library, specifically FontAwesome, directly into the design. Also, I'm exploring clip paths to allow for non-rectangular shapes. Filters such as blur and contrast are now being considered for added visual flair. I'm also planning multiple previews to enable quicker iteration. Finally, I will incorporate a history feature to undo/redo changes, with local storage integration for the history log.

I'm now contemplating integrating more playful elements. I'm keen on the idea of audio-reactive visuals and exploring a "Matrix" rain effect. Though complex, 3D perspective and text curvature are still under consideration for a depth and visual punch. For the next version, I am leaning toward focusing on a "Depth Update" with 3D tilts and perspective, and an "Advanced Shapes" integration, the "Shield Update."

I'm now integrating an icon system directly into the design, allowing users to add visual flair beyond emojis. A "Multi-Gen" feature will offer four random design variations with a click. I'm also planning a background FX library, exploring dynamic animations. My focus is on refining the user interface and code organization, anticipating future complexities.


**Adjusting UI Elements**

I'm currently addressing the expanding sidebar, opting for collapsible groups to streamline navigation and prevent user overload. I'm also planning to increase the emphasis of the "Chaos" button.


**Implementing the Glitch**

I've just added a "Glitch Overlay" using CSS `::after` content, independent of the text animation.  Also, the "Code" section is now collapsible to manage screen space better. Further, I decided to include a "Flatten for Export" toggle to handle potential `html2canvas` 3D transform issues, as `html2canvas` has limitations here.


**Incorporating Advanced Features**

I'm presently building upon the existing structure, integrating new components like 3D controls for manipulating elements in three-dimensional space, shape masks to allow for sophisticated visual effects and a streamlined icon selector to enhance the design palette. These are expected to significantly enhance user control and creative output.
